C: 在星际和平公司的通缉档案里，卡芙卡只留下了名字和「爱好收集大衣」的记录。人们对这位星核猎手所知甚少，只知道她是「命运的奴隶」艾利欧最信任的成员之一。\n为了到达艾利欧预见的「未来」，卡芙卡开始行动。
E: On the Interastral Peace Corporation's wanted list, Kafka's record only shows her name and a note about her "interest in collecting coats." Little is known about this Stellaron Hunter aside from her being one of "Destiny's Slave" Elio's most trusted members. In order to achieve Elio's envisioned future, Kafka gets to work.

C: 她明白，她和母亲是否是合格的义工并不重要。人们只是希望她们出现在这里，仅此而已。 食物分完了，人们也陆陆续续散去，只剩下一个小男孩。他右手有伤，眼神像狼一样，瞪得她有点不爽。 「你也要问我借钱么？」 「我不要钱。我得还刚刚的饭钱，但我现在没钱。」 时常有不认识的「朋友」前来找艾丝妲借钱，但她第一次听到有人要还她钱，惊异地睁大了眼睛。一旁的母亲也忍俊不禁。 「你还是个孩子吧，会干什么？」 「打架。」 「这可不是个好工作——这样吧，我这儿有个工作介绍给你。」 ——时至今日，在艾丝妲心中，阿兰的那顿饭钱，在他说出要还钱的那个时刻，就已经结清了。
E: She knows that it doesn't matter whether she and her mother are reliable volunteers. People just want to see them here. That's all. After apportioning the food, the people disperse one by one, leaving behind a little boy. His right hand is wounded, and his eyes are like that of a wolf as he stares at her in a way she doesn't like. "Are you going to ask me to borrow money?" "I don't want any money. I have to pay back the cost of this meal, but I don't have any money on me." Occasionally, "friends" she never recognizes would come and ask if they could borrow money from Asta. However, it's the first time she actually heard someone offer to pay her back. Her eyes widen in surprise. Listening in, her mother can't help but laugh. "You're still a kid. What kind of work can you do?" "Fight." "That's not a good job. How about this — I'll give you a job." To this day, in Asta's heart, the bill for Arlan's meal was settled the moment he said that he'd pay her back.

C: 年轻的戍卫官站在北方的城垛上。 他俯瞰惨白的无际大地。他见裂界的异形在茫茫雪线中结成翻滚的阴云。他见无畏的铁卫凭城列队立定，仿佛一道坚实的胸墙。 那是他原本的位置。在他尚且是个不起眼的列兵时，便已发誓成为贝洛伯格最坚固的盾牌，应与战友同生共死——哪怕是当上了戍卫官也不例外——这绝非铁卫围炉夜话时的戏言，因那克里珀正是此誓之见证。 然而，此时的他却未能出现在他应至的地点——这正是大守护者的要求。 大守护者究竟是作何考虑？年轻的戍卫官想不明白。不过，他很快就勒令自己将注意力放在眼下的战事上。 「记住，杰帕德•朗道——」 「怀疑生骄慢，怀疑生邪念。作为贝洛伯格的典范，你不应有多余的思考。」 年轻的戍卫官站在北方的城垛上。
E: The young captain stands atop the northern rampart. He surveys the pale wastelands before him, and watches the strange beings from the Fragmentum forming a broiling swarm in the distance amid the snow. He sees the fearless Silvermane Guards lining up in formation to guard the city, like a defensive parapet. That was his original position. Back when he was still a humble private, he'd sworn to serve as Belobog's strongest shield and pledged to live and die with his comrades. This hasn't changed when he became a captain. This isn't some fireside joke of the Silvermane Guards, because Qlipoth is testimony to this oath. However, right at this time, he isn't where he should be — and this is at the request of the Supreme Guardian. What exactly is the Supreme Guardian thinking? The young captain has no idea. But he soon forces himself to focus on the conflict at hand. "Remember, Gepard Landau." "Doubt breeds arrogance, and doubt breeds evil. As a model for Belobog, you shouldn't overthink." The young captain stands atop the northern rampart.

C: 周围火光四起，弥漫的烟尘扰乱了他的视线，嘶吼和惨叫不断传入耳中。机油和血液的气味混杂着袭来，卢卡强忍住呕吐的欲望。 第一次挥出标准的直拳时，奥列格师父脸上的笑意让他备受鼓舞。然而，亲身体会过前线的残酷之后，他再也没能寻回那股温暖的心流。每次列队，他都会打暗中观察战友们的表情——从一张张脸孔上读出的不安反而能稍稍平复他的慌张。 一阵尖叫将卢卡拉回了现实。他冲向声音传来的方向，看到一个无助的孩子被怪物逼到了角落。本能策动他飞身一跃，挡在了利斧与孩子脆弱的身躯之间。 身后传来一声巨响。卢卡一手抱紧惊慌失措的男孩，缓缓转过头来。畸形的怪物瘫倒在地，似乎是被战场上的流弹击中了要害。 「谢…谢谢哥哥……」 「怎么样？你没事吧？」 「哥哥…你…你的手……」 他顺着孩子的手指望向自己的右臂——本应连接着上臂的肩袖处只剩下一截随风飘摆的碎布。碎布之下，血流如注。 但在疼痛夺走他的意识之前，那股暖流重新涌进了他的心房。
E: There is fire all around him, and the thick black smoke makes it hard to see. He keeps hearing screams and screeches as the fused scent of machine oil and blood sweeps over his nostrils. Luka tries hard to push down the urge to vomit. The smile that Oleg wore on his face when Luka swung a perfect straight punch for the first time inspired Luka. However, once the boy had experienced the cruelty of the front lines first-hand, he never regained that warm feeling in his heart. Luka would secretly observe his comrades' expressions every time they lined up for action — and the apprehension he saw on those faces would actually soothe his own anxiety. A scream pulls Luka back to reality. He rushes toward where the sound came from and sees a helpless child being backed into a corner by a monster. Instinctively, he leaps out and puts himself between the sharp ax and the child's fragile form. A loud blast sounds from behind him. Luka hugs the panicked boy with one arm and slowly turns his head. The mutated monster had fallen to the ground, seemingly hit in the vitals by a stray bullet. "Th—Thank you... mister..." "Are you okay? Are you hurt anywhere?" "Mister... your... your arm..." His eyes follow the direction the child is pointing at. The sleeve that should have covered his upper right arm has been reduced to a shred of broken fabric, and blood is pouring out of his severed limb. However, before he faints from the pain, he could once again feel that warmth swelling up in his heart.

C: 他只能见一片殷红，嘴里腥甜，四肢绵软 ——自己应是死了。 怪物再次吞噬了他，但这次他面对的不是别人。 高大的铠甲沉默不语，他被牢牢禁锢在那双手臂中，说话的是戴墨镜的女人。 「听我说，我可以再杀你一遍，否则没法把你带回去。」 她的声音很温柔，连他体内的怪物也安静了下来，听她说话。 「但我不想那么做。」 女人俯下身，在他耳边轻语。那是他无法拒绝的交易。 「你们想要什么？」 「还有比目睹不死之人如何死去更令人高兴的事么？『他』这么说。」 高大铠甲松开了手臂。「命运」已在前方，他会同他们一起走。 「听我说，阿刃，放轻松。」 「听我说，你什么都不要想。」 他点点头，女人走到他身边。她笑着，他却觉得那笑容非常悲伤。 「也许有人离开了她，没有听她说完话。」他想。
E: The only thing he could sense was a splotch of crimson in his sight and the taste of iron in his mouth. His limbs were unresponsive. — He must have died. The monster swallowed him again, but this time, his enemy is not another person. The imposing armor stayed quiet. He was grappled and imprisoned within those pair of arms. The speaker was the woman with sunglasses. "Listen, I can always kill you again, otherwise I can't bring you back." Her voice was very gentle, and even the monster inside his body stayed silent to listen to her. "But I don't want to." The woman leaned down and whispered in his ear. It was a deal he couldn't refuse. "What do you people want?" "Is there anything more satisfying than seeing how the undying die? That's what 'he' said." The giant armor loosened its arms. "Destiny" was ahead, and he will be leaving with them. "Listen, Bladie, loosen up." "Listen, don't think about anything at all." He nodded. The woman walked to his side, smiling. Yet he thought her smile looked very sad. "Maybe someone left her before they could listen to everything she had to say," he thought.

C: 「这故事里的情节和你们仙舟人恰恰相反。」  这个故事来自仙舟之外。故事说，有一个青年人，与神明做交易，祈求自己永生不死。神明实现了他的愿望。他不死，但他的肉体会衰老。他会永恒地衰老下去，承受无尽的苦行。这一切都是因为他妄图获得不会朽坏的肉身。  故事末了，给我讲故事的老人才对我道出如上的感慨。或许，仙舟巨舰在化外民看来就是徜徉星海的极乐宝船——在这里，人们只会以无穷寿量永享天伦之乐，不知衰败寂灭之苦。只是在我看来，状况并非如此。  仙舟人恰恰在经历着永恒的衰老。的确，我像五十岁那年一样精力充沛。我能驾驶着星槎穿过不足两丈宽的峡谷；我能和人连续跳上几个时辰的舞；我还能歌唱——说起来你可能不信，我唱得比长乐天的许多艺人还要好呢。  可惜，我不会再这么做了。我不想再这么做了。它们不再能给我带来任何乐趣。已经没什么能给我带来太多乐趣的事物了。  这就是我们的衰老。这就是所有仙舟住民的衰老。
E: "The plot in this story is just the opposite of Xianzhou natives like yourself." This story came from beyond Xianzhou. The story tells of a young man who made a deal with a deity. He wished to be immortal, to be deathless. The deity granted his wish. He would never die, but his body would continuously weaken and wither eternally. He would carry the burden and sufferance of old age of perpetuity. This was all because he dared to dream about an unchanging flesh. At the end of the story, the old man who told me the story expressed the sentiments above. Perhaps, to Outworlders, the Xianzhou ships are dreamboats of bliss that traverse the ocean of stars, where people will spend their everlasting lifespan in enjoyment of sublime happiness, never knowing the pains of separation, aging, and death. In my opinion, that was not the case. Xianzhou natives are precisely experiencing an eternal deterioration. Sure, I am as energetic as I was when I was fifty years old. I can drive a starskiff through a valley no wider than two yards, I can dance continuously for hours, and I can sing... You may find this difficult to believe, but I can sing better than many of the performing artists in the Exalting Sanctum. Unfortunately, I will not do any of those things again. I do not want to do any of them, as they bring me no enjoyment. Not many things do. Not anymore. This is our deterioration. This is the deterioration of all Xianzhou natives.

C: 小时候，父亲总告诉格妮薇儿，人应当体面地活着。可谁又能在「洪堡特-σ」上体面地活着呢？ 那是个荒芜的行星。原始的藻类、真菌和地衣维系着它勉强能支撑动物生存的大气环境，而在那些坚强繁衍的原生物种中，几乎没有哪一种是对人类没有威胁的。 如果星际和平公司没有发现这颗行星所蕴含的矿产，应该也不会有人想要移居到这里。 格妮薇儿在这颗贫瘠的星球上，度过了整个少女的时代。 她很擅长交朋友，与其他小孩子关系很好。穷苦人的儿子、流亡者的女儿、烂赌鬼的弟弟、杀人犯的妹妹…格妮薇儿并不在乎出身，毕竟无论他们出身于何种家庭，在这颗星球上，都同样不一定能活到明天。 公司对此处的看管并不严格。除却那些身负债务或罪案的倒霉蛋，只要交够了应缴的税款，公司并不会限制工人的自由。只不过，缴清了税款之后，他们甚至未必有余钱去镇上的酒吧喝上一杯。 在故乡时，父亲是一家人最坚实的依靠。如今父亲和故乡都已不在，照护一家人的责任，就落到了唯一的年长者——「石墙骑士」身上。在逃离家园时，母亲强硬地让这位忠诚的老骑士与孩子们一同逃离，自己则留在故土，陪伴荒原的最后一缕尘埃。 老骑士曾是父亲最亲密的玩伴，而后是父亲最勇敢的战友，再来是父亲最忠诚的家臣，现在…他成了孩子们的另一位「父亲」。直到最后，格妮薇儿都没能记住他的真名实姓，她更熟悉骑士的另一个名字——石墙叔叔。 十几个饥饿的孩子，使本就捉襟见肘的经济状况雪上加霜。在某一夜的争吵过后，石墙勉强同意让三个哥哥姐姐同自己一起下矿，但无论格妮薇儿怎么哀求，他也不肯让她同行。 一个个夜晚过去，他变得苍老、憔悴，肺部充满难以愈合的创伤，脊椎再也无法像过去那样挺拔，曾挥舞着动力锤虎虎生风的双手如今扭曲到难以拿稳汤匙。 不久后，他死了。 石墙倒塌了，倒在黎明到来前，没有发出一丝声响。像沙滩上的城堡在潮汐涨落之间消退，像冬日的枯枝在风中轻轻坠地，像注定要到来的结局。 而石墙之外，是只有风雨冰霜的世界。 哥哥们变成星际海盗，是那之后不久的事。格妮薇儿能吃饱饭了，可她也隐约感到，自己进一步违背了父亲的训诫，走向了更加不体面的人生。 所以，当公司的士兵们给格妮薇儿戴上手铐，和弟弟妹妹们一起移交给云骑军的时候，她长舒了一口气。 人们都说仙舟人特别善良，她想，云骑军一定愿意让我们一家体面地死在一起。 …… 谁曾想长兄他一时昏了头，竟劫了艘商船它来自仙舟。 仙舟人刚直嫉恶如仇，有雷霆的手段似风驰雨骤。 长兄他被人剿了匪，降心俯首，只求军爷对我们弟妹高抬贵手。 剿匪的军爷亦是宅心仁厚，将我全家都请回了仙舟。 宽仁了我家长兄的一颗人头，更为了我弟妹的生计苦苦筹谋。 弟妹们进了学宫识文断字，咱这儿的悠姐对我把本事传授。 长兄劝我学完了本事高飞远走，可知恩不报非让人说我不如禽兽。 谁曾想在这金人巷我把能耐展露，从贫苦的儿女到如今那是名利双收。 ……
E: When Guinevere was young, her father always told her that humans should live with dignity. However, who could manage that on Hombert-σ? It was a barren planet. Primitive algae, fungi, and lichen maintained an atmosphere barely able to support animal life. Among the endemic species that stubbornly proliferated in that world, almost all of them existed as genuine threats to humanity. Had the Interastral Peace Corporation not discovered the mineral ores hidden in the heart of this planet, no humans would have wanted to move here anyways. Guinevere passed all of her teenage years on this poverty-stricken planet. She was good at making friends and was on good terms with the other kids. The son of the poor man, the daughter of the refugee, the brother of the gambler, or the sister of the murderer... Guinevere did not care about people's background. No matter what kind of families people are from, they were equally at risk of perishing before the arrival of tomorrow on this planet. The IPC didn't keep a tight eye on this place. Except for those with debts or criminal charges, the IPC didn't limit the workers' freedom as long as they paid their taxes. However, if they did pay their taxes, they might not have enough money left to even buy a drink at the town's bar. Her father was the most reliable backbone of the family back home. Now that both father and home were lost, the duty of looking after the family fell on the shoulders of the only senior in the group — the Stone-Wall Knight. Back when they had to flee their home, the mother sternly demanded that this loyal old knight escape with the children, while she stayed behind in their homeland to watch over the last speck of dust on their barren planet. The old knight was once her father's closest playmate, then her father's most courageous comrade in battle, then her father's most loyal servant. And now... he became another "father" for the children. Guinevere didn't manage to remember his real name even till the end. She was more familiar with the knight's other name — Uncle Stone-Wall. A dozen starving children made their dwindling finances even worse. After a night of arguments, Stone-Wall reluctantly agreed to have the three eldest children go to work in the mines with him. However, no matter how much Guinevere begged, he refused to let her go with them. Night after night passed. Stone-Wall grew old and withered. His lungs became full of incurable scars, and his spine no longer stood as tall as in years past. His hands, once able to swing a kinetic hammer majestically on the battlefield, have been deformed till he could no longer hold a spoon. Soon, he died. The stone wall fell. It fell before the dawn arrived, and it didn't make a single sound. It was like a sand castle receding as the tides swelled and fell, like the soft descent of winter's withered boughs in a breeze, like an ending doomed to arrive. Only a world of hoarfrost exists beyond the stone wall. Her elder brothers soon became interstellar pirates. Guinevere can fill her stomach again. However, she was also faintly aware that she had further strayed from her father's creed and embarked on a life even less respectable. Therefore, when the IPC's soldiers put cuffs on Guinevere and handed her over to the Cloud Knights together with her younger siblings, she breathed a long sigh of relief. People all claim the folks of the Xianzhou are very kind. She thought that the Cloud Knights would definitely allow her entire family to die together in dignity. ... Folly befell my brother's mind. A Xianzhou ship, his raid entwined Those of Xianzhou, just and upright. Thunder and storm, willed in their might. To Xianzhou, my brother offered compliance. For us siblings, he pleaded forbearance. Xianzhou knights, blessed with grace. Xianzhou fleet, we get to embrace. Our brother pardoned, our burdens lessened. To the school, our young'uns go. Teaching skills was my dear Ms. Yo. A future elsewhere, brother urged me to prepare. Gratitude to pay, I chose here to stay. In Aurum Alley I shine. Fame and fortune, I'm fine. ...

C: 「雪衣大人，你这幅身体已经没救了。我…我得把你移进新的偃偶里。这个过程可能会让你有些糊涂，你忍一忍。」 在她与冥差藿藿之间，类似的对话已重复了不知多少次。她也一如往常应对，「谢谢。这回请挑个结实的。」 她看见藿藿的狐耳摆了摆，是在表达丧气的情绪吗？她不知道。她的眼睛虽然可以看见，但没有辨认情绪的能力…或许，这不是眼睛的问题。 「我已经把最好的、最硬的、最灵敏的零件全都塞进雪衣大人的身体了，但您的负伤率和损坏率还是部里最高的…问字部的匠作们都开始埋怨了。」 「等你拼好吾，吾就……」 「…你就给他们一人脑袋上『轻轻』敲一下对吧？」一个熟悉的声音来到四分五裂的她身旁。「他们还是血肉凡胎，受不住你的玩笑。」 垂下的长发覆盖在她的脸上，她的人造肌肤传来一阵扰动信号。女人俯瞰的脸从各自独立的五官凑成了一张教她无比熟悉、亲切的脸。 「姐姐，机巧之身总会让人产生自己金刚不坏的错觉。但我却要用还阳的假日，抵扣这次你身体的超前损坏。盼你下次执行使命时记住了，你还有个妹妹会为你担心。」 「记住了。」 「再不行的话，就得让藿藿把这一条写在你的脑海里…啊不用，藿藿，我开玩笑的。我相信姐姐会记住。」 「那雪衣大人，我们准备开始了。」 她感到自己被切开，被复制，分裂成数千份，被上传到十王司万千回路之中—— 一瞬间，她翻过因果殿中无数刻录简牍，在惊鸿一瞥仙舟人的灵魂全貌后又忘之阙如。 下一瞬间，她进入周遭金人勾魂使的身躯，体会金铁身躯的刚强和玉兆中难以动摇的意志。 她长出一千只眼睛，用机巧鸟的翅膀和视线俯瞰星槎海下的人流…… 她生就一千张耳朵，听到无穷个频段中波形的变化与尖啸…… 她的一千只手在冥差身上书写业判，一千只脚在陌生的街道上紧追慢赶…… 她明白自己此刻只在十王司的玉兆回路中，但她又感到自己无处不在，渐渐消散…… 「姐姐…姐姐！」 熟悉的声音再次出现，超乎声纹波形之外，一个回忆牢牢禁锢住了她。白衣判官脑海一阵恍惚。
E: "Madam Xueyi, this body of yours is beyond salvation. I... I have to move you into a new puppet now. This process may leave you a little confused. Please bear with me." Similar conversations had been exchanged between her and Huohuo the spiritfarer over and over again. She responded the same as always, "Thank you. This time, please pick something sturdy." She saw Huohuo's foxy ear twitch — was it out of frustration? She knew not. Her eyes could see, but they had no capacity for recognizing emotion... And maybe this was through no fault of her eyes. "I've packed all the best, hardest, and most flexible parts into Madam Xueyi's body, but your rates of injury and damage are still the highest in the division... The craftsmen of the Interrogation Division have started to grumble." "Once you put me together, I will..." "... Just give each of them a 'light' tap on the head, okay?" A familiar voice came beside her as she lay at sixes and sevens."They are still flesh and blood, and cannot stand your jokes." Long hair drooped down to cover her face, and a disturbance signal emitted from her artificial skin. The woman's face looking down had each independent feature combined into a new one that was both extremely familiar yet also kind to her. "Sister, having an ingenium body will always lull you into a false sense of invulnerability. However, I have to use the remaining days of reanimation to offset premature damage to this body of yours. I hope you can remember during your next mission that you've still got a sister out there who cares about you." "I remember." "Otherwise, you'll have to get Huohuo to write this line into your mind... Ah, just kidding, Huohuo. No need for that. I trust my sister can remember it." "So Madam Xueyi, let's begin." She felt herself being sliced open, copied, split into a thousand pieces, and uploaded into millions of circuits housed at the Ten-Lords Commission. When... In a flash, she shuffled through countless documents inscribed in the Hall of Karma and then, after a fleeting glimpse at all the souls of the Xianzhou, the memory vanished. Moments later, she entered the body of a nearby aurumaton spectral envoy, feeling both the strength of the metal body alongside the unshakable will of the jade abacus. She has one thousand pairs of eyes, watching over the people of Starskiff Haven with the wings and sight line of a cycrane... She has one thousand ears, scanning the changing waves and pitches among the infinite possible frequencies... Her one thousand hands write handwritten judgments on the spiritfarer's body, and her one thousand feet give chase over unfamiliar avenues... She knows that she's only inside the jade abacus circuitry of the Ten-Lords Commission, but she feels as though she were everywhere and gradually fading away... "Sister... sister!" A familiar voice rang out again beyond the waveform of the voiceprint, and she was trapped fast inside a memory. The white-robed judge was left befuddled.

C: 在丹鼎司跟随云华学习的那段时间，是她一生中最为充实愉快的岁月。 就像一尾嗅觉灵敏的小蛇，她穿梭于异香扑鼻的药草之中，研究来自不同星球的奇特生物。魔阴身的起源，丰饶孽物的本质，缓解魔阴发作的丹药…每一项课题，都令她流连忘返，痴迷许久。每一日有每一日的进益，每一日有每一日的欢喜。 当她沉浸在药香与玄想之中时，丹鼎司的局势已然悄然变得风云诡谲。 经历数十个日夜上天彻地的内部监察后，争斗的浪潮终于波及到了司鼎云华。 一纸令下，云华被剥夺司鼎之位，废为庶人。 其实在这之前，她也并非没有闻到过奇怪的味道。 龙师们的窃窃私语，丹鼎中陌生的丹药香味，师父收到某人神秘的讯息后连夜前往幽囚狱…但当她发现这些事情的关联后，一切都太晚了。 她向丹鼎司的前辈求援，平日里慈眉善目的师长为下任司鼎之位斗红了眼，她收到的只有冷漠的回复与警告。 她投书上诉，但一而再，再而三，她收到的只有一模一样的文书。 但她绝不相信，那位时时刻刻以病人安危为己任的司鼎会做出伤天害理的事情。 就在她再一次忍不住与人争辩时，云华不知何时走来，轻轻地拍了拍她的肩。 「丹朱，不必替我辩白…我倦了，离开也好。」 她追上师父，没有再说一句话，某种气味已然充斥了她的鼻腔 ——那是阴谋的味道。
E: The years that she spent studying under Yunhua were the most fulfilling and joyous of her life. She would flitter through vials of strange herbs like a snake with a keen nose and research strange creatures from other planets. The origin of mara, the true essence of the Abominations of Abundance, medicinal pellets that eased the onset of mara... Each new research topic led her further into this fascination and caused her a lifelong obsession. Every day brought new progress and new joy. However, in the time that she had become immersed in fragrance and fantasy, the Alchemy Commission had silently grown unstable and treacherous. After dozens of days and nights of internal surveillance, the waves of war finally spread to immerse Cauldron Master Yunhua. With a single order, she was stripped of her role as Cauldron Master and made a commoner. Actually, she had smelt this strange scent coming. The whisperings of the Preceptors, the aroma of unknown medicinal pellets around the Alchemy Commission, the nights her master had spent going to and from the Shackling Prison after receiving a mysterious message... But by the time she noticed how these things were all related, it was too late. She sought help from her superiors in the Alchemy Commission, but her usually kind-hearted seniors had grown envious of the previous Cauldron Master and she received only cold responses and warnings. She made an official appeal, over and over, but received the same response every time. However, she just could not bring herself to believe that the Cauldron Master who had devoted herself wholeheartedly to the wellbeing of her patients would do anything unreasonable. Just as she could not repress the urge to argue her master's case once more, Yunhua appeared from nowhere and gently patted her on the shoulder. "Dan Zhu, there is no need for you to plead my innocence anymore... I am exhausted, I don't mind leaving this place." She chased after her master, but before she could say another word, she caught a whiff of a strange scent... The scent of a conspiratorial plot.

C: 斯缇科西亚，醉与梦的海滨之城，旧日的歌声仍在浮浪间回荡。\n大海的女儿海列屈拉，清洗「海洋」火种的黄金裔，驱散污浊的暗流，为天外的英雄奏响不醉不归的盛宴\n——散场之时未到，纵然希望如泡沫般易碎，浪花也将一往无前。
E: Styxia, the coastal city of intoxication and dreams, where echoes of old songs still drift among the waves.\nHelektra, Daughter of the Sea, Chrysos Heir who cleanses the Ocean's Coreflame, dispels the murky undercurrents and orchestrates a banquet of revelry for the heroes beyond the sky.\nThe show must go on. Even if hope is as fragile as bubbles, the waves will keep surging forward.

C: 卡芙卡受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，弱点击破状态下受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Kafka takes less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken in Weakness Break state.

C: 迷离人心的虚言
E: Confusing Lies

C: 你踏上星穹列车，结识了一群志不同道不合的同伴，好在他们的态度都还算友善。\n一段不知终点的星间流浪之旅即将开启，或许你真的在不经意间把自己卷进了某部科幻电影的拍摄片场。\n根据列车长帕姆的通报，「跃迁」即将开始——鉴于你还是个星际穿越新手，最好还是找个地方坐稳扶好吧。
E: You board the Astral Express and become acquainted with a group of companions who may not always get along, but are all at least friendly.\nA journey with an unknown destination between the stars is about to begin. Maybe you really did accidentally stumble upon some set of a Sci-Fi movie.\nConductor Pom-Pom announces that the warp jump is about to begin — seeing that you're still new to interstellar travel, best you find a seat and hang on tight.

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 你不得不佩服桑博的油嘴滑舌。要不是丹恒不吃这一套，你们三人恐怕又要吃哑巴亏了。\n在丹恒的威逼下，桑博终于提出要将你们引荐给「地火」。\n你不清楚「地火」具体是怎样的组织，但听多了这地下的街谈巷议后，你凭本能觉得他们极有可能了解指向星核的线索…
E: You have to give credit to Sampo — no one can be quite the con man as he is. If it weren't for Dan Heng, the three of you would fall for Sampo's silver tongue again.\nSampo finally agrees to introduce all of you to Wildfire, thanks to Dan Heng's... persuasion.\nYou have no clue what Wildfire is up to, but judging from word on the street, you have a feeling that Wildfire may have leads on the Stellaron...

C: 矿区风波暂告一段落。「地火」首领奥列格为报答各位无名客的支援，他同意与你们合作，并为你们安排了合适的住处。\n不过，上一次在大人物安排下入住旅店、随后被人反手捅一刀仿佛就发生在昨天。\n不知道现在返回列车，向帕姆索要绊线地雷还来得来不及…
E: Peace has at long last returned to the mines. Oleg, chief of Wildfire, has agreed to work with you to show his gratitude towards you, the Nameless, for your support. He has arranged your accommodation.\nSpeaking of accommodation, the last time you got invited to stay by someone important and then got backstabbed does not seem too long ago.\nMaybe it's not too late to go back to Pom-Pom and ask for some tripwire mines...

C:
你早有物资会被人捷足先登的预感，可你没能想到这是熟人干的好事。
好吧，其实也不太熟…但你们至少见过一面——四舍五入的话，你已经是克拉拉的家人了。
就在你询问克拉拉出现在这里的理由时，希儿和布洛妮娅终于结束她们的谈话，来到了你们面前。
来得早不如来得巧，问问大家接下来作如何打算吧。
E:
You've had the feeling that someone has gotten to the supplies before you but you didn't think it'd be someone that you were close with.
Okay, maybe not that close... but you've at least met her before — you're technically family to Clara now.
Seele and Bronya finally end their conversation and approach the two of you just as you are asking Clara about her reason for being here.
Perfect timing, now it's time for everyone to figure out what to do next.

C: 你和同伴击退裂界生物，保证了克拉拉的安全。你本想借此机会说服克拉拉将大家带到史瓦罗面前，可惜她是个比三月七更透彻、更坚持自己信念的孩子…因此，这次交涉以失败告终。\n但是，这次交流也并非没有收获：你们觉察到了或许能令她和史瓦罗松口的突破口——接下来，只需找到克拉拉重新交涉即可。\n你在电梯上看到了她闪过的背影——抓兔子的时间到了，快追！
E: You and your companions defeated the Fragmentum organisms and secured Clara's safety. You wanted to take the opportunity to persuade Clara into bringing you to Svarog, but she has a firmer and clearer conviction than March 7th... Your persuasion ended in failure.\nHowever, all is not lost. You've noticed a breakthrough that could make her and Svarog talk — all you have to do now is to find Clara and revisit the conversation.\nYou catch a glimpse of her while in the elevator — it's time for a rabbit hunt. Go after her!

C:
行星的真相已近乎明朗：席卷行星的巨大浩劫肇始于星核。
历任守护者对此皆心知肚明却全无办法，只好选择罗织谎言，使城市和她的子民能够在这虚假的片刻安宁中继续苟延残喘。
——但这并不能彻底解决问题。你非常清楚：只有摧毁星核，这颗星球和贝洛伯格才能重回正轨，而你们的列车也可再度踏上旅途。
将你的想法与同伴分享，并讨论决定接下来的行动吧。
E:
The truth of the planet is almost clear: The great calamity that ravaged the planet originated from the Stellaron.
The past Guardians have known about this but could do nothing about it. In the end, they chose to lie so that the city and its people could continue to live on the brink of desperation in this fabricated momentary peace.
But this does not solve the problem. You are well aware that only by destroying the Stellaron can this planet and Belobog return to their correct path, and enable the Express to embark on its journey.
Share your thoughts with your companions and decide on your next moves.

C: 你们与邓恩的交涉堪称轻松写意：堂堂铁卫队长被各位打到昏迷、生死未卜，而你们拿到了解锁能源中枢大门的密钥。\n整个禁区的铁卫闻讯纷纷赶来，现在的你们只要像对付邓恩那般对付其他人即可。\n还等什么？快去解锁能源中枢大门吧！
E: Your encounter with Dunn turns out to be easy indeed: You knock the dignified Silvermane Captain out cold and acquire the encryption key that unlocks the gate to the energy hub.\nThe Silvermane Guards from the entire restricted zone rush over to the scene. All you have to do now is make them join Dunn.\nWhat are you waiting for? Go and unlock the gate to the energy hub!

C: 布洛妮娅捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。\n这位年轻守护者的继任仪式即将开始，你们早早就来到了永冬铭碑前等待宣讲。\n时间尚早，找地方休息片刻，享受下贝洛伯格罕见的悠闲时光吧。
E: Bronya sent news that the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld is about to lift after more than a decade.\nThe succession ceremony for the young Guardian is about to start. You arrive at the Everwinter Monument early to wait for the speech.\nThe time is still early. Find somewhere to rest and enjoy a rare moment of respite in Belobog.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶入星穹深处。\n少女的心思犹如三月春风飘忽，等闲变却风向。在投出关键一票后，列车即将奔赴下一站：仙舟「罗浮」。\n不知为何，丹恒坚持留在车上。于是这一次的开拓，只能由你、三月和瓦尔特先生来完成了。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe heart of a maiden is as flighty as a spring breeze, easily changing its direction. After casting your important vote, the Express will head towards its next destination: The Xianzhou Luofu.\nFor some reason, Dan Heng insists on staying on the train, meaning that March 7th, Mr. Yang, and you are the three who will complete the trailblaze journey this time.

C: 得知你们为星核而来，停云邀众人前往司辰宫通传来意。\n仙舟之上，六司各掌其职。在这敏感时刻，你们若想在罗浮上自由行动，便须取得司掌航行与外交的天舶司长官，驭空的首肯。
E: Knowing that you came for the Stellaron, Tingyun invites everyone to the Palace of Astrum for a meeting.\nSix individual commissions oversee the Xianzhou. If you wish to move freely on the Luofu during these sensitive times, you must obtain the approval of the Head of the Sky-Faring Commission, Yukong, who is in charge of transport and diplomacy.

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 尽管你入梦的方式实在不够体面，星期日和知更鸟还是给予了你无微不至的关怀…好吧，他们本来就该这样。\n重新抖擞精神的你与三月七取得了联系，她推荐你前往「梦境贩售店」——你或许可以把它当做美梦之旅的第一站。
E: Though the way you entered the dream was less than desirable, Sunday and Robin made sure you received the utmost care... Fine. That was what they should have done anyway.\nHaving refreshed your spirits, you and March 7th received a message recommending you head to the Dreamscape Sales Store... Perhaps you can consider this the first stop on your wondrous dream journey.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n打开宝箱后你才发现有数道大门环绕四周——也许你可以利用其中一扇大门离开这里。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nOnly after you have opened the chest do you discover several great doors surrounding you... Perhaps you can use one of these doors to leave this place.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n黑天鹅认为情况或许比想象中的更严重，你们应当尽快赶到烙印着流萤痕迹的那片忆域才是。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nBlack Swan believes that the situation may be even more serious than she imagined. You must hurry to the Memory Zone branded with traces of Firefly as quickly as possible.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 你们成功抵达「苏乐达™盛会海选•热砂分会场」。梦想成为大明星的人们聚集于此，展开激烈的闯关竞争，目标是成为唯一的「盛会之星」。作为「盛会海选」的赞助方，苏乐达™的元素充斥着整个区域：街边布置着难以细数的饮料广告和招牌，苏乐达™瓶形状的建筑与雕塑亦是随处可见。\n可惜，现在不是悠闲游玩的时候——绷紧神经，使出全力，想办法速通这座苏乐达游乐园吧！
E: You successfully made it to the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions in Scorchsand Hall. Those who dream of becoming huge stars gather here and compete in a ferocious competition in hopes of becoming the one and only "Festive Superstar." As the sponsor of the Festivity Auditions, the entire venue is covered in SoulGlad™ memorabilia: Beverage advertisements and billboards litter every square inch of the streets, and buildings and statues in the shape of SoulGlad™ bottles surround you as far as the eye can see.\nUnfortunately, this is not the time to be having fun and playing games... Steel your nerves, use all your strength, and think of a way to speed around this SoulGlad amusement park!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 抱着九分怀疑和一分缥缈的侥幸，流萤登上了「晖长石号」。\n她来这里是为了寻找传闻中的「慈玉典押」，听说那是一家能实现任何人心愿的典当行。\n为了活下去，星核猎手选择暂时相信这个传说。
E: Mostly harboring suspicion but with a sliver of hope, Firefly boards the Radiant Feldspar. \nShe's here to find the rumored Bonajade Exchange, which is said to be a pawn shop that can grant anybody's wishes.\nIn order to survive, the Stellaron Hunter chooses to believe this legend — for now.

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，而「晖长石号」也基本被你扫荡一空……\n什么，你说没有参与感？好吧，距离开幕式其实还有一段时间，你不妨再到处转转，累了再找个座位等待典礼开幕吧。
E: The Charmony Festival is about to begin, and you've pretty much completely cleared out the Radiant Feldspar...\nWhat, you said you wanted a sense of participation? Well then, there's still a while before the opening ceremony commences. You may as well take a stroll around. Find a seat if you're tired and hold tight for the opening ceremony.

C: 自称芮克先生的考官让测弦考试变成了他的「试镜会」，这名头听上去比之前更令普通人紧张，毕竟面试的压力永远是最大的。但你应该不会因此退却吧，盛会巨星？\n这位导演看起来挺奇怪的，但据说如今宇宙院线<unbreak>80</unbreak>％的影片都由人工智能生产，不是有怪癖的天才可能也干不了这行。
E: The examiner, known as Mr. Reca, has transformed the Tuning Test into his audition session. This may heighten anxiety for many, given the inherent stress associated with interviews. But such a scenario won't deter you, our Festive Superstar, right?\nThe director may appear a bit eccentric, but in a universe where <unbreak>80%</unbreak> of movies are AI-generated, maybe only geniuses with eccentricities can manage to stay in the industry.

C: 虽然这个导演哥们不喜欢猴子，但说的话和喜欢猴子的小可爱一样爱兜圈子。没办法，谁叫你的同僚总是一群不说人话的家伙呢？等你修好了联觉信标，得好好教教大家什么叫有话直说。\n先看看他准备的礼物吧，要是效果不好，就给他的电影打差评。
E: So, this director bro isn't too keen on monkeys, but he sure beats around the bush just like those shirthead monkey lovers. Can't blame them, because your colleagues never really got the hang of talking plain human language. Once you've fixed your Synesthesia Beacon, you'll teach them how to talk like a straight shooter.\nSee what gift he's got lined up, and if it's a dud, feel free to roast his movies in bad reviews.

C: 没有任何告别能一帆风顺——按照猎犬家系成员的说法，这里似乎发生了一些异常，并且，很可能与某种被扭曲过的余音有关…\n就让他们给万维克一个面子，进入艾迪恩公园调查此事吧。
E: No farewell ever goes smoothly... According to the Bloodhound Family members, something unusual has occurred here. What's more, it is likely connected to some kind of distorted Afterechoes...\nLet's have Wonweek pull some strings and head to Aideen Park to investigate.

C: 我们与被称作黄金裔的翁法罗斯人发生了初次接触，并跟随两位黄金裔进入神殿进行探索。他们声称来此是为了营救难民，但是在难民中似乎发生了冲突。
E: We had initial contact with the people of Amphoreus known as the Chrysos Heirs, then followed two of them into the Temple to explore. They claimed their purpose here was to rescue the refugees, yet there seemed to be tension and strife among the people.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 如今瑟希斯的火种就在你的胸中，这意味着阿格莱雅迟早会为了逐火之旅将它取出。届时，因火种死而复生的你将会怎样也不难猜到。\n为了求生，也为了求索，你需要寻找既能够保全自己、又能对抗阿格莱雅等人的力量——元老院的使者已经等待你多时了。
E: Now, the Coreflame of Cerces resides in your chest, which means that Aglaea will eventually extract it for the Flame-Chase Journey. It's easy to guess what will happen to you, who the Coreflame had revived.\nTo survive, and to seek, you need to find a power that can protect you and combat Aglaea and others — The messenger from Council of Elders has been waiting for you for a long time.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 圣城陷入永夜，混乱令人不安，而距火种尽数归还也仅剩一步，危机下，完成「再创世」恐怕是我们唯一的选择。取回刻法勒的火种后，我们将立刻赶往创世涡心。
E: Evernight has descended upon the holy city, bringing disturbing chaos in its wake. With just one final Coreflame to return, completing the "Era Nova" may be our only choice in this crisis. After retrieving Kephale's Coreflame, we will immediately head to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 盗火行者再次出现在我们面前，这意味着…\n去吧，{NICKNAME}，去帮助白厄，完成「再创世」！
E: The Flame Reaver stands before us once more, which can only mean...\nGo now, {NICKNAME}, help Phainon complete the "Era Nova"!

C: 盗火行者再次出现在我们面前，这意味着…\n去吧，{NICKNAME}，去帮助白厄，完成「再创世」！
E: The Flame Reaver stands before us once more, which can only mean...\nGo now, {NICKNAME}, help Phainon complete the "Era Nova"!

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
E: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

C: 大家都在音符小姐的结界里看到了什么，你就不好奇吗？
E: Aren't you curious what everyone saw inside Miss Note's Zone?

C: 你们很强吗？强有什么用？匹诺康尼讲的不是打打杀杀，是人情世故。
E: You think you're tough? So what? Penacony isn't about fists and firepower. It's about people and connections.

C: 你已知悉翁法罗斯的往日，如今，你要改写它的明天。该如何与命运的伟力抗衡？你身旁的伙伴与同行的智者，一定能驱散疑虑的阴云。
E: You have seen the past of Amphoreus. Now, you shall shape its future. How will you stand against the weight of destiny? The companion beside you and the sages who walk with you will definitely clear the clouds of doubt.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 退场歌已经奏响，剧目将近尾声…但在此之前，沉默无言的观众将会为你献上掌声，庆贺你完成了这场悲剧，庆贺你将走向下一场悲剧。\n走向他渴望的悲剧。\n将观众逐出神话的剧场，或是让这场剧目成为万物的绝唱。
E: The music for the curtain call has begun to play, and the show nears its end... But before that, the silent audience will offer you their applause, celebrating your completion of this tragedy, commemorating your path toward the next tragedy.\nToward the tragedy he yearns for.\nEither banish the audience from this mythical theater, or let this performance become the swan song of all creation.

C: 退场歌已终。你要亲手用火种烧尽台下无人的剧场，再亲手拉开下一场序幕——又是荒唐的悲剧，还是荒诞的喜剧？这一切仅有前进才得以窥见，身后万物都将迎来又一次退场。\n但无需遗憾，无需留连，因为世代如落叶，英雄亦如是。
E: The curtain call music has ended. You must use the Coreflame to burn down this empty theater, then raise the curtain for the next act. Will it be an absurd tragedy, or a preposterous comedy? Only by moving forward can we glimpse what lies ahead, while everything behind us faces another final bow.\nBut there's no need for regret or lingering attachment, for generations fall like leaves, and so, too, do heroes.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

C: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
E: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 站内向来通过一架电波中继器收发银河讯号，它坐落于怪物驻守的失地，临近名为嘘实埋间的标志性舱室。如今通讯中断，第一要务自然是保证中继器不掉链子。
E: The station has been sending and receiving cosmic signals through an airwave repeater located in the lost territory guarded by monsters. It's been recently known as the signature cabin of the Disposal Site. With communications cut off, the most important task is naturally to ensure that the repeater is functional.

C: 就在你打算将《剧本》与《告罪书》交还给希拉的关头，却发现古恩抢先一步接管希拉的治疗，封锁了医疗舱。
E: You decide to give the character script and the confession letter to Sheila, but Gunn seals off the Medical Cabin and is now in charge of Sheila's treatment.

C: 怪物清缴完毕，向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Monster elimination complete, report to Asta remotely

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德似乎依旧忧心忡忡……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have finally abated, but Leonard still looks concerned...

C: 你收到了帕姆的短信，列车大扫除之日竟然这么快就要来了！帕姆似乎非常激动，等准备好了就去列车看看吧。
E: Pom-Pom messages you: The big spring cleaning day aboard the Express is coming really soon! Pom-Pom seems really excited. Go to the Express to check it out once everything's ready.

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n情况似乎比你们想得更加复杂……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nThings are starting to become trickier than you thought...

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n找到了公司的混蛋。小扑满挺有用的。该出手了。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFound the IPC's rascals. Little Trotter was pretty useful. Time to smash.

C: 矿车工老师傅似乎为你准备了新的谜题——去问问他准备的如何了吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator seems to have prepared a new puzzle. Go and inquire about his preparation

C: 马虎的犯人在盗取矿脉探测器的时候遗落了货箱标签，而虎克知道这些物资箱子在哪里。\n你已经感觉到你们离真正的犯人越来越近…早知道这么顺利，一开始就应该来调查失窃地点。
E: The clumsy culprit left the packaging label when they stole the vein detector. Hook knows where these packages are.\nYou feel that you're getting closer to the culprit... You would have gone to the scene of the crime in the beginning had you known about this.

C: 即便知道自己可能拍不到地髓探针，虎克大人还是决定把探针还给拍卖会。走吧，她的决心已定。\n熊孩子总是随口就说一些无足轻重的谎言，但在这种时候，她的心还是像金子一样。
E: Although Hook knows she might not get the Geomarrow Probe, she decides to return it to the auction. You know that she has made up her mind.\nThis child may have told a few white lies over trivial matters, but she has a heart of gold.

C: 回到原处，你却发现佩拉出现在了茉莉本该在的位置上。交换信息过后，你得知佩拉正在追查与次品机器人相关的腐败案件，而茉莉极有可能遇到了危险。\n茉莉的同事告诉了你们茉莉的住址——你们或许可以在那里找到茉莉。
E: When you return, you find Pela taking Molly's place. After talking to her, you learn that Pela is investigating a corruption case related to those defective robots, and Molly is likely to be in danger.\nMolly's colleagues tell you her address, where you might find her.

C: 陶德向你讲述了自己的心愿，他现在只想体验一些孩童应有的快乐。你答应了他买小吃的幼稚要求。
E: Todd tells you about his wish. He just wants to experience the happiness that children deserve. You agree to his childish request to buy a snack.

C: 你还是决定将「黛青小姐」带去地衡司自首。至此，「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相已经昭然，将它汇报给艾丝妲，希望这些情报对温符瑞的外驻有一些参考作用吧。
E: You decide to bring "Ms. Daiqing" to the Realm-Keeping Commission to turn him in. At this point, the truth about the Foxian Beauty Chat has come to the surface, and it will be reported to Asta. Hopefully, this information will be of consideration for Wen Furui's transfer request.

C: 在三月七的翻译下，你们得知这谛听自流云渡码头某处发现了可疑线索。原来不是埋藏的宝藏啊…你内心长叹一声，再给你一次选择的机会，你肯定不会对那只小狗招手。而眼下，你只有去流云渡跑一趟了……
E: With March 7th's translation, you understand that the Diting found some strange clues in the Cloudford dock. Not a buried treasure... You sigh wordlessly. If you can do it over, you wouldn't have beckoned to the puppy. Looks like you're on a trip to Cloudford now...

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 带着可爱的小谛听，你踏上属于自己的寻羊冒险记。
E: With the cute little Diting, you embark on your sheep-hunting adventure.

C: 你们，是的，就你们俩抵达了荒弃已久的绥园。大部分恐怖片里，主角总喜欢不知死活、不问人数多寡地闯进有着闹鬼传闻的荒园。但凡他们停下来思考一番，那之后的种种故事都不会发生了。\n一路上桂乃芬尽职尽责地给你讲起绥园被荒废的历史…顺带拍下不少瘆人的素材。你不禁感慨，网络主播混口饭吃确实不容易，得在这么阴森的地方忍住拔腿就跑的冲动像个采访凶杀案的记者般拍个不停。这儿确实像个会闹鬼的地方，但鬼…鬼在哪儿呢？
E: You two — yes, only you two — arrive at the long-abandoned Fyxestroll Garden. The protagonists in most horror movies always like to brashly break into derelict buildings that are rumored to be haunted, completely disregarding all safety concerns and bringing in only a small party. If only they stopped to think things over, then none of the stories that follow would ever have happened.\nOn the way over, Guinaifen diligently recounts for you how Fyxestroll Garden ended up getting abandoned... all the while shooting plenty of spooky footage along the way. You can't help but feel it's actually quite hard for internet influencers to make a living, especially if they have to keep taking photos while resisting the urge to run away from such an ominous place, like a reporter at a homicide scene. This place really does feel as though it's haunted... Where, then, are the ghosts?

C: 在浮烟的指引下，你在幻境中找到一篇怪异的话本残篇。其中讲述了许久之前罗浮将军与岁阳的故事，而其中行文似有所指，暗含着你勘破幻境的方法。
E: Through Cirrus' guidance, you discover a ripped page from a bizarre story recounting events surrounding the heliobi and the Luofu's general from centuries ago. Its writing style seems to hint at a way to see through the illusory maze.

C: 此刻陈放在黑天鹅面前的，毫无疑问，是一个垃圾桶。一个贝洛伯格款式的垃圾桶。你本该对这一幕感到惊讶，但你没有。你早就见怪不怪了。这份见怪不怪的淡定，使你感到自己有些沧桑。
E: What stands before Black Swan in this moment is undoubtedly a trashcan. A Belobogian-style trashcan. This sight is supposed to shock you, but it does not. You have seen many strange things on your journeys. This sense of being unfazed by the bizarre makes you feel like you have really gained some life experience.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 为了应对呼雷垂死一击，天击将军不得不全力应对那轮高悬于天的「赤月」，她仿佛堕入旧日的战场，展开永无尽头的厮杀。欲解除疯狂，唯一的良方仅有「拖延」二字。
E: In response to Hoolay's dying blow, the Merlin's Claw has no choice but to use everything in her power to confront the Crimson Moon hanging in the sky. As though she had returned to the battlefields of yore, she initiates a bloody massacre that has no end in sight. There is only one way to bring her out of madness: Stall for time.

C: 猎犬家系提到了莱斯利•迪恩入住的酒店房间号：<unbreak>1007</unbreak>。\n莱斯利•迪恩希望你能回到现实，进到他的房间一探究竟。
E: According to the Bloodhound Family, Lesley Dean is staying in room <unbreak>1007</unbreak>.\nLesley Dean wants you to investigate his room in reality.

C: 店长柯柯娜似乎缺少了某种重要的情绪，试着和钟表小子一起将其修补完整吧。
E: The shopkeeper Cocona appears to be lacking a crucial mood. Try to restore it to its completion together with Clockie.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 「湛蓝爵士」的真实名字就是奥尔拉，去看看过去究竟还发生了些什么。
E: Dr. Blues' real name is Orla. Go and see what else had happened in the past.

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n朱明仙舟的怀炎将军、云璃姑娘已经到达港口，灵砂大人似乎也在…送别就应该这么热闹。\n别惦记着你的剑了，彦卿。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nGeneral Huaiyan and Miss Yunli of the Xianzhou Zhuming have arrived at the port. It seems that Master Lingsha is here, too... This is the excitement you'd expect from a proper farewell.\nDon't forget your sword, Yanqing!

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n为了交到朋友，他想出了一个策略——策略的第一步是为他拍摄一张照片。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe has a plan to make more friends, and the first step is to have a photo taken.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n悠闲的老人似乎想要修好手机……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe leisurely senior wants to fix his phone...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 击败「历战余响」中出现的强敌，获取奖励
E: Defeat the formidable foe in the Echo of War and claim the rewards.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 车厢的加湿器坏了，帕姆需要你帮忙洒水，以维持车厢内的湿度。
E: The humidifier in the car is broken, Pom-Pom needs you to sprinkle water to maintain the humidity in the car.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 机巧鸟栖木似乎遭人蓄意破坏，正不断用高频音波吸引附近的丰饶孽物。\n你得击败聚集在栖木下的丰饶孽物，才能操纵机巧鸟。
E: The cycrane roost seems to have been deliberately altered, and is currently emitting high-frequency sound waves that attract Abominations of Abundance.\nYou need to defeat the Abominations of Abundance gathered under the roost before you can reach the cycrane.

C: 这些坏家伙利用丹鼎司的地形四处逃窜，但有机巧鸟这双「天空之眼」，你一定能轻而易举地抓住他们。
E: These villains are scurrying everywhere, taking advantage of Alchemy Commission's layout. However, with the "eyes in the sky" offered by the cycrane, you will definitely be able to catch them.

C: 黑潮无情地从普通人身上碾过，不留下一丝怜悯。然而，这似乎无法解释…它为何如此「高效」？
E: The black tide runs over mortals ruthlessly without a shred of mercy, but that doesn't seem to be enough to explain why it's so... "efficient."

C: 事情尘埃落定。你们付出了一些代价，终究还是守住了这里。赶来支援的卫兵接管了防卫事务，去问问他们情况吧，也别忘了问候问候柯库翁。
E: The dust has settled. You paid a price, but you managed to hold the area. The reinforcements have taken over security duties. Ask them about the situation and don't forget to check in with Glykon.

C: 你已经知道了，这名叫斐第斯的士兵，就是帮助过希瑞雅的守卫叔叔。面对他已经牺牲的事实，你要如何满足孩子们的心愿呢？
E: You now know that the soldier named Phedes was the guard who once helped Serena. Now that he has sacrificed himself, how will you fulfill the children's wish?

C: 看来你被卷入了一场奇妙的游戏，再去和伦纳德谈谈，听听他有什么建议吧。
E: Looks like you got involved with a fantastical game. Go talk with Leonard again and listen to what he has to say.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了才华横溢的希露瓦。代她们前往机械屋「永动」，了解希露瓦是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the talented Serval. Head to the Neverwinter Workshop in their stead, and see whether Serval is interested in the position.

C: 在西衍先生的故事当中，「龙尊大人」带着你辗转于罗浮各处，寻找锻造神兵利器的诸多材料…这下彻底变成喜闻乐见的寻宝故事了。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the "high elder" takes you to many places in the Luofu to look for the various materials needed to forge the divine weapon... Now this is truly a stereotypical treasure-seeking adventure story.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，你自告奋勇要担任「推广大使」，可得肩负起责任。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." As you have volunteered to be the "Promotional Ambassador," you must be able to bear the responsibilities of your duties.\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 小秘书正式通知你，金人巷商会在你的帮助下顺利完成这一阶段的营收目标，并且会将部分收入用在码头修缮上。她还在高阿姨那里订了不少小吃，去好好享用吧。\n虽然小秘书没有明说，请你把这些小心思当作一个阶段完成的奖励吧。
E: Miss Secretary has officially informed you that, with your help, the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild has successfully achieved their revenue goal for this phase, and will spend part of the revenue on dock maintenance and renovations. She also ordered plenty of snacks from Tall Auntie for you to enjoy.\nThough Miss Secretary didn't state it directly, you should take this as a reward for helping everyone reach the revenue target for this phase.

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 乔瓦尼先生说，只有完成每个决胜乐园的试炼、取得资格徽章才可以参加庆典赛事。\n抵达决胜乐园之后要做些什么呢？不如去问问万能的乔瓦尼先生吧。
E: Mr. Giovanni says you can only participate in the matches in the festival by completing trials in every Victory Zone and obtain Mastery marks.\nWhat should you do after reaching a Victory Zone? Why don't you ask the omnipotent Mr. Giovanni.

C: 观众们的热情已达巅峰。天空为鼓，大地也随之震颤。是时候迎接你的冠军之战了。
E: The fervor of the audience has reached a fever pitch. The sky thunders akin to a drum, and so too does the land tremble in accordance. It is time for you to come forth and battle to become champion.

C: 黑塔让你去空间站找她商量要事，这次她似乎与另外三位天才俱乐部会员对模拟宇宙做了些点，呃，小小的疯狂改造。你很期待究竟发生了什么……
E: Herta wants you to go the space station to discuss important business. This time, Herta and the three other members of the Genius Society made some... um... tiny, renovations to the Simulated Universe. You are very much looking forward to seeing what happened...

C: 考虑到你们手中已扣留一名岁阳犯人，你们决定充分利用，争取将它转作污点证人，为你们提供情报。\n孰料浮烟竟然趁势提出条件，它想与罗浮将军决斗一场，以餍其心。
E: Since you have already captured a heliobus criminal, you decide to get as much value out of it as possible. You will try to flip it so as to provide evidence for you.\nUnexpectedly, Cirrus takes the opportunity to present terms. It wants to duel with the general of the Luofu to consume the latter's mind.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 这幽府武弁果然没有看上去那么简单，好在她并不敢造次，在你的监督下，她静静地讲述着这一切的始末……
E: It turns out the Wraith Warden has her own hidden stories. Thankfully, she does not dare to stir up trouble. Under your watchful gaze, she slowly recounts the truth behind everything...

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 既然帖子指向了流云渡的「十三号货柜」就去调查看看吧。\n不过，总感觉事情并非如此简单。
E: Since the post points to Locker No. <unbreak>13</unbreak> in Cloudford, go investigate it.\nHowever, you keep feeling things aren't as simple.

C: 狂热的粉丝为了与桂乃芬见面，多次用假情报骗桂乃芬到实地调查…\n说真的，想见面就告诉桂乃芬吧，按她的性格，根本不需要这些弯弯绕。\n听听桂乃芬怎么说。
E: The fanatical fan used fake information to trick Guinaifen to investigate on-site many times, just so they can meet her...\nSeriously, just let Guinaifen know if you want to meet her. With her personality, there's no need to jump through so many hoops.\nListen to what Guinaifen has to say.

C: 为「阮•梅」造物们打造的休息区已建好，小家伙们对你竖起了大拇指——如果它们能做得到的话…现在该去验收下你的劳动成果咯！
E: The resting area for Ruan Mei's creations has been built, and the little ones are giving you a thumbs up... if they can do that. Now it's time to check out the fruits of your labor!

C: 你在剪辑工作中得到了一份「外传胶片」，和动画师一起把它变为精彩的外传影片吧。
E: While editing, you obtained a roll of film for an extra story. Turn it into an exciting Extras movie with the animator.

C: 艾迪恩为你准备了一份定制礼物，但似乎发生了小小的意外，去找他聊聊吧。
E: Aideen has prepared a custom gift for you, but an accident has transpired. Go and speak with him.

C: 前往终点，前方或许就有答案。
E: Head to the finish line. Answers may lie ahead.

C: 在碰撞的思想中种下一朵花，等待它在未来发芽。
E: Plant a flower among the collision of ideas and wait for it to sprout in the future.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与青雀一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向青雀寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Qingque during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Qingque for some advice.

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n尽管还有乐队成员没能成功劝服，但演出仍然要继续，当务之急是完成要演奏的曲目。为了帮助乱破进行创作，你必须收集到足够的作曲灵感。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThough some band members remain unconvinced, the show must go on. The most urgent thing right now is to finish the piece you need to perform. You need to collect enough inspiration to help her with composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n几位乐队成员似乎有话想对你说，去排练室门外看看究竟是什么事吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe band members seem to want to say something to you. Head outside the rehearsal room to see what's going on.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n你和财富学院代表达成了赌约——若是乐队未能在他到达舞台前开始演出，所有成员都会遭到开除。等待乱破归来的这段时间里，和现场观众聊聊吧。或许…事情还会有转机。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nYou and the Fortune Academy representative made a wager: If the band cannot start their performance before he reaches the stage, then all members will be expelled. As you wait for Rappa to turn, chat with the audience. Perhaps... things might take a turn for the better.

C: 「金杯终破碎」——金、金杯呢？\n替换奖杯以避开预言的计划似乎出了纰漏，本该被赝品替换的奖杯竟不翼而飞。这到底是怎么回事？
E: "The golden trophy shatters." Wh—Where's the golden trophy?\nThe plan to swap the trophy and avoid the prophecy seems to have gone awry — the trophy that was supposed to be replaced with a replica has vanished without a trace. What is going on?

C: 大家都在忙着为宴会做准备，你和昔涟当然也不能闲着，去看看有什么能帮忙的。\n就先用美味的菜品把桌面摆满吧！
E: Everyone's busy preparing for the feast, so you and Cyrene certainly can't just sit around. Go see what you can help out with.\nLet's start by filling the table with delicious dishes!

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 坐到沙发上，等待跃迁开始
E: Sit on the sofa and wait for the warp jump

C: 寻找三月七和丹恒
E: Find March 7th and Dan Heng

C: 找到所有躲起来的小朋友，赢得胜利
E: Find all the concealed kids to win the game

C: 在孤儿院周边寻找物资
E: Search for supplies around the orphanage

C: 取得一级认证
E: Collect Level 1 Certification

C: 追上克拉拉
E: Catch up with Clara

C: 追上克拉拉

C: 没错…想必这次的「开拓」之旅也不会轻松呢。
E: Yes... Looks like this trailblazing expedition won't be easy.

C: 星核…
E: Stellaron...

C: ——欸！喂，别从背后吓我呀！
E: WHOA! Don't sneak up on me like that!

C: 得亲自确认过才知道。
E: We won't know unless we have a look ourselves.

C: 那么，帕姆祝你一路顺风。
E: Well then, Pom-Pom wishes you the best of luck.

C: 卡芙卡的话也不能尽信。虽然「星核猎手老大能预知未来」的可信度很高，但卡芙卡未必说了实话。
E: We can't trust everything Kafka says. It's credible that the leader of the Stellaron Hunters can predict the future, but Kafka might not be telling the truth.

C: 此外还有「曜青」、「方壶」、「朱明」、「虚陵」和「玉阙」。
E: There are also the Yaoqing, the Fanghu, the Zhuming, the Xuling, and the Yuque.

C: 想去的世界嘛？…是故乡吧。但很遗憾，在列车星图未损坏的记录里，没有它的位置。
E: That I want to go to? ...My home world, I suppose. Sadly, its location doesn't appear on the Express' astral chart records, at least the ones that are undamaged.

C: 首先，帕姆要感谢各位无名客成功解决了本站点的问题，让列车能继续在星轨上奔驰！
E: Firstly, Pom-Pom wants to congratulate you, the Nameless, for successfully resolving the problems at this stop. The Express is now able to continue along the star rail!

C: 她可是「天才俱乐部」的人。「智识」博识尊的令使。长生不老返老还童都不在话下吧。
E: She's a member of the Genius Society and an Emanator of Nous the Erudition. She can probably age backwards if she wanted.

C: HDH<unbreak>-125963</unbreak>  定分枪
E: HDH<unbreak>-125963</unbreak> Rating Pistol

C: 一对垃圾桶，分类方式很怪异：诺布莱斯虫能吃的/诺布莱斯虫不能吃的。
E: A pair of trashcans with an unusual sorting method — whether or not the trash is digestible by Noblesse worms.

C: 好啊，那载体的准备也拜托你了～
E: Good, then I'll also count on you with the preparation of the receptacle.

C: 你要去哪…
E: Where are you going...

C: 这个人的坐标不是由空间站发出的……
E: Weren't their coordinates sent out from the space station...?

C: 我行动不便…会拖累你们。我就留在这里，在你们成功抵达后再次封锁电梯权限。
E: My leg is injured... I'd only slow you down. I'll stay here and shut down the elevator once you've made it to the master control zone.

C: 啊！又是一个精致的利己主义者！狭隘的人类中心主义者！
E: Hmph! Just another egocentric anthropocentrist!

C: 为什么会是这个分数？你不理解……
E: Why is that this score? You don't understand...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着藿藿：「0分？5分？」
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Huohuo: "0 points? 5 points?"

C: 在它附近贴有警告：「未经空间站书面许可，切勿启动。」
E: A warning notice affixed next to it reads, "Do not activate this without written permission from the space station."

C: 你看见的这个是我做的人偶，我操纵她和你们对话。
E: What you're seeing here is one of my puppets. I'm using her to talk to you.

C: 现在「星核」是这个小鬼了？
E: So this little twerp has the Stellaron now? Huh.

C: 我没有想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我们赢了吗？
E: Did we win?

C: 我是谁，我在哪…
E: Who am I, where am I...

C: 距离列车跃迁应该还有一些时间，随意走走熟悉一下环境吧。
E: There should be some time until the next warp jump, so feel free to walk around and familiarize yourself with the environment.

C: 咳，这个，年轻人嘛，房间自然都比较有个性一点。
E: Ah, you know, young people! Their rooms always reflect their personality.

C: （只是稍微看一看的话…应该没有问题吧？）
E: (Just one look should be fine, right?)

C: 关于列车…
E: About the Express...

C: 何况，「开拓」尚未陨落时列车就存在了，总不能有两颗心脏对吧？但，这辆列车很可能拥有某种机制，使它可以从开拓命途搬运力量。
E: Besides, the Express existed before the Trailblaze fell. There's no way they could have had two hearts, right? However, it is likely that the Express possesses some sort of mechanism to transfer power from the Trailblaze.

C: 它们的行为无法用「为什么」来解释，因为执行「毁灭」的信念，就是它们唯一的动机。
E: Their actions cannot be explained by reason, because their only motivation and purpose is to destroy.

C: 让你等久了吧。
E: Sorry if I kept you waiting.

C: 生死存亡之际，寒潮忽然降临——席卷的狂风毫无预兆，入侵的军团被暴雪掩埋，留存的唯有贝洛伯格——
E: In the midst of the conflict, the Eternal Freeze descended without warning. Suddenly, sweeping winds brought blizzards which buried the invading Legion. Belobog was all that remained.

C: 不必着急，我自有办法。
E: Do not worry, I have a way.

C: 可恶，我好感兴趣啊……
E: Darn, I wanted to see one...

C: 哪里不对劲？挺正常的一位女士啊。一开始有点难说话，讲完道理后还挺温柔的。
E: Something up with her? She seemed normal to me. She was kinda harsh at first, but she turned out to be a nice, reasonable lady.

C: 嘘！这是列车团的老暗号了，数到一的时候，你就跟我们一起跑！
E: Shh! It's an old Astral Express escape signal. Do you play cards?

C: 行啊，反正也没别的事。
E: Sure, we're not busy.

C: 自由的味道…寒冷的味道…有点冷了，还是走吧。
E: ...Freedom... Cold... Mainly cold actually. Let's go.

C: 不清楚。她没离开克里珀堡，大守护者只说她回来了，没提别的。
E: I'm not sure. She hasn't left Qlipoth Fort. The supreme guardian just said she'd returned. Nothing more.

C: 新刊？哼哼，那我明白了…她休息日经常一整天都泡在书商那里。走，我们找她去。
E: New magazine, huh? I see... She often spends her off days at the bookstore. Come on, let's go find her.

C: 怎么样，你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME} ？
E: What's up, are you ready, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我的手都开始抖了，{NICKNAME}——但愿没有让你白跑一趟……
E: My hands are trembling now, {NICKNAME}. I hope your effort won't be wasted...

C: 还能执行公务，看来他的伤势不算太重。
E: He's still on duty. Huh, he must have recovered quickly.

C: 铁卫，列队！
E: Guards, formation!

C: 我就问问，你别突然这么严肃啊……
E: Yikes! So serious! I was just curious.

C: 造物引擎、可可利亚、虚幻的宇宙空间、「存护」的视线——与那场决战相关的画面不断闪回交错，最终拼凑成了一段模糊且不真实的记忆胶片。
E: The Engine of Creation, Cocolia, an ethereal outer space, the gaze of Preservation... your fragmented memory of the battle forms a blurry and surreal montage.

C: 但我们一定会战胜困难。哪怕这意味着，类似这样的争执要一直持续下去……
E: But we will prevail here... Even if it means arguments like this go on forever...

C: 机械屋还招助手吗？
E: Still looking to hire assistants for the workshop?

C: 不过，你也看到她的态度了…我怕她此行前去也聊不出什么令人满意的结果，指不定还会闹出些不愉快。
E: However... you saw her attitude just now. I doubt her meeting with Lady Bronya will change anything — it'll probably just leave them both feeling dejected.

C: 听起来好像很有故事…细说。
E: Sounds like you've got a story to tell. Let's hear it.

C: 希望你能有一段精彩的旅途，希露瓦。有机会的话，也一定记得回家看看。
E: I hope you have an amazing journey, Serval. Do remember to visit home when you get the chance.

C: 姐姐，你如果真要离开贝洛伯格的话…走之前还是回趟家看看吧。
E: Y'know Serval, if you're really leaving Belobog for a while... you should pay them a visit first.

C: 不过，这其中的原因我并不想和人说…还希望你能多理解一下啦。
E: I'm sorry, I'm not ready to talk to anyone about the reasons behind my decision... I hope you can understand.

C: 从地底采掘出的地髓矿石在这里转化成了人们赖以为生的热量。
E: Here, Geomarrow ore excavated from underground is converted into heat necessary for survival.

C: 路灯上斑斑的污迹诉说着它的历史。
E: The marks on this lamp are clues to its history.

C: 这是历史正剧《雪国往事》的宣传画。
E: This is the advertising poster for the historical drama Once Upon a Snowsieged Country.

C: 坏掉的加热器（家用版）。
E: Broken heater (home version).

C: 你好奇「侯爵夫人」是哪一朵花，但显然它不在这里。
E: You wonder which flower is the Marquise, but it doesn't seem to be here.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『覆夏竹』——寓意吉祥，价格亲民！」
E: You see a sign that says: "Summershade Bamboo — auspicious and affordable!"

C: …连值班的人都没有，谁送这新鲜奶呢？
E: ...What use are fresh milk deliveries if there's no one here to sell it?

C: 我想问些别的事。
E: I want to ask something else.

C: 搏击…原来地下喜欢这么粗放的娱乐活动啊。
E: A club just for fighting... who knew undergrounders had such brutal hobbies.

C: 呃…说起来，「地火」的人呢？是不是往深处去了？那两帮人不会还在干仗吧……
E: Uh... speaking of which... where is Wildfire? Did they head further in? Is there a fight happening?

C: 普通机器人是没有自主意志的，它们的目的，其实就是史瓦罗的目的。
E: Your run-of-the-mill robots don't have a will of their own. Their aim is merely Svarog's aim.

C: 您就是首领？千呼万唤始出来。
E: Are you the chief? You're a hard man to find.

C: 很宝贵的！
E: Yeah, precious!

C: 还有这个规则？
E: Show me the rule book.

C: 你是不是觉得这个人还挺有意思的？当心别被他骗啦。
E: I bet you think he's pretty entertaining. Watch out, or he'll fool you!

C: 我也正有此意。
E: That's why I'm here.

C: 怎么说，{NICKNAME}？今天就这么歇了，还是再四处转转？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Should we go ahead and call it a day, or walk around a bit more first?

C: 我对睡眠的需求不高，我来吧。
E: Sure. I don't have much need for sleep.

C: ——希儿没有拒绝，就是已经认可你们啦。有你们陪着她，我也能放心了。
E: —Seele's lack of outright rejection means she approves of you, hehe. With you all accompanying her, my mind will be more at ease.

C: 她也有自己的打算。
E: She also has her own plan.

C: 是块很漂亮的石头。
E: Pretty, they look like gemstones.

C: 期待这段旅程吗？
E: Looking forward to this journey?

C: 用来拍特摄的话差条腰带。
E: It'll need a belt to serve as a Tokusatsu costume.

C: 但还有一些多出来的，我看看…是几罐奶粉，几件幼儿穿的贴身衣服，还有两套故事书。
E: ...which is why now we have some extra stuff. Let me see... a few tins of milk powder, a few sets of clothes for toddlers, and two sets of storybooks.

C: 你爸爸不管你吗？
E: Does your dad take care of you?

C: 我妹妹…她得了一种奇怪的皮肤病，不能穿普通的粗制亚麻衣物，否则就会全身红疹，疼痒难耐。
E: My sister... she has a strange skin disease and can't wear ordinary coarse linen clothes, or else a red rash will break out all over her body, which can be unbearably painful and itchy.

C: 他受伤了还能接着战斗？
E: Is he still fit to fight in his condition?

C: 而{M#他}{F#她}将要面对的是——搏击俱乐部中素有「新人克星」之称的自动机兵双子——「希罗」与「尤尔」！
E: And what {M#he}{F#she} will face is — Silo and Yur, the two automatic robot soldiers known in the Fight Club as the Rookie Busters!

C: 您现在在天梯榜上的位置是…第<unbreak>128</unbreak>名！这可真是个不错的开始。当然，赢家的奖金是少不了的——请拿好！记住，这里的每一分钱可都出自史考特老板慷慨的腰包！
E: Your current ranking is... No. <unbreak>128</unbreak>! That's a great start. Of course the winner's prize is yours, here you go! And don't forget, every penny comes from the generous Mr. Scott's pockets!

C: 答案或许出人意料——此刻站在擂台上的，竟是来自遥远矿镇的传奇机械武斗家「尊者」，和它那同样强悍的徒弟「多蒙」！
E: The answer might surprise you: Standing in the ring is a legendary mechanical warrior from the faraway mining town — Master! And its equally formidable disciple — Domon!

C: 您现在在天梯榜上的位置是…哇哇哇，第2名！天梯榜首的位置近在眼前，下层区拳王的金腰带几乎唾手可得！
E: Your current ranking is... wow wow wow, No. 2! You're so close to the top now. The golden belt of the Underworld champion is almost within reach!

C: 唔…老弟，你可别说错话啊……
E: Hmm... Choose your words wisely, Geppie...

C: 你认识去大矿区的路，对吧？准备好了就去追上杰帕德吧！
E: You know the way to the Great Mine, right? Let's catch up with Gepard when you're ready!

C: 不辛苦，这是身为姐姐的责任。只是现在的日子不太平，我总怕有一天……
E: Mm, not really — it's my responsibility as a sister. I'm just worried that with all these monster invasions, maybe one day I won't...

C: 姐姐，你…我只是想让你放下心里的负担，没有逼你留下来的意思。
E: Serval, I... I just want you to know that I would've supported your decision no matter what you chose. I wasn't trying to force you to stay.

C: 「地髓」——顾名思义，是行星大地的髓液，对于雅利洛-Ⅵ和贝洛伯格而言是无比珍贵的宝藏。可矿石总有开采殆尽的一天——到那时候会发生什么？没人知道，没人想知道。
E: Geomarrow, as the name suggests, is the essence of the planet. To Jarilo-VI and Belobog, it is an invaluable treasure. However, ores will run out one day, and what will happen then? No one knows, and no one wants to know.

C: 你做得很对，这座垃圾箱是某个人的私有领域。这两下轻轻的敲打——咚，咚咚——意义重大，它意味着尊重。这世上，体面的人们也并不真正拥有尊重。
E: Well behaved! This trashcan is someone's private zone. *rat-a-tat-tat* Knocking on the wall before entering represents your respect. In fact, however, not every decent person can really win others' respect.

C: 再动点手脚。
E: Temper it.

C: 7个普通的垃圾。
E: Seven normal pieces of trash.

C: 自<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪开始出现的神秘现象「星核」造成的污染仍在继续。「星核」阻塞了文明之间的道路，令一度团结在「琥珀王」命途下的诸界分崩离析。
E: The mysterious phenomenon known as Stellaron corrosion continues to propagate. Stellarons have blocked travel between civilizations since <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, and they shattered the union of the worlds that were once united under the Path of the Amber Lord.

C: 星际和平公司与仙舟联盟：罗浮再度签署全新的互惠贸易协定。
E: Regarding the IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance: The Xianzhou Luofu has opted to renew the trade agreement.

C: 那万一他们以为我们和星核猎手是一伙的怎么办？别说联盟了，我都不相信星核猎手……
E: What if she thinks we're with the Stellaron Hunters? Never mind the Alliance, even I don't trust them...

C: （先等一等）
E: (Maybe later)

C: 本座谅二位不知内情，就不责怪方才的妄言了。先行一步准备问讯事宜，再见。
E: Hmph, since you are clearly ignorant of the commission's internal affairs, I shall absolve you of your ridiculous remarks. I'm going ahead to make some inquiries. Goodbye.

C: 上一次驾驶星槎来此…让我想想…是约莫二十年前了。小女子终日在商路漂泊，仙舟里的景象倒有点陌生。
E: The last time I came here on a Starskiff was... let me think... about <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago now. I've been on the road for so long that I've started to forget the sights and sounds of the Xianzhou...

C: 唷，还真是贵客！私底下给您透个信，这次可不是小打小闹的安全维护。将军派了云骑军清查隐患。
E: Well now, you must be quite special! Don't spread this around, but this isn't some small-scale maintenance drill. The general has sent the Cloud Knights to check for hidden dangers.

C: 本小姐打从蜕生出水就开始研习医道了，在丹鼎司里也是正儿八经的挂牌执业的医士！
E: I've been studying the art of healing ever since I cast off my old shell! You're looking at a recognized, practicing, dedicated doctor.

C: 我没爸爸。
E: I don't have a dad.

C: 原来如此，这便是「持明族」吗？我也只在文献里看过记录。听说他们是龙脉族裔，如此一看确实很贴切。
E: So this is the Vidyadhara, I've only ever read about them. They're known as the dragon race... not hard to see why.

C: 你是「曜青」人？
E: You're from the Yaoqing?

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 虽然观众来得少…
E: The audience might be sparse...

C: 恩公这是要跑哪儿去？
E: Where are you going, benefactors?

C: 汪，汪！
E: Woof! Woof!

C: 「赠予迷路人的小小礼物…」。
E: "A small something for the lost..."

C: 呃，你等等，我这就去找你的同僚来救你。
E: Uhh, you wait here. I'm gonna get your comrades to help you.

C: 这群人索求星神的力量时，就该考虑清楚，自己是否有能力支付相应的代价。
E: They should have thought about whether they were capable of paying the price when seeking the power of an Aeon.

C: 咳咳，现在开始练习闭气，应该不算晚……
E: *coughing* What? It's not too late to practice holding my breath...

C: 当心，有敌人来了！
E: Look out! Enemies incoming!

C: 唉，我总觉得，虽然长生种能活很久……
E: *sigh* I feel like... even though long-life species get to live forever...

C: 哦…好吧，我去向这儿的云骑长官报备了。
E: Oh... okay. Well, I'm gonna go report to the nearest captain.

C: 我已是罗浮将军，有些事纵使不情愿，也仍然要去做的。
E: I am the general of the Luofu. There are things that I wish I did not have to do, and yet I must.

C: 龙祖以生命之水化育我等，赐予持明不朽。我等出于此处，亦当回归此处。
E: Our dragon ancestors nurtured us with the water of life and bestowed us with the permanence of the Vidyadhara.

C: 符卿。
E: Lady Fu.

C: 说说星核猎手…
E: Let's discuss the Stellaron Hunters...

C: 是…停云留下的东西？
E: Something Miss Tingyun left behind?

C: 无论银河浩瀚、苦旅迢迢，罗浮云骑都会赶来与列车汇合，完成各位所托。
E: No matter how astronomically distant you are, the Luofu Cloud Knights will always come to the aid of the Crew, whatever your need may be.

C: 那么，我和丹恒就先一步返回列车了。三月，你和{NICKNAME}可要早点回来啊。
E: Fine, fine. Dan Heng and I will go back to the Express. The two of you come back soon, okay?

C: 这些声音…只是梦境的影子。无需在意。
E: These voices... They are just shadows of the dreamscape. Pay no heed to them.

C: 这是你的房间…？
E: Is this your room...?

C: 这取决于你的态度。
E: That depends on you.

C: …我无意冒犯。
E: ...I did not mean to offend.

C: …丹恒先生。确实只有以上四位的预订信息。
E: ...Mr. Dan Heng. These are the only four names on the reservation list.

C: 闭上眼睛，任凭愉悦的记忆涌上心头……
E: Close your eyes, and let happy memories surge forth...

C: 我该从哪前往「黄金的时刻」？
E: How do I get to Golden Hour?

C: 姬子。
E: Himeko.

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 遵命！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 没事，下次你再请我嘛。
E: No worries. You can buy me a meal next time!
Hmm...

C: 嗨！嗨嗨嗨！谢谢，你！美丽的，人！
E: Hey! Hey, hey, hey! Thank... you, beautiful person!

C: 看到远处那座建筑了吗？那就是著名的「大剧院」——匹诺康尼的另一个重要地标！
