E: Can you see that building in the distance? That's the famous Grand Theater, another great landmark of Penacony!

C: 哦！上手就命中了，状态不错呀！
E: Wow! You won something on your first attempt! Impressive!

C: …看！这玩意叫作《小小哈努行动》——根据剧情介绍，你是被石头老板的奇怪装置变小了，不得不经历一场惊心动魄的大冒险，用小小的身躯拯救美梦小镇……
E: ...Look! The title of this game is Hanu's Adventure. According to the plot synopsis, you have been shrunken down by one of {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s devices. You will embark on an epic adventure to rescue Dreamville with your miniature body...
...Sure.

C: 各位，请冷静一下……
E: Everyone, please stay calm...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我无意步入一场舞会，一位身披黑纱的女士邀请我共舞一曲。这是我第一次跳舞…是段令人难忘的经历。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I wandered into a ball without realizing it. A lady wearing a black veil invited me to dance. It was my first dance, and it was an unforgettable experience.</color>

C: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
E: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

C: 当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
E: Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!

C: 实在抱歉啊，给各位添麻烦了…唉，我这火气怎么就突然往上涌了呢？真是莫名其妙……
E: I'm so sorry for stirring up all this trouble... Alas, why did I get so worked up all of a sudden? It's baffling...

C: 当然，你们也可以选择强闯过去…但我发誓一定会跟二位拼命——我已经没什么好失去的了……
E: Sure enough, you guys can force your way through, but I swear I'll stop you or die trying. After all, I have nothing left to lose...

C: 你平息了筑梦师的愤怒——但导向了错误的方向。或许你应该换个方向再试试。
E: You have calmed the Dreamweaver's fury but directed it in the wrong direction. Perhaps you should try a different approach.

C: 家族从银河招揽了许多艺术家、建筑师、学者…组成「筑梦师」团队，编织匹诺康尼的美梦。
E: The Family recruited many artists, architects, and scholars from across the universe to form the team of Dreamweavers that built the dream of Penacony.

C: 真的平安落地了。这还真是…神奇。
E: We landed safely. This is... amazing.

C: 开玩笑的，{M#他}{F#她}做不到。
E: {M#He}{F#She}'s kidding. {M#He}{F#She} can't do it.

C: 我依旧认为流萤小姐的事…如我们推测的那般，和星核猎手关联更甚。但你也听到了，砂金指控了那位游侠。
E: I still believe that Miss Firefly's situation... is deeply connected with the Stellaron Hunter, just as we speculated. But as you've heard, Aventurine has his finger pointed at the Galaxy Ranger.

C: …看，我就说没那么简单。这是哪儿？
E: ...See, I told you it wasn't going to be that simple. Where is this?

C: …接下来呢？你打算怎么做？
E: ...What now? What are your plans?

C: 我们从火中来，沐火而生，蔓延、焚烧、破坏，直到薪柴燃尽，留下一地死灰。
E: We come from the fire, and are born bathed in fire. We spread, burn, and destroy until all the kindling has burned out, and we leave only ashes on the ground.

C: 怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
E: How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?

C: 这种明显站不住脚的推论…对获取你的信任毫无帮助，只会让他显得更可疑。
E: It was a groundless accusation... which only serves to make him seem more suspicious.

C: 「瓦尔特」……
E: Welt...

C: …对了，要喝点什么吗？出发前，来两杯*如梦初醒*如何…不，四杯吧。
E: ...By the way, would you like something to drink? Before we go, how about two cups of Wake the Heck Up...? No, four cups.

C: …等等。
E: ...Hold on.

C: 而这颗金黄色的石头属于{RUBY_B#「石心十人」成员}托帕{RUBY_E#}，它的别名是「黄玉」——不是「砂金」。
E: And this golden stone is also known as a topaz, not aventurine, and it belongs to {RUBY_B#One of the Ten Stonehearts}Topaz{RUBY_E#}.

C: 等等，这位先生…我们有家族授予的文书，会协助各位进行调查，可否行个方便，让我们见见那位加拉赫先生？
E: Hold on, Sir... We have documents authorized by The Family that would aid your investigation. If it wouldn't trouble you, could we see this Mr. Gallagher?

C: 老大说了，事关家族颜面，谁也不能放过去。
E: Sorry, no can do. The boss said that since it's a matter of The Family's reputation, no one's allowed through.

C: 你误会了，我没有。
E: You got it wrong, I'm not.

C: 很有趣的比喻，或许这就是匹诺康尼的「美梦」得以长存的根本。
E: Interesting analogy. Perhaps that's why Penacony's "beautiful dream" has persisted for so long.

C: 当然…前提是我还记得。
E: Of course... That's if I remember.

C: 因为人们总要走向未来。纵使人性的弱点让他们驻足停步，但在真正无法前行的时候…人类一定会试图拯救自己。
E: Because people must always move towards the future. Even if human weaknesses make them pause, when they truly cannot move forward... humanity will eventually seek a way to save itself.

C: 我马上就到匹诺康尼了，忆者，去买瓶「阿斯德纳白橡木」，温好，敬你一杯。
E: I'll be on Penacony soon. Memokeeper, go buy a bottle of Asdana's White Oak and warm it up, and I'll raise a glass to you.

C: 哇，好漂亮的宝石！不过如此精美的礼物，为什么要随便送给陌生人呢？
E: Wow, how fabulous! But why would you give such a wonderful gift to a random stranger like me?

C: 呀，被人家听到啦……
E: Oops, she's heard us...

C: 她管我叫可爱的小姐哎…！
E: Did you hear that! She just called me "my lovely lady"...!

C: 你干嘛呀！垃圾不能随便…不会吧？！纸条上的字居然变了！
E: Hey, what are you doing! You can't just throw trash... No way! The words on the note are changing!

C: 准备好了就去找加拉赫——我看他已经手痒难耐啦。
E: When you're ready, go to Gallagher. I can tell he's itching to show off his skills.

C: 可结果…只有一个坏消息，也是最让人头疼的消息。
E: But here's the thing... We only received bad news, and the trickiest kind at that.

C: 这人是谁？
E: Who could that person be?

C: 也可以这么理解。不过继承了「钟表匠」名号的应该只有一人。
E: Well, that's one way to look at it. However, only one member has truly inherited the Watchmaker's title.

C: 如果家族中真的存在叛徒…那人必定要身居高位，或拥有深不可测的实力。
E: If there really is a traitor within The Family... that person must hold a high position or possess unimaginable strength.

C: …便一去不回？
E: ...never to return?

C: …那你我究竟是犯了多少错误，才要出生在这世上？
E: ...Then what did we do to deserve living in a world like that?

C: 「旅途永远坦然……」
E: "Let your journey be forever peaceful... "

C: 你是想…制造一个三方共同在场的局面么？
E: You want to... create a situation where all three parties are present?

C: 别着急。如果真的有人布下了局…他一定会想方设法邀我们入场的。
E: No need to rush. If he truly has laid a trap... he will definitely use every means to lure us in.

C: 你在跟我打赌？好啊，那我也和你赌。我赌自己能大获全胜，用一场史无前例的大爆炸证明「同谐」的誓言就是个彻头彻尾的笑话。
E: You wanna bet? Sure, I'll bet with you. I'm betting that it'll be a sweeping victory for me, by detonating an unprecedented explosion to prove that the vow of Harmony is a complete and utter joke.

C: 你确实很幸运，命运使我们的道路交汇，而我恰好配有一柄利刃——锋利到足以斩落美梦的帷幕，同时将你身上「同谐」的烙印一刀两断……
E: You're very lucky that fate has decided to let us cross paths. I happen to be equipped with a very sharp blade — sharp enough to slice through the veil of dreams. I can also carve the Harmony's brand off of you...

C: 我在这里等你很久了。
E: I've been waiting on you for quite a while.

C: 我什么都没有做，只是等你醒来。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
E: I didn't do anything but wait for you to wake up. You've met me before, I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.

C: 你好。请问这里发生什么事了吗？
E: Hello. May I ask what happened here?

C: 啊，没什么大事，只是克劳克影视乐园出现了排演事故，请各位宾客稍安勿躁……
E: Nothing to be worried about. There's been a small rehearsal mishap at Clock Studios Theme Park. Please stay calm...

C: 姬子和三月已先一步动身了。{NICKNAME}，调整下状态，我们这就出发。
E: Himeko and March have already made a move. {NICKNAME}, get ready. We're about to set off.

C: 我…理解。保持对星核猎手的警惕，不是一件坏事。
E: I... I get it. Being cautious around a Stellaron Hunter isn't a bad thing.

C: 不必贪恋梦中虚幻的天空，因为我们有权利，也有能力…飞向更广阔的天地。
E: There's no need to covet an illusory sky in dreams, because we have the right and the ability... to fly towards a broader horizon.

C: 出于懈怠，我谎称全部安排妥当。虽然家主已将我辞退以示惩罚，但我依旧寝食难安，担忧恶的种子在我心间生根。我特此向您告解，以求赔补我的罪过。
E: Out of laziness, I lied and claimed that everything was ready. Although the Head has dismissed me as punishment, it has been tough to sleep with the guilt still gnawing at me, as I worried that the seeds of evilness may have taken root in my soul. So, I confess to you now to seek atonement for my sins.

C: …没事。可能是工作太久，又从流梦礁返回，有些不适应。过会儿应该就好了。
E: ...I'm fine. I've been working long hours, and I just made a trip to Dreamflux Reef and back... So I'm a bit out of sorts. But it'll all be over before we know it.

C: 是啊，但愿如此。
E: Indeed — let us hope so.

C: 时间差不多了，我和哥哥得先去做接见的准备…情势紧急，招待不周还请见谅。
E: It's about time. We'll have to get ready for the meeting... I apologize for any inconvenience caused by the urgency.

C: 怎么？本尊回来了，我就没用了？亏我还帮了家族那么多忙，真是太令人心寒了呀。
E: What? Now that you have the real Robin, I'm useless? Oh, how disheartening! I've done so much for The Family.

C: …住口！
E: ...Stop it!

C: 嗯。话说回来，哥哥，我听说你现在再也不碰甜食了。明明小时候还经常和我抢餐后甜点……
E: Okay. By the way, brother, I heard you no longer have a sweet tooth. Back when we were kids, you used to steal my desserts...

C: 「你是否叛离了你的神所期望的路，辜负了祂的名？」
E: "Have you strayed from the path expected by your God, betraying THEIR name?"

C: 她还没回来吗？
E: Hasn't she returned yet?

C: 那是一场惨烈的战争，一场轰动寰宇的讨伐，宇宙见证了绝灭大君「诛罗」的陨落，但代价…除了亲历者，没人会记得代价。
E: It was a brutal war, a crusade that shook the universe. The universe witnessed the fall of Zulo the Lord Ravager, but it came at a price... A price so hefty that only those who were there still remember.

C: 为了什么？
E: For what?

C: 也许我们就是无法成功。
E: Perhaps we were never meant to succeed.

C: 别担心，这位姑娘，我已经精准定位到它缺失的零件了！
E: Don't worry, miss. I've already pinpointed its missing parts!

C: 我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见，纯美的骑士。
E: We don't have much time... May fate allow us to meet again, Knight of Beauty.

C: 最后，只有像各位这样的「英雄」才能获得成功。
E: Ultimately, only "heroes" like yourselves manage to achieve success.

C: 你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
E: Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

C: 哦？刚才是不是有人提到了「高难度动作」？没错，朋友！接下来的剧情正好充满了各种高难度动作！
E: Oh? Did someone say "high-level moves" just now? That's right, pal! The upcoming script is just exploding with all sorts of high-level shenanigans!

C: 哦？竟然还有如此令人发指的暴行……
E: Oh? To encounter deeds so vile they stir one's very soul...

C: 它落得何种下场，只在我们的一念之间。
E: Its destiny was determined by our momentary whim.

C: 很高兴看见你和当年的我们做出了同样的选择。既然你心意已决，就让我来揭晓这一选择的结果吧。
E: I'm happy to see that you made a choice similar to ours. If your mind is made up, let me reveal the outcome of this choice.

C: 期待各位的选择，也许能够扭转那桩悲剧也说不定。
E: I look forward to everyone's decisions. Who knows, perhaps they might even alter the outcome of this tragedy.

C: 这么一想，就只有一种选择了：<color=#dbc291ff>让猎犬家系的人送他回去</color>！这人一定得受到惩罚！
E: With that thought, there is only one choice: <color=#dbc291ff>Let the Bloodhounds send him back home!</color> This person deserves to be punished!

C: 而这次的故事…属于我本人。
E: And the story this time... is my own.

C: 怎么会这样…知更鸟小姐……
E: How could this happen... Miss Robin...

C: 也许逃避是弱者的天性，但谁是弱者…不应由他人来定义。
E: The want to escape may be innate in the weak, but whether they are weak or not... It is not up to another to decide.

C: 这就是「钟表把戏」，名为「开拓」的意志。
E: Such is the essence of clockwork, the will of the Trailblaze.

C: 米沙！你要去哪里？
E: Misha! Where are you going?

C: 无论如何，星穹列车不能对星核坐视不理。为匹诺康尼「开拓」未来，也是米哈伊尔等前人的夙愿。
E: Anyway, we can't leave the Stellaron unchecked. This is about trailblazing a bright future for Penacony and fulfilling Mikhail's and his predecessors' long-cherished wishes.

C: 嗯，再见，各位。愿你们的「开拓」之旅——永不终结。
E: Yeah, farewell, everyone. May your Trailblazing expedition never end.

C: 话说回来，你一个人？
E: By the way, are you always alone?

C: 先生，我还有最后一个问题。
E: I have one final question, Master.

C: 「祂采星云作成羽拨，造了有黑白键的大琴。」
E: "THEY gathered nebulae and forged them into picks, thus creating a grand lyre with black and white keys."

C: 「这里曾经是逼仄的囚牢。但我们要让它变成自由的乐园。」
E: "This place was once a place of confinement, but we will turn it into a haven of freedom."

C: 「这便是第七日。」
E: "That marked the seventh day."

C: 你错了。如果人要带着尊严活下去，那么，绝不应有任何人或事物凌驾于他们之上。
E: That's not the case. If people are to live with dignity, there must be nothing and no one above them.

C: 看来我们无论如何也说服不了对方了。命运注定我们捉对厮杀，事已至此，还是让你我用各自的命途为宇宙昭示一条正路吧。
E: Looks like we won't be able to convince each other. Now that our conflict has been destined, let's unveil our Paths and reveal to the universe the true path.

C: 那我们就恭敬不如从命了。
E: Well then, we shall oblige.

C: 「一切为了和平」——这就是我司的基本价值观。
E: "All in the name of peace" — that's our motto.

C: 醒来吧，{NICKNAME}。从这场没有尽头的梦中脱身，回到清醒的世界去——我们都将在那里找到{RUBY_B#一线生机}答案{RUBY_E#}。
E: Wake up, {NICKNAME}. Break free from this eternal dream and return to the real world. We'll find our {RUBY_B#a glimmer of hope}answers{RUBY_E#} there.

C: 你们的判断不错，我也投江户星一票。
E: You and Dan Heng make good points. I'll throw in a vote for Edo Star too.

C: 流萤
E: Firefly

C: 匹诺康尼
E: Penacony

C: 「钟表匠」是他最伟大的谎言，而匹诺康尼的「盛会」是他最后的谎言。
E: "The Watchmaker" was his greatest lie of all, and Penacony's "Festivities" was his final lie.

C: 所以你的梦中才会出现<color=#dbc291ff>瑕疵</color>。换言之，只要能察觉到世界的异常，意识就有机会从梦中抽离。
E: That's why there was a <color=#dbc291ff>flaw</color> in your dream. In other words, once you have realized the world is not real, you'll have a chance to break free from the dream.

C: 就像深海中的溺水者，当一个人的身体和心灵都承受重压，痛苦、迷茫和绝望便会随之而来。而我也相信……
E: Like a drowning individual in the deep sea, when one's body and mind bear immense pressure, agony, confusion, and despair will follow. I firmly believe that...

C: 多么荒诞，又没有意义的使命啊。
E: Such a task is absurd and meaningless.

C: 但你提出的那个问题…我猜星星也是会死去的，就像人一样。
E: As for the question you asked... I think stars do die, just like people.

C: 此人双目无神，嘴角微微上扬，正沉浸于巨大的喜悦中。
E: Their eyes are dulled but their lips curl up at the edges, as though transfixed in overwhelming joy.

C: 你的「钟表把戏」全然没有奏效。
E: Your "clockwork" is completely ineffectual.

C: 生命是一座迂回的迷宫——除了记忆，我们一无所有。
E: "Life is akin to a winding labyrinth, where memories serve as our sole companions."

C: 这周围挺热闹啊，先四下逛逛吧。
E: Such a bustling place. I think I'll take a little walk around.

C: 还好没人相信他的话。但保险起见，猎犬家系还是回收了这些按钮。
E: Luckily, no one believed him. Still, the Bloodhound Family collected these buttons just to be on the safe side.

C: 我在跑一个重点项目，没空跟你们置气。
E: I'm working on a major project, I don't have time to squabble with you guys.

C: 就像公司里的明争暗斗一样，五大家系所谓的「万众一心」…在梦主失位的如今，也只剩下一句口号了。
E: It's similar to the power struggles within the IPC. The supposed "all for one" philosophy shared by the Five Lineages... it's just a slogan now that the Dreammaster has gone.

C: 不知道，上次酒吧相遇后，我就没再见过他了。回想起来，他的到来和离去总是这么悄无声息。
E: I'm not sure. I haven't seen him since our last meeting at the lounge. Come to think of it, he always did come and go quietly.

C: 为逝者干杯，敬他们的梦想。
E: A toast to the departed, in honor of their dreams.

C: 我说的！
E: I did!

C: 该打爆哪个呢？
E: Which one should I pop?

C: 我同意。那就让我们恭喜一下{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}吧。我听说家族要在谐乐大典上好好感谢你们列车组呢。哎，不能亲临现场真是太可惜了。
E: I agree. Now let's congratulate {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I hear The Family intends to thank the crew at the Charmony Festival. *sigh* It's a real pity I can't personally be there to witness this.

C: 居然能追到这份上…看来我们得说再见啦。不用担心我，你安心参加典礼就好——
E: I can't believe they've chased me this far... Looks like we'll have to say our goodbyes. Don't worry about me. Just go and enjoy the ceremony!

C: 我只需要你手里的炸弹。
E: I just need that bomb in your hands.

C: 你的案子难道和炸弹有关？
E: You're telling me your case is related to the bomb?

C: 不过，看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
E: But, seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here. This is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

C: 欢迎，人类。我是「小{RUBY_B#博识尊}机器头{RUBY_E#}星神模拟智力问答机」，同时也极有可能是一枚虚数中子弹。
E: Welcome, human. I am an Aeonic Intelligence {RUBY_B#Nous}Droidhead{RUBY_E#} answering machine, also very likely an imaginary neutron bomb.

C: 「芙莫」娃娃正在盯着你。
E: The "Furmur" doll is staring right at you.

C: 哎，你终于回来啦！
E: Hey, you're finally back!

C: 继续说吧，忆者。你口中的目的地，那是一个怎样的世界？
E: Continue, Memokeeper. This destination of which you speak, what sort of world is it?

C: 不用考试和写作业的校园生活——简直就是天堂嘛！
E: Campus life without homework or examinations? That sounds like paradise!

C: 嗯。先前在匹诺康尼一起行动时，他也借用过帕姆的名号。我只能想到他。
E: Yes. When we worked together in Penacony the last time... he used Pom-Pom's identity then, too. He's the only one I can think of who would do that.

C: 犯人？
E: Suspect?

C: 你好，缭乱·忍侠
E: Well met indeed, Dazzling Ninja Hero

C: 电光石火！你话音未落，忍者便已跃入梦泡，消失得无影无踪。这一切发生得太快，常人的动态视力完全无法捕捉到过程。
E: Lightning fast! Before you finish speaking, the ninja has already leaped into the dream bubble and vanished without a trace. It all happens so quickly that the average person's eyes can't keep up.

C: 直到——名为「御猿•邪忍」的恶徒谋害忍侠，篡夺城主之位。往日的幸福即刻化作泡影……
E: Until an evildoer known as Evil Ninja Osaru murdered the Ninja Hero and laid claim to the city. The happiness of days past disappeared in an instant.

C: 真可爱，种草了，有机会我也要去看看。
E: So cute! I want one! I'll go take a look when I get the chance.

C: 看来折纸大学的校风比传闻中还要开放，倒也很符合匹诺康尼的气质。
E: Looks like Paperfold University is more open-minded than the rumors say. It really suits Penacony.

C: 好啊，哪怕是同样的剧本和演员，每次拍摄也会有不同的惊喜。
E: Very well. Even with the same script and performer, each take is sure to bring new surprises.

C: 天呐，这个味道！我从没尝过这么好吃的香蕉……
E: Oh wow, this flavor! I've never tasted a banana this good!

C: 啊？别啊，这对我真的很重要！求你了大佬！买一只吧，就一只好不好？
E: Huh? Please don't! This is really important for me! Please, buddy, just one? Buy just one?

C: 我们是新生。
E: We're new students.

C: 股东驾到！
E: That's us! The shareholders!

C: 这人脸变得比中了「钟表把戏」还快……
E: This one's attitude changed faster than the people you use Clockwork on...

C: 可恶的学生会，居然区别对待……
E: Stupid student council. This is discrimination.

C: 摄影忍者乱破，上！
E: Photographer Ninja Rappa, you're up!

C: 哥们，别让我再重复一遍，我可是爱死香蕉了。小心点，别把事情搞太复杂——
E: Listen, buddy, don't make me repeat myself. I love me some bananas. You don't wanna make things more complicated than they need to be—

C: 没错没错，这是最可恨的抹黑手段。
E: Exactly! That's the most despicable form of slander.

C: 弟子应该画些什么？
E: What should I paint?

C: {NICKNAME}，{NICKNAME}——
E: {NICKNAME}, {NICKNAME}...

C: 和打扮成小猴的校长…
E: And the dean dressed up as a monkey...

C: 这造型好眼熟…
E: This style looks so familiar...

C: 三月七？
E: March?

C: （她真的没问题吗……）
E: (Can she really pull this off...?)

C: 不是，这筑梦的方法跟凝结六相冰也太像了，我分不清啊。
E: Well, this dreamweaving method feels just like condensing Six-Phased Ice! I can barely tell them apart!

C: 什么乱七八糟的！这明显是你画的吧！
E: What bananonsense is that!? I know it was you!

C: 虫豸•邪祟，你对百货•忍徒做了什么？
E: Fiendling Pest! What tricks did you pull on Ninja Initiate Merchant?
Bana...

C: 可叹！请再忍耐一番。在下定会击败御猿•邪忍，令二位恢复忍者之身。
E: How lamentable you are! Please, bear with me for now. I vow to defeat Evil Ninja Osaru and restore your ninja forms.

C: 你们这些差生注定不能成才，还是乖乖享受睡蕉小猴的幸福吧！
E: Hopeless students like you are destined to be nothing! Just accept Slumbernana Monkey's grace of a happy life!

C: 你怎么知道我弄到了一张超级稀有的「蕉版卡」？还是烫金卡面！
E: How'd you find out I got my hands on an ultra rare BanaCard? Look, it's even embossed in gold!

C: 三月七…你这是要干什么？
E: March 7th... What are you trying to do?

C: 伴随着从未听闻过的语调，呈现在三月七面前的，是一副在忆域中才有可能出现的奇景。
E: Accompanied by an unusual tone of voice, what appears before March 7th is a fantastical scene that can only exist in the realm of memories.

C: 比如…如果我要求您戒掉麦芽果汁，您首先会想到什么？
E: For example... if I asked you to give up malt juice, what would be your first thought?

C: 那么，我要前去讨伐邪忍了，告辞。
E: With that, I shall continue my journey to take down the Evil Ninja. Farewell.

C: 流行事物潮起潮落，没有不会落幕的风潮。虽然无法压制睡蕉小猴的兴起，但我们仍有可行之事，那就是让风潮的退去提前上映。
E: Trends come and go, but every single one of them eventually dies down, much like how a violent storm quells with time. We may not be able to dampen the increasing popularity of Slumbernana Monkey, but we can always work to hasten the trend's recession.

C: 别听他的，做出真正自由的选择，去拥抱自由的猴生吧蕉！
E: Don't listen to him. Make a truly free choice and embrace the *banana* freedom of a monkey's life!

C: 那…打倒邪忍？
E: Then... defeating the Evil Ninja?

C: 真的假的？
E: Really?

C: 儿子，我想通了。如果你太累了，我们就回老家……
E: Son, I've thought it through. If you're too tired, let's just return to our hometown...

C: 这就是我说过的怪梦！
E: This is the strange dream I mentioned!

C: 忍法或许可以轻易从群敌环伺的恶意中脱身，但却难以抵御汹涌的善意。大岚天在上，热情炽热胜烈火，忍•心亦难解人心。
E: Perhaps Ninjutsu can allow her to easily slip away from the encirclement of enemies, but such a power is helpless against surging kindness. By Great Lan above, these passions burn hotter than fire. Even the heart of ninjutsu finds it hard to decipher the human heart.

C: （我要找的人应该在高温浴池，去看看吧…奔腾的热气总能让人想起故乡的熔炉。）
E: (The person I'm looking for is probably in the hot bath. I should go take a look... The billowing steam always brings back memories of the furnaces in our homeland.)

C: 缇宁大人？
E: Lady Trinnon?

C: 星核？
E: A Stellaron?

C: …没什么，走吧。
E: ...It's nothing. Let's go.

C: 我平日受缇安大人诸多照顾，一直想找机会给缇安大人备点薄礼以示谢意，只是不知要送些什么好。今天碰巧撞见此事，也算命运暗中相助，就选它做礼物吧。
E: I've long wished to show my gratitude for Lady Trianne's care, but I haven't been able to come up with any ideas for a suitable gift. This chance encounter today feels like divine intervention. Perhaps this is the gift I've been searching for.

C: 既然这样…{NICKNAME}和人家就来助小缇安一臂之力吧！
E: In that case... {NICKNAME} and I will lend Trianne a hand!

C: 没有！
E: No one's here!

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的死雾…似乎正在迫近。
E: The deathly fog of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... is fast approaching.

C: 吾师，我还有些事想与你说。那名伤者的来历…有些蹊跷。
E: Tribbie, I have some things to tell you as well... There's something strange about where that patient came from.

C: 这个，缇安知道！大家都说，象征理性的{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，对新思想最宽容了——它是和{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一样的，对我们最最好的泰坦。
E: Trianne knows the answer to that! Everybody says that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, who symbolizes reason, is the most tolerant of novel ideas. Apart from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, they're the Titan who treats us the best.

C: …但既然各位读取了这条消息，那就说明意外已经发生。现在，请继续前进，前往<color=#dbc291ff>启蒙王座</color>——回收火种，以及我们的遗体。
E: ...But since you have accessed this message, something unforeseen must have occurred. For now, you should continue onward to the <color=#dbc291ff>Luminary Throne</color> where you may retrieve the Coreflame... and our mortal remains.

C: 值此水车不能转之关键时刻，{NICKNAME}大喝一声：
E: At this critical moment when the waterwheel refused to turn, {NICKNAME} shouted:

C: 啊？我先？为什么？
E: Ahh? Me first? But why?

C: 缇安大人！还好吗，没有受伤吧？
E: Lady Trianne! Are you alright? Were you hurt?

C: 不过，缇安因为是一个人，怕危险，没有飞下去看。
E: But, since Trianne was alone and afraid that it might be dangerous, we did not fly there to take a look.

C: 感谢诸位相助——现在应由吾来履行约定了。
E: Thank you so much for your help. Now it's time for me to fulfill my part of the promise.

C: 不好…！
E: Not good...!

C: ——哎哟，这不是，万敌阁下嘛？！真是好久不见哪，哈，哈哈……
E: — Well, well. If it isn't Lord Mydei! It's been a while, ahaha...

C: 有趣。我听闻{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的火种已然归位，却并非由你亲手交还。你甚至想将尼卡多利的神力拱手相让——此事当真？
E: Interesting. I heard the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury has been restored — though not by your hand — and you're even considering giving up {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} divine power. Is this true?

C: 我本想与你共议族人的未来。但…现在似乎不是时候。
E: I came to discuss the future of our people with you, but... it appears this is not the right time yet.
Three...

C: 托勒密和他的骑兵队，还未来得及品尝胜利便全军覆没。燃烧崩塌的方尖碑林成为了他们的坟丘。
E: Ptolemy and his cavalry met their end before they could even relish our triumph. Those obelisks that collapsed after being set on fire became their final resting place.

C: 再后来是朴塞塔。他在厄涅俄努斯城中以歌声诱敌深入，为我们争取了宝贵的时间。
E: Then, it was Peucesta. He lured the enemies into the city of Aenionus with his melodies, buying us invaluable time.

C: 我很难给出有用的建议，或许…你可以找更多人谈谈，比如大工匠。哈托努斯的族人应该经历过相似的困境。
E: I don't know how I can give you any useful advice. Maybe... you could seek counsel from more people, such as the Grand Craftsman? Chartonus' people seem to have been through comparable dilemmas.

C: 好…我来带路。
E: Alright... I'll lead the way.

C: 我知道了！她就是——「缇宝」！
E: I know! She's... "Tribbie"!

C: 就在这儿！「我呼唤你，欧洛尼斯——激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: Right here! "I summon thee, Oronyx! Stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 好安静啊！泰坦都住在这么暗的地方吗？
E: It's really quiet in here! Do all Titans live in dark places like this?

C: 人海战术…我们分而击之！
E: They're trying to overwhelm us with numbers... Split up and take them out!

C: 在你们踏入战场前，我有一事想托付给你。
E: Before you step into battle, there's something I wish to ask of you.

C: 把我的话语传递给每一个悬锋人，我命令你。
E: Convey my message to every Kremnoan — this is an order.

C: ——告诉她们，以后不必再以肉身勘察敌后了。只需一条讯息，天谴的锋刃便会指向奥赫玛的敌人。
E: ...Tell them that there is no longer a need to send scouts behind enemy lines. With a single message, the Lance of Fury will target anyone who dares oppose Okhema.

C: 我劝你远离任何需要起名的场合。
E: I recommend that you steer clear of any situation that calls for naming things.

C: 在世人眼中，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}一直是位慷慨的泰坦。它降下神迹，允许人们从过往中捞取便利……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} was a generous Titan in the eyes of the people. They graced us with miracles, allowing humanity to reap many a convenience from the past...

C: 别失落，风堇。缇安只是用完了从{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}那儿借来的时间。
E: Don't be sad, Hyacine. Trianne has used up her borrowed time from {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, that's all.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我明白，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: I understand, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

C: 我都将奔向人间的苦难。
E: I run towards the world's agony.

C: 恕我冒犯，但……
E: With all due respect...

C: 啊呀…这可全要拜你所赐呢。若非汝之灵魂活像只刺猬扎手，吾又怎会成了这样？
E: Heh... And that's all thanks to you. If your soul weren't as prickly as a hedgehog, I wouldn't have to act this way.

C: 这里是……
E: Where am I...

C: 我就知道你不会忘记的。即便生活在匹诺康尼这样的梦中世界，这样的体验也很稀奇。
E: I knew you wouldn't forget. Even in a dreamland like Penacony, that was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.

C: 是「撒手锏」啦。
E: It's an "ace" up their sleeve, not "mace"!

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，是个好问题！那么让我来考考你，斯科特。<color=#dbc291ff>对一个活过十个琥珀纪，从无数场阴谋和斗争中幸存下来，银行户头上躺着怎么花也花不完的财富，同时攀上了匹诺康尼顶峰的老人来说……</color>
E: Hohohoho! A sharp question, Skott. Let me put it this way: <color=#dbc291ff>Picture an old man who's survived ten Amber Eras, navigated countless conspiracies and power struggles, accumulated an endless fortune, and climbed to the absolute pinnacle of Penacony...</color>

C: 这么说起来，您有兴趣接下这封请柬？
E: So, does that mean you're interested in accepting the invitation?

C: 斯科特先生这是怕了？作为「市场开拓部」的成员，他们的手可管不到你这边来吧？
E: What's wrong, Mr. Skott? As a member of the Marketing Development Department, their reach shouldn't extend to you, right?

C: 哈哈，开个玩笑。不知道发了什么神经，那个老可爱给流梦礁也送来了一份邀请函。米凯担心事情会变得像过去那样——上面人找乐子，底下人挨刀子。
E: Hah, relax, I'm just messin' with you. For some reason, that old man went and sent an invitation to Dreamflux Reef too. Micah figured things might go down the same way they always do — the folks up top have their fun, and the people below take the hits.

C: …斯科特先生为何如此忌惮这个家伙？
E: ...Why are you so scared of this guy, Skott?

C: 那我就放心了。作为一名久历战阵的从者，我向来不怎么讲究食物的品质。
E: Then I'm relieved. As a Servant who is a veteran of many battles, I don't really care about the quality of food.

C: 依照我对那个男人的了解，他甚至会挑起些没有意义的争执，然后心满意足地转身离开……
E: From what I know about that man, he might even stir up some pointless fights, just to walk away happy...

C: 他刚才叫你…
E: What did he just call you...?

C: 阿尔托利斯，那是我的男名。毕竟在那个时代，不列颠的王若是女子身份，可不利于统治。
E: Artorius. That is the male name I used. After all, a female king would have had a very difficult time ruling Britain back in those days.

C: 事实上，从一开始你就不存在于这里。停留此处的，不过是坠入宝具中的你，在别人的梦里残留的一道虚影。
E: In truth... you were never here at all. What remains in this place is merely a shadow of you who fell into a Noble Phantasm, lingering in the dream of another.

C: 她把我干哪儿来了？
E: Where did she send me???

C: 我可是银河球棒侠！
E: But I'm the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 这句回答是你的心中所想吗？还是某种虚假的操弄？你试着回想过去发生的一切，但它们变得愈发不真实。
E: But, was that answer truly what you thought? Or was it some sort of illusive manipulation? You try to piece together what has happened, but your memories feel more distant with every passing second.

C: 在囚笼中，鸟儿听到了许多悲叹的声音。于是，她为同在笼中的人们歌唱，抚慰他们的思乡愁绪，鼓舞他们起义的壮志。
E: The bird heard many voices of sorrow. So, she sang for the others trapped inside, soothing their homesick hearts and inspiring them to rise up.

C: 球棒，平平无奇，却如此熟悉。
E: A bat — plain, unimpressive, yet strangely familiar.

C: 你累了，找个房间休息一会儿吧。
E: You're tired. Find a room and take a break.

C: 所以，你这老可爱搞的这「圣杯战争」，到底是想整什么呜呜伯？
E: Old fudgehead. It's time to tell us what kind of stinkin' pie you're cooking up with this "Holy Grail War."

C: 当然，在这前无古人的匹诺康尼第一届圣杯战争下，我也有一些属于自己的私人小目标…但这就和诸位没有关系了。
E: Even if I do have some personal objectives in this first-ever Penacony Holy Grail War... that's none of your concern.

C: 向圣杯要钱不行吗？
E: Why don't you just ask the Holy Grail for cash?

C: 哼，把所有人都卷进了这场「圣杯战争」里，自己却躲在幕后，难道没人打算去找他讨个说法？
E: So he dragged everyone into this Holy Grail War while hiding in the shadows, and none of you are gonna make him pay for it?

C: 是吗？明明我记得某人曾是我的手下败将来着？
E: Is that so? I distinctly remember beating you.

C: 你知道的，我就是个普通的弓兵，就当这回我又输给你了吧。
E: You know me, just a humble archer. Let's call this one another loss on me.

C: 这样如宝石般有着众多切面的记忆，我岂能错失？
E: How could I ever miss out on a memory with as many facets as a veritable diamond?

C: 还有，要小心姬子乘客的咖啡，那是帕姆见过最可怕的饮料——但这事绝对不要当面告诉她。
E: Also, watch out for Himeko's coffee. It's the most terrifying beverage Pom-Pom's ever encountered — but please don't ever tell her that to her face.

C: 随着谐乐大典的余波平息，星际和平公司如愿入驻美梦之星，星穹列车的无名客也成为股东之一。
E: As the echoes of the Charmony Festival fade, the Interastral Peace Corporation successfully establishes itself on the planet of dreams, with the Nameless of the Astral Express becoming one of the planet's shareholders.

C: 竟然连Archer你也有被人骗到的时候。
E: I can't believe that even you fell for it, Archer.

C: 难怪这段情节如此生搬硬套，那就可以理解了。将古老的恐怖片元素随意拼接在一起，实在是没什么新鲜感。
E: No wonder the scene feels so awkwardly shoved in. Now it all makes sense. Randomly cobbling together old-school horror tropes? Yeah, not exactly groundbreaking.

C: 各位，不要进入敌人的节奏，被他牵着鼻子走。越是慌乱的时刻，越是要保持冷静。
E: Everyone, don't dance to his tune. Don't let him pull us along. The more chaos he sows, the calmer we have to be.

C: 持剑的少女怒喝一声，门锁「咔嚓」应声断裂，大门「滋扭」一声随之洞开。
E: The sword-wielding girl unleashes a fierce shout. Crack! The lock splits, and the door creaks open.

C: 这一点从他的宝具就能看出来，以生前曾拍摄过的恐怖片为原型，化作固有结界。虽然能力很稀有，但更像是个陷阱，只能困住受害者。
E: His Noble Phantasm proves it. He built it off one of his old horror flicks — basically a Reality Marble. Though it's a rare ability, it feels more like a trap, one that only ensnares its victims.

C: 没错，一无所能，就连保护自己的御主都相当勉强，更别提赢下这场圣杯战争了。
E: Exactly. Powerless. Barely able to protect her Master, let alone win this Holy Grail War.

C: 这的确是眼下的最优解了。Archer，请务必保护好{NICKNAME}，这是我作为对手的请求。
E: This is indeed the best solution at the moment. Archer, please protect {NICKNAME}. This is all I ask as an opponent.

C: 也对，比起这群人，你这浑身铜臭味的家伙明显和葛瑞迪更臭味相投。
E: Makes sense — compared to this lot, you and Grady are clearly cut from the same money-grubbing cloth.

C: 熟识的二人似乎正在谈论一些往事，暂时还是别打扰他们吧。
E: The two acquaintances seem to be talking about the past. Let's not interrupt them for now.

C: 敌人已经被无力化了，乘胜追击吧！
E: The enemy's down! Now's our chance — go for the finish!

C: 但你的所作所为，绝不值得原谅。
E: But what you've done is unforgivable.

C: 砂金露出比恶灵更恶灵的笑容，嘴唇微微翕动，无声地念出了那个部门的名字。星际牛仔发出爽朗的笑声，将指节捏得咯咯作响，狞笑着走向斯科特。
E: Aventurine flashed a grin more sinister than the devil's own, his lips barely moving as he silently mouthed the name of that department. The space cowboy let out a hearty laugh, cracking his knuckles with a sharp snap, a wicked smirk spreading across his face as he strode toward Skott.

C: 这下舒坦了，咱们出发吧！
E: Now that's more like it. Let's move out!

C: 为什么这么说？
E: Why do you say that?

C: 用不着这样美化自己，其余四大家系一样能解决问题。
E: Get off your high horse. The other four Families are more than capable of working things out on their own.

C: 简单来说——现在，规则就是用来打破的？
E: So... Can I take it that rules are meant to be broken now?

C: 商队的其他人呢……
E: What about the other merchants?

C: 「别担心，我说过你并非独自一人。」
E: "Don't worry. As I said before, you're not alone."

C: 恩公为何偏偏对此情有独钟……
E: Why do you have such a fondness for this, benefactor...?

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 一场道别未必需要双方都知晓。
E: Both parties don't have to be aware that this is a farewell.

C: 当然啦。您太客气了，该请求的是我才对。这里是筑梦边境，造梦者才是它的主人。
E: Of course! You don't have to be so courteous. I should be the one asking. This is Dream's Edge, after all, and the Dreamweavers are its true masters.

C: 完成了，请您看看吧。
E: It's done. Have a look.

C: 「我将要前往的那些星星，太陌生了，没有一颗是熟悉的。」
E: "Soon, I shall travel to those unfamiliar stars, none of which I recognize."

C: 无论如何，我认可你是个高尚的人。你心中常怀怜悯，即使立场相对，我也无法否认这点。
E: You're a noble person. I can't deny that you always have compassion in your heart, even though we may view things differently.

C: 开始决定目的地吧。
E: Let's start voting on our destination.

C: 不至于这么巧，我没见到任何和「六相冰」有关的线索。更有可能是翁法罗斯的某种力量率先在她身上显现了。
E: No, that'd be too much of a coincidence. I haven't seen anything related to Six-Phased Ice yet. It's more likely that some kind of energy on Amphoreus affected her before any of us.

C: 看来是达成共识了，那你们两人跟我来观景车厢吧。
E: Great, sounds like we're all good! Come with me to the Parlor Car then, you two.

C: 真是一段■■■的冒险啊——请在■■■处插入任意你觉得合适的形容词！
E: Ah, an utterly ■■■ adventure! Feel free to replace ■■■ with whatever description you see fit!

C: 呃…可是黑塔女士，您看这里…只从这画面上看，您明明都已经站在博识尊面前了啊？
E: Err... But look at this, Madam Herta... You're standing before Nous here! Right there.

C: 那个啊，应该就是个普通的忆泡吧？没什么特别的，其它舱段里也到处都是。
E: Mm, looks like one of those Memory Bubbles. It's not worth that much attention. You'll find many more in the other zones.

C: 等等——你看到丹恒的胸膛在一起一伏，证明他的生命体征尚未薄落。
E: Wait— you see Dan Heng's chest rising and falling, proof that life still lingers within him.

C: 用力摇一摇。
E: Shake him hard.

C: 但这次「开拓」容不得闪失。
E: But we can't afford to screw up this trailblazing expedition.

C: 这附近不像有人居住的样子，刚才的奇妙生物也不见了。不过……
E: Well, it looks like no one lives in this area, and that strange creature from before is nowhere to be seen. But...

C: 先斟酌一下？
E: Shall we consider our options?

C: 我看你还挺想活的…
E: It looks to me like you still prefer living...

C: 维尔图斯，我依然不认同你的做法。但罢了，就让我们给予黄金裔足够的信任吧。
E: Virtus, I still disagree with your methods, but it doesn't matter now. Let us place our trust in the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 好壮观的生物。
E: What magnificent creatures.

C: 一动不动的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
E: A humanoid statue that does not move. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

C: 不会有人被波及，这也是阿格莱雅大人的指示。
E: As Lady Aglaea instructed, no civilians will be affected by this.

C: 看，我们已连接在一起。
E: Look, we are joined together now.

C: 如此一来，约定便完成了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. The agreement between us is now complete.

C: 我尽力吧，哈托努斯。你明知我做不到，又何必一直提它呢？
E: I'll try my best, Chartonus. But why keep mentioning it if you already know I can't do it?

C: 神谕之所以是神谕，正因它是以「奇迹」的形式降临。无人知晓它究竟代表了谁的意志。
E: It's considered a prophecy because it manifested as a miracle, though its origin or whose will it represents remains unknown.

C: 你也是来散心的？
E: You're also here to unwind?

C: （指着大地兽）活跃一下气氛！
E: (point at the dromas) Let's liven up the atmosphere!

C: 嗯，留影算是我的兴趣。
E: Yes, it is an interest of mine.

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 哈哈，想激怒我，用情绪淹没使命？可惜我看穿了你的用意，你想用尽一切办法挽留我——
E: Haha, trying to enrage me in hopes that my emotions will overwhelm my mission? It's... It's a pity that I've seen through your intentions. You're... You're trying to persuade me to stay...

C: 没关系，眼下只有一个办法：你们可以去找<color=#dbc291ff>真言狮口</color>，给它讲些更有趣的传闻，兴许可以盖过这波浪潮。
E: It's alright. I think there's only one thing you can do right now. Go to <color=#dbc291ff>Verax Leo</color> and share something even more interesting with him. That way, there's a chance that you can cover up the rumors.

C: 欢迎来到你们的<color=#dbc291ff>私人浴宫</color>。
E: Welcome to your <color=#dbc291ff>private bath chamber</color>.

C: 可惜，没来得及进辩论场。
E: Unfortunately, it didn't make it into the Forum.

C: 时间紧迫，先看看能不能直接前进吧。
E: Time is running out. Check if you can directly move straight ahead.

C: 传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：
E: Go, bring word to the bard.

C: 你要脚踏实地！
E: Be realistic!

C: 是什么？告诉我们吧。
E: What is it? Tell us.

C: 没有波动，此步不记。
E: No fluctuations detected. A step will not be recorded.

C: 难题就在这里。<color=#dbc291ff>当旧日的神明倒下后，需要有人来暂时扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺，直到创世奇迹降临。</color>
E: But here's the problem: <color=#dbc291ff>After the fall of the old gods, someone must hold up the broken pillars and fill the vacant seats until the coming of the Miracle of Genesis.</color>

C: 唔…就此为止？确定要这么做吗？
E: So... you'll end things here? Are you sure about that?

C: 知道啦知道啦，但眼下不是只有你和*我们*嘛……
E: Alright, alright, but it's just you and us here...

C: 白厄
E: Phainon

C: 完
E: The End

C: 即便这座堡垒已然破败，但我们此刻要去做的事也没什么不同。
E: The fortress may be in ruins now, but what we're about to do is no different from what they were striving for back then.

C: 积了一大层灰，应该很久没人动过了。大概是万敌的族人在离开时留下的吧？
E: There's a thick layer of dust. Guess no one's been here for a long time. They must have been left behind by Mydei's people when they departed.

C: 我觉得你想多了。
E: It's all in your head.

C: 既然胜负未分，那就继续吧——
E: Since there is no victor, let's continue on—

C: 我不会…忘记您的声音。我一直…在等待这个时刻。
E: I could never... forget your voice. I've been waiting for this moment... all along.

C: 啊…那还真遗憾。
E: Ah, that's unfortunate.

C: 一个人道德的山尖，往往就是他对待朋友的方式。老师教给我的东西，大多都还回去了，但这一句依旧清晰。
E: A person's true character often comes to light in their friendships. Most of what my teacher taught me has slipped away, but this sentence is still vivid in my memory.

C: 没事的…{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}是我见过最强悍的战士。
E: He'll be fine... {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#} is the fiercest warrior I know.

C: 我们不是能借用它的力量吗？
E: But don't they let us use their power?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 你要窥探…我的记忆吗？
E: You want to look into... my memories?

C: 窗外…记住，要看向窗外。
E: Outside the window... Remember. Look outside the window.

C: 我不想和你多说什么。
E: I have nothing more to say to you.

C: 「但你从未屈服！你也从未临阵脱逃过啊。你金黄的战士之魂，也终有一日会战胜黑潮，重塑那悬锋的王座啊。」
E: "But you never faltered, nor did you flee! Your golden warrior spirit, brave and bold, will conquer the black tide, as foretold. To the throne of Kremnos, you'll return once more!"

C: 哈托努斯…这么说来，我是听说过它为悬锋城打造圣器的故事。
E: Chartonus... Come to think of it, I remember hearing about them making a holy vessel for Kremnos.

C: …我答应你，大工匠。
E: ...You have my word, Grand Craftsman.

C: 战斗仍在继续…听上去相当激烈。
E: The battle is still raging... I can feel the intensity even from here.

C: …是谁？！
E: ...Who goes there!?

C: 没人胆敢迎战吗？你们难道不愿赌上荣耀，在悬锋的光辉下燃烧自己的生命吗？
E: Does no one have the courage to take up the challenge? Are you not prepared to wager your glory and set your lives ablaze under the splendor of Kremnos?

C: 等不了，战斗的欲望正在高涨！
E: No can do, I'm already itching to fight!

C: 装作什么都没听到，一切如常。
E: Pretend you did not hear anything. Act oblivious.

C: 会找到机会让他现身的。
E: We'll find a way to make him come out of hiding.

C: 又是相同的机关…需要点燃两个火盆才能打开通路。
E: It's the same mechanism... We need to ignite the two braziers to unlock the way forward.

C: 你在召唤我吗，狮子？
E: Are you calling out to me, lion?

C: …因为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}四分五裂的灵魂就被贮存在这些雕像中。我听见的召唤…就来自于它们。
E: ...Because the fragments of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul are sealed in these statues. The calls that I've been hearing... are coming from them.

C: 记忆，诗歌…收集！
E: Memories, ballads... Collect!

C: 桀桀桀！不试试又怎么知道？
E: Teehee! It was worth a try, wasn't it?

C: 只差最后一步了…我能感应到……
E: We're almost at the end... I can sense it...

C: 呼呼…呼呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 白厄阁下，请继续保持平和的心态吧，我想你会没事的。
E: Please continue with this mentality, Lord Phainon. I believe you'll be alright.

C: 小白…呼…会成功的……
E: Snowy... zzz... will succeed...

C: 不管他身在何处，在与何物战斗…但愿他能通过这次考验。
E: Wherever he is, whatever he is fighting, I pray he makes it through this test.

C: 我好像没有黄金之血？
E: I don't think I have gold blood?

C: 母亲…母亲……
E: Mother... Mother...

C: 我…真的已经死了？
E: Am... I really dead?

C: 接下来怎么办？
E: So, what now?

C: 还真是人人皆知…
E: So, the entire world knows about this now...

C: 盲信总要付出代价，这也是留给白厄的一课。
E: There will be a price to pay for blind faith. This is also a lesson for Phainon.

C: 不甘心吧，凯妮斯阁下？元老院高居云崖，却仍要仰头看黄金裔的脸色。
E: Feeling dissatisfied, Lady Caenis? Despite the Council of Elders' lofty residence on Dawncloud, it must still tolerate the whims of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 这也是「负世」之重的一道侧写吧。如果翁法罗斯真有来生，记得多锻炼啊。
E: I guess this also counts as one aspect of the Worldbearing burden. If Amphoreus does have a next life, you may want to get your body in shape.

C: 泰坦可能近在咫尺，我无法忽视这个机会…为了挽回{NICKNAME}阁下的灵魂，也必须有人行这一程。
E: The Titan could be very near. I cannot let this chance slip by. Besides... someone has to make this trip to bring back {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}'s soul.

C: 有心事吗？
E: Is something troubling you?

C: 缇安她…偷偷为你准备了一份小礼物，可惜没能完成。*我*和缇宁正在加工，一定送到你手上。
E: Trianne... was actually working on a surprise gift for you. It's a pity she didn't get to finish it, but now Trinnon and I are working on it, and we'll make sure to give it to you.

C: 若你无法学会接纳死亡，便不能为哀地里亚所接纳。
E: If you cannot learn to accept death, then Aidonia has no place for you.

C: 不，我怎么能……
E: No, how can I—

C: 这位见惯了死亡的处刑人，她的消逝与常人并无不同：喉头的呜咽，眼中的遗憾，还有…微不可见的颤抖从指尖传来。
E: The executioner who had seen too much death died the same way as everyone else... A gasp for air, a wistful look in her eyes, and a barely perceptible tremor in her fingertips.

C: 不会错，这就是她最爱用的象征。
E: No doubt about it. This is her favorite symbol.

C: 逃避。逃避责任、逃避神谕、逃避命运——<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将与贪婪同行，亦将亡于分文。」</color>
E: You wish to run away. Run away from your responsibilities, from the prophecy, and from your destiny. <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall walk with greed, and die over petty change."</color>

C: 原来你也在！
E: So you came!

C: 老师曾用炼金秘法，成功将自己的灵魂与{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}、{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}短暂熔合，又在弥留之际受到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}招引，窥见了流淌的冥河。
E: Anaxa had used a secret alchemical art to temporarily fuse his soul with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. And when he was on the verge of death, he was pulled by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and caught a glimpse of the flowing River of Souls.

C: 为什么
E: Why!?

C: 我带宠物的，是猎人。
E: This is my pet, so I'm actually of the Hunter class.

C: 今天倒是听过很多。
E: I've definitely heard that name many times today.

C: 巨大的轰响过后，一个雄壮的身影立于你们面前——
E: After the rumble, a towering figure stands before you...

C: 万敌阁下…你又经历了一番死战啊。
E: Lord Mydei... You've been through some tough battles once again.

C: 我会找到归时的路…回到生者的世界…继续我的「守护」。
E: I will find my path of return... and go back to the world of the living... and continue my "protection."

C: 缇安，还有万敌…我明白了。
E: Trianne and Mydei... I get it now.

C: 第一次穿上阿格莱雅大人亲手编织的礼服，第一次和缇宝、缇安、缇宁大人散步，第一次和风堇小姐吹着晚风看星星，第一次和{NICKNAME}照料大地兽……
E: The first time I wore a dress personally made by Lady Aglaea... the first time I went for a walk with Lady Tribbie, Lady Trianne, and Lady Trinnon... the first time I enjoyed the night breeze and looked up at the stars with Miss Hyacine... the first time I took care of dromases with {NICKNAME}...

C: 没错，冥河并非凡物，绝不会被轻易阻断。那拒绝死者往生者，惟有神性的残躯。
E: That's right. The River of Souls is no material river. It cannot be blocked by ordinary means. Only a divine corpse can prevent the dead from reaching the next world.

C: 看来时间快到了。如果再不动身，恐怕…{M#他}{F#她}的灵魂会先我一步回归{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的怀抱。
E: {M#His}{F#Her} time is almost up. If I don't go now, I'm afraid {M#his}{F#her} soul will return to {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' embrace before me.

C: 这扇大门之后…应该就是炼金法阵所在了。
E: The alchemical matrix... should be behind this door.

C: 是它们二者一道…一道将我们困在这生死的夹缝当中！
E: It was the both of them... The both of them who trapped us in this crevice between life and death!

C: 因为，她和她哺育的一切，我所深爱的一切，早已被黑潮吞噬——我无家可归！
E: ...Because she... and all that she nurtured... all that I loved... they have long been devoured by the black tide. My beloved home... is no more.

C: 这就是黑潮，奥赫玛如今迫在眉睫的威胁。凯妮斯或许承诺了，灾厄三泰坦皆已陨落，奥赫玛必将重返「黄金世」——
E: That is the black tide — a looming threat that can bring Okhema to its knees anytime. Caenis may have promised that, with the Three Titans of Calamity gone, Okhema will return to an Era Chrysea once more, but...

C: 那黑袍剑士…「盗火行者」的名字，恐怕早已传遍大街小巷。现在，「纷争」用他的惊雷送来信号，告诉我们：它已自死灰中复活，并渴求着众神的火种。
E: By now, the name of that black-robed swordmaster... the Flame Reaver, has likely echoed throughout the city already. The roaring thunder is a message from the Strife demigod: The Flame Reaver has risen from death, and they hunger for the Coreflames of the gods.

C: 不出所料，这是逐火之旅距离「中止」最近的一刻。
E: As expected, this is the moment when the Flame-Chase Journey is the closest to its end.

C: 什么…？
E: What...?

C: *狂热的喝彩*
E: *fanatic cheering*

C: 放心，「拒绝死亡」本来就是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的神权。幸好，阁下的灵魂还未消散，这并非死而复生，而是引渡一位垂死之人回到现世。
E: Rest assured, "defying death" is {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' divine authority. Fortunately, your soul hasn't dissipated. This is not a resurrection, but the extradition of a dying person back to the present world.

C: 你在大会上说的那番话，我还是没能消化。就算它是真的…按照记忆重塑而成的事物，也不能和原来的画等号了。
E: I still don't really understand what you said during the assembly. Even if it were true, things reforged from memory could never be the same as the original anyway.

C: 镜子们，轮到你们出场了。
E: Mirrors, get to work.

C: （在翁法罗斯，「泰坦」是绕不开的话题。人们创造了神话，神话又塑造了他们…身在其中，总是很难保证客观。）
E: (In Amphoreus, Titans are a common topic of discussion. People create myths that, in turn, conceive Titans... It's a tricky task to keep an objective view when among the people of Amphoreus.)

C: （没能保护好{F#她}{M#他}，是我的失职…但还有一线希望。翁法罗斯独特的死生规则，如今反倒成了救命稻草。）
E: (I should have done more to keep {M#him}{F#her} safe... but it's not too late. We still have a fighting chance. The unique rules that govern life and death on Amphoreus might just work in our favor and save {M#him}{F#her}.)

C: 似乎是那刻夏的资料？值得注意，风堇也应该来看看。
E: This is... about Anaxa? I should read this. Hyacine, you should come have a look, too.

C: 那刻夏的研究…
E: Anaxa's research...

C: 可是，一旦离开人世…这一切不就化为乌有了么？
E: But when you depart the mortal realm... won't all of your accomplishments be reduced to nothing?

C: 所以，姐姐，我答应你——
E: This is why, sister, I promise you...

C: 「当我透过神的百眼俯瞰这渺小的大地，我终于得以下定决心。英雄的本能在驱使着我，为你们宣读命运的审判——」
E: "I gaze upon this fragile earth through the god's hundred eyes, and resolution fills me. A hero's instinct drives me forward, compelling me to deliver your final judgment —"

C: （这老头，病得比想象中还严重…看来是祭司们在有意隐瞒他的病情哪。）
E: (This old man is way sicker than I thought... Looks like the priests are deliberately hiding how bad it really is.)

C: 哈哈哈哈，被我戳中痛处了吧！好几次了，我远远望着你站在悬崖边，无助地四十五度仰头望天…那景象，真是好凄惨呀！
E: Hah! Struck a nerve, have I? I've seen you lingering on a cliff more than once, staring hopelessly at the sky. Pathetic.

C: 原来就是字面意思啊……
E: Was quite literal, after all...

C: 啊…对不起……
E: Ah... I'm sorry...

C: 每一篇史诗的作者，均如那既定的预言所书，在此处封笔。
E: The author of each epic, as the prophecy has foretold, stays their pen at this point.

C: 你决定前往冥河不再被阻断的斯缇科西亚，去和那位猫女汇合。希望那些闪闪发光且当啷作响的玩意，能一如既往…令人振奋起来。
E: You decide to head to Styxia, where the River of Souls is no longer blocked, to meet up with that catgirl. Hopefully, those glittering, clinking trinkets will, as always... lift your spirits.

C: 好、好陌生的语言，人家是不是出现幻听了……
E: I—I don't understand this language at all. Am I hallucinating...?

C: 我在黄金裔建议下接受了「岁月」的试炼，却发现自己早在进入翁法罗斯时就已经「死去」。为了寻回我被夺走的未来，众人加快步伐寻找「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯的踪迹。
E: Following the advice of the Chrysos Heirs, I embarked on the trial of Time, only to learn that I had been "dead" since the moment I stepped onto Amphoreus. To reclaim the future that had been stolen from me, we pushed onward in pursuit of the Death Titan, Thanatos.

C: 但「伙伴」这两个字…如今也包含了逐火的黄金裔们。无名客不能，也不会对伙伴的命运不管不顾。
E: But our "companions" now also include the Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heirs. The Nameless cannot and will not ignore the fate of our companions.

C: 怎么不让哈托努斯帮忙？
E: Why not get Chartonus to help?

C: 若真如此急不择途，你们倒不妨试试看。
E: If you're in such a hurry, give it a try.

C: 哼…就算你能完全掌控巴特鲁斯的意识，我照样能戳穿你的伪装——阿格莱雅。
E: Hmph... Even if you could fully control Bartholos's mind, I would still be able to see through your disguise — Aglaea.

C: 「所以这一次，即便只是徒劳，我也必须把讯息传入你的耳中——我需要你，赛法利娅。黄金裔的使命需要你。」
E: "So this time, I must say this to you, even if it's all in vain — I need you, Cifera. The Chrysos Heirs' mission needs you."

C: 你不打算问我吗？问我这些伤是怎么落下的？
E: Aren't you going to ask me how I got these wounds?

C: 那我们就…约定好了。给你一天机会反悔——等践行时一过，再想赶我走可就晚了！
E: Alright, let's make it a deal. You have one day to change your mind — once the Action Hour passes, there's no turning back.

C: 当然是——分文不花。我那个愚蠢的预言，你忘了？
E: Of course — spend nothing. Have you forgotten my silly prophecy?

C: 嚯，这里还守着个大家伙哪？
E: Ho, there's a big guy guarding this place!

C: 会将仁慈误解成软弱，看来你们那位主子自负又愚蠢。
E: Misinterpreting mercy for weakness shows how arrogant and foolish your master is.

C: 骗人的吧…
E: It must be a lie...

C: 明早见。到时候，我再帮你准备早餐吧。
E: See you tomorrow morning. I'll prepare breakfast for you then.

C: 冲天的火光也许会令人们混乱、畏惧，但我并不担心他们会迷失方向。因为奥赫玛还有你在，白厄。
E: The blaze soaring into the sky might sow fear and confusion, but I have no worries about people losing their way. After all, Okhema still has you to guide them, Phainon.

C: 裁缝女，你常说，我有成为一个好人，甚至是成为大家眼中的英雄的潜质……
E: You keep talking about how I have the potential to become a good person, or even what people call a "hero"...

C: 你真的…不用再吃药了吗？
E: So, you... really don't have to take the medicine anymore?

C: 何况我并非孤军奋战…在我身边，聚集了这世上最强大，最坚韧的伙伴们。
E: And I am not fighting alone... I have the strongest and most tenacious companions in the world.

C: 缇宝老师也在？在她身边那位……
E: Wait, is Lady Tribbie here too? And who is that next to her...?

C: 战斗的最后，「烈阳之翼」点燃了泰坦的羽翼，「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
E: In the final moments of the battle, the Sunlit Wings set the Titan's wings aflame, while the Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...

C: 「我的后裔终将领受祝福，脚踏虹桥重登天空…在那创世神谕的终点，从我手中带回这枚火种。」
E: "My descendants will be blessed and cross the rainbow bridge back to the sky... At the end of the Prophecy of Genesis, they will reclaim the Coreflame from my hands."

C: 这次没再睡懒觉了？
E: You didn't oversleep this time, did you?

C: 煽情的告别就留给未来吧，正好先在心底酝酿一下情绪。何况之前在浴场玩豹豹…碰碰……
E: Let's leave the emotional goodbyes for later. That'll give us some time to figure out what we should be feeling at that time. Besides, when we were playing Seal... Slammers...

C: 她也是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的骄傲。另外……
E: She's not just the pride of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus as well. And furthermore...

C: 请以彩虹作为指引，带我回到天空之子阔别千年的家园吧。
E: With the rainbow as your guide, lead me back to the home of the Skyfolk, a land we have not seen for a thousand years!

C: 你们胆敢私自操弄「浑象仪」，篡改天象？这是渎神！
E: How dare you tamper with the celestial globe and distort the weather? This is blasphemy!

C: 神明设立舞台，凡人演出戏剧。类似的戏码，「开拓」已不是第一次见证。
E: The divine set the stage, and the mortals perform the play. This isn't the first time we've witnessed such a scene while trailblazing.

C: 若真是这样，维持它形体的执念一定十分强烈，难道是那位塞涅俄丝残存的意志？
E: If that's really the case, there must be a super strong obsession keeping it in one piece. Could it be some remaining bits of Seliose's will?

C: *低吼*
E: *roaring*

C: 那时…？
E: "At that time"...?

C: 那时…？
E: "At that time"...?

C: 我看到了你们怪怨神的偏袒，却不敢对那信仰的中心起丝毫的反抗之心。你们懂得如何将刀子插进同胞的后背，却从未有勇气追溯仇恨的源头。
E: I see how you blame the god for their favoritism, yet lack the courage to rebel against the core of your beliefs. You're quick to turn your blades on your kin, but you never dare to confront the true source of your hatred.

C: 为什么你没有早些告诉我呢？如果我们早点谈到这些…也许我就能多和你聊聊，帮你解开心结啦……
E: Why didn't you tell us sooner? We could have helped you untangle your feelings if we had talked about this earlier...

C: …不用为火种的下落担忧，我们接着下山。
E: ...There's no need to worry about the Coreflame's whereabouts. Let's just descend the mountain.

C: {NICKNAME}，你还跑得动吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, can you still run?

C: 但既然注定…死亡，无法逃脱……
E: But if destined... inescapable, death is...

C: 哈托努斯已经下定决心了——
E: Chartonus has made up his mind...

C: 别担心，缇宁老师。我已经不再是被阿格莱雅带回奥赫玛的那具空壳了。
E: Don't worry, Trinnon. I'm no longer the empty shell that Aglaea brought back to Okhema.

C: 她疗愈世界的信念那么强大……
E: Her will to heal the world is so strong...

C: 从刚才的某一刻起，它就忽然陷入僵直，一动不动。
E: At some point earlier, they suddenly froze in place... not moving at all.

C: 无论如何，我们得走到最后。
E: No matter what, we need to see it through the end.

C: 如此说来，我已无需再维持这「神礼观众」的伪装。你渴求真相，白厄阁下——你亦将得到真相。
E: Very well, I need no longer maintain this Theoros masquerade. You seek truth, Lord Phainon — and truth you shall have.

C: 当然，我知道仅是这样的回答不能满足阁下的好奇心。因此，我愿附上这样一条信息——它对翁法罗斯而言并无价值，但对您这样的天外行者则意义重大。
E: Of course, that alone won't satisfy your curiosity. So let me share something more... something that means little to Amphoreus, but everything to a traveler like yourself.

C: 至此，请容我暂且搁置那台权杖的故事。回到最初的话题，所谓「生命的第一因」，它究竟是为何物？
E: Now, let's leave the Scepter's story here. Returning to where we began: What is "the prime mover of life"?

C: 时而畅想自己会打倒巨人，成为守护世界的英雄——当然，对于年幼的他，<color=#dbc291ff>「世界」只是这小小的村庄。</color>
E: ...dreaming of slaying the giant and becoming a hero to save the world — though to his young mind, <color=#dbc291ff>the "world" was just this small village</color>.

C: 说什么来什么…皮西厄斯老师？学校放学了吗？
E: Speak of the devil... Mrs. Pythias? Is school out already?

C: 谢谢你， 好伙伴！小兵人，咱们回家！
E: Thank you, my friend! Time to take our soldier home!

C: 让人忍不住想哼起儿时的歌谣呢……
E: You can't help but want to hum one of those old songs we used to sing...

C: …「如我所书」？
E: ..."As I've Written"?

C: 我的心愿，也早在踏上「天空」之前就已经完成了，把我所拥有的疗愈力量化为暖阳，均等地分给了每一个我珍视、爱护的生命。
E: My wish came true before I touched the Sky. I transformed my healing power into gentle sunlight, distributing it equally to every life I cherished and loved.

C: 否则——就跟上来，直面我，我会赐你一个与勇气相称的结局！
E: Otherwise — come and face me! I'll give you a warrior's death!

C: 我猜到是你，就趁着人们不注意，偷偷溜回来啦。
E: I figured it had to be you, so I snuck back here!

C: 「人生不过是个行走的影子，一个在舞台上指手画脚的伶人，登场片刻，就在悄无声息中退下。」
E: "Life's but a walking shadow, a poor player, that struts and frets his hour upon the stage, and then is heard no more."

C: 呵呵，毕竟阁下聪颖过人。
E: Hehe, sharp as ever, I see.

C: 告诉我…你甘为烈阳……
E: Answer me... will you be the blazing sun...

C: 它的帷幕仿佛能装下整个翁法罗斯，光怪陆离的戏剧在其中上演……
E: The curtain seemed to contain all of Amphoreus, where strange and fantastic dramas played out within...

C: {RUBY_B#白厄}「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>」{RUBY_E#}。
E: {RUBY_B#Phainon}"NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>."{RUBY_E#}

C: 哀丽秘榭，儿时的小村庄，微风和涛声依旧。
E: Aedes Elysiae, the little village of my childhood. The gentle breeze and the sound of waves still linger.

C: 说出缇宝的预言。
E: Speak of Tribbie's prophecy.

C: …对吗，缇宝老师？
E: ...Is that correct, Lady Tribbie?

C: 我名为灰黯之手，遐蝶，「死亡」之半神。听好，自往日而来的救世主——
E: I am the Hand of Shadow, Castorice, the demigod of Death. Listen closely, Deliverer from days past—

C: 「毁灭」…前所未有的力量在我胸中翻涌，暴烈的火焰随时都能将我的身躯崩裂，吞噬这个世界，这座可悲的囚笼…我以为，那就是世间最极致的力量，再无其他。
E: The Destruction... A power unlike anything before surged within me. Violent flames, ready to tear my body apart and consume this world, this wretched prison. I thought that was it... the ultimate power, which nothing could surpass.

C: 可惜，在这生死交界，巨龙仅余残躯……
E: A pity, at this crossroads of life and death, the giant dragon is but a shattered shell...

C: 毕竟，在三千万个昔涟中，人家可是第一个，也是唯一一个等到你的昔涟呢！
E: After all, across thirty million Cyrenes, I was the first and the only one who got to finally meet you!

C: 不仅如此，我们还都是开朗、美丽、乐观的青春少女，真是不可思议的巧合！
E: And we're both bright, pretty, and positive girls! Talk about coincidence!

C: 你是昔涟…还是迷迷？
E: Are you Cyrene... or Mem?

C: 没有，我没选那个选项。
E: Wait. I didn't pick that option.

C: 嗯，比应该理解的要更多一些。总觉得有些对话，像是我曾经知道，却又忘记了的事。
E: Yeah... I understand more than I should, actually. Honestly, some of that conversation feels like it's about things I once knew, but then forgot.

C: 别忘了带走它，这是你唯一能与外界沟通的手段。天才留下的信息还在提醒着你——
E: Don't forget to take it with you. It's your only means of communication with the outside world. The genius's message is still there, reminding you—

C: 那些逆贼曲解神谕，燃起战火，为的是锻造你们的怯懦！
E: Those rebels have twisted the prophecy and ignited the flames of war in order to stoke fear in your hearts!

C: 又一夜没睡吗？
E: Did you have trouble sleeping again?

C: 距离会议开始还有些时间，与其去听城邦代表们的嘁嚓细语，不如先认识下未来的战友吧。
E: There is still some time before the meeting begins. Rather than listening to the whispers of the delegates, why don't you get to know your future comrades first?

C: 这是……
E: This is...

C: 很高兴认识你们，「曳石爵」、「吟风爵」！两位还真是形影不离呢。
E: Nice to meet you, Dux Helkolithist and Dux Carminum! You two are inseparable, aren't you?

C: 哦？是灰色的小鱼苗，还有粉色的小海兔啊。
E: Oh? The little gray fry and pink sea hare.

C: 倒是你，一尾成日忙碌摇鳍的金鳟，怎突然有闲心来探望我？
E: Yet, you, a golden trout who's always busy all day, suddenly have the time to visit me?

C: 他会和帝皇有关联吗？
E: Could he be related to the emperor?

C: 到时候我们谨慎行动。
E: We'll operate carefully when the time comes.

C: 暴君…疯女皇……
E: Tyrant... Mad Queen...

C: 相信你的直觉。
E: I'll trust your gut feeling.

C: 我就知道，{NICKNAME}和我最默契啦。
E: I knew it. {NICKNAME} and I can practically read each other's minds~

C: 这…不太好吧？况且我们也不认识将来的她呀。
E: That... doesn't sound like a good idea. Besides, we don't even know her in the future.

C: 未成年人不得饮酒…
E: Minors shouldn't drink...

C: 可这么做…不是自作主张吗？
E: But... isn't this acting behind her back?

C: 奥赫玛盟军…无往不胜！
E: The Okheman Alliance... is invincible!

C: 失礼了。只是确认一下，您那两位贵客是否有异样——
E: My apologies. I was just checking whether everything was fine with those two distinguished guests of yours...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「剑旗爵」海瑟音——此人用海妖的歌谣令众人深陷幻觉，隐匿行踪。并伙同天外之人窃听机密，意图强夺火种，谋害凯撒！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Dux Gladiorum, Hysilens... She used the sea siren's song to immerse the crowds in an illusion and conceal her whereabouts. She then worked with those from beyond the sky to spy on confidential matters, hoping to rob the Coreflame by force and harm me, the Imperator!</color>

C: 现在，先回席位上吧。
E: You should head back to your seats for now.

C: 我理解您的愤怒，但恕我不能容许阁下继续影响演算的进程。
E: I understand your anger, but I cannot allow you to continuously influence the extrapolation's progress.

C: 我相信，那不会花上太久。
E: I believe the wait won't be too long.

C: <size=28>——呀！</size>
E: <size=28>Eek!</size>

C: 多久都没有关系哦？毕竟，等待是人家最擅长的事情嘛。
E: No matter how long it takes, it's okay. Waiting is what I do best.

C: 事关重大，权杖的内部结构太不稳定，我们也不知道会不会突发什么岔子。最理智的做法，就是抓紧时间重置一次演算，给银河再多争取些时间。
E: This is a critical matter. The internal structure of the Scepter is too unstable, and we don't know what complications might suddenly arise. The most rational course of action is to quickly run another extrapolation to buy the cosmos a bit more time.

C: 你受尽神的诓骗，沉溺海的黑暗。而现在，我会令你前行，成为你的光明。
E: You were deceived by gods and drowned in the ocean's darkness. But now, I will lead you forward and be your light.

C: 伶仃的锋刃，我会赐予你所求的一切。
E: Lonely blade... I shall grant you everything you seek.

C: 待你归来之时，就请以那蜜酿浇奠这座墓碑吧。
E: When you return, please pour that honey brew upon this grave.

C: 然后，再让我们当面角逐，决定这轮新日该承载谁的火光。
E: And then, let us face each other and decide whose flame will rise with this new dawn.

C: 恰如现在，二位一定倍感困惑：为何在一名寻常智械构筑的世界中，你们始终无法在正面战场取得胜果？
E: You must be very confused about why you could not gain a straightforward victory in a world constructed by an ordinary Intellitron.

C: 他只能眼睁睁看着自己，被关进这座由「记忆」打造的囚笼。
E: He won't be able to do anything but watch as he's locked into this prison forged by "memories."

C: 仅作为对先行者的敬意，由我来解答您的困惑：阁下是否听说过阿斯德纳星系的「联觉梦境」？很有趣，在久远的过去，那里也有一座监狱。
E: I shall answer your confusion purely out of my respect for those who came before me. Have you heard of the Synesthesia Dreamscape in the Asdana system? Interestingly, in the distant past, that place once had a prison, too.

C: 黑塔女士和螺丝咕姆先生，被人们称为「天才」。据说只有银河中最具智慧的人，才能得到翁法罗斯真正的造物主「博识尊」的青睐。
E: People call Madam Herta and Mister Screwllum "geniuses." Apparently, only the smartest people in the cosmos can receive the blessings of Nous, Amphoreus's true creator.

C: 为了这场救世之战，我要倾覆的「律法」只有一条，要献上的半神也只有一位——
E: There is only one law I want to overturn to aid the final battle of deliverance, so I will only offer the life of one demigod...

C: 海列屈拉，我以凯撒之名，最后一次对你下令。
E: In the name of the Imperator, I command you one last time, Helektra.

C: 我问你，树庭西方关隘守军投降了吗？
E: The troops defending the pass to the west of the Grove. Have they surrendered?

C: 这是战略转移。正面战场有那掣地的伏龙，足够了。
E: It's a strategic change of plans. The seismic walking dragon is enough for that battlefield.

C: 凯撒，为何我们不在出征的名录中？
E: Why are we not allowed to march out with the army, Imperator?

C: 你看这面棋盘，这些棋子，像什么？
E: Look at this chessboard. What do the pieces look like?

C: 还是退回观众席，给自己、翁法罗斯还有整片银河一个更好的交代。
E: Or do you want to return to the audience's seat and give yourself, Amphoreus, and the entire cosmos a more fitting end?

C: 还真是本色泽明艳的史书。
E: What brightly colored annals.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这件事，从来没有发生过。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>No one ever did.</color>

C: 绝不落下任何一人。
E: No one will be left behind.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>█ 我 ██ ███ █████ 你 ██████</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>（…第一次翻开《如我所书》的时候？）</color>
E: (...Like the first time I opened As I've Written.)

C: 当然，你前面去哪儿了？
E: Of course I missed you. Where have you been all this time?

C: 难怪这些设施会有反应。这本书——本身就是一把「钥匙」。
E: No wonder these facilities are reacting to it. This book is a "key."

C: 现在，我能够确信：「岁月」就是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>{RUBY_E#}记录翁法罗斯的书页。如果它从世上消失，它铭记的一切在星空中佚失，那位「星神」一定会将视线投向这里……
E: Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...

C: 金血忆灵？已经渗透到这里了么……
E: Ichor memosprites? They've even reached this place...

C: 恕我拒绝，这份职责似乎过于沉重了。
E: Allow me to refuse. That duty seems far too heavy.

C: 解锁「访问控制节点」
E: Unlock Access Control Node

C: 倘若她的离去是在循环之内，那么或许每一次的轮回，遐蝶都会照顾好这枚纯净的灵魂。
E: If her departure was part of the cycle, then perhaps in every reincarnation, Castorice would take care of this pristine soul.

C: 答案很简单：这一路上，「我」一直沉睡在相机里，陪着{NICKNAME}走完了全程。
E: The answer is simple. "I" have been dozing inside the camera all along, and I accompanied {NICKNAME} during {M#his}{F#her} entire journey.

C: 那、那还不是因为网上只能搜到七百年前的攻略！
E: W—Well, that's because we could only find <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old guides online!

C: 我没有忘记，你第一次换上这身衣服，看向镜子的那天。
E: I still remember the day when you first put on these clothes and looked in the mirror.

C: 「{NICKNAME}……」
E: "{NICKNAME}..."

C: 最终拯救了翁法罗斯的，除了■■■十二名■■■■■，还有一名关键的■■■■……
E: In the end, the salvation of Amphoreus was not only thanks to the ■■■■■-■■■■■■■ twelve ■■■■■■■ ■■■■■, but also to one crucial ■■■■■■■ ■■■■ ■■■■■■ ■■■ ■■■...

C: 因为在这片忆域里，三月乘客，她无处不在帕。
E: Because in this Memory Zone, March is everywhere.

C: 什么，听不见…
E: What? I can't make it out...

C: 真是无巧不成书，刚有人提醒我要注意你。
E: What a coincidence. I was just told by someone to watch out for you.

C: 什么……
E: What...

C: {F#她们}{M#他们}不止是我的同伴，也是我来时所经的路，引我至此。
E: They are more than just my companions. They are the path I took that led me to where I am now.

C: 龙裔，你是这场献祭中最重要的供物：再坚韧的意志也终将被忆潮吞没，届时，你，还有{RUBY_B#化龙妙法}你承载的力量{RUBY_E#}，便能为我等所有……
E: Long's Scion, you are the most important offering in this ritual sacrifice. No matter how strong your will is, it will eventually be swallowed by the memoria tide. When that time comes, you and {RUBY_B#Transmutation Arcanum}the powers you bear{RUBY_E#} will serve us...

C: 为捍卫世间生灵，我从未后悔。
E: I have never regretted defending the creatures of this world.

C: 只是…若无万分坚定之心，你依旧会受到那片忆潮阻拦，更遑论从中打捞同伴。
E: It's just... without absolute resolve, you still won't be able to pass through that memoria tide, much less save someone from it.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>███不必█逃避██ █ 命█运█ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>███Do not█run from██ █ your█fate█ █</color>

C: 豹杀清场，桀桀桀～
E: A total wipeout! Hehehe~

C: 准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
E: Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.

C: 好啦，现在别纠结这个了。如果*我们*变多了，那翁法罗斯的「门径」也会变得更多！
E: Oh, let's not get hung up on that now. If there are more of us, then there'll be more "passages" in Amphoreus too!

C: 准备带谁？
E: Who are you taking with you?

C: 那么，事不宜迟——第四面镜！
E: Well then, let's not waste any more time. Fourth Mirror!

C: 仙舟古语有云，达则兼济天下。你们的提议自有七天将裁夺，我只负责转达。
E: As an old Xianzhou saying goes: Those who succeed should help all under heaven. Your proposal must be decided on by the Seven Arbiter-Generals. I'm just here to relay the message.

C: 公司内部的分歧，已经严峻到这种地步了么？
E: Has the internal conflict within the IPC really gotten this bad?

C: 终于，最后的「再创世」完成了。
E: Finally, the last Era Nova has been completed.

C: 「所以，流淌吧——黄金的血液——」
E: "So flow, golden blood... flow..."

C: 话虽如此，是我的错觉吗？这<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>……
E: Is it just me, or does this <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>...

C: 不应该啊，是因为「记忆」的质料被「再创世」耗尽了？
E: That shouldn't be possible. Could it be that the Era Nova exhausted all of the Remembrance's texture?

C: 我们浴血捍卫那柄利剑，它刺向的深渊——就是「铁墓」的温床。
E: We fought tooth and nail to defend that blade. And the abyss it pierced... was the very breeding ground of Irontomb.

C: 「等待曾经的『敌人』，再度来到他的面前。」
E: "Waiting for his former 'enemies' to stand before him again."

C: 「毕竟是树庭贤人口中，翁法罗斯最具眼光的泰坦呢。」
E: "Well, the Sages of the Grove do call him the Titan with the sharpest eye in Amphoreus."

C: 「我宁愿被遗忘，也不愿被定义。」
E: "I would rather be forgotten than be defined."

C: 「终于，你们卸下了他背负至今的『愿望』。」
E: "At last, you've released him from the wishes he carried for so long."

C: 但既然，你会为这些石料的光芒所苦恼……
E: But since you're troubled by the radiance of these stones...

C: 探索、了解、建立、连结——其实还有第五个词汇，尽管没有被写入章程，却常伴无名客左右。
E: Explore, understand, establish, and connect... Although unwritten, there's actually a fifth word in the creed that has always accompanied the Nameless.

C: 前路漫漫，但我们会在终点等你。
E: The road ahead is long, but we'll be waiting for you at the end.

C: 「记忆的种子」……
E: "Seed of Memory"...

C: 当然。没有落下一丝涟漪哦？
E: Of course you did. And you didn't leave a single ripple behind.

C: 那颗小小的种子，也长成高高的大树了呢。
E: The little seed had grown into such a big tree.

C: 那你一定还记得，水晶花和小妖精，我为你写下的第一首诗。
E: Then you must also remember the first story I wrote for you. The one about the crystal flower and the little fairy.

C: 但是啊，以我的审美，会再加上小小的一笔呢。
E: But I'll add a small bit to suit my tastes.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>若有朝一日，你必须亲手摧毁「智识」，它会成为你的助力。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If the day ever comes when you must destroy the Erudition with your own hands, it'll come to your aid.</color>

C: 随便想想，又没付诸行动，别紧张嘛~
E: Hey, I was just thinking out loud. I wasn't actually gonna do anything. Don't be so tense!

C: 但愿没弄坏什么东西…
E: I hope you didn't break anything...

C: 我有些担心他们…
E: I'm worried about them...

C: 呵，看看谁来了。这不是星穹列车的主人吗？
E: Heh, look who's here. If it isn't the master of the Astral Express.

C: 管它这那的，最后都得归我管。
E: Whatever. It'll all end up under my control anyway.

C: 此事不假。不过，我和吟风爵偶尔也会觉得，在树庭最敬重的泰坦座前恣意畅饮，似有不妥……
E: That's true. However, sometimes Dux Carminum and I feel it's a bit... inappropriate to drink so freely before the throne of the most revered Titan in the Grove...

C: 不如，就由凯撒大人为我们起稿吧？
E: How about letting the Great Imperator draft it for us?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「无我，即无世界。去思，去见，去征服。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Without me, there is no world. Go think, observe... and conquer."</color>

C: 呵…吾师，赛法利娅——谢谢你们。
E: Heh... Teacher, Cifera... Thank you both.
Mmm...

C: 啊，灰宝！
E: Ah, Grayie!

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 银河向我们露出了温柔的一面呢。
E: The cosmos showed us a kinder face.

C: 我…还醒着吗？
E: Am I... still awake?

C: 介意与我分享吗？
E: Care to share?

C: >>>注释：桃子。
E: >>> Comment: Peach.
>>> Related to: La... Lam... Love...

C: 嘘。你说。我听。
E: Shh. You speak. I listen.

C: 「没有『意识』，也就没有『心』的基础，无法拥有真正的感情。」
E: "Not having a 'consciousness' means not having the foundations of a 'heart,' making them unable to obtain real emotions."

C: 直到有一天，它惊讶地发现——水晶花掉在地上，碎掉了！
E: Until one day, to their surprise... the crystal flower fell to the ground and shattered!

C: 那时人们会看见，倒映在涟漪中的，是一切美丽的事物。
E: Then, people would see every beautiful thing reflected in that ripple.

C: 最初的涟漪，她最后…
E: So, at the end, that first ripple...
███████ You have come: you must have arrived ███████

C: 卡厄斯兰那
E: Khaslana

C: 看访问记录，那女人都大半年没登录过这里了，避难工作是由代理站长——一个叫艾丝妲的人指挥的。
E: According to the access history, she hasn't logged in here for over six months. The evacuation was directed by the acting lead researcher — a girl named Asta.

C: 那你去拿吧。
E: Then go and fetch your thing.

C: 你别装了。
E: You drop the act.

C: （一阵混乱，什么也看不清。似乎有东西在快速移动！）
E: (There is a burst of chaotic activity and everything was a blur. Something seems to be moving fast!)

C: 卡了老半天，可把我憋坏啰，哎哟哟。
E: I was stuck for so long it was starting to ache. Ouch!

C: 那我留着了。
E: I will keep it then.

C: 我承认，你绕了这么一大圈，我要是一根毛也没留下，是有点不地道。
E: I must admit, you've gone such a long way. If I don't give you something, it'll be a little mean.

C: 哈哈，黑塔才不管这个地方呢。不如说有人的地方，就会产生江湖吧。
E: Haha, Herta doesn't really have anything to do with it. I'm afraid wherever you find people, you find gossip of some variety.

C: 没错，我就是你要找的人。
E: That's right, I'm the one you're looking for.

C: 我要是连这都不知道，岂不枉称个「瓜农」虚名？
E: If I didn't even know that, could I really call myself Gossipmonger?

C: 没想到你会来吧，不是说你最近很忙吗？
E: I didn't expect to see you here. Didn't you say you were really busy?

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>戴黑框眼镜的斜刘海</color>小伙，让我看看哪个才是「瓜田里猹」？）
E: (A young man <color=#dbc291ff>with black-rimmed glasses and a slanted fringe</color>. Which one is Richard_Knowitall?)

C: 什么寡头理查…你在说什么啊。
E: Richard knows what now...? What are you talking about?

C: 拜托，我这种公正不阿、聪明好学的正直之人当站长还差不多，你一个听乐子的，搞清楚自己的定位好吧。
E: Please. Only upstanding and intelligent people like myself are worthy of such a position. You gossipers need to figure out your place in the hierarchy.

C: 咳，别误会。这个，虽然下了单，但买不到啊…我这不也是为了加强安防保证这次的袭击事件不再出现嘛……
E: I did make an order, but it didn't go through... I was just trying to improve security measures to make sure attacks like this don't happen again.

C: 请选择你要查询的认证序列：
E: Please select the certification sequence you wish to access:

C: 好了好了，按理来说，我不该和「无敌宇宙核弹头协会」的编外人员说话。但这毕竟是我们<color=#dbc291ff>第一次</color>谈话……
E: Okay, okay. Normally I am not supposed to talk to people outside of the Invincible Space Warhead Association. But after all, this is our <color=#dbc291ff>first</color> conversation...

C: 依靠衣服辨认。
E: By their clothes.

C: 不过我担心这一版写得太直接了，贸然发出去，会暴露我炙热的感情，给她带来很大压力。
E: But I am worried this may be too direct. If I send this to her, it will reveal my burning desire and put her under tremendous pressure.

C: 总之，没有任何预兆表明她会拒绝我的表白。所以，如果我没有在约定时间收到她的消息…一定是银河电波中继器出了问题！
E: Anyway, there is no sign that she's going to reject me. If I don't receive her reply within the usual time frame... it means there must be something wrong with the Cosmic Airwave Repeater!

C: 别听我师父乱说！你要是有空听他唠叨，早找着银河电波中继器啦。
E: Don't listen to my master! If you have the time to listen to him, you would've found the Cosmic Airwave Repeater already.

C: （不是这里。）
E: (Not here)

C: 就是几步路的事啊！
E: The solution is just a few steps away!

C: 这就完了？
E: That's it?

C: 一、二、三……
E: One, two, three...

C: 如果在接触录像带时不够小心，轻则感到眩晕，强制中断信息摄入；重则会致人行为异常，混淆现实与印象的边界，导致记忆与意识的紊乱。
E: If you are not careful when touching the videotapes, best-case scenario is you will feel a little dizzy, and the data transfer may be forcibly interrupted. Worst-case scenario, it may cause abnormal behaviors, hallucination, and paranoia, eventually leading to memory and consciousness disorders.

C: 一个对抗「军团」之人的生平…
E: The life of someone who fought against the Legion...

C: 我梦见了冰冷的空间站、诀别的爱人、巨大的星球、以及沉默的无线电。
E: I dreamed of a cold space station, a lost lover, a huge planet, and a silent radio.

C: 仿生人会梦见电子羊吗…
E: Can an android dream of electric sheep?

C: 我猜，是科室改制。
E: My guess is that it has something to do with the department's reform.

C: 看来你已经顺利抵达了现场，那我们长话短说，你现在所处的这片区域已被裂界造物侵占。
E: Now you've reached the site, let me cut to the chase. Fragmentum creatures are present in this area.

C: 我把他捡回来到现在，从来没发生过这种事。
E: In all the time since I took him in, this has never happened.

C: 你听卡波特说了很久，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
E: You've listened to Capote for a long time, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...

C: （清醒一点！回忆起来我来这里的目的是什么！）
E: (Wow, the cringe is strong... I need to remember what I came here for!)

C: 那个卡波特确实有点东西…
E: That Capote does have something about him...

C: 你见过阿兰？
E: You saw Arlan?

C: 阿兰，你不用再继续隐瞒我了。你的这场修行，我已经和{NICKNAME}彻头彻尾调查清楚了！
E: Arlan, you don't need to hide this from me any longer. {NICKNAME} and I know all about the trials you're putting yourself through!

C: 如果你还不愿意接受我的道歉，那我只能一点一点，深刻反省，向你展示我的决心。
E: If you can't forgive me right now, then... I—I'll reflect further and... find a way to prove that I'm willing to change.

C: 这份限定写真就是证据！
E: This limited-edition snapshot!

C: 阿兰ID的通行证。
E: Arlan's ID Pass.

C: 不论是这张照片，还是刚才你独自一人与敌人战斗的样子……
E: ...when I saw this photo, when I saw you fighting alone just now...

C: 双方都应该动动脑子才对。
E: You both need to use your brains more.

C: 等你们的好消息喔。
E: I'm waiting for your good news.

C: 这些呜呜伯收集的相关所有物，不是为了戏弄它们的前任研究员，也不是为了破坏空间站的研究秩序……
E: These Wubbaboos were gathering his belongings not to prank their previous caretaker, and not to destroy order on the space station...

C: 没关系。
E: That's alright.

C: 哦，黑塔女士的又一个粉丝？行吧，你随意欣赏，只不过这幅画像很快就要被收起来了。
E: Oh, another fan of Madam Herta's? Well, I'm afraid this portrait's being taken down soon.

C: 不是，他们到得要更早些。
E: No, they arrived earlier.

C: 这次我打算从空间站内部入手，看看能不能找到一些线索，还原入侵者当时的行动路线，说不定就能发现之前错过的盲区。
E: This time, I plan to start from inside the space station and see if I can find some clues to trace the intruders' steps. Maybe I can find the blind spot I missed before.

C: 她真好看。
E: Aaah... She's just so pretty.

C: 是不太一样。
E: It's quite unexpected.

C: 其中还有个来自朋克洛德的超级骇客，说来惭愧，我已经在她那儿吃过一次亏了——
E: One of them is a super hacker from Punklorde. I'm ashamed to admit that I've lost to her once before...

C: 所以咱们一起行动真的很重要，拜托你了！
E: So it's really important that we work together! Please!

C: 呃，这段记录是不是损坏了——她穿过墙，然后消失了？
E: Huh, is this section of the record damaged...? She went through the wall and disappeared.

C: 从这番对话来看，进入模拟宇宙的一共有两人——她，还有她的同伴。
E: It is safe to assume that two people entered the Simulated Universe — her, and her companion.

C: 「啊？怎么不信邪呢，都说了是右边，右边！」
E: "What? Why won't you believe me? I told you, it's the right side, the right!"

C: 为什么这么肯定？
E: Why are you so sure?

C: 你看着墙上的图案慢慢溶解、消失…至此，便是结束了。
E: You watch the image on the wall slowly dissolve and disappear... and that's the end of it.

C: 慈爱的「文字叙事玩家」说，游戏是为了铭记。
E: The loving Narrative Gamer said, "Games are about remembrance."

C: 真奇妙，看着你解开我设下的谜题，一层层突破障碍，让人有种莫名的自豪…和雀跃。虽然只有一点点，但我似乎体会到了银狼的心情。
E: Fascinating. Just seeing you untangling my puzzles and breaking through the obstacles I laid down makes me proud and... somewhat thrilled. Even if it's just a fraction of the original, I think I can understand how Silver Wolf feels.

C: 哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
E: Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.

C: …我不是怀疑自己。
E: ...I am kinda good-looking.

C: 想必你就是{NICKNAME}口中的生物，你一定常被「可爱」一词形容，这是否给你带来过困扰？请相信我，你的内涵远无法被这一词汇承载。圆球啊，你的名字叫——「魅力」。
E: You must be the creature that {NICKNAME} mentioned. Does it bother you that people deem you cute? Believe me when I say that you are more than cute, my friend — you are a delightful ball of pure charm.

C: 再拖下去恐怕有危险——我们上。
E: He could be in considerable danger. Let's proceed.

C: 而现在，星穹列车就是这枚种子。这里令我产生归属感，一种有如「家」的温暖，我相信这源自你们彼此深厚的情谊。
E: The Astral Express is the seed. It feels warm — like a home to me. I am certain this is thanks to the strong friendship you have with one another.

C: 可惜这么大的烟花……
E: But the fireworks...

C: 啥情况，列车还能被追尾？
E: *sigh* How do you crash into someone in space...

C: 如果{F#她}{M#他}确实无罪，就用回答来为自己洗脱嫌疑吧。
E: If {F#she}{M#he} is truly innocent, {F#she}{M#he} can clear {F#her}{M#his} name with answers.

C: 现在这状况，我看更像是在刻意隐瞒些什么。
E: They're hiding something...

C: 哦，失踪的科员是声讨管理层的意见领袖，这就有些耐人寻味了。
E: So the researchers who disappeared were at the forefront of challenging management. Isn't that a curious puzzle piece?

C: 曾有人偶然窥见相位灵火的踪迹，捕得一绺子火。黑塔将其收下，又借予阮•梅研究，不想灵火火种却因此丢失。
E: Somebody was once able to glimpse the traces of the Phase Flame, and obtained a wisp of its kindling. Herta kept it and lent it to Ruan Mei for her research, but the kindling was lost in the process.

C: 但失败的人生同样是人生，他们有权品尝至最后；也只有摔倒在地，无人扶起的时候，愚者才能领悟如何站起。
E: ...but even a life marked by failure is a life worth living — it is only in moments of solitude and despair, when help is absent, that fools grasp how to pick themselves up.

C: 这也是留给她的课题。
E: It is also a lesson I left for her.

C: 我本以为#4波尔卡•卡卡目把俱乐部会员抹消得差不多了，没抱多少希望…哦，瞧瞧是谁来了？
E: I thought member #4, Polka Kakamond, had gotten rid of most of the Society members. I didn't have a lot of hope for this... Oh? Look who's here.

C: 你走远点，别靠近这里！
E: Get lost and get as far away from here as you can!

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 那不是正好？「寂静领主」——你在听吗？我是#83黑塔，我想见你。我们一定会有很多共同话题！
E: That'd be great! Hey, Lord of Silence, are you listening? I'm member #83, Herta, and I want to meet you. I believe you and I will have a lot to talk about.

C: 激活特殊的联觉信标。
E: Activate the Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 我要弄清的是「生命的本质」，每一个体都拥有，却不自知的事物——无论是存在的物质性，还是超出物质之外的不可知物。
E: I wish to discover "the true essence of life," something that all individuals possess unknowingly, whether it is the materialism of their existence or an unknown entity beyond corporeal realms.

C: 阅读标识记录。
E: Read the record

C: 奇怪的声音……
E: What strange sounds...

C: 花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
E: The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.

C: 这样就对了嘛，你要争取成为剧场的台柱子啊。
E: That's more like it! You should aim to become the star of the entire theater!

C: 新的大明星即将诞生。
E: A new star is about to be born.

C: 已到达指定地点，正在同步历史数据……
E: Arrived at designated location. Synchronizing historical data...

C: 当前空闲的当事人为：尤利安。因当事人文化水平较低，建议采取当面会晤形式，向当事人了解更多细节。
E: The party involved who is currently available is: Julian. As their education level is comparatively low, I suggest a face-to-face meeting with them to learn more.

C: 你们已经完成了自己的使命，一切都结束了……
E: You have already completed your mission. You can rest now...

C: 回去后我要向大守护者申请一下，看看能不能查出他们的名单，然后在这里立一块碑，也算是给这些英勇的战士一个纪念。
E: I will make an application to the Supreme Guardian when we go back and see if we can find out their names. I'd like to set up a monument here as a memorial to these brave soldiers.

C: 光顾着和你聊天了，快尝尝这碗茶，这可是所有新茶里人气最高的，名叫「海的味道」。
E: That's enough chit-chat. Try this tea! It is the highest-rated of all my new brews. Its name is: "Taste of the Sea."

C: 来，客官，请——
E: Please enjoy!

C: 要这么文绉绉吗，不就是哪有活人呗？你往外走是肯定没戏了，整个世界上唯一还有人类定居的地方，就只有咱们的好贝洛伯格啰。
E: Settlement? What a literary turn of phrase. Why, there's only one place in this world where the living still reside — our beloved Belobog! The further away you get, the dicier things become.

C: 我？还不是被你们吓到了…我本来在这儿东找找西翻翻，想搞点古代的遗物回去小赚一笔…结果你们发出那么大动静，我以为银鬃铁卫来了。
E: Me? You guys scared me to death... There I was looking for relics to sell, when all of a sudden you came stomping over. I thought the Silvermane Guards were paying me a visit.

C: 是呀，咱们得帮布洛妮娅想想办法！公司的势力那么大，光靠贝洛伯格人自己肯定搞不定这事……
E: Yeah! We have to help Bronya out! The IPC is too big and powerful — the Belobogians won't be able to resolve this problem on their own.

C: 我对「星际和平公司」的了解没有你们多，但如果典籍中的记录属实…那是一个横跨整个银河的庞大组织，他们想镇压住贝洛伯格恐怕易如反掌……
E: You seem to have a deeper knowledge of the Interastral Peace Corporation than I do, but if the records are accurate and they truly have a presence throughout the galaxy, the IPC could crush Belobog like a bug if they wanted to.

C: {NICKNAME}…又把你们卷进贝洛伯格的事务，我很抱歉。但面对「星际和平公司」这种背景强大的势力，我们需要一切能够争取到的外部援助。
E: {NICKNAME}, I apologize for dragging you into Belobog's affairs again, but when faced with an entity as powerful as the IPC, we need all the external help we can get.

C: 怎么了？二位莫非是想跟我讨论金融专业方面的问题？
E: So, how can I help? Not sure on the arrangement, or...?

C: 公司的要求很不合理。
E: The IPC's demands are unreasonable.

C: …哎呀，这里面的利害关系也太复杂，太难处理了吧！学校里可没人教过这些呀——欸？这么一说，我失忆之前有上过学吗？
E: All these vested interests — so hard to undo any of it... they don't teach this stuff in school. Wait... did I even go to school?

C: 去掉「业务」的部分，感觉你的工作内容跟列车组也差不多嘛！
E: Huh, your job sounds pretty similar to the Express crew's! Aside from the "business," I guess...

C: 准备好了吗？该去把这帮「公司」的家伙赶出下层区了。
E: Ready for action? It's time to kick the IPC out of the Underworld.

C: 我、我真的啥也不知道啊！
E: I—I really don't know anything!

C: 我更愿意相信你的判断。
E: I trust your judgment more than anyone else's.

C: 咦？三月小姐身边这位女士…总觉得有些眼熟？
E: Hmm... This lady next to Miss March looks oddly familiar.

C: 这么大的惊喜，真是无论如何都预料不到。
E: ...I must say, I didn't anticipate this at all.

C: 职级降级，从P<unbreak>45</unbreak>下调至P<unbreak>44</unbreak>，基本薪酬作相应调整；取消一个周期内，你参与的所有奖励计划，包括股票期权和绩效奖金。
E: Your rank will be demoted from P<unbreak>45</unbreak> to P<unbreak>44</unbreak>, with corresponding adjustment to your basic salary. All bonuses for the current cycle will be revoked, including stock options and performance bonuses.

C: 所以，现在的收集结果是——
E: So, the final conclusion is...

C: 不知道前方是否有公司的人阻拦，务必提高警惕。
