E: Keep your guards up — we might run into IPC agents ahead.

C: 于她看来，将贝洛伯格并入公司是唯一的「存护」之道。我虽持有不同观点，但以现有的算力难以找到反驳的证据。
E: From her perspective, the only way to "preserve" Belobog is by incorporating it into the IPC. While I do not agree with her viewpoint, I lack the computational power to provide evidence to the contrary.

C: 一定可以的！你不觉得吗？托帕小姐身上有种…唔，该怎么形容呢…有种势在必得的气质！
E: Miss Topaz is definitely up to the job! She has that aura of... what's the word... invincibility!
...Huh?

C: 不过感觉，稍微有点…吵耶。
E: Geez... I can barely even hear myself think!

C: 我明白，你心中战斗的欲望正在高涨…但这次还是用「潜爆机兵」解决问题吧。
E: I know that your urge to fight is overwhelming... but let's use the Automaton Stealth Bomb this time.

C: 嗯，它的外观和「灰熊」类似，但武器更先进，装甲也更坚硬。
E: Correct — the exterior is similar to the Grizzly, but its weapons and armor are more advanced.

C: 我给你讲一个故事吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let me tell you a story, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我其实也是在孤儿院长大的孩子。直到被来自上层区的一家人收养以后，我的人生轨迹才发生了变化。
E: I actually grew up in the orphanage. It wasn't until I was adopted by an Overworld family that life changed for me.

C: 让我们继续吧！
E: Let us continue!

C: <size=36>比赛，开始！</size>
E: <size=36>Let the match begin!</size>

C: 让我们将热烈的掌声献给两位斗士吧！现在，我宣布——
E: Let's give it up for the two warriors — Now, I'm proud to announce that...

C: 我现在就想参加下一场比赛。
E: I want to be in the next match now.

C: 你在这里干什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我可不这么认为。你看，我们都是两只眼睛一个嘴巴，谈吐无异，气度相像。
E: I don't think so. You see, we both have two eyes and a mouth. We sound the same and act the same way.

C: 如果我能早一点从别人眼中看到自己的模样，遭遇也许就会截然不同，不论是依靠水魈，还是依靠那封信。
E: If I could see myself in other people's eyes earlier, my life might be different. If it wasn't for the Xenohydro, then it was the letter.

C: 波少！你竟然喜欢吃蛋黄酱那么难吃的东西，把我送你的礼物还给我！
E: Master Capote! I can't believe you eat mayonnaise. That's disgusting! Give me back the gifts I gave you!

C: 如果你还有事找我，记得去找我的秘书「不存在先生」拿号。
E: If you want to find me, remember to ask my secretary Mr. Nonexistent for a number.

C: 算了，在这里呆再久也没用。能讨回真心吗？能讨回我们的笑和泪吗？能讨回在他身上寄寓的研究梦想吗？！
E: Forget it, there's no point staying here any longer. Can we get our hearts back? Can we get back our laughter and tears? Can we get back our hopes and dreams!?

C: （看来这步是正确的……）
E: (This seems to be the correct step...)

C: （这个怪物似乎正把守着大门…想办法打倒它吧。）
E: (This monster seems to be guarding the gate... Find a way to take it down.)

C: 我原本没有怀抱太大希望，但没想到桑博居然真的带来了妈妈的回信……
E: I didn't have high hopes, but amazingly, Sampo brought me my mother's reply.

C: 这是，实验记录……
E: These are... records of his experiments.

C: 这座博物馆建立于距今约六百年前，最初修建它的目的是为了纪念初任大守护者阿丽萨•兰德、以及那些在对抗天外入侵者的战役中奉献出生命的先烈。
E: The museum was established nearly six hundred years ago as a memorial to honor Alisa Rand, the first supreme guardian, and the martyrs who gave their lives in the battle against the invaders from beyond the sky.

C: 碍于铁卫刚刚入驻下层不久，而且缺少直接的证据，我们还没能逮捕任何嫌疑人。
E: Since the Silvermane Guards are still getting situated in the Underworld and we don't have any direct evidence, we haven't been able to apprehend any suspects.

C: 虽说上下层区已经开放有段时间了，但毕竟不是每个人都能第一时间争取到好的机会。大部分人还是得留在下层，想办法养家糊口。
E: Travel between the Overworld and the Underworld has been open for some time, but not everyone down here can take advantage of that opportunity. The majority of underworlders have to stay here to feed their families.

C: 啊…谢谢你们！克拉拉刚刚还在发愁，该怎么接近发脾气的小机器人…有你们帮忙的话，应该就没有任何问题了！
E: Ah... thanks a lot! I was worried about handling the robots on my own... but with your help, it should be easy!

C: 当、当然可以！请跟我来吧。
E: Of course! Just follow me.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}。我们去把被偷走的零件都找回来。
E: Let's get to work then, {NICKNAME}. We're going to get all the stolen pieces back.

C: 你们这么做也太冒险了！万一惊醒了那些家伙，情况可就危险了。
E: That was really risky behavior! If those grownups had woken up, things could have gotten really dangerous for you two.

C: 唔，在这里站着总觉得解释不清，要不我带你去历史区亲眼看看吧。
E: It'll be easier to explain once we're actually in the History-Culture Hall. Why don't I take you there now?

C: 诺尔伯特和案件有关系吗？
E: Does Norbert have anything to do with our investigation?

C: 嘿嘿，那是当然。你知道吗？在我看来，现在开放这座博物馆的意义十分重大…比过去任何一次都更值得铭记。
E: Hehe, that's for sure. And you know what? The way I see it, the museum's reopening is a very significant event... and worth remembering more than any other time in the past.

C: 喂，你们！站住！
E: Hey, you two! Don't move!

C: 走吧，我们把「微缩胶片」带回博物馆去。
E: Come on, let's take the microfilm back to the museum.

C: 还是说，你…唔…这什么破宾馆啊，房门上怎么连个猫眼都没有？
E: How could it... Ugh, what kind of hotel is this, anyway? No peepholes on the doors?

C: 唔…好像是不到<unbreak>60</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... a little less than <unbreak>60</unbreak>.

C: 轻轻地推门而入。
E: Gently push open the door and enter.

C: 我进来时房间里已经没人了。
E: There was no-one here when I arrived.

C: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
E: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

C: 但…后来发生了什么，想必你们也知道了——铆钉镇在裂界侵蚀下沦陷，我们迫不得已离开了那个地方，来到了现在的磐岩镇。
E: But... I think you must've heard what happened later — Rivet Town became affected by the Fragmentum, and we had no choice but to leave for Boulder Town.

C: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
E: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

C: 志愿者？
E: Volunteering?

C: 博物馆是展览文物的地方。
E: A museum is a place where cultural relics are exhibited.

C: 只要把这些都写进去就好了嘛？太简单了，看我的！
E: So all I have to do is just write these things in here? Too easy, watch this!

C: 没问题了，我们出发吧！
E: That's right. Let's go!

C: 这个……
E: Well...

C: 其实，是因为克拉拉之前帮佩拉小姐和{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}解决了展品失窃案……
E: In fact, it's because I helped Pela and {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} to solve the missing exhibits case before...

C: 呃…这个……
E: Um... About that...

C: 恭喜你，希露瓦——你通过测试了。
E: Congratulations, Serval! It's a pass.

C: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
E: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

C: 好的，「解决纠纷」。
E: Fine, "dispute resolution" it is.

C: …不行！无论如何，流程还是要走的。
E: ...No way! We have to go through the entire process no matter what.

C: 难道我们之前还不够了解吗……
E: Don't we know each other well enough already...

C: 哼，眼看形势不对，撒腿就跑…也就这点出息了。
E: Hmph, fleeing at the first sign of danger... that's all they're good for.

C: 很好，回去修矿车吧。
E: Great, let's head back and fix the cart.

C: 绝对和他有关系！
E: It definitely has something to do with him!

C: 滚出避难所！虎克不想再看到你们啦！
E: Get out of the shelter! I never want to see you again!

C: 鼹鼠党的原则是互帮互助！…拜托你了嘛。
E: Members of The Moles gotta help each other out! ...Please...

C: 做饭啊，还能干嘛？这一身油烟味还带骗人的吗？
E: I'm a cook, what else would I be doing? Don't you notice the smoky cooking smell all over me?

C: 区区小鬼还敢威胁叔叔我？你还早了几十年呢！
E: You little brat. Grow a couple feet taller before you think about threatening me!

C: 案发当时你在干嘛？
E: What were you doing when the crime occurred?

C: 你在质疑我的推理？
E: Are you questioning my reasoning?

C: 我看你们这件宝贝价值不菲，不如去敲打敲打他，碰碰运气。
E: I think this device of yours is probably worth a lot. It might be a good idea to try your luck with Balaway.

C: 教你们一招——先在他面前装作要低价脱手的样子，等他兴冲冲地帮你修好了宝贝，再告诉他你们反悔了，想自己留着。
E: Here's a trick — first, pretend that you want to sell it for a low price, then wait for him to excitedly fix the device for you. After it's fixed, tell him you've changed your mind and you want to keep it for yourself.

C: 你再多讲讲，我是打算出手的。
E: Can you tell me more about it? I intend to sell it.

C: 说好的藏宝图呢？搞快点！
E: Where's my treasure map? Hurry up!

C: 矿区刚才经历了剧烈的震颤，又发生了小规模的塌方。多亏了这些路过的流浪者伸出援手，矿工弟兄们才得以全身而退。
E: There was a huge quake at the mine just now — part of it collapsed. If the vagrants here hadn't stopped to help, I doubt we'd have gotten everyone out in one piece.

C: 呃…能让布洛妮娅帮咱们报销吗？
E: Uh... can't we get Bronya to cover the bill?

C: 呼…原来从行政区到雪原要花这么久啊。
E: Phew... I never knew how long it took to get from the Administrative District to the Snow Plains.

C: 嗯，我记得这个——你在露营手册上也是这么写的：露营地必须平整干燥、背风背阴，最好是地势较高的地方……
E: Right! The guide says we should find a flat, dry, sheltered location — facing the sun at high elevation...

C: （该不会是我拿错了吧…那今天岂不是只能用地髓生火了？亏我特地跟姐姐要了这个……）
E: (Did I bring the wrong stove...? Does this mean we have to make a fire with Geomarrow? I specifically got this stove from Serval...)

C: 找到什么了吗？
E: Did you find anything?

C: 佩拉……
E: Pela...
...Huh?

C: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
E: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

C: 留下来，我们一起看极光吧。
E: Stay and watch the aurora with us.

C: 我能感受到佩拉真实的心情，你没必要藏啦。
E: I understand what Pela really feels. You don't need to hide it.

C: 修好炉具之前，我在地上找到的——我猜，大概是那个圆滚滚的裂界生物留下的。
E: I found this on the ground before you fixed the stove. I guess that Fragmentum creature dropped it.

C: 我猜，你应该不知道佩拉母亲的事吧？
E: I'm guessing you don't know about Pela's mother, right?

C: 嗯？啊…对，当然。
E: Huh? Ah... Yes, of course.

C: 我都想在这养老。
E: I'd like to retire here.

C: 还是这么嘴硬，那你倒是说说，你打算怎么当着怪物的面带走几大捆钢板啊？
E: Still stubborn, huh? Then tell me, how exactly were you gonna get those big metal plates out of here past those monsters?

C: 不知道那里变成什么样了，说不定还能看到些熟悉的景象。
E: I wonder what the old place is like now. Maybe some things will still look familiar.

C: 收到指令。威胁消除。主动防卫模式关闭。
E: Command received. Danger removed. Deactivating active defense mode.

C: 至少在史瓦罗先生的计算里，是这样没错……
E: Yes, at least according to Mr. Svarog's calculations...

C: 这上面是什么，小孩子的玩具吗？
E: What's up here? Some kind of toy?

C: …荡个秋千也能这么刺激吗？
E: ...Who knew swinging could be so intense?

C: 感觉没什么特别的。
E: It doesn't look like anything special.

C: 等等！让虎克看看笔记，我把藏宝贝的地方都标记在上面了。
E: Wait! Let me take a look at my notes. I marked the location where I stashed the treasure.

C: 欸嘿，抓到你啦！
E: Aha! Gotcha!

C: 怎么可能…帕斯卡明明就是机器人，是你的同类呀！
E: How is that possible? Pascal is obviously a robot, just like you!

C: 这我是真的没想到……
E: This I really wasn't expecting...

C: 很多流浪者都暂住在这里，他们的老家被裂界的怪物占据了。
E: Many vagrants are staying here temporarily. Their homes were overrun by monsters.

C: 乖，给你认证，让我们进去吧。
E: Who's a good boy? Here's our certification, we just wanna see your master.

C: 提米，我要再去一趟铆钉镇，看看有没有可以回收利用的元件。我不在的时候，你要帮克拉拉看守好大门哦。
E: Timmy, I'm going back to Rivet Town — maybe I can recover some usable components. You need to guard the gate while I'm gone.

C: 鉴于克拉拉的引荐，我会给你们一个发言的机会。
E: You have arrived on Clara's recommendation. I will give you an opportunity to speak.

C: 评估系统重启中…重启成功。正在转化变量…
E: Assessment system reset... successful. Processing variables...

C: 看好了，我要开始狡辩了。
E: Commencing plan "think of something."

C: （注视着他，等他说出口。）
E: (Keep staring at him and wait for him to speak.)

C: 我起早去看了一圈，发现那边的玩意净是些古代遗物、地髓探针之类的，未免过于硬核…转了一圈没有相中的东西，我就提前回来看店了。
E: So, I got up early this morning and went to take a look around — turns out all the items were ancient relics. There was something called a Geomarrow Probe. It all sounded a little extreme... I went around the whole venue and couldn't find what I was looking for, so I came back early.

C: 啊，是那个帅气的妹妹！
E: Ah! It's that brave girl!

C: 我们要通过拍卖，堂堂正正地得到它！走吧，{NICKNAME}！
E: We're gonna win it at the auction, fair and square! Let's go, {NICKNAME}!

C: 算是卖家给我们的「折扣」？
E: So this is like a discount from the seller?

C: …别多嘴，你就老老实实地接受虎克大人的感谢吧！
E: ...No explanation needed! Just accept Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's gratitude!

C: 唔，这个时候就不要提什么荣誉队员啦，老老实实地接受虎克大人的感谢吧！
E: Haha... It doesn't matter whether you're an honorary member or not. Just accept Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's gratitude!

C: 谢谢你！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Thanks for the help, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}.

C: 虎克每次过生日都要吃歌蒂大婶做的黑豆蛋糕，分量超足！
E: Aunt Gertie always makes a big Black Bean Cake for Hook's birthday!

C: 那个，其实是这样…营地里这些天发生了几起奇怪的失窃事件。
E: There have been a few unusual thefts in the dwelling over the past few days.

C: 唔，虽然听着有些奇怪…但这说不定也是一条线索。克拉拉记下来了。
E: It sounds bizarre, but it could be a clue. I'll jot it down.

C: 它的表达…很混乱，但克拉拉大概能理解……
E: It appears to have a malfunction, but I think I can understand it...

C: 这地方对宠物的理解还挺自由…
E: This place has a somewhat lax definition of pets...

C: 那要先修帕斯卡，还是先修它？
E: So, should we fix Pascal or this one first?

C: 史瓦罗先生，我想帮帕斯卡打败那些糟糕的「情感」——我想主动承担起这份「责任」。
E: Mr. Svarog, I want to help Pascal overcome those negative emotions. I want to take on this responsibility.

C: （尽管克拉拉会利用帕斯卡的情感智能、尽力引导帕斯卡向好，但不排除帕斯卡今后还有再次失控的可能……）
E: (Although Clara will use Pascal's emotional intelligence to help guide him in the right direction, Pascal could still go out of control in the future.)

C: 就按克拉拉说的做吧。
E: We'll go with Clara's idea.

C: 我们…就按史瓦罗先生说的来做吧。但克拉拉还会想些办法，努力挽救帕斯卡的情感和记忆……
E: If you feel it's necessary, we'll do what Mr. Svarog suggested... But until you're sure, I'll keep trying to find a way to save Pascal's emotions and memories...

C: 保护，铆钉镇！等待，大家，回来，生活！
E: Protect, Rivet Town! Waiting, everybody, come back, live, together!

C: 前方军事重地，闲人不得入内！
E: This is a military base. Trespassers aren't allowed in.

C: 姐姐，离开入侵者，慢慢走到我身后来。你和他们不一样。
E: Step away from the intruders, Serval. Walk over slowly and stand behind me. You're different from them.

C: 呃…这里发生什么事了？
E: Oh...What happened here?

C: 你问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 我们的先祖——包括阿丽萨•兰德在内——他们为了延续这一方文明燃尽生命，然后归于沉寂，记忆被风雪吹散。
E: Our ancestors... including Alisa Rand... spent their whole lives trying to prolong this civilization. Then, after all fell still, their memories were scattered by the blizzard.

C: 帮助需要帮助的人们，结交值得信赖的伙伴，顺手再拯救几次世界——
E: Helping those in need, befriending those worth counting on, and saving the world a few times along the way...

C: 可以了吧？我已经给了你们充分的时间…道别的时间。
E: ...Finished? I think I've given you long enough, to... bid farewell.

C: 就算面对风雪，面对裂界…这座城市里的每一个人依旧没有放弃希望，依旧憧憬着明天。
E: Even in the face of the blizzard and the Fragmentum... the people of this city never gave up hope, never stopped yearning for tomorrow.

C: 以贝洛伯格所有人的名义，我命令你起身——「造物引擎」！
E: In the name of every citizen of Belobog, I command you to rise... Engine of Creation!

C: 现在我也开不出玩笑了…
E: Can't think of anything funny to say...

C: 把真相伪装起来吧…
E: Cover up the truth...

C: 还是快离开这儿吧，不然连你也要冻出毛病了。
E: Let's get out of here before you catch a cold too.

C: 你是我唯一的见证者…最后的见证者。这个事实已经足够让我欣慰…知道我不必在永恒的孤独中游荡……
E: You're my only witness... the final witness. That fact alone is comforting enough... knowing that I don't have to wander around in eternal loneliness...

C: 丹鼎司的救助马上就到了。
E: The Alchemy Commission's dispatch will be here soon.

C: 看上去像是在公共航道上进行星槎引擎测试，肇事后逃逸，现在应该还在迴星港。
E: It looks like the suspect was testing their starskiff engine on a public lane. After the accident, they ran away. They should be in the Stargazer Navalia by now.

C: 因为她就像是家人一样。
E: Because Mei is just like family to you.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}，老家伙我的关节就要断了，你行行好吧。
E: Ahh, {NICKNAME}! My old joints are about to break! Please, have mercy on me!

C: 哼，但你说的很有道理，我也见过那些浑身长出枝叶的妖怪。看来咱们的第二个任务出现了。
E: Hmm, but it does make sense. I've seen these monsters with branches on their bodies. Looks like we've got another mission.

C: 助手可不好找啊…
E: It's difficult to find an assistant...

C: 化外民怎么你了…
E: What did outworlders ever do to you?

C: 我不是那个意思，我在等我们本地的「鹤运速递」的专员上门呢，结果认错人了，有点失望。
E: That's not what I mean. I'm waiting for the local Heron Express specialist to arrive. I'm just disappointed to see someone else.

C: （说谎）医典上…
E: (Tell a lie) The medical textbooks...

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 我遇到它时，正在伤春悲秋。
E: When we met, it was very sentimental.

C: 为什么主人这么执着于写诗呢？
E: Why is my master so obsessed with poetry?

C: 呱…你说的对，作者的才能决定了一首诗的优劣，但我问是诗歌创作本身！
E: Croak...You're not wrong. The poet's talent dictates the quality of a poem. But I asked you about writing poetry itself!

C: 你只是没有发现离别的眼睛。
E: You just don't have the mindset that can see goodbyes.

C: 星河重逢终有时
E: I'll say our paths shall reconvene among the stars.

C: 有暗香盈袖。
E: My sleeves leave a silhouette.

C: 我不喜欢《流云集》，它太自由了，缺乏规制。但这确实是打动人心的好诗。
E: I'm not a fan of the Drifting Clouds as the verses do not follow a certain pattern. Still, I must say this is a good poem that stirs my heart.

C: 是不是太直接了一些？
E: Isn't it too direct?

C: 她叹了口气，不再说话。
E: She sighs and no longer responds.

C: 后来我们俩又聊了好多愉快的话题。这全靠你呀，你真是我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，该怎么感谢你呢？
E: And then we talked more about so many joy-inducing topics. Thanks to you! You're my good buddy, how will I ever thank you?

C: 我一直以为咱们俩是{F#同一个阵营}{M#穿一条裤子}的人，结果你却说自己不感兴趣。
E: I thought we {F#were both on the same team}{M#both have the same interest}, but you said you weren't interested.

C: 我喜欢黛青小姐姐，我想要见到她，这有什么可以失望的呢？
E: I like Ms. Daiqing, and I want to see her, what is there to be disappointed about?

C: 是我的才对！……你，你别学我说话啊喂！
E: She's mine! You... don't you dare go around mimicking my speech!

C: 你别担心，像这样数目的金额，一般会通过星际和平公司的金融安全账户暂存后才会正式转账。
E: Don't worry, with this amount of money, it will usually go through the IPC's currency safety account for safekeeping for a time before it's officially transferred.

C: 我不是地衡司的条子。
E: I'm not a spy from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…我得想想，到底该怎么温和地告诉温符瑞。
E: So it turns out the Foxian Beauty is neither foxian nor a beauty... I'm going to have to think of a way to break this news to Wen Furui.

C: 啊，关心科员们的起居生活，也是代理站长的职责嘛。
E: Well, what else can I do? Watching out for my fellow researchers is part of the job.

C: 我会为你申请空间站心理创伤医疗补贴的。
E: I'll send in a worker compensation claim for you at the station for psychological trauma.

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 我把识别插件给你装上啦，所以不必担心摸不着头脑，只要去那儿转一圈，它会提示你哪儿留有学会的标识。
E: I've installed the plug-in for you so you won't be lost. Just walk around the place, and the plug-in will tell you where to look for the markings.

C: 看看这张，一名勇士弯弓搭箭，将一株巨木射穿。它很显然是在描绘那个脍炙人口的帝弓神话——「巡猎」斫断了建木。
E: Look at this drawing. A warrior bends his bow and shoots at an enormous tree. It's clearly about The Hunt chopping off the Ambrosial Arbor — a well-known myth about the Reignbow Arbiter.

C: 你来了啊。
E: There you are.

C: 我答应了！
E: Okay, I'll do it!

C: 这也是我好奇的地方，她多半是乘着洞天闭锁之前溜了出来。也许她知道丹鼎司里发生了什么……
E: That's what I want to know. I guess she sneaked out before the delves were locked down. She might even know what happened in the Alchemy Commission...

C: 相反的方向？不对吧，我就是从反方向过来的。
E: The opposite direction? It can't be. I just came from that direction.

C: （好像还有些重要线索错过了，应该再仔细调查一下。）
E: (Feels like I'm still missing an important clue... more investigation needed.)

C: 一张折叠的信纸，上面写着「药王慈怀，建木生发。莳者一心，同登仙道」。
E: A piece of folded letter that reads: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth. Unity of Discipuli Medicus, the Immortality's true path."

C: 我有证据！
E: I have evidence!

C: 我想到了一个人。
E: I have someone in mind.
Shh!

C: 啊，这也太没劲了。不过不打紧，我明天还在这附近玩儿，你可以带上吃的来这儿找我。
E: Oh, that's a pity. No matter, I'll be playing nearby here tomorrow, so you can bring me something to eat and come here.

C: 我不会手下留情的。
E: I'll do what I must.

C: 话说回来，半夏姐姐还没有换好吗……
E: By the way, what's taking Banxia so long...?

C: 这点儿代价就当是他付给我的诊金吧，哼，便宜他了！
E: Hmph, that's the price he paid for my lenience. And it still wasn't enough!

C: 之前半夏问我喜不喜欢治病救人，说实话，原本这对我就像是吃饭睡觉，没啥难度，也就无所谓喜不喜欢了。
E: Banxia asked me if I liked treating people... Like I said, it's as easy as eating and drinking for me — I don't like or dislike it...

C: 了解，辛苦浣溪小姐。
E: I understand. Thank you, Miss Huanxi.

C: 终于能知道丹恒的过去了！
E: Finally, we can learn about Dan Heng's past!

C: 这是持明内务，只要无损于罗浮的太平，云骑将军能有什么看法？
E: It is an internal affair of the Vidyadharas. As long as it does not disturb the peace aboard the Luofu, it does not involve the general of the Cloud Knights.

C: 让持明族再度繁衍？
E: Allow the Vidyadhara to reproduce once again?

C: 所幸我们还是逃出来了…
E: It's a good thing we managed to escape.

C: 唉，你们三位从头到尾都没出什么状况，那我这当侍女的可就失职啦。
E: Hmph, perhaps the real dereliction of duty was that not enough happened to you.

C: 将军！你是给咱们搬救兵来了吗？
E: General! Did you bring reinforcements?

C: 二位言重了，不过是举手之劳。
E: That's too kind of you. It was nothing, really.

C: 一是丢失了很多视频资料，二是影像的时间戳也完全混乱了…您看，这是事发前日，关于罗刹先生的影像纪录。
E: We lost a lot of video footage, and for the image data we recovered, the timestamps are all jumbled up... Look, this is Mr. Luocha on the day prior to the resurrection.

C: 嗯…只有这段影像里，有人从那扇拱门中出去，时间在罗刹进入空地的大约一个时辰后，但是并没有拍到罗刹……
E: Hmm... Only that someone left the area through that exit around two hours after Luocha's appearance here. Luocha's nowhere to be seen, though.

C: 所以小三月的意思是，那两个黑衣人是「饮茶会」的成员，而那个小孩就是…返老还童的罗刹？
E: So, March, what you mean is, the two people in dark clothing are Tea Society agents, and the child is... a de-aged Luocha?

C: 不过，请不要把这件事告诉西衍先生…虽然平时不怎么出现，但他算是我们店的掌柜。要是被他知道了，我一定会挨骂的。
E: It'd be best if Mr. Xiyan didn't find out about this... He doesn't show up very often, but he's the manager here. I'll be in big trouble if he finds out what happened.

C: （不，那是「饮茶会」的守门人「普洱」。）
E: (No, that's Pu'er, the Tea Society's gatekeeper.)

C: 没错，就是他。
E: That's him!

C: 他给我们哥俩的就是这个东西。
E: Here, that's the prescription he gave us.

C: 这是《渔公案》的扉页！
E: It's the title page of The Angler Mystery!

C: 看来还是我们想错啦。
E: Looks like the whole thing was just a big misunderstanding.

C: 阿来，这种时候就不要捧哏了。
E: Back'n, we're not rehearsing...

C: 不必谦虚。两位为仙舟以身犯险，这一切我都看在眼中。
E: No need to be humble, you took great risks for the Xianzhou. I saw what you did.

C: 本来应该再次感谢二位恩公的救命之恩…但这一回又让你们看了笑话，真是非常抱歉……
E: Thank you for saving me, benefactors... and I'm sorry you had to witness all that...

C: 从满地的杂物中找到一个不起眼的挂饰，这不正是一种解谜吗？
E: Well, isn't finding a needle in a haystack a type of puzzle-solving?

C: 嗯…神策府将军公务繁忙，我们未必见得到他，但有试一试的价值。驭空司舵是他一手提拔上来的，那些往事他大概比谁都清楚。
E: Well... the general's been busy at the Seat of Divine Foresight recently — we might not get to see him right away. Still, it's worth a try — he was the one who promoted Helm Master Yukong — he probably knows more about her past than anyone.

C: 我很想知道关于她的事，但她总是扯开话题，要不就是装作没听见。
E: *sigh* I was always curious about her past, but she either dodged my questions or pretended not to hear them.

C: 至于「天才」，别在我跟前提起这两个字。
E: As for "genius," don't mention that word to me again.

C: （说谎）我觉得你挺好。
E: (Lie) I think you're pretty great.

C: 以前的我？…曾经是个「恶魔猎人」。
E: The old me? I used to be a Devil Hunter.

C: 失去了信仰的我，被艾利欧招揽，就这么加入了「星核猎手」。
E: I lost my faith and was recruited by Elio... that's how I joined the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 很聪明，{NICKNAME}。不过，牺牲一个问题来证明上一个答案是真是假，值得吗？…我不好说。
E: Very clever, {NICKNAME}. But was it worth sacrificing a question to determine whether the last answer was true or false? ...Tough to say.

C: 你们是…星穹列车？
E: You're with... the Astral Express?

C: 好！这船交给我了！
E: Nice! I'm driving!

C: 说谎。你也学坏了。
E: But you've learned how to lie.

C: 好、好冷的手！
E: Y—Your hand... It's freezing!

C: 我们是谁这个问题，从来只有我们自己才能回答。
E: Who you are is a question that only you can find the answer to...

C: 重来一次？
E: A second chance?

C: ——只有对手才能让你拔剑。
E: You will only draw against an opponent.

C: {F#算是算啦…但，能和小动物沟通可是稀有设定！}{M#呃…你是这么看自己的吗？好吧，那勉强算啦。如果你强烈要求，我也可以把「勉强」去掉。}
E: {F#I think I'm a better fit, that's all. Ugh, never mind, no need to get offended.}{M#I think I'm a better fit, that's all. Ugh, never mind, no need to get offended.}

C: 呃…镜流姐姐，我先领你走一段吧。可能要绕点路，但我保证把你平安送到云骑那里。
E: Nice to meet you. Um... Miss Jingliu, allow me to lead the way. We might have to take a bit of a detour, but I promise to get you to the Cloud Knights safely.

C: 接下来怎么走？
E: Where do we go from here?

C: 他深深吐纳，仿佛能一口饮尽这片狭小空间中的空气。数息之间，佝偻的身形拔节撑开，成为铁塔般昂藏的巨躯。
E: He inhaled deeply, as if he could consume all the air within this narrow space. In seconds, his hunched body expanded muscle by muscle, and turned into a huge iron tower of flesh.

C: 你总算过来了…我认得你，你是{NICKNAME}！景元将军的贵客！
E: Took you long enough... I know you — you're {NICKNAME}, General Jing Yuan's honored guest!

C: 倒也不是强制你们决斗，不肯斗也可以，但那样就不可能放你们任何人离开了。
E: We aren't forcing you to fight — by all means refuse if you wish... but we won't possibly be able to let either of you leave.

C: 你翻遍了这个物流鸟架上的每一个包裹，可惜并没有你要找的那封信。
E: You rummage through the packages on this Cycrane Stand, but you don't find the letter you are looking for.

C: 请你稍等一下，他马上就到。
E: Just a moment. He will be here shortly.

C: 所以我放弃了凡人之躯，成为了慈怀药王的眷属。
E: So, I abandoned my mortal body and became a faithful servant of Merciful Medicus.

C: 慈怀药王赐予了我敏锐的感官，任何事都逃不过我的眼睛。你这种可笑可耻可悲的凡人是不会懂的。
E: Merciful Medicus has sharpened my senses — nothing gets past me. A pathetic mortal like you could never understand.

C: 别担心，你的卧底行动很成功。虽然暴露了身份，但已获得了很多有价值的情报，最后还能全身而退。这样王牌间谍般的素质，真是令人惊讶。
E: Don't worry, your operation was a success — although your identity was ultimately exposed, you gained a wealth of invaluable intelligence. On top of that, you managed to get out without a scratch.

C: 经文并没有什么蛊惑人心的力量，人们从来只是自己蛊惑自己，而经文给了他们谎言和虚假的希望。
E: The scripture doesn't have the power to lead people astray — they do that to themselves... but it does feed lies and false hope.

C: 有些关于药王秘传的问题…
E: I have some questions about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 在今日预卜中，我占算有什么「横生枝节的事情」，得卦象涨落在坎、乾之间。穷观阵输出了解读，判词曰：「有不速之客三人来，敬之终吉」。
E: Today's divinations threw up some unexpected complications — the hexagrammatic position was vacillating between the water and heaven trigrams. The Matrix of Prescience gave the following interpretation: "You will have three uninvited guests. This is ultimately auspicious."

C: 呃，我大概应该可能已经准备好了……
E: Uhh, I'm pretty sure I should be, almost k—kinda ready to go...

C: 推演的经历失真，咱们就集中注意力把「失真」的因素一个个挑出来，加以清除纠正，不然也没法进一步回溯你的过去。
E: If the inferred experience is distorted, we should focus on filtering out each distortion one by one — otherwise we won't be able to trace your memories back any further.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 我清楚记得，咱们攻入丹鼎司时，将军是不在现场的。看起来，他就是本段经历中失真干扰的源头。
E: Ah! I remember now! The general wasn't there when we broke into the Alchemy Commission. Looks like we've found the source of our distortion.

C: 这个蓝头发的家伙开口就透出坑蒙拐骗的气息。
E: This blue-haired fellow has an air of deceit about him every time he opens his mouth.

C: 三月，你不记得自己的经历了吗？你手边那柄长弓便是证据。
E: March, have you forgotten your past experiences? Surely your bow there is enough evidence for you.

C: 这…这不是我在小说里给自己编的经历吗？
E: Wait... I wrote that! That's a story I made up about my past!

C: 是那个「信使」，她又在干扰你的行动了。
E: It's the messenger. She's interfering with your movements again.

C: 我是大胃王，非常能吃！
E: My stomach is a bottomless pit!

C: 可是我用的不是剑，是球棒。
E: It's not a sword. It's a baseball bat.

C: 就没有误判、错判的时候吗？
E: But what if you make a mistake?

C: 很少有匠人能够做到将岁阳作为铸剑的材料，含光便是那少数人之一。他为自己的尝试付出了惨痛的代价……
E: Very few swordsmiths could use heliobi as forging material, and Hanguang was one of them. His attempt came at a terrible cost...

C: 哎，大毫执事官可没有听到云璃的承诺。
E: Unfortunately, Official Dahao didn't hear Yunli's promise.

C: （要是三月七在，靠她的乌鸦嘴一定能替咱们指出谁是窃贼…）
E: (If March 7th were here, she'd probably jinx it and accidentally reveal who the thief was...)

C: 窃贼偷走了剑，却留下剑匣，这可能是有原因的。
E: There must be a reason why the thief took the sword but left the case behind.

C: 是孤云剑自己脱离了剑匣。那名纯美骑士所做的，只是打开锁扣，帮助它逃走。
E: Guyun flew out of the case on its own. The Knight of Beauty only unlocked the box to aid its escape.

C: 各位，我厌倦了战斗。我只想向你们讲述我的过去，讲述我为何想要逃离。
E: I'm weary of fighting. I just want to share my past with you, to explain why I wanted to escape.

C: 咱们俩的余生都要被锁死在这颗星球上了。
E: Looks like we're stranded on this forsaken planet for the rest of our lives.

C: 你看到过他们的数量，你也知道他们的手段…而你寄予希望的那些野人，他们只知道匍匐在地上，恭敬地称呼那些吃掉他们子女和亲人的怪物为「兽主」！
E: You've seen their numbers, and you know their methods... And those commoners you've put your hopes in, they just kneel down and worship the monsters devouring their children and families, calling them their Beastmasters!

C: 到底还是没能回到仙舟罗浮……
E: I never made it back to the Xianzhou Luofu...

C: 这个嘛，无可奉告。不过我很喜欢你说过的一句话——「好戏就要上演了，来不及登台的人，就只能退居幕后」——很有道理。
E: Well, no comment about that. But I loved that line you said, "If you're too late to take the stage, you can work behind the scenes" — That really makes sense.

C: 关于受害者…
E: Regarding the victim...

C: 唉，一听就是花火干的。她最擅长的就是变化成其他人的样子。
E: That sounds just like Sparkle. Her best asset is transforming her appearance to look like someone else.

C: 看来我们不得不陪花火小姐玩这场游戏了呢。
E: Looks like we'll have to play this little game of Sparkle's then.

C: …哦，看来这是花火小姐自导自演的小剧场，和实际案件并无关联。「金槌」是她的姓氏吗？
E: ...Oh, I guess Miss Sparkle has written herself into the skit here, and this has nothing to do with the actual case. Goldhammer — is that her real surname?

C: 您不问问这是为什么吗？
E: Aren't you going to ask me why?

C: 只是一些浅浅的直觉…总之，我们先去向那位警长汇报吧。
E: Just some shallow intuition... Anyway, let's report back to the sheriff for now.

C: 符卿，说人话，请。
E: ...And for those who don't speak Fu Xuan?

C: 争取让领导满意！
E: Chance to impress the boss!

C: 下次可别准备这样的「惊喜」了。
E: Next time, maybe ease off on the surprises?

C: 很遗憾，这处阵基唤作「业成阵」，据说是专司梳理因果联系的。
E: Darn, the Karma Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to establish causal relationships.

C: 小女子什么也没说，只是提出心中疑惑，恩公…恩公一路小心便是。
E: I am saying nothing of the sort, just raising a doubt, that's all. Please be careful, benefactors...

C: 是工期死线要到了吧？
E: Project deadline approaching?

C: …走吧，不大想接着聊了。
E: Let's go, I think this conversation's run its course...

C: 哼，是那几个不成器的弟子托你来的？没用没用，弃司内宝贵财产不顾，临阵脱逃。
E: Hmph! Did those hopeless brats send you here? It won't work! They abandoned the Commission's precious assets and ran off to save their own little skins!

C: 对哦，那些根须再也没有出现。
E: You're right! Those roots never grew back!

C: 炉心黯淡，植物根系呈死灰色。雄鹿倒地，化为叶片飘散。
E: The core of furnace was extinguished with roots fading into pale gray. The deer fell to the ground and turned into broken leaves.

C: 三个小孩瞬间扭打成一团。你趁乱带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: The three children start tussling with each other. You take the chance to lead the girl away from the site of conflict.

C: 许多在短生种处可以借由机巧或手术弥补的缺陷，对仙舟人反而回天乏术。
E: The impairments of short-life species can be corrected with ingenia or surgery, but that's an impossibility for Xianzhou natives.

C: （狼？鳞渊境里还有这种东西？先过去看看吧。）
E: (A wolf? Does it even exist in the Scalegorge Waterscape? Let me check it out.)

C: 你说的正是鄙人。
E: That's me.

C: 呜，我的小狼…不！我不同意！
E: Sob, sob, my darling wolves... No! I can't accept this!

C: 我没问题，毕竟，{NICKNAME}真的帮我查清了法乌努斯红毛羊的事情。
E: I'm fine with it. After all, {NICKNAME} has helped me get to the bottom of the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep.

C: 你对入会试炼有什么建议吗？
E: Do you have any suggestions for the newcomer trial?

C: 我雇了公司的运输船，带着机兵回罗浮。你嘛，就坐着你的星穹列车，慢慢来吧。
E: So, I've rented a transport ship from the IPC to bring the automatons back to the Luofu. You can take the Astral Express back — no need to rush.

C: 哎呀，你没受伤吧。
E: What!? You weren't injured, were you?

C: 那边的纸人那么多，你的判官朋友肯定给你留下了什么线索，去看看呗？
E: There are so many paper dolls over there. Surely your judge friend left some clues for you. Won't you take a look?

C: 我就知道！像咱俩这样的好奇宝宝通常都有着很强的第六感，能轻易感知到身边许多不对劲的东西。
E: I knew it! Curious cats like us usually have a better sixth sense — it's easier for us to perceive the unseen...

C: 是尾巴大爷的同类吗？
E: Is it the same kind of thing as Mr. Tail?

C: 吾已将遭到恚炎摆弄的冥差尽数打倒了…既要留力，又要能击倒他们，还真是麻烦。
E: I have defeated all the spiritfarers controlled by Furynox... It was quite troublesome taking them down without doing any harm.

C: 别抛下我们…帮帮我们～带我们一起～重现「燎原」的威光吧～
E: Don't leave us... help us... take us... to restore Ignamar's glory together!

C: 这里是…绥园的上空？
E: Are we... above Fyxestroll Garden?

C: …请稍等一下，我、我想问几个问题辨别真伪。
E: ...Wait. I want to ask a few questions... to see if you're the real person.

C: 嘁，给老子支楞起来啊。
E: Quit stalling and get on with it!

C: 还没好好玩一遍。
E: I haven't tried everything yet

C: 请问您还有什么需要吗？
E: How may I assist you?

C: 柯柯娜用手紧紧地抓着自己的衣服，她开始微微地发抖。
E: Cocona tightly clutches her clothes, and her body starts to shiver.

C: 就像之前一样，深呼吸，深呼吸…不要流泪…
E: Just like before, deep breaths, deep breaths... Don't cry...

C: 它是你喜欢的歌手唱的吗？
E: It was sung by a singer you liked?

C: 我有话要和你说，非常着急！快过来！
E: I have something to tell you. It's urgent! Get over here!

C: 如果这个世界是公平的，那些游手好闲的富人根本就不该出现！
E: If this world was fair, those indolent rich folk should never have existed in the first place!

C: 这是我需要思考的问题吗？自己慢慢悟吧。
E: That's not a problem for me, is it? You should think about it yourself.

C: 你会用怎样的酷刑对付我？你会<color=#dbc291ff>用何种手段毁掉自己的纯真、善良、诚实、还有原则？</color>是痛快地一刀两断…还是通过经年累月的折磨？
E: What cruel punishment will you mete upon me? You will <color=#dbc291ff>use any and all means to destroy your own innocence, kindness, honesty, and principles?</color> Will you sever it in two in a heartbeat... or tortuously grind it down with time?

C: 赢下这场比赛之后，我们就能赚到足够的钱，离开匹诺康尼。
E: After winning this match, we will earn enough money to leave Penacony.

C: 一滴泪珠顺着风的方向飞来，划过你的脸颊——依旧滚烫。
E: A single teardrop is carried by the wind towards you, grazing your cheek — it is still boiling hot.

C: 但我做不到彻底的改变。愧疚总能追上我，发自内心的拷问总会到来。我太扭曲，太痛苦，这片美梦里没有我的容身之地。
E: But I was unable to change totally. Guilt always caught up to me, inevitably interrogating my conscience. I was too twisted, and it was too painful — this dream had no place for me.

C: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
E: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

C: 我看到了…那朵玫瑰开了。
E: I can see it... That rose has bloomed.

C: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
E: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

C: 能在这里遇到依然支持着我的各位，我发自内心地感到幸福……
E: Being able to meet you all here, who continue to support me as ever... My heart feels truly joyous and blessed.

C: 我…我知道这听上去有些可怕，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——但我好像忘记该怎么「醒来」了。
E: I... I know this may sound a little scary {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... But I fear I may have forgotten how to "wake up."

C: 任何诋毁莱斯利•迪恩的人都是我的敌人。他们是恶棍，他们必须被消灭。
E: Anyone who slanders the name of Lesley Dean is my enemy. They are villains that must be eradicated!

C: 喔…这样啊。
E: Ah... I see.

C: 这明明是大家的共有财产吧…
E: But this obviously belongs to everyone...

C: 不，让我再想想
E: No, let me think about it.

C: 不急，您可以慢慢考虑。
E: There's no hurry. Please take your time.

C: 船长好，很荣幸能向您汇报现阶段的初步成果——这些新来的年轻人还不错，已经能适应空艇的工作节奏了。
E: Hello captain, I'm honored to report the current phase's initial results to you — these young newcomers are coming along fine, and are getting used to the airship's current work pace.

C: 墙上空空荡荡的，这怎么行…既然是船长室，就该按照传统，把您的画像挂上去。这样才能体现您的身份呐。
E: The wall is starkly empty. This won't do... A captain's cabin should honor tradition by having your portrait hung high. It's the only way to declare your status.

C: 我的准则基于信任与对人性的洞察，我希望能给予船员们足够的职权自由。
E: They are based on trust, as well as my insights on humanity. I hope they can provide sufficient professional freedom for the crew members.

C: 船长，这个长廊位于船上的中心位置，每个经过的人都会注意到它。但这里空空荡荡的，如果只摆些工艺品，我感觉这太庸俗了。
E: Captain, this long gallery is situated at the heart of the ship. Every visitor that passes by will notice it, but it's currently empty — and it'd look quite boorish if we only decorate it with art pieces.

C: 摆啊，为什么不摆？
E: Of course we are hanging it up, pronto!

C: 当然！罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔。
E: Of course! Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell.

C: 多亏了你们，家族的事儿已经解决得差不多了。趁着省下来些时间，我打算好好调查一下这个宝贝组织…哼，最好是能把它连根做掉！
E: Thanks to you, The Family's matters have mostly been settled already. I'm going to make use of my time left to investigate this muddle-fudgin' cult... Hmph, probably for the best if I completely destroy them shirtbags!

C: 啊…原、原来如此，您、您还真是幽默……
E: Ah... I—I get it. You... you're funny...

C: 值得我好好考虑一下…
E: That's really worth giving some good thought to...

C: …我怎么听不懂你在说什么，这段时间你都经历了什么啊？
E: ...I don't understand what you mean. What have you been doing all this time?

C: 为了能来这一趟，我可是把年假一次性都给请完了——太卜大人还以为我是去朱明仙舟串门，肯定想不到我其实是受邀来匹诺康尼旅游的…嘿嘿。
E: I took out all my annual leave at once just to come out here — the master diviner thinks I am visiting the Xianzhou Zhuming and doesn't have a clue I was invited out here to Penacony... tee-hee.

C: 有一颗名叫雅利洛-Ⅵ的星球。
E: A planet called Jarilo-VI.

C: 我是来救人的。
E: I'm here to rescue someone.

C: 哈哈！这回咱俩总算想到一块去了，银枝兄弟！
E: Haha! We're finally on the same page this time, Argenti!

C: 本座专注于卜算种种事端因果，却没有算到回到仙舟，竟然有如此多的人夹道迎接。果然，这罗浮仙舟还是不能少了本座呀。
E: I have been devoted to divining the cause and effect outcomes of so many things, yet I never divined that there would be so many people here to meet me on my return to the Xianzhou. I see the Xianzhou Luofu really just can't go on without me.

C: 哼，有劳各位迎接，本座回来了。
E: Hmm, thank you for the warm welcome. I have returned.

C: 哦？你这话里有话。
E: Huh? What are you trying to say?

C: 帮我给这个培养舱拍个照吧。拍好了，我们就去育成阶段。
E: Help me take a photo of this incubator. Then we can go check out the nutritive phase.

C: …请你原创一下自己的感想。
E: ...Can't you please curate your own thoughts.

C: 说老实话，我也不知道能不能强行把「傻瓜式」驾驶系统做成「傻瓜飞行士系统」…总之我们先试试。你找到了金人零件了吗？
E: Frankly speaking, I'm not sure whether I can turn the set-and-forget driving system into a set-and-forget pilot system... Anyway, let's give it a go. Have you found the aurumaton part?

C: （真不愧是经验老到的师傅……）
E: (You really can't hide anything from an experienced craftsman...)

C: 青雀你太刁难铖杰师傅了。
E: Qingque, you're being too harsh on Chengjie.

C: 不行，你这样是完成不了的。
E: If you think that way, you won't succeed.

C: 过问死生之事，十王司能答应吗？
E: Will the Ten-Lords Commission allow us to meddle in matters of life and death?

C: 你来啦，刚才我还在和青雀小姐商量，要是不做工匠，我能去做什么。
E: Hi there. I was discussing with Miss Qingque what I could do besides being a craftsman.

C: …哎，看来各行各业都不容易，但这样望而却步的话，什么都没法开始。
E: ...Alas, it seems like there are no easy jobs in the world. If I keep hesitating, I won't be able to achieve anything.

C: 你还有什么要求？
E: What else do you want from us?

C: 金人不再动作，也不再言语。
E: The aurumaton stops moving and falls silent.

C: 总算没人跟着咱们了——就在这儿吧！
E: Finally, I think we lost them... Let's chat here!

C: 希儿…{NICKNAME}…还有…娜塔大姐头？我这是…在诊所里？
E: Seele... {NICKNAME}... and... Nat? I'm in... the clinic?

C: 哈，这我就得反驳你一句了，希儿！你看他身边那台「大奔」，这水平怎么也不止小偷小摸了吧？
E: Uh, I'm not sure this falls under "petty crime," Seele — that's a whole robot he's got next to him. It's Big Ben alright.

C: …我知道了，好吧。那我们去见史瓦罗，跟他聊聊。
E: ...Alright. Fine. We'll go find Svarog and have a nice chat with him.

C: 我、我认输！求你了，别再找我麻烦了！
E: I—I'm sorry! Please, I've learned my lesson!

C: 不愧是史瓦罗大佬——那再尝尝这招如何！
E: That's why they call you Boss Svarog! How about this!?

C: 唔，你们偷偷摸摸的，到底在干嘛呀？
E: Umm, why are you sneaking around like this?

C: 典礼前后除去星槎巡航的演出外，不过是些比武斗剑的竞赛。和我们去看过的泰科铵机动球没什么区别。
E: Aside from starskiff performances, it's mostly martial contests, nothing too different from the Taikiyan Roboball contest we've seen before.

C: 没错。这些狼首怪物，唤作步离人，是与仙舟长久为敌的丰饶孽物。
E: Yeah, those werewolf monsters are known as "borisin." They are Abominations of Abundance, and we've been fighting them for a very long time.

C: 仙舟也只是按规矩走
E: The Xianzhou people are just following their own rules.

C: 赶紧搜查吧！谁是你老兄！
E: "Bro?" Just do the inspection!

C: 我甚至不确定这东西算是「机巧」还是「生物」。
E: I can't even tell if it's ingenium or biological in nature.

C: 噗…我警告你，岗哨神圣啊！别跟我嘻嘻哈哈的，烦你了啊！
E: *laughs* ...Hey, I'm warning you, I'm carrying out my sacred duty! It'll be annoying if you keep cracking jokes like that!

C: 是啊，妾身自幼长于罗浮，在丹鼎司中听着这涛声与师长同侪潜心钻研丹方。
E: Yes, I grew up here, listening to the sound of waves while researching prescriptions with my mentors and peers at the Alchemy Commission.

C: 以妾身的愚见，建木重生，恰如药王秘传再度出现，是不可避免的。这颗种子早在仙舟先民求取长生的时刻就已被埋下了。
E: In my humble opinion, the rebirth of the Ambrosial Arbor and the resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were inevitable. The seed was already planted when the ancestors of the Xianzhou sought immortality.

C: 呃，我是说彦卿。
E: Uh... I was talking about Yanqing, actually.

C: 不是老朽自夸，此剑是朱明仙舟工造技艺的极致，曾流落异乡，创下种种英雄伟业。个中离奇，实难一语道尽。不过，送来宝剑的使团尚未驾临，我就先在这儿放个剑匣吧。
E: I don't mean to boast about our skills, but this sword represents the pinnacle of the Zhuming's craftsmanship. It has a legendary history, full of heroic tales from foreign lands, tales that are too detailed to be summarized in just a few words. Since the delegation delivering the sword hasn't arrived yet, I'll just leave the case here for now.

C: 爷爷，想送我剑就直说，何必绕这么大个弯子。
E: If you want to give me a sword, just say the word, Grandpa. No need to beat around the bush.

C: 不过依老朽多年看人的眼光，阁下既无需钻研剑艺裨补实力…这世上只怕也没什么人能为你指点前路。
E: But you know, based on my years of judging people, you don't really need to dive into swordplay to boost your skills... and I doubt there's anyone out there who can really show you the way forward.

C: 睡得迷迷糊糊……
E: I'm still feeling sleepy...

C: （三月七啊三月七，才刚学剑。就三心二意想要翘课了吗？）
E: (Oh come on, March 7th! Really now? You just got into swordplay training. Are you sick of it already? Is that why you want to skip practice?)

C: 务必完成末度大人的要求
E: Mok Tok's request must be seen to.

C: 这师拜得可真值啊！但我怎么觉得，事情开始有些往奇怪的苗头上发展了。
E: I'm so lucky to have two great masters! But why does it feel like things are getting a bit weird?

C: 步法开始。发力开始。
E: Her footwork. Her strength.

C: 是比喻，我加了点比喻。鄙人所师从的医方派别名曰「染指派」，是曜青仙舟上独有的医术，偏爱以食疗济愈病患。所以做菜的事情，我也略懂一二。
E: Well, it's just a metaphor. The medicinal school I follow on the Xianzhou Yaoqing is called the Ranzhi School, that specializes in food therapy, so it's only natural that I know a thing or two about cooking.

C: 走吧，我带各位去见识见识「竞锋舰」。
E: Let's go. I'll give you a tour of the Skysplitter.

C: 我这就带弟弟妹妹们走。
E: I'll take the little ones away right now.

C: 拍摄可疑人士密谋现场
E: Take a photo of the suspects plotting at the scene

C: 货先放在这儿吧？接下来检查船只的问题。
E: Let's just put the cargo here for now, alright? Then we'll move on to inspect the ships.

C: 对于列车而言，星核的存在会阻塞银轨，加剧跃迁风险。因此处理星核引起的麻烦，也是无名客的分内之事。
E: To the Express, Stellarons act as roadblocks on the silver rail and pose risks to the warping process. And that's why dealing with Stellaron issues is part of the duty of the Nameless.

C: 但你还是回来了。从结果来看，建木重生，罗浮需要一位龙尊再度编织封印，压抑祸迹。其中利害，也难免令人浮想联翩啊。
E: But you returned despite everything. Now let's consider the outcome: The Arbor was resurrected, and the Luofu required a high elder to repair the seal and suppress the plaguemark. It's hard not to think about the stakes involved, right?

C: 那里阴寒透体，请稍作忍耐。
E: Please brace yourself for the biting cold.

C: 七百年…七百年过去了，都蓝的崽子为什么长成了你这般模样？回答我，末度，为什么你长成了我们最可鄙的奴隶和敌人——狐人的模样？
E: Seven centuries... Seven centuries have passed, but why have Duran's whelps grown to look like this? Tell me, Mok Tok, why have you grown to resemble our most despicable slaves and enemies, the foxians?

C: 雪衣…在这儿。
E: Xueyi... is here.

C: 重…重新……
E: Re... Reconstru...

C: 这东西无法承载….吾的的的全部部部……
E: This cycrane can't... h—h—hold all of me...

C: 做不到。因为我们比他们晚了一步。
E: No, we won't be able to. We're one step behind them.

C: 现在，我们向上去！
E: Now, let's proceed upward!

C: 事态紧急，不可再耽搁下去了！
E: The situation is critical. We cannot delay any longer!

C: 可是他们身为持明，为何要勾结步离人，协助呼雷逃脱？
E: But why would the Vidyadhara collude with the borisin and aid in Hoolay's escape?

C: 顺着药气寻索一番，应该能甄别出伪装的步离人留下的踪迹。
E: By following the medicinal fumes, we should be able to retrace the steps of the disguised borisin.

C: 不管你要去哪里，都得赶快了。演武仪典马上就要开始了。天舶司正在对空域进行调控，让去竞锋舰的星槎优先航行呢。
E: We need to hurry, wherever we're going. The Wardance is about to start, and the Sky-Faring Commission is prioritizing starskiffs heading to the Skysplitter.

C: 什么？！你能确定吗？
E: What!? Are you sure about that?

C: 这就是曜青仙舟想要带走我的原因？对某些人而言，我可以是握在手上的人质。但对有些人而言，他们想要的是我身上的秘密——
E: So, is that why the Xianzhou Yaoqing wanted to take me away? To some, I'm a hostage, but to others, I hold the secrets they desire...

C: 看来你家将军只教了你剑术，却没教你如何「巡猎」。
E: Looks like your general has only taught you swordplay, not the art of The Hunt.

C: 来吧，从你发现步离人踪迹的地方开始，我们让猎物无处可逃。
E: Let's start from where you found those borisin and corner our prey.

C: 实在不好意思，我必须先专注眼前的工作了。有问题稍后再谈。
E: I'm sorry, but I need to focus on my work right now. If you have any questions, we can discuss them later.

C: 椒丘，快找个医用机巧给那个孩子施针！快！
E: Jiaoqiu! Find a medical ingenium and give that kid a shot! Hurry!

C: 啊，从天而降砸在泰科铵大球馆的回忆又涌了上来，我们…是来比赛的吧。
E: Ah, memories of falling from the sky into Taikiyan Stadium have come flooding back to me. We... came to compete, didn't we?

C: 我是参赛选手！
E: I am a contestant!

C: 其实我也觉得这里有点小。
E: I kinda think this place is a bit cramped too.

C: 太、太好了！
E: Oh, great!

C: 没想到备受关注的天才少年也会有消极比赛的情况。
E: I never thought that such a talented young man that has garnered so much attention would have this kind of attitude!

C: 素、素裳…那是谁？最近好像经常在网上看到过这个名字。
E: S—Sushang...? Who is that? I feel like that's a name I've seen a lot online recently...

C: 想以一己之力「包围」我们…还真是个出人意料的怪物。
E: He wants to "encircle" us in one fell swoop... This beast is truly unpredictable.

C: 将军，请将竞锋舰的安全交给我！我本该出现在擂台上，现在我也必须重新回到竞锋舰上去。
E: General, please entrust me with the safety of the Skysplitter! I was originally meant to participate in the tournament, so now it is only right that I return to the Skysplitter.

C: 我从没这么希望他能靠自己的嘴皮子再拖延些时间……
E: Hopefully, he can use that silver tongue of his to buy himself enough time...

C: {NICKNAME}，四下看看，如果能找到一两个还活着的步离人就告诉我。
E: {NICKNAME}, take a good look around. If you can find one or two borisin that aren't dead yet, let me know.

C: 而飞霄将军会负责敲山震狼，切断步离人逃亡的路线，让他自以为找到了去处。
E: General Feixiao will be in charge of scaring the wolves and cutting off their other means of escape, making him think that this will be his best way out.

C: 你答应过我的，在医好之前，你绝不会死去。
E: You promised me before that you would not die before I could cure you.

C: 我说过，狐人或步离只是一个名字。你想做谁，就可以做谁。你想做什么，就可以做什么。
E: I told you before, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels! You can be whoever you want to be. You can do whatever you want to do!

C: 我们跑啊跑啊，用尽全力，不知彼此奔向了何方。
E: We ran and ran with all the strength we had, but we ended up losing each other.

C: 不、不要…
E: No, please...

C: 狼潜伏在所有步离和狐人的心底…
E: A wolf lurks in the heart of every borisin and foxian...

C: 在它捕食我之前，得先向我摇尾乞怜！
E: If it wants to devour me, it will first have to beg for my mercy!

C: 这场狩猎游戏，就到此为止吧！
E: Our little hunting game ends here!

C: 按盟誓所言，联盟之人不得在此杀伤持明。但我早已不是联盟的子民，我只是一个来去自由的无名客。
E: As the oath dictates, members of the Alliance are forbidden from harming Vidyadhara here. But I've long since severed ties with the Alliance. Right now I'm simply a Nameless, free to come and go as I please.

C: 遇到一伙人然后呢？
E: You've met a bunch of guys, then what?

C: 好啊，之后再聊。
E: Okay, speak soon.

C: 伊里潘！你冷静一点，我们是执法者，不是土匪。
E: Illifan! Calm down. We're executioners, not bandits.

C: 你犯下死罪，还要嫁祸给亲人，真是猪狗不如！
E: You committed mass murder and dare frame family for it. You're worse than a beast!

C: 也对。好了，不谈这些不开心的事了…朕敬你一杯酒。灰骑士，把酒给她端过去。
E: That is true. All right, enough of this upsetting talk... Let me raise a glass to you. Gray Knight, bring out the wine for her.

C: 皇帝将决定权交给了你。
E: The Emperor has decided to leave the decision to you.

C: 好酒…真是好酒啊！
E: This wine... is amazing!

C: 朕知道！可挨饿的老百姓不会这么想！他们会觉得朕不在乎他们，只有你在乎！可朕在乎！朕在乎！
E: I know that! But the famished commonfolk don't! They'll think I don't care for them, and that only you do! But I do care! I do!

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 朕会将她留下的善意传递下去，至死方休。
E: I will continue her legacy of kindness till the day I die.

C: 我能打过那个女人吗？
E: Do you think I can beat that woman?

C: （抓紧时间，再去检查下查德威克的情况吧。）
E: (Hurry up and check on Chadwick.)

C: 这是…药丸？
E: Is this a bottle of... pills?

C: 哈哈哈…放心吧，我们需要的不是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的成功率——我们需要的是有你在我们的团队里。
E: Hahaha... Take it easy. What we need is you on our team, not a <unbreak>100%</unbreak> success rate.

C: 对撞产生的能量波没能成功撕开虚数裂口；引爆胶囊未能达到临界状态。
E: The energy waves from the collision failed to tear up the Imaginary fissure. The detonation capsule did not reach the critical threshold.

C: 真遗憾，我本不想戳破你的偶像气泡…但卡尔德隆•查德威克不值得你的同情。他早就预见到了近似的结局，但还是选择了忘记后果，不惜代价投入研究。
E: I'm sorry to burst your bubble, but Calderon Chadwick isn't worth your sympathy. He'd long foreseen the outcome, but he chose to ignore it and carry on the research at all costs.

C: 换谁来都是一样的。同样的话我已经说过无数次…我现在对你们而言百无一用。
E: Who is sent here makes no difference. I've said time and again that I'm no longer of use to you guys.

C: 黑…塔…女…士……
E: Madam... Her... ta...

C: …所有。就在刚刚那一瞬间，他把自己毕生的成果都托付给了我。
E: ...Everything. In that brief moment, he entrusted all his life's work to me.

C: 有机生命的理性，着实令人难以捉摸。但有机生命的冲动，往往蕴含壮阔且浪漫的诗意——令我震撼。
E: The reasoning behind organic life is truly unpredictable. Nevertheless, the impulses of organic life frequently embody a grand and romantic poetry that never fails to leave me in awe.

C: 还没好好自我介绍过呢。我叫乔伊，隐夜鸫家系的筑梦学家，也是这处白日梦酒店的主设计师。
E: I haven't properly introduced myself. I am Joey, a Dreamweaver scholar of the Nightingale Family and the chief designer of the Reverie Hotel.

C: 还呆着做什么，等你很久了。
E: What are you doing here? I've been waiting for you.

C: （放任奥尔拉离开）
E: (Let Orla leave)

C: 那只是过去的影子…
E: That's just a shadow of the past...

C: 「看向这片梦境，然后告诉自己：你的努力从不会白费。总有一日，它们将连成星光，照亮某人的眼睛。」
E: "Look upon this vast Dreamscape and tell yourself that your endeavors are never in vain. One day, they shall be woven together into a celestial tapestry, casting radiant light into the depths of another's eyes."

C: 以及…不管怎么说，{RUBY_B#流梦礁}这里{RUBY_E#}仍是一处隐秘之地，希望您不要向外透露这里的信息。
E: And... no matter what, {RUBY_B#Dreamflux Reef}this place{RUBY_E#} is still a concealed secret location. I hope you won't reveal it to outsiders.

C: 发生甚么事了？
E: What happened?

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 那些掌握特殊技能、擅长做粗重活计的强壮男子很容易得到机会；而带着孩子的老人则很难，即便他们实际上更需要帮助。
E: Strong men who have mastery over special skills and proficiency in heavy labor stand the highest chances, while old folk with children in tow the lowest, even if they require more assistance.

C: 对不起，孩子，对不起……
E: I'm sorry, darling. I'm sorry...

C: 经历了这么多事，任谁都难免控制不住情绪。给那对母女留点空间吧。
E: Anyone who just suffered so much hardship would find it difficult to keep their emotions in check. Best give that mother and child some space.

C: 怎么样，到底要不要？要就给钱。
E: How's about it? Want it? Cough up the coin then.

C: （这家店的价格和质量都适中。如果我想要无功无过的选择，那就是它了。）
E: (This shop's price and quality are acceptable. If I want a middling option, this is probably it.)

C: 话是这么说没错…但拜托你一定要让他们躺在椅子上、按步骤用餐，不然就享受不到百分百的美味了！
E: You may be right... but I would ask that you must have them lay back in their chairs and taste the food in order, or they won't be able to enjoy the utmost in flavors!

C: 我是他的弟子，卫兵们肯定不会听我解释。但你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄——求你帮吾师说说情吧！
E: I am his student, the guards will never listen to me. But you're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs — please talk to the guards on behalf of Master!

C: 不给。
E: Nope.

C: 咳…我们换个话题，换个话题。
E: Ahem... Let us change the subject then.

C: 那战争结束后呢？
E: What about after the war, then?

C: 人拥有无限的可能性。终有一日，我们会战胜黑潮。到了那时，外邦人会成为帮助我们重建家园的伙伴。难道各位愿意扼杀那个可能性吗？
E: Humanity holds boundless potential. There will come one day when we prevail over the black tide. When that time comes, the outlanders will stand with us as allies, to rebuild our homeland. Is everyone here willing to extinguish that possibility?

C: 哦？我还以为自己在庭上已经说得很清楚了呢。但有些话确实不能暴露在阳光下……
E: Oh? I thought I expressed it quite clearly in court. Though some words cannot be exposed to the light of day...

C: 回到她的过去找线索吗？是个好办法！
E: Go back to her past to find clues? That's a great idea!

C: ……敬仰墨涅塔的顾客确实喜欢所谓的「金丝礼服」，但用软金线来编织，不仅成本高昂，且穿者也会行动不便。不如用染色的丝线或布料来代替。
E: ...I know that those who revere Mnestia are fond of the so-called "golden thread dress," but weaving clothing out of malleable gold not only makes it very expensive, it also makes it very hard for the wearers to move in. Would it not be better to use dyed silk or cotton?

C: 谁是战场上蒙羞而归的败者？谁是误入鲜血蜜酿的飞蝇？谁是悬锋上应被洗涤入血河的污垢？谁辜负了纷争的尼卡多利之授命？
E: Who is the loser who returned from the battlefield in shame? Who is the fly that accidentally flew into the mead of fresh blood? Who is the dirt on Kremnos that must be washed in the river of blood? Who has failed the duty of Nikador of strife?

C: 确实不太好…
E: Now that you said it...

C: 哎呀，不好意思，忘了我们的恩人——一起来吧，你的报酬也在这边。
E: Oh, sorry. I forgot about you, our savior. Come with us, I shall take care of your payment there, too.

C: 呵呵，行啊，拿着吧——等等，婆婆是花了眼吗，你身后怎么站着一个尼卡多利的眷属！？
E: Hah, fine, take them. Hold on, am I seeing things? Is that a Nikador Titankin behind you!?

C: 呵，听上去是人们恐惧纷争与死亡而编造出的故事罢了。
E: Hah. It sounds like no more than a story created by those that fear strife and death.

C: 好！帕里斯，跳得真好！
E: That's it! You're such a great dancer, Paris!

C: 但我知道，刚刚的那位眷属已不是我们的敌人，你不该用言语的剑刃去伤害她。
E: But what I do know is that THIS Titankin is no longer our enemy. You should not use your words as weapons against her.

C: 若是人人如此，我们该如何抵御那即将到来的胁迫，难道要乞求墨涅塔用丝线来抵御刀枪吗？
E: If we all continue this way, how could we hope to fight against the impending threat? Are we supposed to beg Mnestia and their threads to protect us from their weapons?

C: 场景就这么大，总能找到。
E: There's only so far she can go in this scene.

C: 人类，我和你们不一样。刻法勒赋予了你们这个种族无穷的可能性，你们的身体可以用于任何工作，你们可以信仰任何一位泰坦，可以去做任何事情。
E: Humans are different to us. Kephale has bestowed you with infinite possibilities. Your bodies can be used for any kind of work, you can worship any Titan you choose, and you can do whatever it is you please.

C: <size=32>不！我不想！</size>
E: <size=32>No! I don't want to fight!</size>

C: …好啊，那…我们…一起走吧。
E: ...Alright. Then... let's... let's go.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 没有找到阿卡迪亚，也再也寻不回帕里斯，而没有名字的眷属还在你们面前呢喃。
E: You've never found Arcadia, and Paris will never return. Yet the nameless Titankin still lies before you, murmuring.

C: 是哦，那找找附近有没有「欧洛尼斯奇迹」的秘典吧！
E: You're right. Let's look around to see if there is another secret edition of "Oronyx's Miracle"!

C: 泰坦眷属的话语已微弱到无法听清，看来你们真的要快些了。
E: The Titankin's words have already grown too faint to discern. Looks like you really need to get moving.

C: 也怪我们，时常劳烦她协助我们的工作，但能为她做的事却寥寥无几。「雅努萨波利斯的幽灵」…如果能抓到它就好了。
E: It's also our fault, as we often trouble her to assist us for our work, yet we can hardly help her when it comes to her work. Janusopolis' Ghost... It would be great if we can catch it.

C: 这我熟，要抓鬼吗？
E: I'm familiar with this. Are we going ghostbusting?

C: 是吗？这可不是什么好习惯，愿欧洛尼斯降下赐福，让您得享安眠。
E: Really? This is not a good habit. May Oronyx bestow their blessings upon you, and bless you with blissful sleep.

C: 你还能逃去哪儿呢？除非将你的灵魂献给塞纳托斯…没错，塞纳托斯！祭祀！
E: Where else can you escape? Unless you offer up your soul to Thanatos... That's right, Thanatos! A sacrifice!

C: 老朋友，没必要指责一个无知的小女孩。无论是她，还是我们，甚至是三位命运泰坦，都不过是这命运重渊的囚徒。
E: Old friend, no need to be so harsh on an ignorant girl. Be it her, us, or the Fate Titans, we are but all prisoners of this Abyss of Fate.

C: 在未来的某天，会有陌生的人敲响你的家门，带你去往她的葬礼。
E: Someday in the future, there will be strangers knocking on your door, bringing you to attend her funeral.

C: 现在想来，「帕西提亚」、「骗子」，也许并非那位眷属的指责，不过是对我无谓反抗的讥笑而已。
E: Come to think of it, Pasithea and the "liar" may not have been the targets of that kin's accusations, but rather a dismissive sneer at my futile defiance.

C: 就在前面，我已经听到它的声音了！
E: It's right ahead! I'm already hearing their voice!

C: （城市将崩塌，灾难在哭号中席卷大地）
E: (The city is on the brink of collapse. Disaster sweeps the land to the symphony of wails)

C: 谈及《如我所书》。
E: Talk about As I've Written.

C: 献给每个憧憬英雄的人。
E: To everyone who dreams of being a hero.

C: 这不是重点啦。重点是，我们可以去奥赫玛泡温泉，坐大地兽…还有，我想养一只小奇美拉！
E: That's not the point! The point is, we can go to the hot springs in Okhema, ride dromases... and, I want to raise a little chimera!

C: …得此书前，本座只知此战斩获金血，是为大胜。却不知那金血中，竟有这样一番可歌可泣的故事。
E: ...Before obtaining this book, I only knew that golden blood was reaped in this battle, and thus it was deemed a great victory. I did not know that within that golden blood lay such a stirring and tragic story.

C: 今日，我们就讲这情事细细分说。
E: Today, let us recount this tale in full detail.

C: 我们能做的，只有把它摆到货架上。能否在竞争中生存下来，不确定性太多……
E: All we can do is put it on the shelf. Whether it survives the competition... there are too many uncertainties...

C: 毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
E: After all, you're the one who lives through this story.

C: 黑塔女士她…有些消耗过度，还需要一些时间恢复。
E: Madam Herta has... overexerted herself. She still needs some time to recover.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，再告诉你一个好消息：铁墓陨落后，权杖也一同报废了，但我和螺丝抢救出了绝大部分数据。
E: Oh right, {NICKNAME}. I've got some more good news. After Irontomb fell, the Scepter was ruined, but Screwy and I managed to salvage a majority of data.

C: 其实黑塔女士一直惦记着翁法罗斯。上次她三句不离某样东西，还是收容星核的时候呢。
E: Madam Herta has actually been thinking about Amphoreus all this time. The last time she couldn't stop talking about something was when we contained the Stellaron.

C: 若是研究知识我还能传授一二，但这个世界的发展日新月异，有些事情，只有你们年轻人才能跟得上那股浪潮。
E: I can teach her theories, but the world is ever-changing. There are things that only you young people can keep up with.

C: 我都不知道能教她什么…
E: I don't know what I can teach her...

C: （教她在网上冲浪）
E: (Teach her to surf the Internet)

C: 你能不能帮我们跟她说说，劝她改掉这个坏毛病？
E: Can you please help us have a word with her and persuade her to rein in her language?

C: 老实说我真不想搭理他们，不过我也想尽量礼貌一点，这种情况下有没有什么能敷衍过去的万能句子？
E: To be honest, I don't really want to talk with people like that — but I also want to be as polite as possible. Is there any catch-all phrase that can be used in these situations?

C: 启动中…正在寻找远程设备…倒计时3
E: Initiating... Searching for remote device... Countdown, 3...

C: 我不是，我没有，不知道！
E: Not me. I didn't do it. I don't know!

C: 可惜我还有密卷科的工作没做完，实在走不开…所以，能不能麻烦你帮我拍张照？
E: But my work at the Department of Insight is not done. I really can't leave yet... So, could I please ask you to take some photos for me?

C: 荣誉队员，看那边，伊蕾恩姐姐好像被一群坏家伙围住了！
E: Honorary member, look! Elaine seems to be surrounded by some bad people!

C: 走吧，我们去大矿区找他！
E: Let's go find him in the Great Mine.

C: 药…啊，难道老奶奶的包裹里放的是治头晕的药吗？
E: Medicine... Oh, maybe her medicine is in this package?

C: 我想想…就从旅行的经历开始吧？你到过哪些特别的地方，和我说说吧。
E: Let me think... let's start with a traveling experience? Tell me about any special places you've been to.

C: 你其实什么也没干吧…
E: You didn't do anything...

C: 当然了，老头儿——我已经帮你把申报手续走完了，最快下周就能收到消息。
E: Of course, old man — I've already finished the paperwork for your medal's application. We should hear back from them next week or so.

C: 原来如此，是要送给许久未见的亲人啊……
E: I see...

C: 不过，他这把年纪，想做出什么彻头彻尾的改变恐怕很难吧？所以，我们还是在他身后默默支持就好了，不用在沟通的时候掺进多余的说教。
E: Though, at his age, it'd be very hard to change who he is. So, we'll just support him without unnecessary persuasion.

C: 我只需要你帮我做一件很简单的事：把这篇论文交给大守护者，让她看到我的成果。
E: I just need your help with this very simple thing: Give this thesis to the Supreme Guardian. Let her see what I've achieved.

C: 那个家伙？
E: That guy?

C: 哎，这样应该能让他消停一段时间吧。
E: Ah, that should put him off for a while.

C: 不过他们这次倒是识货，我这个论文确实「知识挺大」！
E: Because these guys know their stuff! They must have "real eyes" to recognize my visionary thesis!

C: 不管怎么说…嗯…谢谢你。
E: In any case... thank you.

C: 不然呢？你以为是这我随口瞎编的？
E: What else? Do you think I just made it up?

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 考我。
E: Test me.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 如果有什么异世界的人来到贝洛伯格，他们一定会觉得「这里不适宜人类居住」。
E: If an alien came to Belobog, they'd definitely think "This place is unfit for human habitation."

C: 不，没什么，只是觉得这里不像书中的气氛。
E: Oh, it's nothing. It's just different from how it's described in the book.

C: 如果他不明白你的来意，只需要告诉他「我是会社派来的」，他会懂的。
E: If he doesn't understand why you're there, just tell him that you're "from the Society" and he'll catch on.

C: 那么就拜托你为我跑一趟了，实在不好意思。
E: Well then, please do this errand for me. Thank you so much.

C: 到底是什么呢？
E: What exactly do we do?

C: 呵呵，不想加入吗？那么我会给你开个无法拒绝的条件……
E: Ho-ho, you don't want to join? Then I will give you an offer you cannot refuse...

C: 好吧，那你摆个姿势。
E: Okay. Please make a pose.

C: 三小时过去……
E: Three hours later.

C: 只是，我常在这里散心，却没见过你啊。
E: I take my strolls around here, but I've never seen you before.

C: 自言自语间，这名铁卫渐渐化作齑粉，在空无一人的裂界中散去。
E: As the Guard mutters to himself, he gradually turns to dust and dissipates into the empty Fragmentum.

C: …咦？这照片上怎么什么都没有哇。
E: ...Huh? Why is there nothing in this picture?

C: 队长…我…知道了…我的时候到了……
E: Captain... I... I know my time has come...

C: 这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶。
E: This is undoubtedly a drift bottle.

C: 「护珠人派出了一队搜救人员，到波月古海上搜了一圈什么都没有找到，你到底在哪里……」
E: "The Pearlkeepers dispatched a search and rescue team to explore the entire Lunarescent Depths, but they found nothing. Where exactly is your location..."

C: 没有！绝对没有！这封信也莫名其妙的，不过这个故事我是听人讲起过的。
E: No! Absolutely not! This letter makes no sense, but I've heard stories like this before.

C: 喂！
E: Hey!

C: 突然，你的眼前一片漆黑，有人用*宽大的手掌*遮住了你的眼睛。你感觉到脖子旁冰冰凉凉的，毫无疑问那是足以吹毛断发的锐器。
E: Suddenly, all you see before you is darkness, as if someone covered your eyes with a *giant hand*. You sense an icy sting on the side of your neck, undoubtedly from a blade sharp enough to split hair.

C: 我只是想保留一些个人空间。
E: I just want to maintain some personal space.

C: 什么破漂流瓶，直接扔回海里！
E: Who cares about these dastardly drift bottles!? Just chuck it right back!

C: 为什么只有一个愿望？
E: Why do I only get one wish?

C: 难道我薄荷过敏？
E: Am I allergic to peppermint?
*burp* *burp*

C: 摇铃呼叫大地兽
E: Call for dromas with bell

C: 据说所有的信仰，都是为了祓除人们内心中对虚无的永恒恐惧。 你不禁暗暗许愿，希望这个陌生的世界能够平稳安泰，众生永远不会被高于他们的神秘存在无情摧毁。
E: It is said that the foundation of all faiths is to dispel the eternal fear of nihility existing in people's hearts. You can't help but silently wish that this strange world will stay steady and peaceful and that the masses will never be confronted with merciless annihilation by a mysterious existence beyond them.

C: 对付这种地痞无赖，一根球棒足矣——
E: A bat to the face is all that's required for such spineless thugs...

C: 灯柱为自己缺失的关注而强烈抗议着，可惜你修好了它。
E: The lamppost protests aggressively at its lack of attention. It's a shame you fixed it up already.

C: …但愿这次开拓也能顺利收场。
E: Let's just hope that this trailblaze can have a happy ending, too.

C: 星际和平公司对这位无名的守护者深表感谢，并向全体一线工作人员致敬。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation expresses heartfelt thanks to this anonymous protector and salutes all frontline workers for their dedication.

C: 只消备好松软的新鲜红土，它便欣然前行三日三夜。
E: They happily march for three days and nights as long as there is soft and fresh red soil.

C: 推演规则、制定律法、宣判死亡。
E: Reason out rules, establish laws, and pronounce death.

C: 即使已经陨落，塔兰顿的审判，还是如此繁杂。
E: Though they have fallen already, the remaining judgments of Talanton are many and varied.

C: 你记住了「曾与阿格莱雅交谈过」
E: You remembered "Talking with Aglaea."

C: 你们说话方式都怪怪的。
E: You all have a weird way of talking.

C: 这座圣烛的底座上交织的是星辰与时钟的图案，细看之下，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的双重神徽隐匿在繁复的花纹之中。
E: The base of this holy candle is adorned with interwoven images of stars and clocks. Upon close inspection, one can seem to see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} hidden within the intricate pattern.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>房檐顶上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the roof eaves</color>...

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「吼吼，既然来找本豹搭话…」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "Ho-ho, since you've decided to approach me..." )∋

C: 我也算实现了自己的理想呀。
E: Then I will have truly realized my dream.

C: 侵占每一束阳光，汲取每一滴雨露，直到万物干枯。永不停歇，永无休止。
E: Claim each ray of sun, take every raindrop, until everything dries up. Never stopping, never ending.

C: 记忆化作音色，流淌在海螺的「言语」中——你可以聆听其中之一，或是许多。
E: Memories take shape as tones, flowing through the conch's "words." You may listen to one... or many.

C: 不再聆听「隆隆」。
E: Stop listening to "Rumble."

C: 一架被施了魔法的里拉琴，永远在自顾自地奏乐，无需任何掌声和打赏。
E: A lyre enchanted to play on its own, forever weaving melodies. No applause or tips required.

C: 架子顶端的神秘水果据说是来自阿玛佐恩斯的战利品——一个遥远而炎热的大陆，在此世被凯撒征服——有着黄金色泽与龙鳞般的外壳…等等，这不就是个菠萝？
E: That strange fruit perched high on the shelf is said to be a treasure of war from the Amazonis — a sweltering land far away, conquered by the Imperator in this life. Golden in hue, armored like dragon scales... wait. Isn't that just a pineapple?

C: 冥海无涯，游泳上岸
E: The Sea of Souls is endless. Swim to the shore.

C: 你向来是一个深陷旧日欢宴的人，尝尽了孤独、习惯了孤独，却又从未摆脱对孤独的恐惧……
E: You've always been someone deeply entangled in past revelries, having tasted loneliness, grown accustomed to it, yet never escaped the fear of it...

C: 也让我在那场宴会里陪伴你吧，好吗？
E: Allow me to accompany you in that celebration, will you?

C: 这谁设计的…
E: Just who designed this...?

C: 这钱是你的吗你就数。
E: If this money isn't yours, then stop counting it.

C: 吓！你…你怎么知道的嗡！
E: Eek! H—How did you know, buzz!

C: 谢谢！你真友善～不过，还是让我解释一下吧——
E: Thank you! You're a friendly one! However, I should still explain—

C: 太好了，谢谢你{NICKNAME}，很高兴你是个通情达理的人。
E: Perfect! Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm glad you're so pleasant to work with.

C: （就这样吧……）
E: (That should do it...)

C: 太、太好了！我这就带您去见奥列格兵长。希、希望这能是最后一次……
E: That's g—great! I'll take you to Captain Oleg now. I h—hope this is the last time...

C: 希望我们很快还能再见，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hope to see you soon, {NICKNAME}!

C: 希望我们很快还能再见，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hope to see you soon, {NICKNAME}!

C: （我闻到了陌生的味道，还夹杂着「分装快乐」的气息，我怕打草惊蛇，才守在这里。）
E: (I smelled something strange that had the lingering whiff of the Joy Filtration Set. I didn't want to tip anybody off, so I decided to stay guard here.)

C: 嘤…谢谢…谢谢你……
E: Eeep... Thank... Thank you...
Eeep...

C: 你究竟对奇物做了什么？
E: What exactly have you done with the Curio?

C: （这个舱段还藏着别的造物？{NICKNAME}，我们该怎么办？）
E: (There are other creations hidden in this zone? {NICKNAME}, what shall we do?)

C: 我要是那种人，阮•梅女士怎么可能放心让我当「管家」呢？
E: If I were like that, why would Ruan Mei even let me be the butler?

C: …我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
E: ...I used other equipment to communicate with her.

C: 这，这，我是通过别的设备和她沟通的。
E: I... I... I used other equipment to communicate with her.

C: （今天的事多亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。你是佩佩最靠谱的伙伴！）
E: (It's all thanks to you today, {NICKNAME}. You are Peppy's most reliable partner!)

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: （还是在附近先调查看看吧，说不定能找到什么有用的线索。）
E: (Search around the area. Maybe there are some useful clues.)

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: 怎么会，完全看不出来！相比真实年龄，你也太成熟了吧…怎么人家就是小小一只呢？
E: No way, I'd never have guessed! You're way too mature for your age... And wait, why am I still so tiny then?

C: 又在逗人家！那{NICKNAME}会变成白发苍苍的{F#老奶奶}{M#老爷爷}吗？突然有点好奇…真想见识一下！
E: You're teasing me again! So, will {NICKNAME} grow old and gray and become an {F#old granny}{M#old grandpa}? Now I'm curious... I wanna see!

C: 呀…虽然人家也没有证据，但确实有类似的感觉呢！
E: Ah... even though I have no proof, I can't shake the feeling that it's true!

C: 不过现在流云渡不太平，调度系统一团乱麻，码头卡了特别多的货运星槎，我一个人根本处理不过来……
E: But now, Cloudford is in chaos. The scheduling system is a mess, the jetty is filled with an exceptionally large number of freight starskiffs, I simply can not handle everything alone...

C: 抱歉，报酬其实已经准备好了，但是我到处都没有找着能装报酬的宝箱。所以，下次会把这次的报酬一并送过来，放心，少不了你的。
E: Apologies, the payment is actually ready, but I couldn't find a chest that can hold the payment. So, I'll send this time's payment along with your next one. Don't worry, I won't leave you dry!

C: 咕嘎，完美！
E: Cuckoo, this is perfect!

C: 哈哈，不错，所谓英雄配宝剑，好鞍配好马，「匣里流光」正配你呀！
E: Haha! A great sword for a hero, a good saddle for a fine horse, and the Luminflux Pyxis is just right for you!

C: 「岁阳武器谁家强～工造司里公输梁～」
E: "Who can develop the best heliobus weapon? Gongshu Liang from the Artisanship Commission!"

C: 一道上下波动的曲线罢了，不足为谈。
E: It's just a fluctuating curve. Nothing worth mentioning.

C: 对了，你不会跑到太卜大人那儿揭发我的，对吧？
E: By the way, you won't run off to the Master Diviner and snitch on me, will you?

C: 运气真是万能的解释呢…
E: Ah. "Luck" really can be blamed for anything...

C: 你已经进步很多啦。
E: You've already improved a lot.

C: 等等，太卜司那个家伙…不会还没跟您说过咱们的活动吧？
E: Wait... Don't tell me that guy from the Divination Commission didn't tell you about our event?

C: 想我纵横「寻圈」三百年，打败的对手比掉落的头发还多，到头来却被你个小年轻抢了风头。
E: For three centuries have I dominated the Pathfinder community, trouncing more opponents than hairs have fallen off my scalp. Yet here you are, a young upstart trying to steal my thunder!

C: 怎么幽囚狱里面也有「枘凿六合」？
E: Why is Hexanexus also available in The Shackling Prison?

C: 没问题，上吧。
E: No problem. Go.

C: 哈哈哈，解开心结后的感觉可真棒！等你与我的两位同伴结识，再来找我们！
E: Hahaha, the feeling of untangled emotions is exhilarating! Come look for me again when you rendezvous with my two friends!

C: 嗯…有位织者经历了可怕的幻象。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>断桥旁的走廊边缘</color>，心有余悸呢，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver haunted by terrifying illusions. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie quietly <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the corridor near a broken bridge</color>, seemingly shadowed by lingering fears. Go there and find them.

C: 您生活这么拮据吗，什么东西都要往口袋里塞？
E: Are you so hard pressed that you just go around shoving everything you find in your greedy little pockets?

C: 您太抬举我了！我不过是个初出茅庐的小贼，和真正的行家里手还差得远呢。
E: You flatter me! I'm but an amateur thief, a far cry from the true masters of the craft.

C: 最有惊无险的吧。
E: The most harrowing heist.

C: 据说，为了扼制扎格列斯的恶作剧，其他泰坦在它身上绑了一颗星星，每当扎格列斯从天上逃走，贼星的轨迹就会暴露它的方向。
E: Legend has it that the other Titans tied a star to Zagreus to stop their pranks. Every time Zagreus escaped through the sky, the Thief Star would mark their trail.

C: 如你所见，我无论外貌、名字、声音、还是性格，都和它大差不差，那它的分身能力想必是不错的吧！桀桀桀桀。
E: Just look at me — nearly identical in appearance, name, voice, and character. Its projection abilities must be impressive! Hehehehe.

C: 咳咳，现在反正游戏也结束了，虫子我就还给你吧！不过我其实还挺好奇，泡了一次黄金池，它还愿不愿意说自己什么都知道…桀桀。
E: Ahem, the game's over, so here's your bug back! I do wonder if after its pool of gold experience, it'll still brag about knowing everything... Hehe.

C: 啊啊啊…这就是天外来客的实力吗！老巴特鲁斯常说的不打不相识…竟然是单方面挨揍的意思吗……
E: Aaaaah... this is the power of visitors from beyond the sky! Old Bartholos always claimed fighting creates bonds... did it mean getting pummeled?

C: 灰头发的，老巴特鲁斯看你眼熟——以后有事没事多找我玩，记住啊？让咱也享受享受当爷爷奶奶的天伦之乐~
E: Hey, gray-hair, you look familiar. Next time you're bored, come hang out with me. Let old Bartholos experience a little about being a grandparent~

C: 既然我们的友情始于漫长时光之前的一次偶然合作，那么在最终的分别之前…让你体验一下脑控巴特鲁斯是种怎样的感受，应该是一种不错的报偿吧？
E: Since our friendship began with a chance collaboration long ago, before we go our separate ways... letting you feel what it's like to mind-control Bartholos sounds like a fair reward, doesn't it?

C: 据说，世界上的第一个旅行杂技团就这样诞生了；他们从奥赫玛一路表演回了遥远的哈图西里，从此再也没有从事雇佣兵的工作。
E: And just like that, the world's first traveling acrobatic troupe was born. They performed their way from Okhema to far-off Hattusili and never went back to mercenary life.

C: 这模仿有够拙劣。
E: Seems like a cheap knockoff.

C: 你知道这些柱子是什么吗？桀桀，它们是支撑翁法罗斯的服务器——我猜是这样。
E: You know what these pillars are? Heheh, they're the servers that keep Amphoreus running, or so I'd guess.

C: 未来…我会找到更强有力的证据来说服所有人。
E: Going forward... I'll find more concrete evidence to convince everyone.

C: 真的吗？这可真是如虎添翼啊！{NICKNAME}，考虑一下？
E: Really? That would be a huge help! {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 可是…{F#她}{M#他}甚至不是树庭的学生…再说那个心，比人大多了……
E: But... {F#she}{M#he} isn't even a student of the Grove... Besides, that heart is much bigger than a person...

C: 好了，再试一次吧，辅祭。随着问题的深入，溯寻会变得更困难，但我相信，你能顺利解决的。
E: All right, try again, acolyte. As the question deepens, the extrapolation becomes more complex, but I believe you can manage.

C: 总觉得还不够。
E: It doesn't feel enough.

C: 呜，呜…嘶…呜呜……
E: Waaa, waaa... *sobs* Waaaaaa...

C: 看来铁路不归雅努斯管。
E: It seems the railways lie beyond Janus's domain.

C: 圣杯屹立于群山之间，海浪和鱼儿从中跃出——这是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的象征。
E: Amidst mountains stands the Holy Grail, with leaping waves and fish — the symbol of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.

C: 太好了，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
E: That's a relief! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket.

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 巴特鲁斯，平账的神！
E: Bartholos, the god of accounting!

C: 这又不是你的错……
E: This isn't your fault...

C: 为什么要做到这个地步？
E: Why go this far?

C: 「再创世」——我也曾抱着这样的期盼活着。但当黑潮真的来临，看着黑潮吞没同伴，听到他们的惨叫…我承认，我还是…怕死。
E: "Era Nova" — I once lived with that hope, too. But when the black tide came, when I watched it consume my friends and heard their screams... I won't lie. I was still afraid.

C: 那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
E: Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.

C: 早说有奖励嘛！
E: You should've said there was a reward sooner!

C: 不必担心，{NICKNAME}阁下…我其实感觉好多了。
E: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}... I actually feel much better now.

C: 是撤退的时候了。
E: It's time to go.

C: …我无法保证。
E: ...I can't make that promise.

C: 应该不疼，但会有些奇怪的感觉……或许酸，或许麻，可以忍住不动吗？
E: You might get an aching or numbing sensation, but it shouldn't be too painful... Do you think you can hold still?

C: 没用的…吾身是机巧工造之物，并非血肉凡胎——
E: It won't work... My body is mechanical, not flesh and blood—

C: 很好，不必回地衡了，任务继续。
E: Very good — we no longer need to return to the Realm-Keeping Commission. The mission continues.

C: 好吧，祂大概不会来了。
E: Well, THEY probably won't come.

C: 别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
E: Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!

C: 有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。他想保密，所以你别外传。
E: There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, and resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. He wants to keep things a secret, so please don't leak anything.

C: 角色扮演环节？
E: Is this some kind of role-playing?

C: 下次你最好求我回来。
E: You better beg me to come back next time.

C: 天幕上有黯淡的铂金铝片，一只眼睛忽明忽暗…
E: In the sky, there are some dull platinum aluminum flakes and a flickering eye...

C: 「看起来虫潮在宇宙蔓延最盛时，『贪饕』奥博洛斯也张开了巨口——祂不仅吞下了无数塔伊兹育罗斯的子嗣，还吞下了无数世界！『繁育』和『贪饕』…听着就像一对冤家。」
E: "Seems like Oroboros the Voracity opened THEIR mouth when the spreading of the Swarm reached its peak in the universe. Not only did Oroboros devour countless heirs of Tayzzyronth, but THEY also swallowed numerous worlds! The Propagation and the Voracity... THEY sound like arch-enemies to me."

C: 你睁开眼睛：你身处蠹星，这里没有人，只有虫群在你脚下匍匐爬行——你的直觉尖叫着，这必然是一切的开端！但你发现，古怪的、不合时宜的东西总是在模拟宇宙的漏洞里被推演出来——比如一份天才俱乐部#？会员关于<color=#dbc291ff>「终末」</color>的手稿研究，它自动在你面前展开。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself in Lepismat, where there's no humanity but a swarm of flat insects crawling at your feet. Your instinct screams at you, telling you that this is the beginning of everything! However, you realize that strange and anachronistic items constantly appear and are calculated into being from the loopholes in the Simulated Universe. For example, a manuscript copy of the research of <color=#dbc291ff>Finality</color> composed by Genius Society member #? has unfolded automatically before you.

C: 最终，他从屠杀中逃离，留下最后一份疯狂的呢喃：「行于不同命途的赏金猎人血液颜色并不相同！」你知道这是一句假话，因为你的眼前只有一片*殷红的血海*。
E: Eventually, the hunter flees from the carnage, leaving behind a final, delirious whisper. "For bounty hunters with different paths, their blood is not of the same color." You are well aware that it is a lie, for all you can see is a sanguine pool of blood.

C:
2.小拉铂尔罗曼蒂克预言集：
小拉铂尔星泯灭于虫皇的初次远徙；而其姊妹星球大拉铂尔星早在此前便已灰飞烟灭。
作为大拉铂尔星的姊妹星，二者曾于数个琥珀纪间水火不容——有正史如此撰写：「一双姊妹星，死亡先后攀上它们的面颊。」
但它们在野史中变成了一对爱恨纠缠不休的姊妹；史学家本人更喜欢这个版本。
E:
2. Romantic story collection on Lapole Minor:
Lapole Minor was destroyed during Imperator Insectorum's first conquest, and its twinning star, Lapole Major, was annihilated centuries before that.
These planets were once in endless conflict several Amber Eras ago, as described in the official history. "Two sisters, eager to bring death to each other's door, unknown death marking them both, forevermore."
However, in the unofficial history, a more romantic version preferred by historians depicts them as a pair of sisters who are entangled in love and hatred for each other.

C: 一个声音从你的头顶传来…它仿佛在挠着你的头顶——它关切地献着殷勤问你：到现在还没放弃置身事外的想法？
E: You hear a voice from the top of your head... as if it is scratching your head. It asks you with eager concern: Are you still insisting on not being involved in this?

C: 「嘿，{NICKNAME}，等等！模拟宇宙数据显示，你的『认知』又一次扩张了。」黑塔有些惊讶，「现在你会感觉到大脑灼烧吗？我想这对你来说有些过负荷了。喂，斯蒂芬！这次可以规避我们的数据在战争中湮灭吗？虽然感觉不到痛，但我不想再看到我们的死状！」
E: "Hey {NICKNAME}, wait up! The Simulated Universe data shows that your cognition has expanded once again." Herta is somewhat surprised. "Do you feel like your mind is on fire? I think the load might be too great on you. Hey, Stephen! Can we bypass the demise of our data in the war this time? We don't feel any pain, but I really don't want to see our deaths again!"

C: 「第二场『战争』还在继续。」阮•梅把手中的数据螺旋收拢，她冰凉的手指尖抹过半空，「反有机的『战争』持续了十几个琥珀纪。没人知道它是如何结束的。」
E: "The Second War is still ongoing." Ruan Mei gathers the data spirals in her hands and makes a swipe in the air with her icy fingertips. "The Anti-Organic War went on for dozens of Amber Eras. No one knows how it ended."

C: 「身为一名天才，斯蒂芬•劳艾德竟然不敢面对公众演讲！」黑塔的眼神中明显带有不悦，「总有一天，我们得帮斯蒂芬摆脱这种丢人的群体恐惧。好吧，{NICKNAME}。我们得把和公司有关的部分整理出来，打发下星际和平公司。然后把我们要的，关于星神的数据存储下来。」
E: "You're a genius, Stephen Lloyd. I can't believe you can't do public speaking!" Herta's gaze is clearly tinged with annoyance. "One day, we'll help Stephen overcome his fear of crowds. {NICKNAME}, we need to organize the parts related to IPC to keep them happy. Then, we can keep the data about the Aeons that we want."

C: 「欢迎你，新晋的公司职员——你定是一位充满*血性*的有机生命！让我为你介绍公司体系。」
E: "Welcome aboard, newcomer! You must be a spirited organic lifeform! Let me explain the company's structure to you."

C: 你们意外抵达「机械帝国」，这里无奇不有：智械、未来兽、群体机、还有更多的无机生命…但可恨的是，这次也有*假面愚者*混了进来！你们在入境的瞬间就遭到通缉，一路磕磕绊绊、东倒西歪，最后在一台巨大的*机器*前吓得颠三倒四，索性空手而归。
E: You unexpectedly arrived in the Machine Empire, where you encountered a multitude of wonders: Intellitrons, beasts of the future, collective machines, and more inorganic life forms. However, what's unfortunate is that this time, the Masked Fools have infiltrated as well! The moment you entered, you became wanted, stumbling and faltering all the way, ending up in front of a massive *machine* in a state of shock, ultimately leaving empty-handed.

C: 为缓解痛苦，他告诉你自己发现的十几种控制情绪的方法：阳光、室温、作息、饮食…什么都可以。有时他为了遏制悲伤，会主动开始哭泣，并在三天内专注于哭泣。而三天过后，一切恢复如初。如此循环了八十三次后，他开始怀疑自己能否成为一台「机器」。
E: To ease your pain, he shares with you more than a dozen methods to control emotions he has discovered: Sunlight, room temperature, daily routine, diet... Anything is possible. Sometimes, he will make himself cry and do nothing else for three days just to contain his sadness. Everything will be good three days later. After repeating that <unbreak>83</unbreak> times, he starts doubting his ability to be a machine.

C: 断掉的翅膀和螯肢扎进铁甲，刺耳的嘶鸣将你团团包裹，一如你在入夜时听到的可怖声音。它们拥挤着向你扑来，每只蛰虫都想要品尝这送上门来的美食，残余的萤火已然昭示你行将陨落的宿命。
E: Broken wings and mandibles poke into your armor, and a piercing roar envelops you — just like the horrible shrieks that keep you up at night. They push and shove as they pounce toward you, each bug trying to taste this delicious snack delivered straight to their door. The remaining fireflies already bespeak of your doomed fate.

C: 破坏掉沿途的阻碍，你将过去一年的内容存档，虽然自己受了很多伤，但孩子们安全比什么都重要。在八千个标准年前，你们曾有过一些不愉快的经历，傲慢的孩子不愿听从你过来「人」的经验，竟想要去到外面危险的世界。
E: Destroying any obstacles in your path, you archive the previous year's exploits. Despite sustaining many an injury, the safety of the kids far outweighs anything else. <unbreak>8000</unbreak> standard years ago, some unpleasant things happened to you. These cocky kids never listen to your own experiences as their "elder" and just want to wander off out there into the dangerous world.

C: 你拒绝收下这样的东西。直到一位反物质军团的士兵将天平带到这里，讲述那位总统是如何丑陋地向他们求饶。
E: You refuse to accept such a thing — right up until a soldier from the Antimatter Legion brings the scales here and recounts exactly how ugly the president looked as he begged for the Legion's mercy.

C: 故乡？你的母星不是在赫尔多林吗？含辛茹苦拉扯你长大的养父，把你送上了前往亚伯安南的运输舰。在那里，你谋杀了一位德高望重的筑城者，在法庭上被当场宣判死刑，扔进大气层烧成灰烬。
E: Your hometown? Isn't your home system Heldorin? Your foster dad, who worked so hard to bring you up, sent you off to Arboran on a transport vessel. There, you murdered a highly-respected Architect and were sentenced to death, whereupon you were tossed into the upper atmosphere and burnt to ashes.

C: 药师的影子总是飘忽不定，有时近在咫尺，时而又远在天边。你变得越来越焦急，哪怕寻得了灵药，若故乡已消亡，那求药也失去了意义。
E: Yaoshi's shadow is always dancing, either inches away or flickering over to the other side of the world. You grow increasingly agitated — even if you had the elixir, there wouldn't be any point to it at all if your homeworld had met its demise.

C: 眨眼间，悲悯的神明已然消失，宛如一场幻影，但你能感受到，体内涌出的蓬勃生机。
E: In the blink of an eye, the compassionate god has disappeared like a ghost, but you can still feel THEIR invigorating vitality pouring out of you.

C: 要足够优雅。
E: You must be sufficiently graceful.

C: 对生物智慧研究最深的完美进化学派主动遣出研究队伍尝试拯救小镇的居民，领队男子接受采访，他的声音你再熟悉不过——
E: The School of Evolutionary Perfection, with their unparalleled research into biological intelligence sent a research team to attempt to rescue the townsmen. When the team leader accepted an interview, you recognized their voice immediately...

C: 在██的世界中，情绪与价值判断是荒谬的。你意识到这一点的同时，所在的██冰川尽皆碎裂，学者的声音探进你的思维，试图捞起溺水的你，却又逐渐远去——好在你终于再也听不到他那██的歌谣了。
E: In the world of ██, emotions and judgments of value are merely absurd. As you become aware of this, every glacier in the ██ around you shatters. The voice of the scholar penetrates your mind, as they attempt to save you from drowning, but it gradually fades away once more... At least you will never have to hear that ██'s song again.
