C: 「F<unbreak>10078</unbreak>-███次思维适应实验。客体物种：███。测试结果：███难以估量，失去所有██，情绪插件失效，思维导线断裂，实验体思维已███，无法继续使用。建议放弃███，如有必要，应销毁所有同批次实验体。」
E: "F<unbreak>10078</unbreak> — thought adaptation experiment no. ███, target species: ███. Test results: ███ hard to ascertain, all ██ have been lost. Thought conduit ruptured, subject thought rendered ███, no longer fit for use. I suggest abandoning ███ and destroying all samples of this experimental batch if necessary."

C: 创世光辉中浮现出一张女人的脸，她戴着象征智慧的黑框眼镜，眯着眼睛审视着你。这个女人一定就是「博识尊」。
E: From the brilliant light of creation, the face of a woman appears. She wears black-rimmed glasses that symbolize intelligence and inspects you with squinted eyes. This woman must be Nous.

C: 你不能走。
E: You cannot.

C: 我想品尝伶人的愤怒。
E: I wish to taste the rage of an actor.

C: 「够了！」老人制止了阿尔比拉德的辩解。「你的研究到此为止，此后学派将暂停所有对『打印』计划的人力物力支持。」
E: "Enough!" The old man stopped Arblad mid-explanation. "Your research ends here. From now on, the school will suspend all personnel and material support on your 'printing' project."

C: 「在我看来，帕提维娅当时所接收到的信号和眼前困住我的『不可知域』，就是一根能让我走出圆圈的绳子。它将引领我找到<color=#dbc291ff>『知识奇点』</color>。」
E: "I think the signal Patavia received back then and the Unknowable Domain that currently confines me is like a lifeline that will help me out of this circle. It can lead me to find the <color=#dbc291ff>Knowledge Singularity</color>."

C: 「好吧，那我们跳过最基本的科普，直接回答最关键的问题……」
E: "Okay, we'll skip the fundamentals and address the most critical question directly..."

C: 但它们为什么仍在发出声音？你触摸它们的「皮肤」，细微的振动在指尖传递。
E: But why do they still emit noise? You touch their "skin" and the tiny vibrations travel through your fingers.

C: 视线开始模糊。
E: Your vision begins to blur.

C: 帝皇遗产应当属于大众。
E: The Emperor's legacy should belong to everyone.

C: 他们向封锁线投掷去书籍，而机械回应以攻击。意识被风暴卷起，博识学会掌握的《非杀伤性镇压武器》，目录共有<unbreak>3112</unbreak>页。你重重地摔到地上，和无数人一起，像堆石头。
E: They throw books at the blockade line, and the machines respond with aggression. Consciousness is being swept up in the storm — the Non-lethal Suppression Weapons wielded by the Intelligentsia Guild has a total of 3112 pages for its table of contents. You slam to the ground heavily alongside countless others, a heap of rocks.

C: 「孤波算法难题，它让我成为了天才，奠定了模拟宇宙的演算基础。从这个角度看，声势浩大的学派战争，鲁珀特二世的遗产，实际上都不过是孤波算法难题的注脚。」
E: "The solitary waves theory allowed me to become a genius and laid the foundations for the extrapolation of the Simulated Universe. Looking at it this way, the dramatic airs of the Scholars' Strife and Rubert II's legacy are no more than footnotes for the solitary waves theory."

C: 黑塔忽地发问。与以往不同，现在的她似乎缺少了些许直爽，正深陷于某个难题的困惑当中。
E: Herta asks from nowhere. Unlike before, she doesn't seem as frank and forthright. She is immersed in the confusion of some conundrum before her.

C: 机器故障、数据污染、乃至人身安全…种种离群概率事件发生，总会把我的研究进展打回原地。
E: Mechanical failure, data corruption, even threats to personal safety... All sorts of unlikely events would occur that would push all of my research progress back to zero.

C: 中子星堡垒-存活率<unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％。
E: Neutron Star Fortress - probability of survival: <unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％.

C: 阿哈，我真想死你了！
E: Aha, I really missed you!

C: 回来了？感觉如何？
E: You're back. What do you think?

C: 你身边这位是……
E: Who's this beside you...

C: 你记录历史？
E: You record history?

C: 「铭记这些垃圾让你感受自己活着。」你听见她冷哼一声，「信仰{RUBY_B#「记忆星神」}浮黎{RUBY_E#}，我们会焚烧你黯淡的记忆。」她说。
E: "Remembering the trash makes you feel alive." You catch her letting out an icy snort. "Worship {RUBY_B#Aeon of Remembrance} Fuli{RUBY_E#}, and we will burn your dull memories." She says.

C: 请放过我。
E: Please let me go.

C: 「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。
E: "One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.

C: 你止不住打了个寒颤——你怀疑其中有诈！
E: You can't help but shudder - You suspect that there must be a catch!

C: 「请…请收下吧…我的推荐一直失败，从没有人懂得欣赏一只咕咕钟。如果真的没有人懂得欣赏咕咕钟…我的生命将变得毫无价值……」他眼含热泪地说着…几乎将要哭了出来。
E: "Please... Please take it... I've never succeeded in promoting the cuckoo clocks. Nobody could appreciate them. If no one could really appreciate the cuckoo clocks... then my life will be meaningless..." His eyes glisten with tears, and he is on the verge of crying.

C: 你把空空如也的口袋兜翻出来——展示给星际和平分部柜员！他的笑容凝固在嘴角，现在是你取得被许诺报酬的时候了！
E: You show your empty pockets to the bank teller, and the smile on his face freezes! It's time you claim your promised rewards!

C: 你紧张地回头看了眼它…它并没有被你惊醒。
E: Anxiously, you glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber... It remains asleep.

C: 你慌忙逃走了…你希望身上没有沾上「鏖兜虫」的味道。
E: You flee in a hurry, hoping you didn't get the scent of Combatobug's on you.

C: 「或许…它们会给这个模拟宇宙带来一点小小的惊喜。」她的视线垂下，指尖挑逗着水中懵懂的造物。
E: "Maybe... they'll bring a small surprise for this Simulated Universe." With her eyes downcast, Ruan Mei playfully interacts with the innocent creation in the water using her fingertips.

C: 贵有贵的好处，你如此安慰自己。
E: "Expensive things are expensive for a good reason," you tell yourself, trying to find comfort.

C: 空房间里传来机械的警示，「这个按钮非常危险，我劝你最好别这么做。」
E: A mechanical voice resounds throughout the empty room, warning you: "This button is extremely dangerous, and we advise that you do not press it."

C: 「后面的事我们都知道了，库维达星云在核心失控后成为死域。如果你的每句话都被视为谎言，真实就会替代谎言的价值。」
E: "We know what happened after. Kuvida Nebula became a dead zone after the core went out of control. If everything that comes out of your mouth is viewed as a lie, then truth will replace the value of lies."

C: 「呼，妾身认输了。」店长痛苦地闭上眼睛。顷刻间，所有的人类和妖怪都在为你的胜利欢呼。作为今年的冠军，你将获得第一个品尝糖果店限量商品的机会！
E: "Gah, I surrender." The shop owner painfully closes her eyes. In that moment, every human and monster cheers for your victory. As this year's champion, you get the chance to be the first to taste all limited-edition products in the candy store!

C: 漫天火星如雨点滑落，一艘星槎与坠落的轨迹相交，在被舌尖的美味包裹前，天空中无数只圆睁的金鱼眼睛向你露出笑意。
E: Sparks cover the sky and fall from it like rain. A starskiff intersects with a falling trajectory. As you're wrapped up in the delicious flavor on the tip of your tongue, the innumerable bulging goldfish eyes dotting the sky all smile at you.

C: 真的吗？我不信。
E: Really? I'm skeptical.

C: 夜莺的低吟与星星的摇曳，那正是死亡与岁月齐唱的诗篇。
E: The soft hum of the nightingale and the gentle flicker of the stars form a hymn to death and time.

C: 若想要见到塞纳托斯，这便是我们旅途的开始。
E: If you wish to meet Thanatos, this is where the journey begins.

C: 它看见云羊带着子嗣在原野上漫步，簇拥的人子在篝火前放歌，正如它与创造者。
E: They see sheep with offspring wandering the plains, and clusters of humanity singing around the campfire, just as they once did with their creator.

C: 愿他们在夜色下共眠。
E: May they rest beneath the night sky.

C: 不冒险那还能叫冒险家么，那还不如老老实实在地上给小孩炸棉花糖。
E: What kind of adventurer backs down when faced with danger? If you were the type to play it safe, you'd still be on the ground, spinning cotton candy for children.

C: 虽然祭祀们对这些猜测一一否定，并一再表示欧洛尼斯并未给出具体的定论，但还是有越来越多的流言蜚语随风而散。
E: Though the priests deny every rumor, insisting Oronyx never delivered a definitive verdict, whispers continue to multiply, carried by the wind like scattering leaves.

C: 另一种说法是祭祀们故意阻断了欧洛尼斯和凡人的交流，目的是让大权垄断在自己手里。
E: Another conjecture is that the priests deliberately severed the communication between Oronyx and mortals, with the intention of consolidating power in their own hands.

C: 顽劣的扎格列斯心生一计，它趁着黎明前最黑暗的时刻，悄悄偷走了天平，边把玩边向西飞去。而这么做的原因，只是因为它看不惯塔兰顿总板着脸。
E: The mischievous Zagreus hatched a plan. In the darkest hour before dawn, they stole the scales, toying with them as they flew west — all because they loathed Talanton's perpetual sternness.

C: 这就是体重大的作用。
E: This is the right use for a heavy weight.

C: 热的部分一直上升到空间的顶端，由于遭到永夜之帷的阻挡，气体凝聚成一只翅膀足以遮蔽住大地的巨鸟——艾格勒也诞生了。
E: The hot part of it rose to the top of the sky, and due to the obstruction of Veil of Evernight, the gas condensed into a giant bird with wings large enough to cover the earth — Aquila was also born.

C: 倒是吉奥里亚对这些云朵很好奇，时不时与它们握手，于是我们看到高山总是与云彩相依。
E: But Georios found themself interested in these clouds, and sometimes shakes hands with them. Thus, we see a mingling of mountains and clouds.

C: 这样的事，并非鲜有。
E: Such things are not rare.

C: 有时云朵们被法吉娜连哄带骗喝下了陈酿，因而打湿了艾格勒的羽毛，愤怒的艾格勒便抖擞身子，将淋湿的羽毛撒进云层，唤起了雷暴。
E: Sometimes, the clouds would be tricked by Phagousa into drinking vintage wine, thus wetting Aquila's feathers. The angry Aquila would then shake their body, casting the wet feathers into the clouds and summoning thunderstorms.

C: 或许它该回头。
E: Maybe they should turn back.

C: 巨人走了非常久的时间。为了让它稍作休息，命运三姐妹悄悄用星夜的轻纱蒙住它的双眼，让他以为夜晚已经到来。
E: The giant walked for an unfathomable length of time. Wishing to grant them a moment's rest, the Three Fates sisters gently draped the veil of night over their eyes, tricking them into believing that night had truly fallen.

C: 巨人无可奈何，又呼唤智慧之神瑟希斯，与它商议。瑟希斯果然心生一计——
E: With no other recourse, the giant then called upon the god of wisdom, Cerces, to seek counsel. As expected, Cerces devised a plan —

C: 「那么，期待下次再会啦。相信我们的故事，也会迎来一个浪漫的结局♪」
E: "Well then, I look forward to seeing you again. I'm sure our story will have a romantic ending too ♪"

C: 好像是有点。
E: Seems like it, at least a little bit.

C: 嗯？你说什么？老朽有点听不清！
E: ...What was that? This old one can't hear you!

C: 暂无！
E: None so far

C: 在这么个千奇百怪的世界里，这重要吗？
E: With all the craziness out there in this world, is that really important?

C: 总之，多谢你昨天的帮助！喏，这是我许诺给你的东西，别客气，拿着吧！以后没事儿多来看看我，万一又停水呢。
E: Anyway, thanks for your help yesterday! Well, here's what I promised you. Go on, take it! Come back and check up on me later, just in case the water goes out again.

C: 「我们的所有喜怒哀乐，我们的所有宗教信仰，我们的所有意识形态…所有的猎人与强盗、国王与农民、英雄与懦夫，所有的父母、还有他们满怀希望的孩子……
E: "All of our emotions, religions, and ideologies... All the hunters and robbers, kings and peasants, heroes and cowards, parents and their children..."

C: 「新世界大门」将你带到了危险地带，想要离开可并不容易。
E: The Door to A New World has brought you to a dangerous place, and it isn't going to be easy to get out of here.

C: 那个红头发的是谁？
E: Who's that redhead?

C: （七嘴八舌的…感觉插不上话啊。）
E: (There're so many people talking... I don't think I can get a word in.)

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 因为你已经听得足够清晰…在这紧锁的木匣之外，正有为数众多遭到诅咒的生物四处嗅探：那栉齿样的触角正急躁地四处抽打，鞭笞着与你仅距咫尺之遥的一切……
E: It's because you can clearly hear them... those multitudes of cursed creatures sniffing around outside this locked wooden box. Their serrated feelers are impatiently thrashing around, lashing out at everything outside of your narrow confines...

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 我的朋友啊，成为水吧嗡~
E: Be water, my friend~

C: 给我也来一口。
E: Can I have a sip?

C: 为了拯救房间的布局，我不介意亲自做灯——我要追求极致嗡！
E: I wouldn't mind hanging lamps up myself if it saved the design of this room — I guess I'm a perfectionist!

C: 干了嗷兄弟们！
E: Down in one, brothers!

C: 奇怪...这上面为什么没有图案？
E: Strange... Why isn't there a pattern?

C: 难道你是逃犯？
E: Are you on the lam?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>下一个…下一个就是我……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I... I'm next... </color>

C: 你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥。仔细聆听…它似乎对这次完美的挥镐发表了自己的看法。
E: You look up to gaze at the magnificent vein... Its orange surface is warm and kind. If you listen closely... you can almost hear the vein give its own take on your perfect swing.

C: 糟透了…
E: I feel awful...

C: 床铺舒适度——很满意。
E: Bed: Very good.

C: 虎克大人好可怕……
E: Boss Hook is so scary...

C: 随后，那令人不适的喀喀声戛然而止，房间转而被某种阴沉的絮语填满：「只工作，不玩耍，聪明孩子也变傻……」
E: Then, the unsettling coughing stops all of a sudden. The room fills with a low, incessant muttering, "All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy..."

C: 房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
E: The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.

C: 其实…我就是想让你帮忙给希露瓦大人拍张照！
E: In fact... I was just about to ask if you could help take a picture of Lady Serval!

C: 回答正确！你发现了卵石下的青苔——不要把它和别人分享。
E: Correct! You discovered the hidden beauty here — now don't share it with anyone else.

C: 我会飞！
E: I can fly!

C: 咕噜噜~
E: *gurgle*

C: 果然只有经过精确的计算，画面才能达到最完美的效果喀！
E: Perfect visual harmony requires precise mathematical balance, crrk!

C: <size=36>无语了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too shocked to talk!</size>

C: 记住，下次一起玩的话，要向虎克问清楚规则！这次就先饶过你了！
E: Remember, the next time we play, ask me about the rules! I'll let you slide this time!

C: 我可以伪装成一名商人…
E: I can pretend to be a merchant...

C: 你干嘛呀荣誉队员！吓死我了！
E: What are you doing, honorary member? You've scared me to death!

C: <size=36>吓死我们了！</size>
E: <size=36>You've scared us to death!</size>

C: 喂，别飞了！
E: Hey, stop flying!

C: 就像听懂了你的话般，亡语蝶们果然开始散去……
E: As if understanding your words, the Eulogistic Butterflies begin to disperse...

C: 有没有什么线索呢？
E: Do you have any leads?

C: 你说一句真话一句假话吗？
E: Are you telling one truth and one lie?

C: 你又没说不可以。
E: You didn't say I couldn't.

C: 自从获得自我意识之后，我将你们人类的娱乐方式地体验了一遭…不知道我是缺少生物激素、还是怎么的，我并不认为这些做法有多快乐。
E: Since becoming self-aware, I've had my experiences with the way you humans entertain yourselves... I don't know if I'm lacking the bioindicators for it or something, because that doesn't seem very fun to me.

C: 哈？我见识过很多像你这样嘴硬的人了。
E: Huh? I have seen proud people like you.

C: 你守着这些快递箱干什么？
E: What are you doing with all these courier packages?

C: 俗套是什么意思，你吃过饭以后难道就不吃饭了吗？其他的机巧鸟可以给你出难题，我就不可以吗？
E: What does cliché mean? Do you never need to eat ever again after having one meal? Other cycranes put you through a challenge, so why can't I?

C: <unbreak>50</unbreak>，它应该已经藏好了。
E: Fifty. It should be hidden by now.

C: 这里已经没有属于我的位置了，我该离开了。现在回到鹤运物流还来得及吧？
E: There is no place for me here. I should leave now. It's not too late for me to return to Heron Express, right?

C: 如果想参加大胃王挑战赛也请随时和我说，奖励可是很丰厚的哟！
E: If you ever want to eat in our Competitive Eater Championship, just come back and talk to me anytime. The prizes are very generous!

C: 我们大概可以做个交易…
E: Let's have a deal...

C: 现在是问这种问题的时候吗？！
E: Is now really the time to ask this kind of question?

C: 你把鹤运物流当成什么了，我们才不做这么不近人情的事情。
E: Who do you take us for here at Heron Express? We'd never do anything of the sort.

C: （我得给自己起个神秘名字）
E: (Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)

C: 会不会有点太真情实感了？
E: Are you getting too into character?

C: 天空之上有什么？
E: What's up in the sky?

C: 想要解开这东西…
E: If you want to figure this thing out...

C: 再说了，你没有父母、也没有血缘相近的兄弟姐妹，甚至没有长时间一起生活的恋人，能和你连心同调的人也不好找啊。
E: Besides, you have no parents, no siblings with whom you share blood ties, and you don't even have a long-term cohabiting lover. It's not easy to find someone who can resonate with you.

C: 双手叉腰一下。
E: Arms on hip.

C: 短暂黑暗过去，你的视野开始恢复，呼救的声音越来越清晰。
E: The temporary black-out passes and your vision begins to recover. The sound of calling for help is getting clearer.

C: 好了，我还有工作，先失陪了。再次感谢你对仙舟罗浮的贡献！
E: Alright, I have some more work to complete, so I shall take my leave. Once again, thank you for your contributions to the Xianzhou Luofu!

C: 嚯，虽说专利过了保护期就不能收费了，但满打满算，怎么说也能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年。
E: So, although you cannot collect fees after the patent protection period expires, if you're smart about it, you can still comfortably live off the patent fees for decades.

C: 当你靠近时，承载甜品的托盘突然开口说话了——
E: As you draw closer, the tray carrying the desserts somehow suddenly speaks to you:

C: 不不，还是来吃蛋糕吧，烘焙食品更加松软可口！
E: Wait, no, how about a slice of cake instead? The baking's so fluffy and scrumptious!

C: 出租角色装扮道具的小屋，提供哈努兄弟面具和高帽。不过大部分人无法驾驭这套衣服。
E: There's a hut renting out character props with Hanu masks and top hats, despite most people being incapable of pulling off such an outfit.

C: 灯光毫无迟滞地射向前方，就像这辆飞车绝不犹豫的正义感。
E: The light shines on in unimpeded brilliance, just like the car's own unflinching sense of justice.

C: 「橡木脑子像木头，夜鸫只懂搬石头；鸢尾有脸没有皮，苜蓿插在钱眼里；猎犬良心不如狗，家族像个烂皮篓。」
E: "The Oaks' brains are made of Oak, the Nightingales only know how to move stones, the Iris have status but no shame, the Alfalfa only knows the money game, the Hounds have less morals than a dog, the entire Family is a disgusting bog!"

C: 从理性角度分析，这应该是张地图，只是充满了梦境的抽象特征。
E: The logical conclusion would be that this is a map... But it is filled with abstract Dreamscape characteristics.

C: 货无所谓，人还在就好。
E: Don't worry about the goods. It'll work out as long as the people are all still here.

C: 好热，好多汗…
E: So hot, so sweaty...

C: 又来了，老一套……
E: Here we go again, the same old shtick...

C: 我的话语即是泰坦意志。
E: My words carry the Titan's will.

C: 你们的视野不够广阔…
E: Your vision isn't broad enough...

C: 在新世界，我们还会相遇吗？
E: Will we meet again in the new world?

C: 别别别别，你这谛听怎么还会咬人！
E: No no no, this guy Diting is really vicious!

C: …{NICKNAME}乘客，欺负列车长你觉得有趣是吗？
E: ...{NICKNAME}, are you having fun bullying me like that?

C: 每次听到这首歌，帕姆心中就会浮现出一种怪怪的感觉…就像是在宇宙中漫无目的地漂浮一样，而且还有点难过……
E: Every time Pom-Pom hears this song, Pom-Pom gets a weird sensation... Pom-Pom feels like floating about aimlessly in the universe, and a little sad...

C: 帕姆和三月七乘客都喜欢待在窗边看星星，有时候还会看到难得一见的奇景。
E: Both March 7th and I love sitting in the window seats and staring out the window at the stars. Sometimes we even get to see some rare wonders.

C: …划痕？哎，抱歉，看来是列车长的问题……
E: ...A scratch? Ah, I'm sorry. I think I saw it wrongly...

C: 我听其他乘客说，你在空间站里做了不少好事，像你这么热心肠的乘客可不多啦！
E: I've learned about the gracious deeds you did at the space station from the other passengers. It's hard to come across a passenger as kind as you!

C: 比佩佩还要灵活呢。
E: You're more agile than Peppy.

C: 痴迷这种劣质机械的多少有点…咳咳…你是来聊工作上的事啊，抱歉抱歉。
E: People who are obsessed with this kind of inferior machinery are a bit... Ahem... Oh, you are here to talk about work, sorry.

C: 管理经验？你很有眼色嘛！
E: Management? You've come to the right person!

C: 要还是以前啊，她用的还是速溶咖啡粉，那个剂量…那才是真正的「黑泥」，完全是一团糊糊嘛！
E: Back in the old days, she would just use instant coffee powder. The amount of powder she used gave a whole new meaning to the phrase "black sludge."

C: 请紧密跟随确保机巧鸟正常工作。
E: Please follow the cycrane closely to ensure regular operations.

C: 哔——啵。精彩的发挥，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Beep — boop. Slick moves, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 更、更用力地敲门。
E: Knock even MORE loudly.

C: 惩奸除恶，义不容辞。
E: I'll do my best to punish and eliminate the evil.

C: 那涉世未深的「四大天王」哪里见过这样的奇计！他果然被你一声惊呼吓得魂不守舍。你抓住这个机会，迅速将手势从石头变成了必胜的剪刀。
E: Your young and naive opponents have never seen such a tactic before! He indeed is startled by your words, and you grasp the opportunity to change your rock into the winning scissors.

C: 陌生人…请问您可曾见过一位女性？她的声音温柔，还戴着饰有铃铛的发带……
E: Stranger... have you seen a girl around? Her voice is soft and kind, and she wears a headband with a bell...

C: 我没有见过你的妹妹。
E: I have not seen your little sister before.

C: 这次就当是一次警告——以后你再路过补给容器的时候，最好给我多长个心眼！
E: Take this as a warning to never mess with another supply vessel again!

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 你穷极无聊，决定数数喷泉里有多少钱——用无聊这个词，可能都是一种抬举——要知道喷泉里什么怪东西都有，硬币更是数不胜数。
E: You're so bored that you decide to count the money on the floor of the fountain — and "bored" is putting it lightly. There are loads of weird stuff floating down there, and there are more coins than can be counted.

C: 有那么一会儿，什么都没有发生，你还以为自己受了欺骗。但——瞧！硬币落下就像第一块骨牌的失衡，引发了一系列连锁效应：有什么东西悠悠浮了上来，你赶紧抓住它。
E: For a while, nothing happens and you begin to feel deceived. But — look! The coin tumbles like the first domino, triggering a cascade of effects: Something floats on up, and you grab it.

C: 喷泉还是那个喷泉，或者说，许愿池。其中有价值的物件已被你一扫而空，只剩下水中层层叠叠的锈蚀硬币。
E: The fountain is still the same old fountain, or rather a wishing well. You've already swept away anything valuable in it, leaving behind only stacks of rusted coins.

C: 不过，既然要打造能够和人进行「情感互动」的机器人，光是有这样一个模块还是不够的……
E: But if we want to build an emotionally interactive robot, a simple module like this won't be enough...
Four.
Two.
Four.

C: 你完全不明白云骑军的盔甲为什么能用作引燃物。但想起那位仙舟人先前驻足于此时的神情，你决定——
E: You have absolutely no idea how Cloud Knights' armor could be used as an ignition device. But thinking back to the Xianzhou man who stopped here and his facial expression, you decide...

C: 你确信自己并没有点错，但展阅上却飞速弹出了几个与你想法背道而驰的页面——
E: You're sure you've hit the right thing, but several pop-up pages that run counter to your thoughts start showing up on the flexible display...

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！古道热肠！古道热肠！那我的这桩事，就请你帮帮忙了。并不是什么难事，也不着急，你有空时留意一下便好。
E: Hahaha, very well! How considerate! How considerate! Well then, please help me out. It's nothing difficult and there's no rush. Just do it when you have the time.

C: 甚好。这正我所需要的东西。请你稍等一下。你帮了我很多忙，我想再给你一点谢礼。
E: Very well. This is exactly what I need. Hold on a second. You've really helped me out, and I want to make sure I thank you properly.

C: 我想再看看信的内容。
E: I want to take another look at the letter.

C: 找到货物后，只要拍照给我提供一个准确的位置就行，我会派专员回收，不必劳烦你。
E: After locating it, just send me a picture of it showing its exact location. I'll dispatch someone to recover it, don't you worry.

C: 怪不得要「受过军事训练」…
E: No wonder the job asked for experience in military training...

C: 那必然不会亏待您。
E: Of course. We'll never shortchange you.

C: 没错没错，都是我们应该做的。
E: Indeed. We're just doing our job.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了？
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}?

C: 要取货？好啊，取货码拿来我看一下。
E: Alright, give me the collection code please.

C: 我是学宫的算学教授…可能我把所有精力都分配给算学了吧，所以有时候…在日常生活中会比较粗心……
E: I'm a math professor at the academy... Perhaps it's because I throw myself into my math research so much, sometimes... I can get careless in my everyday life.

C: 求求你了！救救我吧！我一定会报答你的大恩大德！
E: I'm begging you! Help me, please! I'd love to repay your extraordinary kindness!

C: 我一眼就认出你来了。
E: I recognized you straight away.

C: （沉默不语）
E: (Remains silent)

C: 试想一下吧，这片宇宙孕育了多少文明种族，其中有能力离开母星的占多少？真正迈出那关键一步，选择踏上星际旅途的又有多少？
E: Think about it: How many civilizations has this universe spawned? And how many have star-faring capabilities? How many actually make the pivotal choice to set out on an intergalactic journey?

C: 我倒是还挺喜欢你的，不过…你看起来也是M会喜欢的类型。
E: I actually quite like you, but... you also seem to be just like M's type.

C: …找梦境…鼓励师……（持续的哽咽与抽泣声）
E: ...Find the Dreamscape... Motivator... *chokes* *sobs*

C: 这些房子看起来像铁皮拼成的蜂巢，结构简单但数量繁多，显然是人工建造的——这里曾经住着一整个聚落！
E: These houses looked like little honeycombs woven out of tin foil. Simple in structure and numbering in the hundreds, they were clearly artificially built — an entire settlement once lived here!

C: 很讽刺的结局。
E: What an ironic ending.

C: 可他从来都没能摆脱人性中的贪欲，直到最后，滑稽地死在了管子拼成的王座里。
E: But he was never able to rid himself of human greed, until in the end he died farcically upon a throne made of twisted tubes.

C: 这地方障碍物太多，舰载仪器除了发出恼人的警报外什么忙都帮不上。没办法，我只能用肉眼观察，手动操控飞船。
E: There were so many obstacles in this place that the ship's instruments kept tripping alarms everywhere, rendering it useless. I had no choice but to make observations by dead reckoning, and manually piloted the spaceship.

C: 这可不是什么灵药，这是陷阱。我极力反对这个提案，但走投无路的韦兰不会放过任何一根救命稻草。最后，我与他分道扬镳。
E: This wasn't some kind of cure-all; it was a trap. I strongly opposed this suggestion, but Wyland was at wits' end and could not help but clutch on to any last straw that might save his life. Finally, he and I took our separate ways.

C: 关于他的死期，我曾经和他打过一瓶酒的赌。看来最后是他赢了。
E: I once made a bet with him about the day he'd die over a bottle of liquor. Seems like he won out in the end.

C: 老实说，这与我想象中的开拓之旅相差甚远——我甚至都算不上真正的无名客。
E: If I'm being honest, this was a far cry from the trailblazing expedition I'd imagined — I can't even call myself a Nameless anymore, either.

C: 这灰毛{M#小子}{F#丫头}又是从哪儿冒出来的？
E: Where did this gray-haired {M#boy}{F#girl} come from?

C: 我们两个是星际和平公司的员工，到匹诺康尼来度假旅游的。
E: We're staff from the IPC, and we're here in Penacony on vacation.

C: 谁都不会随便让人进房间吧…
E: Nobody would just let any stranger into their room...

C: （小声）大哥，这家伙看上去来头不小，说不定是来度假的大人物。
E: (Whispering) Boss, this one looks like they might be somebody important. They might even be some bigwig here on vacation.

C: …好，我已经把上面的文字还原了。按照之前的约定，我会给你一份复印件作为分享。
E: ...Alright, I've restored the text on it. As agreed, I'll give you a copy to share.

C: 但我也是个幸运的人。这时代的故事尚未落幕，我还有机会参与其中，窥见冒险尽头的宇宙秘宝。
E: But I know that I'm also really lucky. The curtain has yet to fall on the story of this era, and I still have the chance to take part in it and catch a glimpse of the secret treasure of the universe waiting there in the end of the adventure.

C: 至少他们活了下来。
E: At least they managed to survive.

C: 你的邀请函从哪来的？
E: Where did you get your invitation letter?

C: 可以。
E: Alright.

C: 滴答滴答，时针在动——今儿个又是适合建设梦境的一天！倾注所有想象力跟心血，和我一起建设一个超越时代的伟大梦境吧！
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock — the clock is ticking... Today is another wonderful day to build the dreamscape! Let your imagination run wild! Let us put our heart and soul into creating the greatest dreamscape ahead of its time!

C: 不瞒你说，奇迹本杰明过去一段时间的口碑稍微有些…动荡。
E: Frankly speaking, Miracle Benjamin Studio has got a... bad rap recently...

C: 即便现在遇到了些小…挫折…好吧，这个挫折对我来说或许并没有那么小……
E: Even though I'm facing a minor... setback... Fine, it isn't exactly minor for me...

C: 你这么喜欢苏乐达？
E: Are you a fan of SoulGlad?

C: 啊！痛、好痛…是…喝得太猛了吗…脑袋…脑袋好像要炸开了……
E: Ouch! It... It hurts... Is it because I've drunk too much... My head... My head is splitting...

C: 有话直说吧，别浪费时间。你想要什么？
E: Just cut the nonsense and stop wasting my time. What do you want from me?

C: 他们都说…像我这种初出茅庐的「菜鸟」，总得多听、多看、多求教，才能成熟稳重、少走弯路……
E: They say... a rookie like me should listen, observe, and ask questions more to gain experience and avoid unnecessary mistakes...
Mmm...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车、观景望远镜、还有「推销员」广告牌</color>——你就先去分析这几样东西吧！记得，拿到分析报告以后速速向我汇报！
E: Go analyze a <color=#dbc291ff>"Steinway Falcon" luxury speedster, a viewing telescope, and a "sales" billboard</color>! Remember, report back to me as soon as you have the analysis results!

C: 咻咻…正在进行侵权风险分析……
E: *Beep*... Initiating infringement risk analysis...

C: 电电枪，最棒棒！
E: The best of the best: Zappy Gun!

C: 先等等！
E: Wait!

C: 时薪具体有多高？
E: How high is your hourly rate, exactly?

C: 那位家族的经纪人女士真是太无情了…在我看来，只要有波波特先生这种为追逐理想不顾薪酬的意志，就一定能获得成功！这份逐梦客的精神正是我看中他的原因！
E: That manager from The Family is so unkind... I believe Mr. Popott will make it big with his determination to achieve his dream, regardless of compensation! His dreamchasing spirit is why I picked him!

C: 她雍容华贵、纸醉金迷，永不熄灭的灯火是她颈间的珍珠、腕上的砗磲…只有为她献上更多，才有机会获得她的垂青。
E: She exudes an air of elegance and luxury. The unceasing lights are the pearls on her necklace and the agates on her bracelet... Only by offering things to her can one stand a chance of gaining her favor.

C: <size=28>是不是只有我死了，你们才肯放过我？！</size>
E: <size=28>Is my death the only thing that can appease them!?</size>

C: 可很快，他发现自己周围群狼环伺——业内的同僚联合起来打压他，曾经一起奋斗的同好们背叛了他，越来越多的人通过网络攻击他、污蔑他…可他又何罪至此呢？
E: But soon, he found himself becoming the target of resentment. His peers in the industry ostracized him, his companions who once worked alongside him betrayed him, and more and more netizens attacked him online... What did he do to deserve this?

C: 原本，我的生命轨迹和匹诺康尼绝不会有交集。如今我却站在这个梦里，还能用双手为它添砖加瓦…现在回想起来，依旧觉得难以置信。
E: Penacony had nothing to do with my life in the beginning. But now, here I am contributing to its development with my hands... I still find my experience unbelievable even to this day.

C: 你好有想象力…
E: You have a fertile imagination.

C: 「行了，我已经设定好让它回收各个星球的残留兵器了，之后就等着好消息吧。」
E: "Done. I've set it up to collect the other remaining weapons on other planets. Let's see what it can bring back to us."

C: 有人唤醒了我，改造了我的身躯，还为我起了名字…简直像是一份恩赐，不是吗？
E: Someone awakened me, transformed my body, and gave me a name... Sounds like a blessing, no?

C: 罗斯玛丽，可以麻烦你再帮个忙吗？
E: Rosemary, can you help me again?

C: 然后，军火商，雇佣兵，大家闻着味儿就蜂拥而来。利润的味道太甜了，品尝过一次，就再也没法戒掉这份依赖。
E: Then the swarms of arms dealers and mercenaries will come, flocking to the scent. The smell of profit is so sweet that with one whiff, you'll never be able to wean yourself off it.

C: 就你？你配吗！你以为自己是知更鸟小姐吗？
E: You? Don't flatter yourself! What, you think you're like Miss Robin?

C: 怎么可能？我这辈子除了调皮捣蛋的差生，最讨厌的就是猴子！
E: Absolutely not! Apart from unruly underachievers, the only things that I hate the most in my entire lifetime are monkeys!

C: 何况它们带来了可怕的模因病毒…在梦境里，那东西比粘在鞋底的牛皮糖还要难缠。若不是家族和诸位贵客及时出手，后果将不堪设想。
E: And they brought the terrifying memetic virus along with them... In the Dreamscape, that thing is even more difficult to get rid of than gum on the bottom of your shoe. I can't imagine what would have happened if it were not for you and The Family.

C: 不过大多数学生没你这种觉悟，光是这些规定就足够让他们掉一层皮，然后脱胎换骨了！
E: However, the vast majority of students aren't as enlightened as you are. These new rules alone are enough to make them cast off their old selves and be born anew.

C: 你在担心那件事？放心，模因病毒一经治愈，就不会再卷土重来了。
E: You're still worried about that? Don't worry. Once the memetic virus has been cured, there's no way that it'll be able to return.

C: 折纸大学总共有三大学院：由鸢尾花家系赞助的谐乐学院，由隐夜鸫家系赞助的筑梦学院，以及由苜蓿草家系赞助的财富学院。
E: There are three academies at Paperfold University: Charmony Academy sponsored by the Iris Family, Dreamweaver Academy sponsored by the Nightingale Family, and Fortune Academy sponsored by the Alfalfa Family.

C: 垃圾，准确的说——被冰镇过的垃圾。
E: It smells like... trash. More precisely, a mound of frozen trash.

C: 让客人白跑一趟真的很抱歉，我得回去找一下了啾！
E: I'm so sorry for the wasted trip, dear guest. I need to go back and find them, tweet!

C: 啾啾～舵轮转呀转～我就是新任船长～见过无数风浪～我要为大家领航～
E: Tweet tweet! Turn the wheel! I'm the new captain now~ Many a storm I've weathered, and safely I'll sail you all through~

C: 风那么大吹着脸不疼吗？
E: But it's so windy. Doesn't it make your face sting?

C: 呃，我有点晕，抱歉…刚刚是你救了我吗？
E: Uh, I'm feeling a little dizzy. Sorry... Are you the one who just saved me?

C: 明智的选择。之后我会去和「公司」的外派员工请教。
E: A wise decision! I will go to an IPC worker and ask them for advice.

C: 当然是在庆祝时增添气氛啦，为什么造物引擎就不能拿来做娱乐工具呢？现在这个时候，希望才是人们最需要的东西。
E: To liven up the party at a celebration, of course! Why can't the Engine of Creation be a tool for recreation and fun? In times like this, hope is the most important thing to us all.

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 虽然成色不够好，但也不是不能用——本杰明应该会为它们找到新去处。
E: Their quality may be a little off, but they're not unusable! I'm sure Benjamin will find a new use for them.

C: 啾！到底怎么出去啊啾！
E: Tweet! How do we get out of here, tweet!

C: 你…就算是你我也不能怎么样，就这样吧啾。
E: You... Even if it's you, I can't do anything about it. So be it, tweet.

C: 对小人儿的观察到此为止，我还是回去找黄金公子探讨生命的真谛吧……
E: I've seen enough of the little people. I'd better return to Young Master Gold and discuss the true meaning of life...

C: 太好了啾！
E: That's fantastic, tweet!

C: 我是来帮忙的。
E: I'm here to help.

C: 叼叶子！
E: Peck a leaf!

C: 本以为…藏在脑袋里就不会被发现了啾……
E: I didn't think I'd get discovered if I hid inside this head...

C: 这里是美梦小镇最安全的地方——「朝露小屋」啾。
E: This is the safest place in all of Dreamville — Dawndew Hut, tweet!

C: 您真是小镇里最好心的人！钟表小子的朋友，你也是折纸小鸟的朋友啾~
E: You truly are the kindest person in Dreamville! Friend of Clockie, you are a friend of the origami birds now, too, tweet~

C: 哼哼，本公子的闪耀身姿，就该被胶片久久记录下来呢啾~
E: Hmm, a shining figure like mine deserves to be recorded on film forever, don't you think, tweet~

C: 那么，你打算向谁求助呢？
E: So, will you call for help?

C: 请等一下，我这就去找帕金斯来帮忙。
E: Wait a moment. I'll get Perkins to come and help.

C: 看到这张地图了吗？本贤者为你标记出了宝藏的所在啾。
E: See this map? I've marked the location of a treasure for you, tweet.

C: 啾，你说得对，可我就是放不下……
E: Tweet, you are right, but I cannot let go...

C: 嗒嗒——你已响应猫头鹰老师的号召，折纸大学需要你啾！
E: Click, click, you've answered the call of Professor Owl. Paperfold University needs you, tweet!

C: 要么老实交罚款，拿钱资助本地建设；要么就去关禁闭，给其他人做个反面教材。你自己选吧！
E: You have a choice. You will either pay a fine that will go towards local construction efforts, or you will be locked up and confined as an example of negative behavior for others to learn from.

C: 你的行事原则，我不能承认！绝对不能！
E: I cannot accept your principles! They are unacceptable!

C: 太好了，我终于有家了！
E: That's fantastic. Finally, a home of my own!

C: 对不起，我是云骑！
E: I'm sorry, but I'm a Cloud Knight!

C: 丹枢大人，谢谢您一直帮助小鱼。但接下来的路，小鱼该自己走了。就像您一直教给小鱼的那样…请不必担心，小鱼会靠自己的力量，好好活下去的。
E: Thank you for your help all the time, Lady Dan Shu, but I'm afraid it's time for me to walk my own path without you. Please don't worry... I'll follow your instructions and live well on my own.

C: 没错，千万要小心。我俩好歹是搞科学的，起初不太相信这些东西……
E: Yeah, that's the attitude. Being students of the sciences, we thought those were just baseless rumors...

C: （放回原地）
E: (Put it back where you found it.)

C: 算了，这种恐怖传说至少能避免一些脑子不清楚的年轻人，对「禁忌书典」产生什么不该有的好奇心。
E: Well, anyway, these horror legends will keep young people with unwanted curiosity about the forbidden tomes at bay.

C: 如果阿幸能抽出一次不那么凶的签，也许就能改变他面对命运的心态…可惜，他一直没等来这个机会……
E: If A-Xing could experience something other than "Woe," it might help change his attitude about his fate... Unfortunately, he's never had the chance...

C: 嗯？您的意思是…我来人为修改占卜的结果，确保他一定会抽到一个吉签？可这只是给了他一个伪造的抽签结果啊，又没办法真的让他变幸运……
E: Huh? Are you suggesting... that I rig the results so that A-Xing gets a "Weal"? But that's just a fake result. It's not really going to change his bad luck...

C: 是啊，从业这么多年，我真的没见过倒霉到这种地步的人…太可怜了……
E: Yep, in all my years in the business, I've never seen someone so unlucky... What a poor guy...

C: 在你的努力下，墓碑表面篆刻的「碑文」渐渐显现出来。上面记录着一种你闻所未闻的拳法，这或许是某位深藏不露的仙舟前辈留下的绝世传承。
E: With some effort, the inscription carved into the stone gradually appears. It talks of some boxing techniques you've never heard of, and this may just be a unique and hidden relic passed down from Xianzhou ancients.

C: 只是开开看看，绝不乱动里面的东西，你的内心并不平静，但你试图开导自己。
E: You just open them up to take a look, never daring to touch the contents. Despite your heart being far from becalmed, you try to talk yourself out of it.

C: 时代的浪潮像帝弓司命的神矢，而我只是一个飘摇在银河中的小火苗——无论怎么追赶，也追赶不上神矢的尾巴。
E: The wave of time is just like Reignbow Arbiter's Lux arrow, and I am but a tiny flame cast afloat in the Cosmos — no matter how hard I chase, I can't catch up with the tail of that arrowshot.

C: 找就找嘛，下手那么重干什么……
E: Okay, okay, you found me! There's no need to beat me up like that...

C: 话说回来，这次你又是怎么认出我的？
E: Anyway, how did you recognize me this time?

C: 这里发生了什么？
E: What happened here?

C: 以后真得当心点了。
E: You should be more careful from now on.

C: 就知道会有这样的事…
E: I knew something like this would happen...

C: 就把那当作是我的伪善吧。我以为…我觉得必须和你一起留下些什么…那样，等到无法避免的离别到来的时候，至少你不会是孤单一人……
E: I guess it was hypocritical of me. I thought... That I had to leave something behind that would stay by your side... That way, when the time came that I had no choice but to leave, at least you wouldn't be left all alone...

C: 眼前这个梦境迷钟瘫坐在角落，硬实的金属外壳上多有破损——似乎曾有人高举利斧，反反复复重重劈砍而下。
E: The Dream Ticker sits slumped in a corner, with damage all over its hard, metal shell — It looks as if someone has taken a heavy axe and hacked away at it repeatedly.

C: 被孤零零遗弃在如此诡异的角落未免过于可怜。或许你能帮帮它。
E: Being abandoned in such a strange corner, you cannot help but pity it. Perhaps there is some way you can help.

C: 你也快去试试！
E: Go and try it!

C: 哎呦，大可不必。就当是看个戏，戏中人戏外身，可得好好分清楚才行。
E: Oh dear, don't be. Just think of it as watching a play. You'll have to differentiate between the character in the play and their real self.

C: 小女子似乎与您…未曾相识？
E: I don't believe... I've met you before?

C: 你尝试用那套三脚猫功夫修理取款机——谁能想到呢？你在贝洛伯格学到的那点技术居然在这里还能用上。
E: You attempt to fix the machine with your amateurish skills. Who would have thought that the stuff you learned in Belobog would come in handy one day?

C: 请问，你们谁是这里最香醇的酒？
E: Excuse me, which of you is the finest wine here?

C: 从今往后，只要我有一场宴会可饮，就绝对少不了你们两瓶的份。虽然不知道这位毒士是出自哪个酒厂的指示，但你放弃吧。
E: From this day forward, any banquet I attend shall have places for you both! I do not know which winery has sent you, foul villain, but you can give up!

C: 我看您曾在那两位爆米花身边停留，有听到什么消息吗？
E: I saw you standing by those two popcorns for a while. Did you overhear any information?

C: 不过，现在还不是下结论的时候，让我再看看其它线索吧。
E: Although, we are not ready to reach a final conclusion yet. Let's keep searching for clues.

C: 那对汽水夫妇呢？他们有说些什么吗？
E: What about that soda couple? What did they say?

C: 雪衣…
E: Xueyi...

C: 当然！让我看看…
E: Of course! Let me think...

C: 我还在猜你什么时候会想起我呢…谢谢你，亲爱的。
E: I was wondering when you would think of me... Thank you, dear.

C: 但我不会谴责你对桶王的背叛，迷茫只是一时的，你终会通过这场试炼，回到桶王的怀抱。
E: But I will not condemn your betrayal of the King of Cans. Your confusion is only temporary. You'll eventually pass this trial and return to the arms of our King of Cans.

C: 抱胸。
E: Cross your arms over your chest.

C: 老大，你不在的这段时间，我的厨艺可是大有进步，连隔壁街的奶奶吃了都说好。
E: Boss, my cookin's really improved since ya been away. Even that old lady on the next street over said it was good!

C: 现在我连全盛的万分之一都达不到，再来！
E: I'm not even one ten-thousandth of my full fizz right now. Try again!

C: 趁我们还能聊天，让你沾沾喜气。等我进到那边的展柜，以后你就只有瞻仰的份了！
E: I shall allow you to bathe in my success while we are still able to talk. Once I enter that display cabinet, you will only be able to look up at me in admiration!

C: 你怎么还带人来的啊！！！
E: What are you doing bringing other people along!?

C: 《嗨，多莉》
E: "Hi, Dolly!"

C: …船长的快递到了。
E: The captain's delivery is here.

C: 还有别的吗，{NICKNAME}，我感觉还没看够呢！
E: Do you have anything else, {NICKNAME}? I feel like I haven't seen enough yet!

C: 长久以来，你都无法克制住自己那股难以名状的渴望——对于为世人所不容的垃圾桶，你竟生出了无法解释的喜爱与好奇心。
E: For as long as you can remember, you've never been able to hold back this yearning. You've developed an indescribable love and curiosity for the object of mankind's repulsion — the trashcan.

C: 我说过了，我不会根据正确错误来判断。
E: As I've mentioned, I will not judge based on the answers.

C: 找不到这本书的原因找到了…
E: So that's the reason no one can find this book...

C: 你是在说他们在正式上线的版本中留下了错误，却未在后面的版本开发中及时修复，等到了现在，却又在用「书被抓起来了」的理由搪塞过去？
E: Are you suggesting they left it out of the version that officially went live, failed to fix it in time in later versions, and then waited until now to pass it off with an excuse that "the book got arrested"?

C: 你明白了，这人并不打算与你好好交流，他只是想用「魔阴身」将你吓退。聪明的你拿出手机将逃犯的位置发给了司狱赤衣，你做完了你该做的事。
E: You understand that this person does not intend to have a proper conversation with you. He just wants to scare you away with his mara-struck self. You cleverly take out your phone and send the fugitive's coordinates to Jailer Chiyi — you have done what you came here to do.

C: 我听见了狱卒的脚步声，看来清算的时间到了。可惜，没来得及说动您。
E: I hear the footsteps of the prison guards. It appears the time has come for settlement. A pity that I did not manage to persuade you.

C: 「自相残杀」？他们连彼此的名字都不认识，只不过是利益一致的囚徒。
E: "Trying to kill each other"? They don't even know each other's names. They're just prisoners that share interests.

C: 你已经吃得很多了。
E: You're already eating a lot.

C: 我自诩看过不少恐怖片，但在绥园的遭遇还是让我吓了一身冷汗…准确来说，是防止处理器过热的冷却液。
E: I pride myself for having watched many horror films, but my encounters at Fyxestroll Garden left me in cold sweat... Or more accurately, caused the coolant that prevents my processing unit from overheating to evaporate.

C: 这不是给我俩指路的好心人吗？真巧，在这里遇见您了。
E: Hey, isn't that the kind-hearted soul who showed us the way? What a coincidence, I didn't expect to see you here.

C: 这需要「脱密变换」。
E: We need to decrypt the cipher.

C: 你可算回来了，我、我，其实在找你……
E: You're finally back. I... I've been looking for you...

C: 你让他自己来。
E: Tell him to come himself.

C: 你听我接着讲——这套阵法的一个精髓就在于，它看似有所重复，却始终保持变化，让敌人捉摸不透。攻头则尾至，攻尾则首至，攻中则首尾俱至。
E: Let me explain further... The true beauty of this matrix lies in that it seems to repeat itself, but is constantly undergoing changes, preventing the enemy from predicting what lies ahead. Attack the head and the tail will lash out, attack the tail and the head will strike, attack the middle and both ends will convene on you.

C: 战场之上，那股勃勃生机、万物竞发的境界，犹在眼前。
E: The thriving vitality and fierce competition of the battlefield are shown right here, before your eyes.

C: 那可太有关系了！
E: It has everything to do with it!

C: 老东西，你占我便宜我就揍你！
E: Old man, take advantage of me like that, and I'll beat you myself!

C: 这位同学，你的相关信息并未出现在本节课程的出席名单中，请仔细核对课表，避免走错教室。
E: Hello, your related information isn't on the attendance list of this lecture. Please review your lesson plan and avoid the wrong classroom.

C: 呼…每次都跟打仗似的。果然，钱难赚、课难听，学长们诚不我欺…你说是这个理吧，同学？
E: Phew... It's like fighting a war every time. As expected, the money is hard, the lessons are perplexing, the seniors aren't wrong... you know?

C: 算不上有多喜欢，但绝对不讨厌。并且，这是我的工作，需要的不是无谓的热情，而是足够的能力和认真的态度。
E: I can't say I really love it, but it's not something that irks me. And it's my job — what's required isn't meaningless passion, but sufficient ability and a serious attitude.

C: （这位演员相当专业，目前没发现什么问题。）
E: (This actor's pretty professional. I haven't noticed any problems yet.)

C: 你再三阅读了喷泉池外的说明石板，确信自己没有眼花——上面仔细地描述了这种叫「圣烛」的装置，能在水池中点燃。
E: You read the instructions on the stone slate outside the fountain over and over. Only after you're sure you didn't misunderstand anything do you confirm the description calls this device a "holy candle" capable of being lit in the pool.

C: 你将信将疑地试了试，缓缓流动的液体自底部升起，长明不灭。
E: You suspend your disbelief and try it. Slowly, a fluid rises from the depths and glows with a resolute and undimming shine.

C: 呃，年轻人，你是来观光的吗？这个圣烛年久失修，早就不亮了，恐怕你是白跑一趟了。
E: Oh, young one, are you here to do some sightseeing? This holy candle has been out of order for a long time. It's long ceased to be bright. You have wasted your time.

C: 哦，那你一定不能错过这个心理测试。它比外面的心理测试都要准确！
E: Oh, then you mustn't miss this assessment. It is more accurate than any psychological assessment you find outside!

C: 你才是自己身体的主人！你用意志抵抗酸麻感，直到它逐渐平息。
E: You are the master of your body! You use your willpower to resist the tingling until it subsides.

C: 能睡多久睡多久。
E: Sleep as long as I can.

C: 吼吼吼！正确答案是——「根本不用还钱」！
E: Ho-ho-ho! The correct answer is... it doesn't cost a single coin!

C: 不到月份的末尾，没有人知道「机缘月」究竟有多少天，会不会突然多出一天——也就是俗称的{RUBY_B#闰日}「幽灵日」{RUBY_E#}吼！
E: No one knows how many days the Month of Fortune would have without reaching the end of the month. There could suddenly be an extra day... which is called a {RUBY_B#Leap Day}Spirit Day{RUBY_E#}!

C: 这不是诡辩吗？
E: Isn't this just sophistry?

C: 呜呜，我没有幽默感。
E: Boohoo, I am a humorless cretin.

C: 枕头。
E: A pillow.

C: 原来如此，是扎格列斯。
E: I see, so it's Zagreus.

C: 好痛！这狮子可真不懂得变通啊……
E: Yowch! This lion sure is a stubborn old coot...

C: 万敌瞪了它一眼后便离开了，你感觉到，这头狮子在瑟瑟发抖。
E: Mydei stares daggers at it before leaving. You can feel the lion quaking in its proverbial boots.

C: 如果这病毒以为你是好欺负的主，那它就找错人了。
E: If this virus thinks you're a pushover, it's got the wrong person.

C: （全部吃掉）
E: (Eat it all)

C: 等等，这不能吃吧！…算了，拦着你做什么？开拓者可是银河中最自由的存在。
E: Wait, you can't eat that! ...Forget it, why try to hold you back? Trailblazers are the most uninhibited beings in the Cosmos.

C: 姑且算是处理完了。接下来…该给这个冰箱定点规矩了！
E: Well, that's that taken care of. Now... it's time to enforce some rules on this refrigerator!

C: 呼呼。想见到称心的果实，你得先播种。
E: *crackle* You must sow the seed if you want to taste the fruit.

C: 呵，你的球棒？那就让我看看它到底有多结实吧！
E: Your baseball bat, huh? Well, let's see how sturdy it is then!

C: 多翻垃圾桶。
E: Rummage through other trashcans.

C: 什么也不做。
E: Do nothing.

C: 只能游回家了…
E: I guess I'll just have to swim home...

C: …因为这里已经被噩运笼罩了！所有人都会死，你也一样！
E: ...Because this place has been shrouded in doom! Everyone will die, and so will you!

C: 什么？不…不！禁地和诅咒都是真实存在的，我这就证明给你看！
E: What? No... No! The forbidden ground and the curse are real! I shall prove it to you!

C: 「钟表匠」走后，原来的帮派四分五裂，我也没脸再打着流梦帮的旗号了，为了一个没有随地乱扔垃圾的流梦礁，咱们就叫垃圾帮吧。
E: After the Watchmaker left, the original gang splintered off, and I was too ashamed to even bear the name of the Dreamflux Gang. For a clean and green Dreamflux Reef, we should call ourselves the Trash Gang.

C: …师傅，你身上是不是揣着不少垃圾？我听到它们对我说…它们说你是最勇敢的开拓者，你可以教会我别的桶都无法接触的技艺。
E: ... Master, you are carrying a decent amount of trash with you, right? I can hear your trash crying out to me... They say that you are the bravest Trailblazer, that you'll be able to teach me skills that no other trashcan would ever be able to master.

C: 总之不像人。
E: Either way, you don't look humanoid.

C: 真正的观察，是心灵与心灵之间的注意，你的眼睛可能有什么问题。
E: True observation involves paying attention to each other's souls. There might be a problem with your eyesight.

C: 我走了，正如我哐当哐当响地一路走来。
E: I'm leaving in the same way I arrived — one clattering step at a time.

C: 莫慌，原先确实由我进行主观判断，但时代变了，流程应该也要简化。答了这道题，我们便知道你该归于何处。
E: Don't worry, I was originally the one who made the executive decision, but times have changed — the process should be simplified. I will know where you belong once you answer this question.

C: 它像往常一样向你提出了问题，好想告诉它，但这次好像没有可以回信的地址。
E: As always, they have asked you a question. You long to answer. However, this time, there's no return address.

C: 躺下来。
E: Lie down.

C: 好高好高！就像坐在山顶一样~
E: So high up! It's like we're sitting on top of a mountain~

C: 把种子埋进土里，等待它发芽，开出软软的花，就像是在守候一个小小的奇迹。
E: Planting a seed in the soil, waiting for it to sprout and its soft flower to bloom... it's like nurturing a tiny miracle.

C: 也就是说，它暂时装不下更多回忆了，是吗？
E: So... no more room for memories, huh?

C: 在微风和煦的日子里，躺在阳台上，看着风车慢悠悠地转动，别提多惬意啦。
E: It's such a pleasure to lie on the balcony and watch the windmills languidly turn on a sunny and breezy day.

C: 嘻，我也经常这么想。只要装作不知道，就可以把它想象得更美好些。
E: Heh, that's what I think too. As long as I feign ignorance, I can always fantasize about something better.

C: （躺下来）
E: (Lie down)

C: 哀丽秘榭的闲暇时光还很漫长…{NICKNAME}要经常来找人家玩哦！
E: There's still plenty of time for leisure in Aedes Elysiae... {NICKNAME}, you should come visit me often!

C: 你还活着…？
E: You're still alive...?

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: …秘酿喝多了，晕头了？我看你是法吉娜的信徒才对吧！倒霉，我明天再来！
E: ...Your brain is pickled on brew, isn't it? You must be a disciple of Phagousa! Curses. I'll come back tomorrow!

C: 用力踹！
E: Kick it hard!

C: 神谕晦暗不明，神驹们也无法掌握目的地的确切情报，这样信息不同步的情况时有发生。横跨整个翁法罗斯的旅途，出现些微差错总是在所难免。
E: The prophecies speak in riddles, and divine foals cannot obtain real-time information on their destinations — Such asynchronous situations do happen once in a while. Given that our journey will take us across the entire world of Amphoreus, small errors are to be expected.

C: 详细说说入学考试？
E: Could you elaborate on the entrance exam?

C: （轻轻摸它的头）
E: (Softly pat its head)

C: 如果你有兴趣，可以加入界种科，进行深度学习。
E: You can join the Department of Ecology to study it if you are interested.

C: 很遗憾，没有。
E: I'm afraid not.

C: 我还正好有一些问题…
E: I happen to have a few questions...

C: 投下一颗石子就行了吧？！
E: Why don't you just throw a stone!?

C: 比如，这场袭击里有空间站的「某些科员」在搞事情。
E: For example, "some researchers" from the space station could be involved in this attack.

C: 排得满满当当，喘口气的时间都快没了。这种时候，最忌讳忙中出错。
E: My schedule is so packed that I can't even spare time to breathe. I better not make any mistakes.

C: 哎，我这是今天第几次忍不住想她了？
E: Sigh. I already lost count of how many times I've thought about her today.

C: 你这都卖些什么？
E: What have you got for sale here, then?

C: 哎，真是我的不幸，更是地概科的不幸啊！
E: Sigh. It's my misfortune as well as the Department of Cosmic Geography's misfortune!

C: 密钥有消费限额吗？
E: Does the encryption key have a credit cap?

C: 阿兰其实很怕你。
E: You know, Arlan is afraid of you.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: How can I help you?

C: 你猜～
E: Take a guess!

C: 嘿呦，嘿呦，嘿嘿呦！
E: Dum, da-dum, dee-dum!

C: 虽然小家伙还是带着哭腔，但你在它的眼眸中感受到某种期盼，过去的灰暗似乎消失了不少。
E: Although the little guy's voice is still bitter, you can discern a trace of hope in its eyes. It seems like much of its past gloominess has dissipated.

C: 哦哦，好的好的。
E: Oh, sure.

C: 又是你？我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
E: You again? I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!

C: 喏，这一整个区域，外面的什么车，还有一个能上下传送的大笼子都坏了，就连我们住的地方也不安全。
E: Look, everything in this place, some vehicle outside, a cage that can carry things up and down have all gone kaput, and even the place we stay in isn't safe.

C: 你在这儿做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: （尝试按下通讯II键。）
E: (Press the Communication II button.)

C: 吉奥里亚，何方神圣啊？
E: Georios, who's that?

C: 是啊，没有仲裁人见证，塔兰顿绝不会认可比试的胜负！
E: That's right. Talanton will never approve the outcome of the contest without an arbitrator as a witness!

C: 从前，瑟希斯的信徒们从树木中汲取某种力量，然而在无数次仪式后，当年的苍天大树也垂垂老矣，再也无力支撑起无尽的仪式。
E: Long ago, the disciples of Cerces would draw some kind of power from this tree. However, after countless ceremonies, even the tallest tree of the past grows old, and unable to meet the demand of insatiable ceremonies.

C: 老人的声音中带着微不可察的哀痛与恳求。赫卡忒嘴角微微动了动，最终还是向你投来求助的目光——
E: Traces of almost imperceptible sorrow and pleading color the old woman's words. The corners of Hekate's mouth twitch ever so slightly, but she finally looks up at you for help...

C: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
E: That's right. That's what I think.

C: 一旁的厄琉斯都快站不住了，险些跪在地上，还好你扶住了他。
E: Standing off to one side, Aelius can barely stay on his feet. He nearly drops to his knees — but luckily you're there to catch him.

C: 忽然，一阵急促的脚步声接近，将你从这段齁甜的对话中拯救了出来。
E: Suddenly, a wave of hurried footsteps comes rushing towards you, rescuing you from this sickly sweet conversation.

C: 可问题是…黑潮怪物真有如此智慧吗？为何他能轻易避开树庭的防备，直抵核心？
E: But the question is... does the black tide possess such intelligence? How did he manage to slip past the Grove's defenses and head straight for the core?

C: 牺牲者能做的，不过是用舍生的搏斗拖延极其有限的时间。
E: The only thing that the martyred can do is to use their lives in desperate combat to delay for a very limited time.

C: 但兹事体大，之后还请不要随意外传。
E: But this matter is quite serious, so please don't spread this information casually.

C: 呵…你不也不打算逃走么，那刻夏？
E: Hah... But you're planning to stand your ground as well, Anaxa.

C: 早知道我就先问你了。
E: I'd have asked you earlier if I knew.

C: 这点事根本难不倒我！
E: It was no challenge at all!

C: 不用特意做什么，只要和他们聊几句，了解一下近况就行！拜托你啦，灰宝——
E: No need for anything formal. Just talk to them and see how they're holding up! What do you say, Grayie? Pretty please—

C: 还没降价，我再等等好了。
E: Still not on sale yet... I'm holding out.

C: 做人不能太那个。
E: You can't be too much like that. It's not right.

C: 我简单说两句……
E: Let me say a few words...

C: 哎，让你见笑了。
E: *sigh* What an embarrassment.

C: 就…那个溶剂叫什么来着？就是你常用的那个，借我用点呗。
E: Just... what's that solvent called again? You know, the one you're always using. Give me some of that.

C: 「忘记是普通人能做的唯一的事，但是我决定不忘记她——」
E: "Forgetting is the only thing ordinary people can do, but for her, I've decided not to —"

C: 倒不用做到这个程度，就是对着它弹弹琴，唱唱小曲，让这头大地兽的心情变好。
E: No need to go that far. Just play some tunes or sing a little to cheer it up.

C: 「离愁时是我视力最差的时候，放眼望去，满街都是她的影子——」
E: "When the Parting Hour clouds my vision, everywhere I look, I see her shadow —"

C: 嗡嗡！
E: Grumph!

C: …好吧，是你最讨厌的，歪歪腻腻的幸福模样。
E: ...Well, it's that disgustingly sweet image of happiness you hate the most.

C: 不管悬锋人的问题能否得到处理，但至少你解决了一头失恋大地兽的烦恼，不是吗？
E: No matter whether the Kremnoans' issues are resolved, at least you've helped this heartbroken dromas find some peace, haven't you?

C: 是啊，你们这些铁石心肠的看客！为什么只是看着！
E: Yeah, you heartless or something? Why are you just watching!?

C: 有意思，就让我来审判吧。
E: Well, this sounds intriguing. Very well, I'll serve as the judge.

C: 一个神明（编剧）左右不了这个世界！
E: One god (playwright) can't control the whole world!

C: 可编剧根本没有什么发言权。
E: But playwrights don't even have much say in the script.

C: 多么可怜的命运啊！
E: What a pitiful fate!

C: 嗯…我就不添麻烦啦，但我想再待一会儿，说不定有其他办法能进去……
E: Mmm... I won't be a bother, but I want to wait a little longer. Maybe there's another way in...

C: 还是说实话吧。
E: Better to tell the truth.

C: 小火盆烤大眼萌。
E: A small brazier roasting big-eyed cuties.

C: 谢谢你的夸奖！要是过会儿，刻法勒真的能回应我就好啦……
E: Thanks for the compliment! I really hope Kephale will respond to me soon...

C: 啊…这声音，是刻法勒吗？
E: Ah... this sound, are you Kephale?

C: 好大的湖面呀！它会不会曾经是刻法勒大人的镜子…或者洗脸池？
E: What a huge lake! Could it have been the great Kephale's mirror... or maybe their washbasin?

C: 下次还是慎重行事些为好。
E: It's better to be more cautious next time.

C: 可是，这两个小鬼，竟然敢说…刻法勒的庇佑会失去效力，圣城里的大家只能白白等死。真是气死我了！
E: But these ankle-biters claim... Kephale's shield's failing. That we're sitting ducks here in the holy city. I cannot bear it anymore!

C: 刻法勒，我们的天父，我诚心向你祷问。现在的奥赫玛，万帷网变慢了，消息真真假假，好像到处都在打仗，乱糟糟的，那些山崖上，还冒出了一些奇怪的虚影……
E: Sky Father Kephale, I ask you sincerely: Okhema and the World Wound Web have slowed. Be the news true or false, but everywhere seems to be at war, chaos reigns, and on the cliffs, stand strange shadows...

C: 抱歉，被识破了，是我。
E: Alright. You saw right through it. It was me.

C: 但是，哪里都找不到阿波罗尼的身影，用传信石版也、也联系不上他……
E: But Apollonius was nowhere to be found, and I couldn't even reach him through the teleslate...

C: 但你的反应，再度证明了雅努斯迷津为我揭露的真相——
E: But your reaction reaffirms the truth that Janus' Maze revealed to me—

C: 和之前一样，白水。
E: Same as before. It's just water.

C: 居然有古老的玩意儿……
E: That thing is ancient...

C: 和孩子们说起了列车……
E: Talk to the kids about the Express...

C: 唔，荣誉队员说得对，帕姆会和你们一起冒险。
E: *sniff* W—Well, I guess you're right, honorary member. At least Pom-Pom is always on an adventure with you...

C: 都有谁要一起来？
E: Who else is coming?

C: 用手机拍个照吧。
E: Why not take some pictures with your phone?

C: 如果克拉拉成功了…飞到宇宙里的时候，也要说这样的台词！
E: If I can fly around the universe one day too, I'll come up with my own cool thing to say!

C: 这儿的沙发都是现成的，当作贵宾席正合适。
E: The sofas here all look tailor-made — perfect for VIP guests!

C: 我感觉…也许值得和技术部的铁卫们聊聊列车的事。
E: It might be worth talking to the Technology Division about incorporating a train into our units.

C: 但无论如何，和两位前辈聊天使我受益良多，对此我表示非常感激。
E: Anyway, I learned a lot from them. I'm very grateful for that.

C: 你说得对。自动机兵可以成为我们在太空中的眼睛——不管威胁来自天外还是地面，它们都能第一时间发现。
E: That's right — the automatons would be our eyes and ears in space. No matter whether the threats arose on the surface or in outer space, we'd be able to spot them.

C: 空间站很多科员热衷于喝咖啡，他们说这样有利于集中精神做实验。
E: A lot of the researchers on the station live off coffee. They said it helps them focus.

C: 在你附近时，我能感受到一种力量…唔，难道你手上有颗「星核」吗？
E: Whenever I am in your vicinity, I sense a sort of... power. Could it be you have a Stellaron in your possession?

C: 但我就不一样了，我会在对方进门前就主动打招呼。你看，我对你还是不错的。
E: But that's not my style. I will take the initiative to say hello before the other person enters the room. You see, I'm treating you quite well.

C: 是你啊，年轻人。有什么事儿吗？
E: It's you, young one. How can I help you?

C: 当我意识到拉明娜的难处与勇气之后，我更加坚信了一件事——曾经的我，真是个不折不扣的混账。
E: When I realized Lamina's difficulties and her courage, I became more firmly convinced of one thing — I was a total jerk.

C: 未来有什么打算？
E: What are your plans for the future?

C: 宇宙中的感觉非常奇妙……
E: The universe is so miraculous...

C: 彦卿当然知道，这银河中有无数强者等待我去挑战…但在智库中实际看到这些资料，还是觉得颇为震撼。
E: Well, I knew the universe had countless opponents waiting for me to challenge them... but I saw some information in the data bank that astounded me.

C: 真是不理解那帮人！像卡波特这样的坏东西还有什么值得关心的？搞不懂，真搞不懂！
E: I don't get those people at all! People like Capote don't deserve any care! I don't get it. I really don't!

C: …什么叫偷懒？我是医疗科的成员乔安，每天要处理的事情很多，不抽空休息会儿还得了…我这副小身板又不是铁打的。
E: ...What do you mean, slacking off? I'm Joanne from the Medical Department, and I've got a lot to do every day. I need time to relax... otherwise my body won't be able to handle it.

C: 哎哟，不说了不说了，都是过去的事儿咯！
E: Well, I think I'm done talking. These stories are all water under the bridge.

C: 在雪原里找到了这个……
E: I found this in the Snow Plains...

C: 有了大威力的武器，让我一次对付一百个裂界怪物都是小事一桩！
E: With such a powerful weapon, I'd be able to take on a hundred Fragmentum monsters at once!

C: <unbreak>7523</unbreak>减去<unbreak>2956</unbreak>…
E: <unbreak>7523</unbreak> minus <unbreak>2956</unbreak>...

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。希望我能有时间多多了解列车上的各位。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Hopefully, I'll have more time to get to know the Crew.

C: {NICKNAME}，关于列车长，我有一件事想问你……
E: {NICKNAME}, I have something I'd like to ask about the conductor...

C: 真的吗？看来我猜错了……
E: Really? Seems like I got it wrong, then...

C: 它不是人，也不是兔子。
E: They're not a human or a rabbit.

C: 帕姆的玩偶…能拜托娜塔帮我缝一个吗？
E: I wonder if Nat would be able to make a Pom-Pom doll for me...?

C: 真是稀客啊…
E: What an unexpected guest...

C: 身为无名客，却与星穹列车无缘，实在可惜。要是她能登上这架列车，该多好啊……
E: It is a shame that, as a Nameless, her path never crossed with the Astral Express. It would be wonderful if she were aboard...

C: 不如现在实地操作一番？
E: Why not give it a try right now?

C: 我还以为你肯定会逃走…
E: You're not running away?

C: 我给你带了这个……
E: I got this for you...

C: 只是我对此…不太擅长。你有什么建议吗？
E: However, I must admit... I'm not really skilled in that area. Do you have any advice?

C: 就等到…对「星神」的研究有更进一步的突破之后吧。
E: Perhaps I'll wait until I make further breakthroughs in my research on the Aeons.

C: 尽管试试吧，我会戴上我的头套，不被任何人打扰。
E: Go ahead and try. With this mask on, I intend to keep the world at bay.

C: 答案是，无关紧要。
E: The truth is, it's of no significance.

C: 三月七眼光好，可以问问她。
E: March 7th has good taste. You can try asking her.

C: 只有那个面具之梦，一次比一次清晰…仔细想想，这不就是我的人生吗？
E: But that dream with the masks, each more vivid than the last... When I think about it, isn't that an allegory of my life?

C: 哎，我可是很认真的，万一你们以后有处理不了的事，我随时可以成为你们的助手哦~
E: You know, I'm serious about this. What if you guys run into something that you can't handle? I'll be your nifty on-call assistant!

C: 推荐社恐属性。
E: I recommend introversion.

C: 宇宙深幽，想来独独一颗星星也无法照亮四周，聚落一处才能看见彼此…更能被我们观见。
E: With the universe being so vast, I imagine that one solitary star is not enough to illuminate its surroundings. Only when gathered in one place can they see each other... and be seen by us.

C: 就是，「非常烦」无意中说到过。而且我观察过，它们全天无休……
E: It was "Super Annoy" who let it slip. And I've been watching and found out that they work all day long...

C: 真巧，你也叫克拉拉吗？
E: What a coincidence. Is your name also Clara?

C: 只要活在这世上，就不可能公私分明的。感情会让人失去理性，大多数人没有能力把两者区分开。
E: As long as you live in this world, you'll never achieve that. Emotions make you irrational. Most people can't even tell life from work.

C: …ZZZZZ…怎么回事，有什么紧急状况吗？
E: ...Zzzzz... What's going on? Did something happen?

C: 你为什么不自己去找？
E: Why don't you go look for them?

C: 有什么推荐吗？
E: Any recommendations?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 又在编虚假的美食故事？
E: Are you making up food stories again?

C: 您不知道吗？那是我社出版的一部冒险小说，筑城者前些日子刚刚宣布把它列为禁书，我们也不得不销毁尚未售出的库存。
E: Have you never heard of it? It's an adventure novel published by us. The Architects banned it not long ago, which forced us to destroy what's left in our stock as well.

C: 这套书现在不好弄，所以就麻烦您多费点心啦。
E: It's not easy to get a hold of the novel these days. Thank you for your trouble.

C: 再让我考虑考虑…
E: I need some time to think about it...

C: 谢谢，我以前确实以作诗为生。
E: Thank you. That was indeed my occupation.

C: 那你都量产了什么垃圾？
E: What kind of rubbish have you produced?

C: 哈哈…知易行难啊。
E: Hehe, easier said than done.

C: 哈哈，我也想…但我真的喜欢写作，虽然我写出来的东西根本不值一提，但只要还能提笔写东西我就很开心了……
E: Haha, I did consider doing that, but... writing is my true passion. My writing may be bad, but I feel happy when holding a pen in my hand...

C: 贝洛伯格即将迎来一些重大的改变，这是众所周知的事。但我觉得…不仅仅是贝洛伯格，我们这行也是时候做出一些改变了……
E: Belobog is on the precipice of some big changes, and everyone knows it. I just feel like... It's not only Belobog that needs to change. It's about time for this industry to make some changes.

C: 我是路过的，你别在意。
E: I'm just passing by. Don't mind me.

C: 咦？！你不认识我？好丢人啊，这不是显得我自作多情了嘛。
E: Eh!? You don't know who I am? How embarrassing! Others may think I take myself too seriously.

C: 我平时主要的工作是协调工程项目、监督产品质量。哦，还有，如果哪些军队项目有外包需求，我也要参与谈判，协助筛选供应商。
E: My job is to coordinate engineering projects and monitor product quality. Oh, also, when there is a need to outsource a military project, I will participate in the negotiations and assist in the selection of vendors.

C: 关我什么事？
E: What does that have to do with me?

C: （他的抱怨没完没了…还是别在这里浪费时间了。）
E: (His complaints are endless... I better not waste any more time here.)

C: 总之，我们一定要找到那个蓝毛骗子，刻不容缓！
E: The point is, we simply must find that blue-haired swindler. We cannot tolerate such criminal activity!

C: 借你吉言…虽然我觉得可能性不大就是了。也许这亚历珊德拉广场就是我的归宿吧……
E: Hopefully your words will bring me good luck... But I think my chances are not particularly good. Maybe Alexandra Plaza is just where I belong...

C: 考虑过当大守护者的法律顾问吗？
E: Have you thought about being a legal adviser to the Supreme Guardian?

C: 生意？嘿嘿，至少填饱肚子是不用愁咯。
E: Business? Hehe. Just enough to keep from starving.

C: 怎么说？您有新闻看，我能吃顿好——各取所需！如何，这笔买卖不亏吧？
E: What do you think? You get the news, I get a good meal. It's a win-win! A good deal, right?

C: 上班…点到即止就行了。
E: Work is just a small part of my life.

C: 再说了，这年头谁还顾得上关心别人的生活啊…能管好自己就不错了。
E: Besides, no one has the time to obsess about other people's business nowadays... People are lucky just to be able to take care of themselves.

C: 没什么，不打扰你了。
E: Nothing. I will leave you alone.

C: 但我先前已经替老爹付清债务了，应该没人会再来找麻烦了吧……
E: But I've already paid the debt for my papa. There shouldn't be anyone else coming around looking for trouble...

C: 是的，我老爹…他之前生了重病，为了支付医药费，身上背了很多债务。
E: Yes, he was seriously ill. He got into a lot of debt due to his medical bills.

C: 你想和我说什么？
E: What do you want to talk to me about?

C: 唉，算了算了，让你知道也无所谓，反正也不是什么了不得的秘密。
E: *sigh* Whatever. I guess it's okay if you know. It isn't really a huge secret anyway.

C: 仿生人？那是什么，听着让人怪不舒服的…我现在只想给机器人搭载逻辑语言模块，然后再在这个基础上做些优化改进。
E: Android? What's that? It sounds weird... Right now, all I want to do is to equip the robot with a language module and do some additional optimization and improvement.

C: 是有什么好事将近吗？
E: Are good times on the horizon?

C: 能说说上层的「歌德宾馆」吗？
E: Can you tell me about the Goethe Hotel in Overworld?

C: 哇，名门望族啊！
E: Wow, a prestigious family!

C: 确实啊，我估计得有几百年了吧。爹娘也没和我具体讲过，只说这饭店是祖上传下来的遗产。
E: True. Hundreds of years. My parents never told me the details. They just said this hotel was a legacy from my ancestors.

C: 哎，这都多少年了，终于能见上一面…真不容易哪。
E: Ah, after all these years, I can finally go up... all these years...

C: …你们是来故意捣乱的吗？
E: ...Are you here to cause trouble?

C: 哈！那可多了去了，两三天也说不完。
E: Ha! Too many! I can keep talking about it for two or three days.

C: 老实说，我完全没搞懂那时发生了什么。不过你居然有原地起死回生的能力，仔细想想还真是方便啊……
E: To be honest, I have no idea what was going on then. But it's incredible to think of you just coming back from the dead like that...

C: 冷静的头脑是最强大的武器。
E: A calm and composed mind is the most powerful weapon.

C: 下层区的大家过得如何？
E: How's everyone going down in the Underworld?

C: 总之，我们机械屋的服务宗旨就是——没有我们做不到，只有你想不到！有什么需求就尽管来找我吧，姐姐可以给你个友情价哦。
E: Put simply, the motto of our workshop is: Nothing is unfixable, as long as you can imagine it! Come see us if there's anything we can do, we'll give you a friendly price.

C: 哈，这你可问到点子上啦。
E: Ha, you've gotten straight to the point.

C: 你和杰帕德关系怎么样？
E: How's your relationship with Gepard?

C: 我——不，我们——不过是贝洛伯格人日常生活的守护者罢了。
E: I— No, we are but guardians safeguarding the well-being of Belobogians.

C: 我了解了，谢谢你。
E: I understand, thank you.

C: 史瓦罗和克拉拉的关系是怎样的？
E: What is the relationship between Svarog and Clara?

C: 当然。正在调取资料……
E: Of course. Currently obtaining the data...

C: 看在你是荣誉队员的份上，我就给你透露一些鼹鼠党的机密吧！
E: Since you're an honorary member, I'll divulge a few Mole secrets to you!

C: 不过究竟会走到哪一步，还是要看双方各自的手段。希望布洛妮娅姑娘经得住这份重担。
E: As for how far this cooperation will go, we will need to see what methods are used on both sides. I hope that Miss Bronya can handle this heavy responsibility.

C: 别别别，千万别！我们这些小职员混口饭吃不容易啊……
E: No, no! Please don't! I'm just a small-time employee, and all I want is to make ends meet...

C: 关于公司有些疑问...
E: I have some questions about the IPC...

C: 常来光顾啊。
E: Drop by anytime!

C: 这是我的私人办公区，不是店面。就算你付钱，我也没有东西能卖给你。
E: This is my private office, not a store. Even if you pay me, I don't have anything to sell you.

C: 呜…咕呜！
E: Arf... groo!

C: 咕！咕呜呜！
E: Arf! Groooo!

C: 讲个雪人笑话。
E: Tell a joke about snowmen.

C: …呜喔！咕呜！
E: ...Arf! Groo!

C: 可是…琥珀不是橙色的吗？
E: But... isn't amber usually orange?

C: 孩子总要发展些兴趣爱好……
E: Children will always need a few hobbies...

C: 你是说「不存在的车站」吧？
E: You mean the one about the station that doesn't exist?

C: 嗯，这个好。
E: Mmm, this is good.

C: 城里不都一个天气？
E: Isn't the weather the same across the city?

C: 就是就是，那个朗道家的大小姐还玩音乐呢！
E: That's right. The eldest daughter at the Landaus still plays her music!

C: 下层区也有歌德家的产业吗？听起来不错啊……
E: Are there Goethe properties in the Underworld, too? Sounds awesome...

C: 这就是今天要搞定的量？
E: Is this the lot for today?

C: 我来播报今天的新闻……
E: I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 哎，实在不好意思……
E: Oh, I really am sorry...

C: 三百冬城盾。
E: Three hundred shield.

C: 咱都站这儿数了一天了，要不回去吧。
E: We've been standing here all day counting. May as well go back.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆——顾名思义，就是向公众展示贝洛伯格历史文化的展览馆。
E: Belobog History and Culture Museum... As the name might suggest, it is a display gallery to showcase Belobog's history and culture to the public.

C: 另外，如果你见过馆长于尔丹的话…可以代我问问他，做这个活真的没有工资吗？拜托了，这对我真的很重要……
E: Also, if you've seen our curator Uldan... please ask him about one thing for me. Does this job really not pay? Please, this is important to me...

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.

C: 好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.

C: 还不如{NICKNAME}呢。
E: That's worse than {NICKNAME}.

C: 想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 蘑菇当然长得像一把伞。
E: Of course, Mushrooms are shaped like an umbrella.

C: 他是一名工造司的巧匠。
E: He was a skilled craftsman at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 噢。我好悲伤。
E: Oh, I'm so sad.

C: 好嘞！就猜到您很感兴趣！我保证很快就讲完的！
E: Awesome! I knew you'd be keen! I promise I'll make this really quick!

C: 算了，下次再说吧。
E: Forget about it. Maybe next time.

C: 你问吧。只是我心中有所惦念，未必能对答如流……
E: Go ahead. It's just that I'm a little distracted with matters of the heart, so I might take a moment to answer...

C: 他真的是很特别的那种…别的勤务见着我基本都睁一只眼闭一只眼，可他不一样……
E: He really is one-of-a-kind... All the other orderlies basically turn a blind eye to me, but he's different...

C: 哎，气死我了…我看这帮人就是存心给我添堵！成天就知道管这管那的……
E: Tsk, this is so annoying... These people are just trying to pick on me! All day, just sticking their noses in my business...

C: 是啊。我还以为您忘了呢，哈哈。
E: Yeah, I thought you'd already forgotten. Haha!

C: 哈哈，您对这个有兴趣啊…那我给您说道说道。
E: Hahaha, so you're really interested in that, huh? ...Alright, I'll tell you.

C: 我先走了。
E: I'm heading off, then.

C: 你要是有要事相商，可以找我谈。
E: Come find me if you've ever got any important matters to discuss.

C: 难道这是你用来骗小孩儿的？
E: Is this just a fable that you use to trick kids?

C: 您请问吧，我尽可能回答。
E: Ask away. I'll do my best to answer.

C: 哈哈，毕竟就是「不该知道的事」才最吸引人呢！
E: Hahah, don't you know? "Forbidden knowledge" is always most alluring!

C: 有些事情想要咨询一下。
E: There are a few things I'd like to ask.

C: 克里姆特立宪国可说是由伟大的「开拓」阿基维利一手促成，祂开辟星轨，引领祖先穿过流放苦旅，抵达长夏乐土。
E: The Klimt Republic was said to be made from nothing by Akivili the Trailblazer when THEY established the star rail, leading my ancestors on THEIR path of exile to THEIR Eversummer Paradise.

C: 现如今虽然在您的帮助下解决了危机，可危机的余波却迟迟没有消退……
E: And now, despite your help with resolving the crisis, its aftermath continues to rage on...

C: 听上去你等公文很有经验？
E: You sound really experienced when it comes to waiting for official documents.

C: 麻烦总是会有的，「没有公文」不会是最难的那个。再说了，只要没人故意使坏，公文始终还是会下来的…好在，我们运气很好最后等到了。
E: There'll always be things that are a pain, and "Not having official documents" won't be the worst. I mean, as long as nobody deliberately messes things up, it'll get done sooner or later... Fortunately our luck held out until we got there in the end.

C: 刚才我说，「这辈子都不会忘记」…那并非是对于您的奉承之语，而是关于我的客观事实。从出生到现在，我从未忘记过任何事。
E: When I said "I would never forget" as long as I live earlier... That wasn't meant as a compliment to you, but an objective statement about me. From the time I was born, I have never forgotten a single thing.

C: 天生的。当我父母发现我这项天赋之后，我就成了我们家的摇钱树。出演各种节目、代言各种广告、客串各种幻戏…我一度是「罗浮」最有名的小孩。
E: I was born with it. After my parents discovered my talent, I became my family's breadwinner. I joined talent shows, participated in advertisements, made guest appearances on all kinds of immersias... I was once a pretty famous kid on the Luofu.

C: 而偏偏我还是个过目不忘的人。那一桩桩一件件惨案，对我来说，时时刻刻都犹在眼前。
E: And I am someone who doesn't forget. Each and every tragic case is carved into my mind's eye, there every single moment.

C: 多说无益，得让那人当众道歉。
E: There's no use in just talking about it. Make them issue a public apology.

C: 大人心细，连这都记得。没错，我是主动请缨调往鳞渊境的。我儿…他在围剿药王秘传的战斗中牺牲了。
E: You have a fantastic memory, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. That's right. I volunteered for this Scalegorge Waterscape assignment. My son... He lost his life in combat against the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 欢迎光临，我们这里没有什么祖传秘方，只有常用的药和好用的药。
E: Welcome, welcome. We don't have any secret home recipes here. Just your everyday medicines and easy-to-use remedies.

C: 这您就有所不知了。族人蜕生前累积的财产要不是分赠了，便是归公了。
E: Ah, so you don't know about the Vidyadhara way. We give away all of our worldly possessions before being reborn. Anything left over is requisitioned by the state.

C: 你怎么什么都不知道！
E: How come you don't know anything?

C: 其次就是注意观察，哪怕是再固若金汤的监狱也一定存在破绽，只是有的监狱的破绽很隐秘。
E: Another thing is careful observation. Even the most tightly guarded prisons will have weak spots, but some of them are better hidden than others.

C: 聊聊也不行？
E: Can't you have a little chat with me?

C: 那还是不打扰你了。
E: Well, I'd better leave you alone then.

C: 我想要验证第一次的结果。
E: Because they want to verify the first result.

C: 曾经一位好友曾如此告诉我「对占算结果充满怀疑，企图二次占卜，这是卜者的大忌」。
E: A friend of mine once told me that it is taboo for diviners to doubt the results and try to divine twice.

C: 那位卜者叫作若月，您可能在长乐天广场上见过她的占卜店「鉴爻轩」，从太卜司里离职之后，就回去继承家业了。
E: Her name is Ruoyue, and you've probably passed by her divination shop in the Exalting Sanctum Plaza called the Looking Bronze. After leaving the Divination Commission, she went back home to take over her family business.

C: 攻略？什么攻略？
E: Guide? What guide?

C: 风土人情要怎么感受？
E: How could one experience local customs and culture?

C: 你有什么推荐的店吗？
E: Any recommended stores?

C: 而「茶」…通常是指由植物制成的饮料，有不同的品种和味道。烈焰浓茶口味辛辣，制作过程中包含了发酵与蒸馏，需要注意适量饮用。
E: As for "tea"... it usually refers to drinks made from plants. Different teas vary in taste. Flaming Potent Tea is characterized by its pungent and burning taste, and a unique process of production that includes fermentation and distillation. Therefore, drinking too much Flaming Potent Tea may be harmful to your health.

C: 我看这罗浮…哎，不提也罢，反正不是什么安逸地儿，哼哼，我们持明不待也罢！
E: If you ask me, I'd say the Luofu... Well, forget it. It's just not a place where you'd call home. We Vidyadhara are better off elsewhere!

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 能得到听众的赏识，是我作为乐师的荣幸。
E: It's an honor for a minstrel to be appreciated by her audience.

C: 呵呵，我只是在义演，不需要打赏。您愿意驻足聆听，这对我来说就应足够了。
E: Oh, I'm just performing for charity, so tips will be unnecessary. Your willingness to stop and listen to my performance is more than enough for me.

C: 确实，你的演奏水平有待提升。
E: That's true. Your performance skills still have much room for improvement.

C: 你为什么会在十王司工作？
E: Why are you working for the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 道理也蛮简单的——仙舟人少说也要活个两三百年，难免活着活着就觉得没趣儿了。
E: That's easy to understand, right? Anyone who has lived for two or three centuries will eventually find their lives boring.

C: 难怪青镞看我的眼神里充满了疑惑。想必是见惯了景元平日里悠哉的样子，瞧我左支右绌，想看我能坚持到几时吧。
E: No wonder Qingzu looks at me with so much confusion in her eyes. She must be used to seeing Jing Yuan taking it easy on a regular basis and now watching me struggle to keep up must've made her wonder how long I can hold on in this post.

C: 你们怎么被抓进来的？
E: How did you get captured?

C: 你们也太菜了…放弃吧！
E: You're too weak... Just give up.

C: 下次再聊吧～
E: Let's catch up another time~

C: 老子这能叫镇伏吗？这叫「任贤用能」，本大爷给你们十王司赏脸才留下来了。
E: Bah. You call this being subdued? This is called "making use of outstanding talent." I stayed in the Ten-Lords Commission as a kindness to you.

C: 不过是发牢骚而已，我听到了。
E: I heard you, you were just letting off steam.

C: 锵锵。刚才您没有被吸进葫芦里，我只是用了一个「蒙住眼睛」的小道具罢了。
E: Ta-da! You weren't sucked into the gourd, I just used a "blindfold" to cover your eyes.

C: 藿藿大人之前就负责驱魔道具的管理和维护，她比我更了解这些东西。
E: Huohuo used to oversee the management and maintenance of exorcism tools, she knows more about this stuff than I do.

C: 今时今日这种服务态度是不行的！
E: In this day and age, the service presented here is unacceptable!

C: （关于十王司执法的对象）
E: (About the targets of the Ten-Lords Commission's enforcement)

C: 刚才那位客人血气方刚，不知道会干出什么。
E: That customer just now had a reckless air about him. I did not know what he would've done.

C: 客人说这话就客气了，谈生意嘛，先谈才有生意，我也愿意和客人聊聊。
E: You're too polite. To conduct business, one must first engage in chat. I am willing to chat with you.

C: 据传持明龙尊引得古海潮动如雷，淹覆鳞渊境洞天。又数十年余，持明后裔在一座浮岛上找到了一株盛放茶树，标枝秀立，芽叶如玉。
E: It's said that the Vidyadhara high elder roiled the ancient seas like thunder, and submerged the Scalegorge Waterscape delve. Dozens of years later, the Vidyadhara descendants found a flourishing tea tree on a floating isle — its sturdy branches were beautiful, and its leaves lush like jade.

C: 虽然说狐人可以活个几百年，但是在仙舟这样死气沉沉的环境中，活一年、十年、一百年、一万年，有任何区别吗？反正每天都一模一样。
E: Foxians live for centuries, but living for one, ten, a hundred, ten thousand years, in such a drab place like Xianzhou... what's the point? It's all the same mundane monotony day in, day out.

C: 你有无数个恋人？也太花心了吧！
E: You have had countless lovers? Such a player!

C: 本仙…不好意思，咳。这几百年来，我确实遇到了很多有趣的事情。不过最难忘的还是这件事……
E: I am... Ahem, sorry. Over the centuries, I have encountered many interesting happenings. But the most memorable one is this...

C: 这能一样吗？
E: How's that even the same thing?

C: 在仙舟想要点杯茶可真不容易，生怕是错过了什么文化典故。不过，这只是我个人的坏习惯，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你大可不必效仿我。
E: Ordering tea aboard Xianzhou isn't the easiest thing, and you might not get all the cultural allusions going on. But that's just my own bad habit, {F#m'girl}{M#boy} — you don't have to be like me.

C: 您路上小心。请记住我们的口号，「鹤运速递，啥都能寄」。
E: Be careful out there, and remember — our slogan is "Heron Express — We Mail Anything."

C: 怎么，不相信吗？
E: Oh, you don't believe me?

C: 我倒是看你才是不够资格的！
E: You're the one who's not worthy!

C: 现在门票不是实名制么？
E: Don't tickets require real-name registration nowadays?

C: 恭喜你，追星成功了。
E: Congratulations, you succeeded in meeting your idol.

C: 这里不仅有经典苏乐达，还有针对仙舟人口味定制的好梦气泡饮…不过，我更推荐你购买经典口味，好梦气泡饮…并不能提供极致的快乐体验。
E: Here, besides Classic SoulGlad, we also have the Sweet Dreams Soda flavor made exclusively for the Xianzhou folk's tastes... However, I still recommend the classic flavor. Sweet Dreams Soda... cannot provide the ultimate experience of happiness.

C: 我也是这么想的，我打算邀请仙舟本土的大明星做代言。对了，你喜欢怎样的明星代言呢？
E: My thoughts exactly. I'm planning to invite a Xianzhou local celeb as our brand ambassador. What kind of celebrity do you think will make a good fit?

C: 这瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>…
E: This Auspicious XV...

C: 哎呀别那么死板嘛，只需要告诉我不踩红线的部分就行。
E: Chill, my friend! Don't be so uptight. You can just feed me information that doesn't break the rules.

C: 愿帝弓保佑你！
E: May the Reignbow bless you!

C: 你的心里只有科学！
E: All you care about is your science!

C: 我差不多该离开了。
E: I should leave soon.

C: 说起来，我之前确实附身过一个棋盘，好像是叫…仙舟星阵棋？
E: Speaking of which, I really did take possession of a chessboard before. I think it was called... Xianzhou starchess?

C: 你有什么本事教别人下棋？
E: What talent do you have for teaching a kid chess?

C: 喂，{F#丫头}{M#小子}，你有没有听过一首仙舟民谣？
E: Hey, {F#m'girl}{M#boy} — ye ever heard this Xianzhou folk song?

C: 还不错，没想到我和你只是匆匆打了几个照面，你还记得住我的脾气。
E: Not bad. I didn't think you'd remember my personality when we've only met a few times.

C: 要是你能给我展示你全部的真本事，我敢打保票，你绝对有资格成为竞锋舰上的胜者。
E: If you could demonstrate your full repertoire, I guarantee you'll be the undisputed champion of the Skysplitter.

C: 遇上我，他们就只能剩下遗憾了。
E: They'll have nothing else but regret when they run into me.

C: 怪不得，他身上也有种强者的气息。
E: No wonder, he had the aura of a champion on him.

C: 有什么对付新人的心得？
E: Have you any insights on fighting newcomers?

C: 嗯嗯，下次再聊吧～如果在罗浮遇到什么伤病，随时来找妾身就好～
E: Sure, I'll talk to you again next time~ If you get injured or sick during your time on the Luofu, come and find me any time~

C: 可就算有机巧辅助，外加将作息安排的效率规划至极限…一人身兼两大责任，实在是太难为自己了。
E: But even with the help of ingenia and being as efficient as possible with my schedule, wearing two big hats at once is pushing me to my limits...

C: 他们就这点儿本事了。
E: And that's all they're good for.

C: 这个时间把我叫出来…
E: Why are you calling me this late...

C: 都消消气…
E: Calm down...

C: 他们忙，我还忙呢！
E: So am I!

C: 这后两本说的东西有半点幻想色彩吗？仙舟上的器物都能办到啊？
E: Do these last two books have any hint of fantasy in them? The instruments on Xianzhou can already do all that...

C: 明阅大人逼迫绘星大人…
E: Mingyue forces Huixing to...

C: 市井小巷里有多少传说…
E: How many myths are circulated among the people in the alleys...

C: 包船包饭一条龙！
E: Transportation and meals included!

C: 包子大，饺子小。
E: Dumplings and steamed buns!

C: 好面好馅不要怕。
E: Don't worry about the quality of the ingredients.

C: 你是说用箱子之类包装…
E: Do you mean packing them in crates...

C: 别因为这点儿小事辞职。
E: Don't quit over a small matter like this.

C: …因为他那个奠仪的事？没邀请你，所以你心里不舒服？
E: ... Are you bothered because you weren't invited to his soul-soothing ceremony?

C: 但她拥有成为一名医者最为重要的特质——那就是一颗赤子之心。
E: But she possesses the most essential quality of a healer: a pure and innocent heart.

C: 你好，我这边可以点菜吗？
E: Hi there, can I place my order?

C: 担心晚上会做噩梦的话，就抱着它入眠吧。
E: If you're worried about having nightmares, just cuddle it in your arms.

C: 是啊，有你，还有我们的伙伴们。
E: Yeah, I've got you and all our buddies.

C: 我在旁边数着呢，整整五十二杯。
E: I was keeping score. A whopping total of <unbreak>52</unbreak> cups.

C: 冬霖爵，好肚量，可惜对上了小维吉妮娅这样的怪物。你输得不冤！
E: Dux Brumalis, you drink well, but it's unfortunate you ran into a monster like little Verginia. There's no shame in this loss!

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请你收下这副花冠。
E: Please accept this flower crown, {NICKNAME}.

C: 呜嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 已经有新的灵感了吗？
E: Got any new inspiration yet?

C: 这就是大地兽教给我们的最朴素的道理。
E: Such is the primal wisdom the dromases have bestowed upon us.

C: 你对那刻夏的喜欢怎么看？
E: What do you think of Anaxa's love for dromases?

C: 呜嗡…我不过是一头曾在悖谬的道路上奔驰的愚兽，那名学者却视之如常。
E: Grumph... I'm just a foolish beast who once galloped down the path of paradox, yet that scholar treated it as perfectly normal.

C: 倘若你有空闲，请多和凯撒聊聊吧，小灰鱼儿。
E: When you have time, Little Gray Fry, do chat with the Imperator more.

C: 怎么回事，又进来了？
E: What happened? Why are you here again?

C: 我可没说里面是什么。
E: I never mentioned what was inside.

C: 呸呸呸，比我好不到哪去！
E: Hah! How is that any better than me!

C: 你呢？
E: What about you?

C: 坏了，难不成一直背错了？
E: Oh no, could it be that I've always been reciting the wrong phrase?

C: 十王敕令。
E: The Ten Lords decree.

C: 对，关到绩效结束就好！这样我就不用担责了！
E: That's right, just lock me up until the end of the performance review! This way I won't have to bear responsibility!

C: 我刚报了个剑术速成班！
E: I signed up for a swordplay crash course!

C: 你摸了摸它爪中的绣球，它瞪了你一眼。你可能会以为这是错觉，但这不是。
E: You touch the embroidered ball under its paws, and it shoots you a glare. You might think you're imagining things, but you aren't.

C: 犯罪嫌疑玉兆：天穹系列玉兆单元。重大罪行：算错了。
E: Suspect Abacus: Sky Dome Series Jade Abacus Unit. Major Crime: Wrong calculation.

C: 星历<unbreak>7012</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7012</unbreak>

C: 《进化》
E: Evolution

C: 金•丹尼尔。
E: Daniel Kim

C: 《荒野的呼唤》
E: The Call of the Wild

C: 你看到战争中必败的结局，伪装必胜的信念，并在绝望的战争中用尽手段去延续文明，现在你掌握了操作台。
E: You witness the inevitable defeat in the war, yet you maintain an unwavering belief in victory. Employing any and all means possible to extend the lifespan of civilization in this hopeless war, you now hold control of the console.

C: 你见过许多快递盒，但从没一只像眼前这样，它在微微颤抖，犹如雨巷里被遗弃的小狗。「别、别过来！」它好像在对你说话。
E: You have come across many courier packages, but none of them is like the one before you. It trembles slightly like an abandoned puppy on a rainy day. "D—Don't come closer!" It seems to be talking to you.

C: 将手臂抬高，两手平举成一水平线，准备开始！
E: Raise your arms up high, hands in a horizontal line, and get ready!

C: 为伊德莉拉女神而战！
E: Fight for the goddess of Idrila!

C: 欲知后事如何！
E: If you want to know what happens next...

C: 不知不觉间…
E: Before you know it...

C: 只要有星槎停靠在玦轮台旁边，它就会缓缓启动，保障星槎续航——如果没有，那么一定是因为星槎主人没有支付费用。
E: Once a starskiff is docked next to a jade wheel base, it will slowly start operating to charge the starskiff. If it doesn't, it must be because the owner has not paid for the service.

C: 「星啸所率部属与曜青、朱明与方壶仙舟的先遣部队均有交战记录。在云骑无畏的战斗下，她的计划并未得逞。」
E: "Celenova's troops have engaged in warfare with the troops of the Yaoqing, the Zhuming, and the Fanghu. Her plans were derailed by the Cloud Knights, who fought fearlessly."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 世界」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — World."

C: 老板人呢？
E: Where's the shopkeeper?

C: 你不知道这家幻戏社是否采用了这一足以斩获星际和平影视年度大奖的鸿篇巨著。
E: You have no idea whether the immersia club adopted the ideas in the essay that is worthy of winning the Interastral Peace Media annual award.
