C: 单从外观来看，盒内装着的食物或许曾经是一碗炒饭——如果愿意，你可以装一碗新的进去。
E: From the looks of it, the package might have once contained a bowl of fried rice. You can replace it with another bowl if you wish.

C: 你伸手触摸眼前这颗持明卵，光滑表面上隐隐有水珠滑落的痕迹，又像是某种泪痕。
E: You extend your arm to touch the Vidyadhara egg in front of you. There are faint traces of water droplets that resemble tear stains on its smooth surface.

C: 不对，持明离去留下的空缺，与持明留在此处的空缺是不同的。她经历了彻底的背叛与绝望，留在眼前的空洞就像无穷远方的叹息之墙。
E: Wait a minute. The emptiness caused by the Vidyadhara's departure is different from the emptiness exuded when they are still here. After going through betrayal and abject despair, the emptiness left before this Vidyadhara is akin to a wall of lamentation in a faraway land.

C: 「你完成此事，便是我族英雄，我保举你加入龙师议会。如何？」你摇头，然后点头。长老长笑一声，如鸱鸮怪叫。
E: "If you can complete this mission, you'll become a hero, and I'll guarantee you a seat in the council of Preceptors. What do you think?" You nod, then shake your head. The elder laughs eerily like a screeching owl.

C: 一只被打开的快递文件袋，包装上的奇特标志吸引了你的目光——毫无疑问，那是个榫卯结构的木锁——你在仙舟上已见过太多次了。
E: An opened courier package with a weird insignia draws your attention. Undoubtedly, it is a mortise and tenon wooden lock that you have come across umpteenth times on the Xianzhou.

C: 唉，你至少完成了作业，这已经很了不起了，不是吗？
E: Ahh. Well, at least you finished the homework. That's already very impressive, no?

C: 「虽会大赦，犹合除名」。
E: "...may still face expulsion even if they received general amnesty."

C: 帝垣琼玉是个好东西啊！
E: Celestial Jade is great!

C: 你附身后光打牌去啦？
E: Do you only play tile games after possessing someone?

C: 现在我只想成为棉花糖幽灵。
E: Now I just want to be a marshmallow spirit.

C: 许多年前神秘失踪或沉海的船只，经过许多年后被发现在海上航行，而船里空无一人——它们被叫作「幽灵船」，或者它们只是单纯被认错了。
E: Ships that mysteriously disappeared or sank many years ago are found traveling on the sea. Since no one is found on the ship, they are known as "ghost ships," or maybe, they are simply misidentified by the people.

C: 一阵慵懒的气息从门后渗出，伴随着似有似无的怨念。
E: A sluggish voice resounds from behind the door, carrying a vague sense of resentment.

C: 《漏斗与花朵碰杯》
E: A Cheers of Funnel and Flower

C: 靠近这扇门时，你听到里面传来了女人的尖锐嗓音。
E: As you approach the door, you hear a woman's shrill voice coming from within.

C: 格拉克斯大街上最具规模的苏乐达俱乐部，足以接待每一位奇形怪状的宾客。
E: The largest SoulGlad club along Glaux Avenue, enough to host every odd and eccentric customer that comes through its doors.

C: 「冷静…现在只有我了…必须完成他留下的嘱托…我必须做到……」
E: "Calm down... It's just me left now... I have to complete the instructions he left behind... I have to do it..."

C: 柜子上的钟表永远指向了某个时刻，你不确定它代表着什么。
E: The clock on the drawer is permanently pointing at a certain moment, and you're not sure what it means.

C: 它再也无法放映孩子们喜欢的节目了。
E: It will never again show the programs that children loved.

C: 「您正在呼叫的是，『蓝调的时刻』。愿您在梦泡之海的舞会上被浪漫垂青。」
E: "You are calling the Blue Hour. May you find romantic encounters at the ball in the Ocean of Dream Bubbles."

C: 这些探照灯最大的用处，就是测试新梦境的光线追踪是否有效。
E: The greatest use for these searchlights is to test the effectiveness of the new Dreamscape's ray tracing.

C: 「通过我，将进入亘古之虚空」
E: "Step past me and enter the Immemorial Void"

C: 这并非什么秘密，任何宾客都有权知晓这些规则。
E: This isn't a secret. Any guest has the right to learn about these rules.

C: 就是说，为什么活着这么难呢？
E: Which is to say: Why is living so hard?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 你的来历…
E: Where you're from...

C: 我来自很遥远的地方，您完全没听说过的荒凉星球，那里只有黑暗和无止境的劳作，人们只有拼尽全力才能在自然的夹缝中勉强活下去。
E: I come from a faraway place, from a barren planet that you've never heard of, where there is only darkness and endless labor. Our people have to work themselves to the bone to eke a living in the crevices of nature.

C: 唔，都结束了？那到我的提问环节了，您不介意吧？
E: Boo, over already? It's my turn to ask questions then. I hope you don't mind?

C: 我不知道…
E: I don't know...

C: 冰原熊幼崽呢？
E: What about arctic bear cubs?

C: 呜！咕呜呜！
E: Groo! Groooo!

C: 你想啊，逐梦客们来到匹诺康尼是为了什么？还不是为了体验「美梦」。
E: Think about it — why do Dreamchasers make their journey to Penacony if not to experience sweet dreams?

C: 道具表演？
E: Prop performance?

C: 真难听！什么叫偷，这是比喻，是催促观众快快打赏的比喻！
E: That's awful! What "steal"? That's just an indirect way to urge the audiences to give us tips!

C: 你看上去不怎么惊讶。
E: You don't seem surprised.

C: 很早我就意识到了：能陪伴我走完这一生的不是我的亲人或朋友，而是这份与生俱来的天赋。
E: I realized it in my early stage of life that my family and friends aren't going to be the ones that accompanying me to the very end, but this talent of mine will.

C: 已经没有这样的人了。即使最愁眉苦脸的家伙，一想到梦境的繁华与美好，也会不由自主地露出笑颜。
E: There's no one like that anymore. Even the most worrisome person would unwittingly smile at the thought of the dream's prosperity and beauty.

C: 嗯…？等等，年轻人，别走呀！你还没向我提出*报酬*呢！
E: Hmm...? Hold on, young one, don't leave just yet! You haven't asked for a *reward* from me!

C: 你这{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}还挺实诚，真不错。现在的年轻人啊，个个能说会道，还知道体贴人，陪老婆子我聊上一整天都不嫌烦。
E: You're an honest {F#girl}{M#boy}. Young people nowadays are really good with people, and know how to treat them well. They don't feel bothered even after chatting with an old lady like me for an entire day.

C: 如何评价匹诺康尼的美梦？
E: How would you rate the dreams of Penacony?

C: 这位朋友，请留步，容我采访你一下——请问你知道什么是「二次元」吗？
E: My friend, please allow me a moment. I would like to interview you — Are you familiar with "anime"?

C: 唉…我一直以为自己多多少少也算是当世泰斗了，可现在却觉得，自己远比自己想象中要浅薄。
E: Ah... I always thought that I was an authority in the modern anime world... But now I feel like I am far less knowledgeable than I imagined.

C: 酒店每间客房内都配备特殊「入梦池」，引导客人前往指定梦境。
E: Each room is equipped with a specialized "Dreampool" to guide our esteemed guests into the Dreamscape.

C: 就先到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 您如果对这些话题感兴趣，我们倒是可以找个时间慢慢聊聊…当然，要等我下班以后。
E: If you are interested in such topics, we can talk about them sometime, but perhaps after my work hours.

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 听起来有点吓人…
E: Sounds terrifying to me...

C: 就这么说定了。不许反悔啊。
E: It's a deal. There's no backing out now.

C: 哔哔哔哔——噗！疾风——光线！
E: Beep, beep, beep... Poof! Traveling at the speed of light!

C: 什么是折纸小鸟？
E: What is an origami bird?

C: 折纸小鸟…就是折纸做的小鸟，你没看过《钟表小子》吗？
E: An origami bird... is a bird made of folded paper. Haven't you watched Clockie?

C: 哎，布琳娜，你不能再这么堕落下去了。该认真工作了！
E: Ah, Brina! You must not let yourself slack off like this. Pay attention to your work!

C: 只要你心怀虔诚，誓不再犯，神主便会看在迷途知返的份上赐你赦免。
E: As long as your heart is devoted, and you vow never to commit these crimes again, the Great One will grant you forgiveness on account of you recognizing how misguided you were.

C: 真是可笑——明明从选择付诸暴力的那时起，他就已经先背弃了美梦。
E: What a joke. He was the one who forsook the dream first the moment he chose violence.

C: 我的风格并未改变，口碑与名声却一落千丈…往日的赞美都变成了恶评，他们讥讽我、嘲笑我，将我的作品贬的一文不值。
E: My style didn't change, but my fame suffered greatly... Praises of the past became review bombs, and they ridiculed me, mocked me, and considered my art utterly worthless.

C: 是，我们当然需要美梦，「黄金的时刻」是一座梦之城。正因心存对美好的渴望，人们才会来到这个地方。
E: There's no doubt we need dreams. The Golden Hour is a city of dreams where people who desire beauty visit.

C: 我拥有的这份工作是多么美妙啊——不用东跑西颠，不会感到劳累，下班后还能回家照看我的小狗。
E: It just dawned on me how perfect my job actually was — I don't have to run errands at different places. It's not too tiring, and I still have time to take care of my dogs after work.

C: 能源…战甲缺少能源……
E: Energy... The armor needs energy...

C: 不过…倒是不能理解那些「逐梦客」是怎么想的，毕竟是匹诺康尼嘛…哈哈……
E: Although, I can understand how these Dreamchasers feel... This is Penacony after all... Haha

C: 要问「后悔吗」——我自己也不知道，哈哈。我只知道如今的我就像是失去了汽水先生的钟表小子，再提不起半分精神、点不燃一星热情……
E: If you ask me "Do you regret it?" ...Even I'm not sure, haha. All I know is that, right now, I feel like Clockie without Mr. Soda. I can't get my spirits up, or ignite even a spark of enthusiasm...

C: 我们是喜欢钟表小子、是可以为爱发电，但这不意味着我们就甘愿被压榨！就连石头老板做坏事之前都知道找个「体面的理由」呢！
E: We all love Clockie, but just because we're passionate about it doesn't mean that we're okay with being exploited! Even Boss Stone knows you can't just be evil without a solid reason!

C: …那你现在呢？
E: ...So, how do you feel now about home?

C: 果然啊，回到了熟悉的地方，过去那些悲伤的难堪的回忆就全部涌了上来。
E: It always happens, you get back to a familiar place and all of those sad and painful memories come flooding back.

C: 果然啊，回到了熟悉的地方，过去那些悲伤的难堪的回忆就全部涌了上来。
E: It always happens, you get back to a familiar place and all of those sad and painful memories come flooding back.

C: 好啊，给我瓶经典苏乐达。
E: Alright, a bottle of Classic SoulGlad.

C: 让我给您先报个菜单！欢迎光临钟表餐厅克劳克影视乐园分厅。请问您是想来点——
E: Let me get you a menu! Welcome to the Clock Diner in Clock Studios Theme Park! May I ask what I can get you—

C: 我没有直接说出来，就是担心会影响怪物们的情绪。
E: I never said it outright because I was worried about upsetting the monsters.

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: 因此，我很欣赏这位酒吧主人的做法。尊重与陪伴，永远是表达爱意最好的方式。
E: Therefore, I appreciate the lounge owner's approach. Respect and companionship are always the best way of expressing love.

C: …噢？这倒挺有意思的，怪物们的故事很适合作为新闻素材。
E: ...Hm? Now that's interesting, the story of these monsters would make great news articles.

C: 嘿！刚才有五个苏乐达汽水瓶在空中飞！
E: Hey! There were five SoulGlad bottles flying in the air!

C: 这是我和舒翁的约定。她不在酒吧的时候，我会照顾那些怪物。
E: This is my agreement with Siobhan. When she's not around the lounge, I'll take care of the monsters.

C: 只要你坐在那，我就总是忍不住想瞄准你的头。
E: As long as you're sitting there, I can't resist aiming for your head.

C: 真羡慕，你一定是位了不得的大人物。
E: Jealous! You must be someone very important.

C: 一想到工友们纷纷向我投来敬佩和艳羡的目光，就连干活都比平时更有力气了。
E: When I think about the looks of admiration and envy my fellow workers would give me, I find myself feeling more upbeat about my work than usual.

C: 当然——前提是他们当真能找到合适的人来接手。
E: Of course, that is if they could ever find someone more accomplished to handle this job.

C: （听他讲完）
E: (Let him finish)

C: 我是浣熊。
E: I'm a raccoon.

C: 呜。其实…超级骇客的故事，都是骗你的。你不会生气吧？
E: *sob*... actually... all those stories about being a super hacker? They were lies. You're not mad at me, are you?

C: 你看我长得像群演吗？
E: Do I look like an extra to you?

C: 我刚到这的时候，也尝试过重拾盗贼的老本行。可没过多久我就想通了，就算夺来了东西，也没法带回现实啊，那何必还要冒这个风险呢？
E: When I first got here, I tried picking up my old profession. But it didn't take me long to realize that I couldn't take any of the stuff I pilfered back to the real world. So, what's the point of taking that risk?

C: 所以说啊，种田也要讲究家族法！
E: That's why I say you have to abide by The Family's rules even when farming!

C: 可惜我们人手太少，一时之间找不到更多的教师。
E: It's a shame that we are so understaffed and cannot find any more teachers at the moment.

C: 是留下继续研究拉扎莉娜的手稿，还是前往别处研究新的话题…人生未来的方向，我得好好想想。
E: Should I stay to continue studying Razalina's manuscripts or travel elsewhere to study new topics...? I must think about my future and my life direction.

C: 呵呵，我靠的可不是养生，而是要付出更多代价的方式……
E: Hehe, it's not about good health, but rather, how to pay higher prices...

C: 听说过烛墨学派吗？「秉烛而行，照亮文墨」，不让历史被时间埋葬。而我就是学派的一个记录员。
E: Have you heard of the Candelagraphos? "Illuminate each step with candlelight and bring life to the written word" to ensure that time will not bury the past. I am an archiver in the Candelagraphos.

C: 每到长夜，他们就会潜入村庄抢走幼儿。但这个部落对数字九有着未知崇拜，所以行动只会持续到第九颗星星升起。
E: Every long night, the rival tribe will sneak into the villages to snatch the young children. But for some unknown reason, this tribe worships the number nine, so the action will only last until the ninth star rises.

C: 这份薄礼还希望你收下，就当是陪我这糟老头子聊天的报偿了。
E: Here's a small gift from me. Thanks for chatting with an old geezer like me.

C: 「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」…看吧伙伴，这个约定，我最终还是好好遵守了啊。
E: "Bring joy to the world through music"... Look at me now, Asna. This promise of ours: I've kept my word until the very end.

C: 感谢！一会我整理一下新菜单，敬请期待！
E: Thanks! I'm taking care of the new menu. Stay tuned!

C: 太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好「谢礼」，慢走不送。
E: Excellent, we can wrap up early. Don't forget to take this gift, and don't let me keep you.

C: 去吧，把那些没魄力的小家伙找回大树，我要替老师好好给它们补补课啾。
E: Go and return those spineless fools to the Great Tree. I will drill their lessons into them in the Professor's stead, tweet.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，赛场里新建了<color=#dbc291ff>一台非常大的时钟</color>，每次飞过那里，总能听见熟悉的声音啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: <color=#dbc291ff>A giant clock</color> was recently built at the racetrack. You can hear familiar sounds each time you fly by there, tweet.

C: 我一直认为，所谓筑梦，筑的不止是梦，更是做梦之人的心灵。
E: I've always felt that dreamweaving isn't just about dreams, but also the soul of the one who creates them.

C: 而此刻、而眼前，我愿笃信、我将得见——
E: And right here and now before me, I sincerely believe that I will see...

C: 我的积木是用无比激烈的情绪碎片制成的，能帮人激发出被压抑的欲望，这种效果在他们这些梦境造物身上会更加明显……
E: My building block was made from exceptionally intense emotion fragments that can help people evoke desires that have been suppressed. This effect will be much more evident on these Dreamscape creations...

C: 你让他们坏掉了。
E: You broke them.

C: 是哈努星。
E: It's the planet of Hanu.

C: 我曾是梦主的鹰犬，为家族撕咬着为害梦境的蠹虫，以猎犬的身份为荣…直到擢升音级的「升音礼」过后，我从家主口中听到了哈努努这个名字。
E: I was once a hunting Hound of the Dreammaster, biting down on the enemies of The Family who would harm the Dreamscape. I reveled in the glory of the Hounds... until after the Tuneriser ceremony in which I was to receive a promotion, when I heard Hanunue's name from The Family Head.

C: 或许「绿洲的时刻」也是个好的选择？我们已经很久没有一起野餐了，偶尔晒晒太阳、放空一下也不错。嗯，到时候干脆雇佣一只气泡锂犬吧，我记得路易斯小时候最喜欢玩飞盘游戏了……
E: Or perhaps the Moment of Oasis would be a good option as well? Since we haven't picnicked in so long, basking in the sun and relaxing once in a while sounds like a good idea. Ahh, on that day, I'll hire a Bubble Hound. I recall that Louis loved playing holodisc when he was young...

C: 我向来是个不怎么安分的人，总想着能离开这里，到其他地方去看看。
E: I've always been a restless person, always wanting to leave this place and see other sights.

C: 我就知道…留在这里做水手总还是有好处的。
E: I've come to realize that... staying here and remaining as a sailor has its benefits.

C: 尽管空间有限，但她的视线穿越层层障碍，投向远方，落在记忆深处。不多时，她的嘴角终于开始出现向上的弧度。
E: Even in the limited space, her vision pierces through barriers, reaching far into the depths of her memories. Soon, a smile forms on her lips.

C: 虽然她开心起来的样子令你感到欣慰…但说老实话，这世上也不是什么事都可以乐在其中的。
E: Her happiness is uplifting to see, yet honestly, it's a hard truth that not all experiences in life are joyful.

C: 嗨，我老早就注意到你了，你刚才一直在盯着我看…嗯哼，我就是那档真人秀的特邀嘉宾！
E: Hey, I noticed you've been eyeing me for a while now. Yup, you thought right. I am the special guest from that reality show!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 很有趣的问题。匹诺康尼有一种独特的魅力，但所有美丽的东西都有自己的阴暗面。权力斗争，美梦背后的秘密…「暗流涌动」应该是最能概括匹诺康尼的词了。
E: Interesting question. Well, Penacony has a unique charm, but all things glamorous are known to have a dark side. Power struggles and secrets behind sweet dreams... Perhaps "surging undercurrents" is the term that can best describe Penacony.

C: 说来惭愧啾…人家本想带小鸟们来度个假，可它们太淘气了啾。
E: Tweet... I brought the little birds here on a vacation, but they truly are a mischievous bunch, tweet.

C: 就是以每一任船长的为主题的商品。像是以船长形象制作出的立体拼图、船长签名与半身像的钥匙扣、玩偶…诸如此类的小玩意儿。
E: They are goods themed around the presiding captain. Examples include 3D puzzles designed after the captain's appearance, captain's autographs, captain's half-body keychains, dolls, and other knick-knacks.

C: 你的技术很差吗？
E: Are your skills that bad?

C: 不用这么在意形象细节吧？
E: Is there a need to be so hung up over such minor grooming details?

C: 好的，船长辛苦了！
E: Understood. Thank you, Captain!

C: 我选帕姆！
E: I'll go with Pom-Pom!

C: 没事，随便找你聊聊。
E: I just want to have a chat with you.

C: 跟我讲讲你的工作方针吧。
E: Tell me about your work motto.

C: 方案二，命名为「塔塔洛夫号」，尾翼配以垃圾之王塔塔洛夫模样的涂装。
E: Choice two, The Tatalov. It features an insignia designed after Tatalov the Garbage King on the tail of the airship.

C: 家族给了我这份工作。在有足够的财产进行维修前，我能使用的记忆储存空间十分有限。
E: The Family gave me this job. Before I can raise enough money for my repairs, the amount of memory storage space that I'm able to use is very limited.

C: 现在她肯定对你印象深刻了。
E: ...At least you left a deep impression on her now.

C: 有空的话，请务必来参观筑梦学院的概念艺术展！
E: If you get time, please come along to the Dreamweaver Academy Conceptual Art Exhibition!

C: 为了降低成本而使用薄弱忆质？提前结束工期，放着空荡荡的屋顶不管？为了钱，这些家伙什么事都干得出来。
E: Using low-quality memoria to lower costs? Ending construction projects early and leaving roofs wide open? These people will do anything for money.

C: 说起这个你可就不困了——眼见一个系统时过去，你依旧滔滔不绝舌灿莲花毫无疲态。
E: As you start to discuss this topic, all of your exhaustion suddenly fades away... A system hour passes before your very eyes as you continue your tireless speech without any sign of slowing down.

C: 嘶——痛痛痛…啧，我刚刚又陷入谵妄状态了，对吧？
E: Ow... It hurts, it hurts... Tsk, I was in a trance again, wasn't I?

C: 曾几何时，我以为有梦想就能活下去。但我也快毕业了，生存问题还是更要紧些……
E: There was a time when I thought I could survive with dreams alone. But I'm graduating soon — survival is probably a more urgent priority right now...

C: 其实我觉得我们社团走商业化路线也挺好啊！
E: Actually, I think it's pretty good that our club is moving into a commercialized route!

C: 对演出的热情？那种胡闹的气氛？还是不管学院阻拦，坚持要冲上舞台的勇气？
E: The passion for performing? The rowdy atmosphere? Or the courage to push ahead to perform despite the disapproval from the schools?

C: 对！我想起来了，让乱破小姐教我忍术！实不相瞒，演出结束后，我确实跟着乱破小姐学了些基本技巧，可那实在太难了，很折磨。
E: Yes! I remember now, I wanted to ask Miss Rappa to teach me ninjutsu! To tell you the truth, after the show ended, I learned plenty of fundamentals from Miss Rappa, even though they were excruciatingly hard.

C: 要是演奏的音乐没法让观众开心，没法让自己和同伴开心，不是就没意义了吗？
E: If the music performance can't evoke joy in its audience, yourself, or your companions, wouldn't that be meaningless?

C: 在其中，排名第一的是那位财富学院代表，而我居然在第二位。真是不可思议。
E: Inside, the top-ranked teacher is that Fortune Academy representative, and I am surprisingly just below him. It was simply astonishing.

C: 哎…现在说这个也什么用，是我判断失误了，我…对不起你们。
E: *sigh* ...It's pointless to say anything of this now. It was an error on my part. I... I have wronged all of you.

C: 就这样吧，没事别来打扰我。
E: We're done here. Don't bother me unless it's important.

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 真、真是的，{NICKNAME}同学，你、你还真是大胆……
E: R—Really, {NICKNAME}, y—you're too bold...

C: 唔…真、真是过分……
E: Ooh... Th—This is just too much...

C: 无名客难得的休憩时光，正配得上一杯美味的调饮。
E: A rare moment of rest for the Nameless, this occasion deserves a delicious cocktail.

C: 关于家族…
E: About The Family...

C: 我毕竟是一名逃犯，不应引人注目。恢复自由后，便第一时间换下了家主的衣装。
E: I am a fugitive, after all, and I shouldn't draw attention. I changed out of the family head's outfit the moment I gained my freedom.

C: 好奇那一位的事吗？当然，我们已经打过交道了。
E: You wish to know more about her? Well, yes, we've already met.

C: 感到好奇也是在所难免。毕竟，你很难从人们口中听见对焚化工的正面评价。
E: I get why you'd be curious about them. People don't usually have nice things to say about The Cremators.

C: 关于翁法罗斯…
E: Regarding Amphoreus...

C: 窗外是剧院的舞台，一些尊贵的客人会留在这里，用望远镜观看剧目，或是遥望其他客人。
E: Beyond the window is the theater's stage. Some distinguished guests will linger there and use binoculars to watch a show or observe other guests.

C: 瞭望镜的镜头在不断缩放后，焦距达到极限，你这才意识到这艘飞艇之大，远超你的想象。
E: It is when the telescopic lens keeps zooming in and out, and its focal length is at its maximum, that you realize the enormity of this ship far exceeds your imagination.

C: 为家族贵客备下的华丽晚宴，你试图随便找个位置坐下时，家族侍从提醒你：「尊敬的船长，您该坐在主位上。」
E: A magnificent banquet prepared for honored Family guests. When you try to find a random seat, a Family attendant reminds you: "Honored Captain, you should be seated at the main seat."

C: 凶手是…卡厄斯兰那。
E: The culprit is... Khaslana.

C: 愿你收获宁静，最初的「卡厄斯兰那」。
E: May you find peace, the first Khaslana.

C: 粉丝群里说已经到了。
E: They said in the fan group that they're already here.

C: 哎，你听说了吗？
E: Hey, have you heard the news?

C: 这就是皮皮西舞！
E: Now this is how the Pepeshi dance!

C: 就要！扭出！
E: Must! Win!

C: 这种需求怎么可能实现嘛，我们又没有那么多模型资源…
E: How can her request ever be fulfilled? It's not like we have that many model resources...

C: 元年苏乐达，限时贩售！
E: Epochal SoulGlad! Limited-time offer!

C: 哪怕能借到钱也好…
E: If only someone would lend me some money...

C: 这水还挺清澈…
E: The water looks pretty clear...

C: 知更鸟的票都是秒没…
E: Robin's tickets sell out in seconds...

C: 我也喜欢海胆味的。
E: I prefer the sea urchin flavor, too.

C: 肯定是那些有钱人把我发财的机会抢走了！对，一定是这样！
E: Those rich folks must have robbed my chance at getting rich! That's gotta be it!

C: 连着试了这么多下，我的脑袋都快撞开花了……
E: I've bumped into it so many times that I've almost broken my head...

C: 啊哈——夜安，你这怪人！
E: Ah-ha... good evening, weirdo!

C: 「蓝调的时刻」吧，看看能不能来一场浪漫的邂逅……
E: Blue Hour, I guess. Maybe I'll have a romantic encounter or something...

C: 你简直是全宇宙的明星！
E: You're a universal superstar!

C: 不许你这么说他！他是完美的！
E: Don't speak about him like that! He is perfect!

C: 小声点，别被人听见。
E: Keep it down, don't let the others hear you.

C: 我要你收回刚才的发言，你这是在歧视皮皮西！
E: You take back your words! You're just belittling the Pepeshi!

C: 我们鸢尾花里，会不会也有叛徒？
E: Do you think there are also traitors in our Iris Family?

C: 这次比赛你押注了吗？
E: Did you place a bid on this competition?

C: 嗯嗯，谢谢你的理解，我看你这个报价挺实在的，我们现在签合同？
E: Yes, thank you for understanding. Your offered price is quite solid. Shall we sign the contract now?

C: 领导发话了，说这次来的都是公司那边的贵宾，所以我们的日常工作一定要……
E: The boss said that all arrivals are VIP guests of the IPC. So, in our daily routine, we've got to...

C: 孩子，你先别急…信任的重建需要时间，这得慢慢来。
E: Child, you mustn't be anxious... It takes time to rebuild trust. We have to be patient.

C: 估计我们也听不到了…
E: I doubt we'll be able to hear any of them...

C: 天天都在爆单。
E: Daily orders are through the roof.

C: 不过来坐会儿吗？
E: Aren't you going to come over?

C: 我也听说了…
E: I heard about that too...

C: 球杆呢？
E: Where's the bat?

C: 老古董，这是激光感应的。
E: You fossil. These are laser sensors.

C: 请问您需要什么服务？
E: Which service do you need?

C: 这如黄金般的岁月啊…
E: These golden years...

C: 影片鉴赏之《鸢尾花房间》——「在梦中体验一部讲述梦中电影的电影吧！」
E: Film appreciation: The Iris Room — "Experience a film in the dream that talks about films in the dream!"

C: 啾！这可是艺术家的自我修养，要成为我的粉丝，就趁现在啾！
E: Tweet! It's the self-cultivation of an artist. If you want to be my fan, now's the time, tweet!

C: 啾~啾~啾~啾~客人哟~跟着我的节奏，扭个腰，转个头，提提肩，抬抬手~动作要温柔，力道要足够~不要偷懒啾！
E: Tweet tweet~ tweet tweet tweet tweet hello! Follow my beat, twist your waist, turn your head, shrug your shoulders, and raise your head! Your movements must be gentle! Your strength must be ample! No goofing off, tweet!

C: 教授，入浴剂的效用时间就要到了，请问您接下来想用什么种类的？
E: Professor, the bath soak is almost past its effective period. Might I ask what type you wish to use next?

C: 难道是梦游？
E: Could it be sleepwalking?

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「钟表小子闹钟」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Clockie Alarm Clock."

C: 某日我望见在城里巡逻的白厄大人，灵光一闪将奥赫玛黄金裔们的英雄事迹绘制在了陶罐之上。
E: As for their origin, one day, while spotting Lord Phainon patrolling the city, I felt inspired and painted the epic tales of Okhema's Chrysos Heirs on a dolium.

C: 我们的父母很早前就在黑潮灾难中去世了。那时他不过六岁，却要负担起两个人的生活，几年后又张罗着家族藏书所的重建，想尽办法让我的精神也变得富足。
E: Our parents died in the black tide disaster long ago. He was just a six-year-old child back then, but he had to provide for both of us. As time passed, he worked on rebuilding our family librarium, while also doing the best he could to nurture me intellectually.

C: 我没什么要打听的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 好的，那么您请自便。祝您有个好胃口。
E: No problem. Enjoy your meal. Good appetite.

C: 至少从外观上看，你无法察觉到它与一杯水之间有任何区别——
E: From the appearance, at least, you can't tell one drink from another —

C: 其实还挺简单的。只要在传信石版的辩论场上匿名留言，「某某时刻，有谁要一起去祭拜塞纳托斯」，自然就有心领神会的家伙加入进来。
E: Well, it's pretty straightforward. We just post an anonymous message on the teleslate's Forum. "Anyone wants to worship Thanatos together at some Hour?" Insiders who understand what it means will naturally join.

C: 「呜呼——诸多奇观美景、早湮灭历史洪流之间，唯余叹惋。」
E: "Ah... so much beauty, lost to time's cruel hand. A tale of sorrow, slipping like sand."

C: 嘿嘿，不知道在小灰眼里，缇宝是什么样的呢？
E: Hehe, Tribbie wonders what she's like in your eyes.

C: 我看你们打得不相上下呀。
E: You two seem evenly matched.

C: 言尽于此。再会。
E: Farewell.

C: …在黑潮来的那天，我刚把晚饭端上桌。孩子们还在吵着要吃点心。谁知道那会是最后一顿饭。现在想想，真该让他们多吃点的。
E: ...On the day the black tide came, I had just put dinner on the table. The children were clamoring that they wanted to eat snacks instead. Who knew that would be the last meal we ever had together? Thinking about it now, I should have made sure they ate more.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 如果你不想被打搅…告辞。
E: If you don't want to be disturbed... then so long.

C: 就像很多人一样——他一开始固执得很，觉得手艺就是自己生命的一部分，根本放不下自己的活计。怎么劝都劝不动。
E: Like many others, he was very stubborn to begin with — thinking that his craft was part of his life, his handiwork, of which he could never let go. There was no talking him around.

C: 最近还有什么异常表现吗？
E: Any other abnormal behaviors recently?

C: 打扰了，我对植物不感兴趣。
E: Sorry to bug you. I'm not interested in plants.

C: 我替你去调停！
E: I'll go and mediate for you!

C: 刚刚那是？
E: What happened?

C: 「所以，我会陪在你身边。因为你一定，也是她深爱的人。」
E: "So, I will stay by your side. Because you must be someone she deeply loves."

C: 痛并快乐着——祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
E: You who feel the pain in happiness... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!

C: 另外，不要忽略了绑腿。这不起眼的布条能让你在行军时免去腿疼。倘若你在作战中受伤，它也能延缓你的死亡。
E: Also, do not neglect leg bindings. These unremarkable strips of cloth can save you from leg pain while marching, and even buy you more time if you are wounded in battle.

C: 我要怎样成为一名战士？
E: How can I become a warrior?

C: 嗯…气势有了，但十个是不是有点太少？
E: Mm... It's got flair, but is ten too few?

C: 悬锋人提倡的是争抢球、摔跤和越障跑。这些运动既能磨炼我们的技艺，也能唤醒我们体内的热血，让我们变得更快、更强。
E: Kremnoans advocate games where people fight over balls, wrestling, and obstacle races. These sports can hone our technique and summon the blood in our bodies to the fore, allowing us to become faster and stronger.

C: 等等…等等…那不是你们的！是我的，都是我的！
E: Wait... Wait... That does not belong to you! It's mine, all mine!

C: 叮，叮，叮——不行，这位铁匠完全不理你。
E: *ding* *ding* *ding* ...Nope, the blacksmith ignores you completely.

C: 哎呀，巧了这不是，店里刚好有折扣活动，您要是不赶时间，进店瞧瞧？
E: Hah, a fortunate encounter then. We've got a discount on right now. If you're not in a rush, care to step in for a browse?

C: 小店随时欢迎！
E: You're welcome any time!

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 对吧！要是将这个发现公之于众，我们就能改变奥赫玛沿用至今的历法了！
E: Exactly! By sharing this discovery, we could revolutionize the longstanding calendar system in Okhema!

C: 我同意帕门弥德的观点。
E: I agree with Parmenides.

C: 抱歉，我又开始滔滔不绝了。创作对我来说就像呼吸一样自然，有时候会忘记身边的人。你呢？你对艺术有什么看法，你认为艺术应该追求什么？
E: Sorry, I can get carried away sometimes. Creating is as instinctive to me as breathing, and sometimes I lose sight of those around me. What are your thoughts on art, and what do you think art should pursue?

C: 哦，是你呀。我刚刚在思考接下来的一组壁画该如何创作，没注意到你是什么时候过来的。找我有什么事吗？
E: Oh, it's you! I was pondering my next set of murals and didn't notice when you came over. Is there something you need?

C: 这不是饿死的，是蠢死的。
E: That's not starvation. That's just plain foolishness.

C: 想问什么就说吧，别在我伤口上撒盐就好……
E: Feel free to ask whatever you want. Just don't rub salt into my wounds...

C: 你们找到了一处空地，按照博莱斯的指示，你需要随便运动运动，那么——
E: You find an open area, and following Bolaris' instructions, you begin to move around... so —

C: 不过你们那儿的「扎格列斯信徒」可真有趣，还有那个叫「匹诺康尼」的城邦里的「酒馆」……
E: Though, that follower of Zagreus you talk of does sound interesting. And that tavern in the city of... Penacony, was it?

C: 不如信我是刻法勒。
E: Why not just trust that I am Kephale?

C: 拟人…别说，真是个好主意！画名我都想好了！就叫「旋转的异邦舞者」！
E: Anthropomorphizing... I must say, that's a great idea! I've even thought of a title for the piece — let's call it "The Spinning Dancer of the Outlands"!

C: 但说真的，要是笔自己能画画就好了——老师，既然你来了，也给我贡献点灵感吧！
E: But honestly, it would be great if the brush could paint by itself — Master, since you're here, why don't you contribute some inspiration to me?

C: 要是想指责我不务正业，骂我偷懒，那我可必须得说——你来错地方了。云石天宫是给大家放松的场所，不是认真工作的地。
E: If you're here to criticize me for not being productive and call me lazy, I must say — you've come to the wrong place. The Marmoreal Palace is a place for everyone to relax, not for serious work.

C: 我想了解生命花园的事。
E: I wish to learn more about the Garden of Life.

C: 唔，我成为园丁的时间还不长，对过去的事情可能不太了解。不过请问吧，我会尽可能地为你解答。
E: Oh, I haven't been here long, so I'm not too sure about past matters. But ask away, and I will try my best to answer.

C: 「敬拜学派」一天到晚就知道捣鼓仪式和钻研政治，弄出一堆乱七八糟的玩意，简直听得人头痛。
E: And all the Venerationist school knows is to fiddle with rituals and delve into politics all day, and create messy knick-knacks. They're a right headache.

C: ——巨大的海豹玩偶！
E: ...A giant sea seal doll!

C: 你差点被那家伙骗了！
E: That guy almost scammed you!

C: 这些都和我的想象完全不同，让人感到既矛盾又困惑…我曾就此询问过那些祭司，而他们回答我说：「在塔兰顿的威严面前，一切都需要代价。」
E: This is all completely different to what I imagined. I'm so conflicted and confused... I once asked some priests about this, and they replied: "Seeking an audience with the majesty of Talanton will always require a price."

C: 命运泰坦们已经知晓您的诚意，我们会为你求取一份神谕。愿您的家乡——塔拉萨波利斯——平安无虞。
E: The Fate Titans have recognized your piety. We will obtain a prophecy for you. May your home — Thalassopolis — long remain safe and sound.

C: 啊…没有啦，都是些力所能及的小事，不算什么。
E: Ah, it's nothing. These are just small acts within my power. Nothing noteworthy.

C: 除此以外，你应该知道的——就是给游客指指路，担任下义务向导什么的。
E: Besides that — as you probably know — I help visitors find their way around, acting as a volunteer guide.

C: 瞧你说的什么话——我向{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}起誓，宣传什么就是什么！一个字都假不了！再说，我哪有能力搞来假的？
E: What an accusation! By {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, I swear what I advertise is what you get! Not a word of falsehood! Besides, how could I possibly procure counterfeits?

C: 身为{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的追随者，我有义务让所有物品的价值得到公正评判。为此，即便要背上偷盗的骂名，我也心甘情愿。
E: As a follower of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, it is my solemn duty to ensure every item is assessed with fairness and justice. For this cause, I'm even willing to bear the shame of being called a thief.

C: …呵，真是鼓舞人心的话语。
E: ...Haha, such inspiring words.

C: 笑容很甜的风堇。
E: Hyacine, whose smile is really sweet.

C: 缇宁她安静又知性，很久以前*我们*一块儿从雅努萨波利斯离开的时候，她抱着一小块石板，想要把自己的知识和理想传达给所有响应号召的黄金裔。
E: Trinnon is quiet and intellectual. Long ago, when we left Janusopolis together, she carried a small stone tablet, hoping to convey her knowledge and ideals to all the Chrysos Heirs who answered the call.

C: 我为数不多的日常零用，除了武器的维护，基本都花在这个副业上了。
E: Aside from maintaining my weapons, most of my modest daily expenses go toward it.

C: 我是隶属于元老院的记录员，据我所知，外乡人{NICKNAME}曾在奥赫玛城中擅自打开宝箱取走财物，打碎飞天坛递，还让黄金短矛在闹市穿梭……
E: I'm an archiver for the Council of Elders. According to our records, the outworlder {NICKNAME} once opened a treasure chest in Okhema without permission, shattered the Flying Amphora, and let the Golden Short Spear fly through a bustling market...

C: 我向来追求雅俗共赏…你的意见，我会考虑进去的。
E: I strive to create works that appeal to both the refined and the common audience. Your feedback will certainly help me improve.

C: 好的。
E: Very well.

C: 坚强而理智的灵魂化作甲虫，踏实前行；浪漫而感性的灵魂化作蝴蝶，翩然起舞……
E: Strong and rational souls become beetles, moving forward steadily. Romantic and emotional souls become butterflies, dancing gracefully...

C: 你怎么还在演奏？
E: Why are you still performing?

C: 如你所见，巡逻、维护基本的秩序。
E: Patrolling and keeping basic order, as you can see.

C: 黎明虽熄，莫要惊慌！
E: Though the dawn has faded, do not panic!

C: 我们有缘再见。
E: Let's hope we'll cross paths again in the future.

C: 你怎么在这儿…
E: Why are you here...

C: 不管出于什么原因，也不管用了什么方式…豁出性命，让更多人免于死亡的折磨，都是一件高尚的事。
E: Whatever their reasons, whatever their methods... sacrificing one's life to spare others from the torment of death is a noble deed.

C: 回过神来，我就已经站在驿站这里了，手里拿着全套的疗伤用具……
E: When I came too again, I found myself standing here at the relay post with a full set of medical equipment at the ready...

C: 做坏事的人已经得到报应了。
E: The bad people have already gotten what they deserve.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 嗯…有位织者怀揣着惩恶扬善的信念。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一根石柱上</color>，为雨之民打抱不平呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who carries the belief of punishing evil and promoting good. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a stone pillar</color>, standing up for the Rainfolk.

C: 果真如此，我也在暗自揣测呢。
E: It's as I suspected. I've been quietly pondering this.

C: 我似乎已经集齐了石板。
E: It seems I've gathered all the stone tablets.

C: 这，便是从无到有的第一步。若能探明织者之秘背后的原理，终有一天，翁法罗斯的人民将不再畏惧天灾。
E: This is the first step from nothing to something. If we can uncover the secrets behind the weavers' mystery, one day, the people of Amphoreus will no longer fear natural disasters.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 多谢你，贵客…现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 不过…悄悄告诉你，我还是更喜欢昔涟姐姐一点。
E: Buuut... between you and me, I like Cyrene just a tiny bit more.

C: 哼，我也很忙的迷。钱多得实在花不完，得忙着花迷！
E: Hmph! I'm super busy too, memi. I've got more money than I can spend, so I'm busy spending, memi!

C: 静观其变。
E: Wait and see.

C: 嗨，见到你真高兴！是来找人家玩的吗？
E: Hi! I'm so happy to see you! Are you here to hang out with me?

C: 长大了就不可爱了。
E: But they won't be cute once they're grown.

C: 干杯！你这人真爽直，我喜欢。等玩完一遭，记得再来找我碰杯！
E: Cheers! I like your candor. Remember to drink with me again once you're done!

C: 干杯！
E: Cheers!

C: 吟风爵，又在写情诗呢？
E: Another love poem, Dux Carminum?

C: 当、当然可以啦！正好，我写到法吉娜陨落的桥段，像{NICKNAME}这样的英雄，一定对那种壮景很、很有体会！
E: O—Of course! I was just writing about the fall of Phagousa. A champion like you... I'm sure you'll r—relate to experiencing that spectacular scenery!

C: 打小，我就很瘦弱，连最轻的矛都举、举不起来。
E: Since I was young, I was very frail and weak. I couldn't even l—lift the lightest spear.

C: 我的过去吗…仔细回想，尽是凯撒大人的恩情啊。
E: My past... Come to think of it, it's all thanks to the Great Imperator.

C: 我们希望信仰能安抚海洋的疲惫…但只是徒劳…她从未启目窥看我们的敬拜，只是无休地献唱……
E: We hoped faith might soothe the sea's weariness... but it was all in vain... She never gazes upon our worship, and only sings endlessly...

C: 遵命，但以您的身份，我们还是少说些话为好。
E: Understood, but considering your station, we best keep our mouths closed.

C: 讲，讲完了。哈哈，呼吼哈哈哈。
E: Th—That's all. Hahah, roahaha.

C: 可它们长得确实像刻法勒！你瞧那些多变的外观，多么「全世」啊！我传信石版的记忆区已经被各种奇美拉的绘像装满了，等下就打包发到我们的辩论场去。
E: But they look just like Kephale! Look at their variety of designs, such a spitting image of Kephale! My teleslate's memory zone is full of all kinds of chimera-related drawings. I'll compress them and send them to our Forum later.

C: 不…不是，是它们…对我过敏。唉……
E: N... No, they're... allergic to me. *sigh*

C: 人不该被预言束缚。这才是雅努斯…还有命运泰坦们的真实想法吧。
E: No one should be bound by prophecies. This is also what Janus... and the Fate Titans truly believe.

C: 对这个毫无预兆的问题，猫头鹰老师显得有些诧异——他清了清嗓子，快速整理好了表情。
E: Professor Owl is obviously somewhat puzzled at this sudden question — he clears his throat, and hastily composes himself.

C: 你可以与他多多交流沟通，想必会收获很多有趣的知识。
E: I am sure you will gain a lot of interesting knowledge if you talk to him more.

C: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
E: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

C: 哎，说到底，待在这里，也是无奈啊……
E: *sigh* At the end of the day, I stayed because I don't really have a choice...

C: 我记得艾丝妲站长已经安排了相关部门在进行专门的复兴与安全区开辟吧？
E: I remember Lead Researcher Asta has organized the relevant departments to work on the recovery and establishment of safe zones, right?

C: 为什么会想到保障非人生物权益？
E: Why do you want to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures?

C: 但好在偶尔会有几个同你一样的知音出现，让我有信心坚持在这一条正确的道路上。
E: But fortunately, once in a while I meet people like you who share the ambition. It gives me faith to stick to the right path.

C: 不是送药就是补药，这种事情分明就该交给机器人吧？
E: I am either delivering or going to deliver medicine. They should've assigned this job to a robot, right?

C: 这个话题我有发言权。
E: I am the best qualified to talk about this.

C: 真拼呢~
E: Working hard~

C: 实不相瞒，我是绳结学派延毕数十年的老学生，按理来说，世界将行至尽头，我一个老学生毕业不毕业，又会怎么样呢？
E: To be honest, I'm a decades-long senior student at the Nodist School who's been putting off graduation. At this point, with the world coming to an end and all, does it even matter if an old student like me graduates or not?

C: 对于我来说，这就是有意义的。
E: For me, that's something with a purpose.

C: 荒笛大人说真正的引领是「让大地的生灵们各行其是」，我想，终有一天，大地会回应荒笛大人的理想吧。
E: Lord Terravox says true leadership means "letting all beings of the land follow their own path." I believe that one day, the land will respond to Lord Terravox's ideals.

C: 可你不在乎，你只关心你自己喀。
E: But you don't care. You only care about yourself, crrk.

C: 嗯…有位织者对自己悬空的身躯感到惊奇。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>透明的墙垣上</color>，思量立足之处的奇妙变化呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is marveling at their floating body. The golden thread brings tidings: They're lying on <color=#dbc291ff>transparent walls</color>, pondering the peculiar changes in their footing.

C: 嗯…有位织者思虑深远。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>断裂的路途上</color>，心忧世界的前程呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with deep thoughts. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on a <color=#dbc291ff>broken path</color>, worried about the world's future.

C: 嗯…有位织者想要细细观赏那龙形枝干。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>雅努斯密径上</color>，期待有人为它开辟前路呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who wants to get a closer look at those dragon-shaped branches. The golden thread brings tidings: They are perched on <color=#dbc291ff>Janus's Hidden Passage</color>, waiting for someone to clear the way.

C: 有这闲功夫说这些让人听不懂的旧理论，还不如聊聊我的新椅子呢！
E: Instead of wasting time on these old theories no one can understand, let's talk about my new chair!

C: 诶呀，你的手艺我信得过，我女儿可喜欢你选的香袋了。
E: Oh my, I trust your craftsmanship completely. My daughter absolutely loved the sachet you picked out!

C: 嗝…塔兰顿一点也不公平，欧洛尼斯更是偏心。命运将我们投于纷争的半途，却又使我们无缘参加那场最终战役。
E: *hic* Talanton is so unfair, and Oronyx is even more biased. Fate threw us into the midst of strife, yet denied us the chance to join that final battle.

C: 正合我意！那么，便过两招试试吧——
E: Perfect! Then let's see what you've got—

C: 我承担了多少…多少次传承、多少世回忆，只为了，只为了……
E: How many... how many inheritances, how many lifetimes of memories have I carried, all for... all for...

C: 啊…我看到了！
E: Ah... I saw it!

C: 这是强词夺理！让你这样粗俗蛮横的人当祭司，简直有辱塔兰顿的威严……
E: Absolute blasphemy! Having someone as crass as you being Talanton's priest brings great shame to that Titan...

C: 这些广告效果是自己品出来的吗？
E: Did you come up with these ad slogans yourself?

C: 既然都说到这里了，哈哈！我认识一些力气比较大的常客们！
E: Since we're on the topic, haha! I know some regulars who pack quite a punch!

C: 呜嗡！（不可以哦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}会把肚子吃坏的！）
E: Grumph! (Nope! That'll upset your tummy, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

C: 我很想知道…凯撒大人独自一人的时候都在想些什么？对于黄金裔们，还有一度能以另一种方式触及的天外世界，现在又是怎么看的呢？
E: I'm so curious... What does the Great Imperator think about when she's all alone? What are her thoughts now on the Chrysos Heirs, and on the world beyond the sky that was once within her reach?

C: 看这尊神像，欧洛尼斯也是我们的好伙伴。
E: Look at this statue. Oronyx is our good buddy too.

C: 带着释怀的表情，衣匠将记忆的残晶炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker refines the Memory Crystal Shards with a relieved expression.

C: 那我们之后再见。
E: See you later then.

C: 收下吧，庆祝我们平安无事地走完了这一遭，{NICKNAME}。
E: Take this. To celebrate that we made it through unscathed, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你还活着？
E: You're still alive?

C: 是列车啊。
E: It was the Express.

C: 也不是什么特别的理由……
E: For no particular reason...

C: 但我在想自己是不是应该从《冒险鼹鼠队》毕业了，毕竟我也长大了嘛。{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，你是怎么想的呢？
E: But I wonder if I should graduate from The Adventurous Moles. I've grown up after all. What do you think?

C: 你为什么会来做矿车工？
E: What drove you to become a mine cart operator?

C: 只有通过我们铺设的轨道，地髓才能被送达它应该前往的地点。
E: Geomarrow can only be delivered to the place it's supposed to go through the tracks we lay.

C: 而<color=#dbc291ff>空载矿车</color>则应该开往亮着<color=#dbc291ff>蓝灯</color>的停泊处。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>empty mine cart</color> should be driven to the stop with <color=#dbc291ff>blue lights</color>.

C: 你在这片矿区做了很久吗？
E: Have you been working in these mines for a long time?

C: 只有通过我们铺设的轨道，地髓才能被送达它应该前往的地点。
E: Geomarrow can only be delivered to the place it's supposed to go through the tracks we lay.

C: 滴、答…我已经连续招待宾客一个周了，休息…好想休息……
E: Tick, tock... I've been hosting guests for a week now. Rest... I need rest...

C: 滴答？我好像想起来了…我是扮演钟表小子的迷钟……
E: Tick-tock? I think I remember... I'm the Ticker that plays Clockie...

C: 滴、答！苏乐达，我要苏乐达！我现在就要！
E: Tick, tock! SoulGlad, I need SoulGlad! I need it now!

C: 平时很少遇见你。
E: I rarely bump into you.

C: 「虽然不知道你的名字，但还是要夸夸你，做得真不错！没几个人能发现我留下的这个漏洞。」
E: "I don't even know your name, but I want to praise you on a job well done! Not many people at all know about this exploit."

C: 接下来，我将亲自将这幅画作送往博物馆——是时候让贝城所有人民欣赏这充满力量的作品了！
E: I'm going to personally send this painting to the museum — it's time for all the people of Belobog to enjoy this powerful artwork!

C: 你要是这么办事，那要加的价可不止原先那个数了——<unbreak>14000</unbreak>信用点，你爱要不要吧！
E: If you do that, then I'll have to keep putting up the price — it's <unbreak>14,000</unbreak> credits now. Take it or leave it!

C: 哦？你已经找到了吗？让我看看……
E: Hmm? Already? Let me have a look-see...

C: 「大守护者可可利亚在遥远的下层区度过了童年，那时的她就已展现出对世间万物的好奇与热爱——初雪八落是她最钟爱的花朵，一如大守护者高洁的人格。」
E: "Supreme Guardian Cocolia spent her childhood in the distant Underworld, where she showed curiosity and love for all things - her favorite flower being First Snow, much like her own noble character."

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: …真的吗？但我怕自己有失偏颇。
E: ...Really? I worry that I might be biased.

C: 看看其他人的…
E: Check out the resumes of others...

C: 一幅贝洛伯格机械制造业的宣传画，但是复制品。
E: A poster for Belobog's machinery manufacturing industry, but this is a replica.

C: 在贝洛伯格，简单的矿用机械通常都配有复杂的终端设备。但它们的存在并不能简化作业流程，只是为机械师们提供了炫技的空间。
E: In Belobog, simple mining machinery usually comes with complicated terminal equipment. However, their existence is not there to simplify operations, but to provide a space for mechanics to show off their skills.

C: 这篇剪报的标题是「兄弟对簿公堂，歌德家宅暂封」。
E: This clipping is titled "Brothers in Court, Goethe Mansion Sealed Temporarily."

C: 随着一声脆响，有关「仰望星辰」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
E: With a crisp click, the content regarding "Gaze Upon the Stars" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.

C: （看来这件展品也可以顺利展出了……）
E: (Looks like this piece can now be put on display...)

C: 我叫作晴霓，之前和{NICKNAME}打过照面。
E: I'm Qingni. I've met {NICKNAME} before.

C: 没错，我就想来这里找找看。
E: That's right, and I thought of coming here to try to find it.

C: 好主意，走，现在就去司辰宫。
E: That's a good idea. Come on. Let's go to the Palace of Astrum now.

C: （直接摇动同心火铃）
E: (Rings the Harmonic Chime straightaway)

C: 也许只是光的幻觉，也许是一艘超速的星槎…诸位不如坦诚一点吧，为什么来找我？天舶司不登记人们虚构出来的星槎。
E: Perhaps it was just an illusion of light or a speedy starskiff... Please, why don't you be honest with me? What's the intention behind your visit? The Sky-Faring Commission does not register any imaginary starskiff.

C: 算了，开诚布公，才能尽解疑惑。身为司舵，我自当遵守十王判官的要求。
E: Never mind. Only when we are open and honest can we resolve all our doubts. As the Helm Master, I should comply with the requirements of a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 故人的样子？
E: Ones who had passed away?

C: （劝说它们离开）
E: (Persuade them to leave)

C: 你想让我请你吃什么？
E: *sigh* Which Xianzhou delicacies would you like?

C: 激进的，有多激进？
E: Depends on what you mean by "adventurous."

C: 回过神来，你已经沉浸在金人巷的夜市气氛之中了。
E: When you return to your senses again, you find yourself immersed in the atmosphere of Aurum Alley's bustling night market.

C: 这件事我还没跟会长说过，这样吧，我们现在就去会长那边。
E: I still haven't discussed any of this with the president — let's go pay them a visit.

C: 你看，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}就比你通情达理多了。
E: You see, this {F#young lady}{M#gentleman} understands etiquette.

C: 哈——？我没听错吧，{F#她}{M#他}说{F#她}{M#他}赔得起，真是让人意外。
E: Ha...? Did I hear that right? {F#She}{M#He} said {F#She}{M#he} can afford to pay for it. What a surprise.

C: 唔嗯嗯嗯嗯…
E: Grrrrrrrrrrrr...

C: 为了犒劳你和素裳姑娘长时间以来的操劳，商会在高阿姨那里订了些小吃，你们也正能休息休息，为之后的复兴计划继续做准备。
E: In order to reward you and Sushang for your long hours of work, the Merchant Guild has ordered some gourmet snacks from Tall Auntie, so you can rest for a bit and prepare for the revival of Aurum Alley.

C: 正好，现在换我来讲了。
E: Very well, I believe it's my turn to speak.

C: 但同样是为了金人巷，我们和会长也会产生分歧。
E: ...but the president wants what's best for Aurum Alley too, and yet we still disagree with him.

C: 不过，我都抛下了「金人巷必须存在」的执念，就绝不会否定你们胜利的可能性。在那之前，你们就放手试试吧！
E: ...but since I've accepted the worst-case scenario — Aurum Alley ceasing to exist — I can't see why it hurts to endorse your idea... and see how far it takes us.

C: 怎么，对面是一块铁疙瘩，你就害怕了？
E: Still, I didn't expect a reaction like this... Are you so afraid to converse with a piece of metal?

C: 继续说，我在听。
E: Go on, I'm listening.

C: 难道不是派送距离太远了？
E: Is the Alchemy Commission outside the delivery area?

C: 我们希望尚滋味的食客们吃饱喝足以后，还能回到金人巷里来逛逛。
E: Yes. When customers are done eating, they can come to the Alley for a stroll.

C: 你确定你要从一句话就开始反驳我吗？
E: No need to be quite so aggressive...

C: 小少爷将码头看作的优势，但是对商会来说，商铺才是最大的卖点。
E: As Xiaohan mentioned, the IPC sees the dock as the most valuable asset the Alley has to offer, but for us, the local shops are what makes the Alley special.

C: （不行，我还得再去问问他）
E: (No, I have to ask him again)

C: 这个嘛，我建议您不要问，我只能说都是合规合法的，我向您保证。
E: Well, you know... I recommend that you don't ask that. All I can assure you is that they're all legal. You have my word on that.

C: 寿考堂里除了些奇怪的药材之外，你找到了几份可以用来唬人的证据。
E: In the Longevity Hall, in addition to the strange medicinal ingredients, you find a few pieces of evidence that are quite convincing.

C: 金人巷的商户们都好有干劲，我还以为大家都像若月老板那样悠闲呢。
E: The merchants in Aurum Alley are enthusiastic. I thought everyone would be as laid back as Ruoyue about it.

C: 在你的帮助下，寿考堂逐渐打开了知名度。
E: Thanks to your aid, the Longevity Hall gradually increased its renown.

C: 谢谢你，刚才我遭遇了一场独属于机巧鸟的交通事故。
E: Thank you. I encountered a cycrane-on-cycrane traffic accident earlier.

C: 商会搜肠刮肚凑了些钱，请你一定好好规划。
E: The Merchant Guild has mustered all it can to put together some funds for you. Spend it wisely, please.

C: 我看你这规划，还有提升空间。
E: Looking at your plan, I see there is still some room for improvement.

C: 先往前走，然后左拐试试…
E: Try going straight ahead, then turn left...

C: 从右边的楼梯上去再左拐？
E: Go up those stairs on the right and then turn left?

C: 我们之中，必有一人是怠工的坏蛋！
E: There must be slacker among us!

C: 你总是这样，有点吓人。
E: You keep doing that. It's rather scary.

C: 毕竟鬼知道这前言不搭后语的残卷上记载的「古武术」可不可靠，搞不好就是史考特那个老东西自己编造的。
E: After all, who knows if the "ancient martial arts" recorded on these disjointed and fragmented scraps are reliable or not. It could all be a fabrication of that old joker, Scott.

C: 这哪儿比得过你…
E: I'm not as gifted as you are.

C: 聊聊感应仪的事儿…
E: Talk about the sensor...

C: 天哪，要不是我有誊抄笔记手稿的习惯，那可就损失惨重了！
E: My goodness! I'd be in serious trouble if I didn't have the habit of copying my notes!

C: 哎，现在的人怎么都这么势利？收费的事情回头细说。
E: What? Why are people nowadays so pragmatic? We'll talk about the fees later.

C: 尤其是这次的位置…我不是很方便去。你自己也最好多注意安全！
E: The location this time... It's not very convenient for me to go myself. Be on the lookout for any danger!

C: 就是就是，这里不是博物馆，不需要受博物馆的要求限制！
E: That's right! This is not the museum, so we don't have to follow the museum's rules!

C: 在哈努兄弟的授意下，你和同伴们将成箱的苏乐达偷运进隔壁的监狱区划。
E: With Brother Hanu's permission, you and your companions smuggle crates of SoulGlad into the neighboring prison block.

C: 给你吧啾，石头老板一直拖欠我的工资。我可不想再给他卖命了啾！
E: Keep it, tweet. Boss Stone has not settled my wages for a long time. I'm not going to work for him anymore, tweet!

C: 因为渴望自由。
E: The prisoners' desire for freedom.

C: 滴答，再这样下去，搞不好我们这个部门全都要被优化了…但有个迷钟告诉我，出现了一个能修好我们的人——就是您，亲爱的宾客！
E: Tick-tock, if this keeps up, our entire department will be optimized... But a Dream Ticker told me that someone who could fix us showed up — and that's you, my dear guest!

C: 真没想到，酒店里的异变现象居然还会套娃。真有趣，这里的环境越是诡异，我们就距离真相越近——我的直觉是这么告诉我的。
E: To think that the anomalies in this hotel also devour themselves, interesting. The environment here is even stranger, which means we're getting closer to the truth — that's what my hunch tells me.

C: 这是假的哈哈，你被耍啦！
E: I got you! You fell for it!

C: …你真的没有做错吗？
E: ...You didn't actually do anything wrong?

C: 汪！我不会让你伤害它们……
E: Woof! I won't let you harm them...

C: 我已经通知她了。
E: I've told her about it.

C: 她总是说有事情要忙，却从来不肯告诉我们细节……
E: She always says she's busy with something, but never spills the beans...

C: 你还是来了。
E: You've come after all.

C: 是那个想把舒翁从酒吧带走的坏人哇！她们怎么会在一起！
E: Hey, it's the baddie who tried to take Siobhan away from the lounge! How did they end up together!?

C: 但我都听到了汪！你们讨论的事，我都听到了！
E: But I heard it all, woof! I heard everything you guys talked about!

C: 即使是遭到噩梦侵袭的「惊梦剧团」，依旧能与我们和谐相处。这段时间来到酒吧，对怪物们感兴趣的人们，也会向你们讲述相同的见闻。
E: Even the Dreamjolt Troupe, corrupted by the Nightmare, can live in harmony with us. Those who are interested in those monsters and have visited the lounge will tell you the same thing.

C: 其中有一些人曾是星穹列车的搭车客，有一些人从未上过列车…不过我保证，他们都是一群有趣的家伙。要是有一天，你也能认识他们就好了帕。
E: Some of them were once passengers on the Express. Others have never boarded it... But I guarantee you that they're all interesting people. It'll be good if you can meet them one day.

C: 即便行于坦途之上，无名客也能收获一丝不易察觉的好运气…这就是我能给你、给其他无名客们带来的好处。
E: Even on a smooth ride, the Nameless can gain and use some almost imperceptible luck... That is the benefit that I can bring to you and the other Nameless.

C: 「银河强手棋」好随便的名字…
E: Cosmodyssey is such a slapdash name...

C: 我还有别的事情。
E: I've got other things to do.

C: 我其实根本就不关心。
E: I don't care, actually.

C: 叛徒们躲的躲，跑的跑，但匆忙逃窜间一定难以顾及全局。
E: The traitors all hid or ran, but it must have been difficult for them to clean up the scene in the rush.

C: 他们也顶着苏乐达吗？
E: Are they also carrying SoulGlad on their head?

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 不愧是您！自从热砂会场建成以来，您还是第一位找齐所有宝藏的选手！
E: As expected from you! You're the first contestant to have gathered all the treasures since the completion of the Scorchsand Hall building!

C: 为了等待您这样的天选之人，我们在这里站了很久很久，久到连脑袋都变成了汽水瓶。
E: We've been waiting here for a chosen one like you for what felt like an eternity. We've stood here for so long that our brains have turned to a soda bottle.

C: 「钟表小子」系列动画发展至今，早已不是「钟表匠」一个人的作品了。它承载了匹诺康尼的精神，承载了美梦的形象——欢欣、美好、和谐……
E: The Clockie series has evolved to become something beyond a mere piece of work by the Watchmaker. It embodies the spirit of Penacony and represents the image of a dream — joyful, pleasant, and harmonious...

C: 没错，这种动画最吸引人的东西就是趣味，至于其他东西，观众不想看到，家族更不想看到。
E: Exactly. The main selling point of this genre is fun. As for other stuff, neither the viewers nor The Family are interested.

C: 家族不是不讲人情，按照家主的意思，这份胶卷可以解禁，但必须要「钟表匠」本人表态——他到底想用《钟表小子》表达什么？是制造混乱，还是另有所谋？
E: The Family isn't being unforgiving. As stated by the family head, the film could be unbanned provided that the Watchmaker could come forward with an explanation. What kind of message is he trying to convey with Clockie? Is he trying to create confusion or does he have some kind of hidden agenda?

C: 好、好！快走吧，咱们好像惹错人了！
E: O—Okay! Let's bolt. I think we've messed with the wrong person!

C: （他们往墓园的方向走了，去看看吧……）
E: (They are heading toward the graveyard. Let's follow them...)

C: 你有什么感想？
E: What are your thoughts?

C: 您应该知道，「美梦小镇」就是钟表小子和他的伙伴们生活的小镇，这部系列影片就是关于美梦小镇的故事。
E: The series revolves around the story of Dreamville, where Clockie and his friends live — I bet you already know this.

C: 发出一个帅气的*哼*。
E: Let out a cool grunt.

C: 钟表小子，你为什么垂头丧气啾？
E: Clockie, why do you look so dejected, tweet?

C: 态度转变真快…
E: That tone sure changed fast...

C: 「因罗盘号的突然失灵，钟表小子误闯进一一片神奇的美梦仙境。帮助折纸小鸟，战胜惊梦剧团，钟表小子终于得到用折纸魔法修好罗盘号的机会。」
E: "The Compass' sudden malfunction allows Clockie's accidental entry into a wondrous sanctuary of dreams. After helping the origami birds and defeating the Dreamjolt Troupe, Clockie can get a chance to fix the Compass using origami magic."

C: ——大概就是这样的故事。为了更快完成制作，希望导演您能够亲自上阵，成为钟表小子的动捕演员。
E: ...That's the gist of the story. To complete production quickly, I hope you, as the director, can personally get your hands dirty, and become Clockie's motion capture artist.

C: 咕噜噜，别这么说呀，我真想不出方案了，再这样下去就要开天窗了！
E: *gurgle* Don't be like that. I really can't think of anything. Don't make me leave it blank!

C: 一个厨师。
E: Chef.

C: 人造兵器「苏乐达•猎梦者X」。
E: Artificial weapon, "SoulGlad: Dreamhunter X."

C: 咕噜噜，汽水先生是钟表小子和哈努兄弟的好朋友，他们曾经一起对抗石头老板，维护了美梦小镇的安宁。
E: *gurgle* Mr. Soda is a good friend of Clockie and Brother Hanu. They once teamed up to fight against Boss Stone and keep the peace in Dreamville.

C: 他入狱前在蒙托尔星系制造了一场战争，令上千万条无辜的生命葬身于战火。虽然凭着粗暴的手段解放了匹诺康尼，也因为粗暴的统治而将匹诺康尼变为了噩梦。
E: He waged war in the Montour System prior to his imprisonment that cost millions of innocent lives, and despite freeing Penacony using brutal means, it was those same brutal means that turned Penacony into a nightmare.

C: 哼，搞定了，我们的外传一定会大卖的！
E: Hah, it's done. Our extra story is going to be a bestseller!

C: 哼，虽然我调查了很久，但也不明白哈努努到底是什么人。
E: Hmph, I've been investigating this for a long time, but I still don't know who Hanunue actually is.

C: 咳咳！你看看！导演都不知道这个角色！
E: *cough* Golly! The director doesn't even know about the character!

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 这个仓鼠小子似乎完全不想听你讲话，得想办法让他老实点……
E: This hamster punk doesn't seem interested in listening to what you have to say. You have to find a way to make him behave a little better...

C: 有人抄袭我的名字！
E: Someone plagiarized my name!

C: 没问题！请尽管向我提问。想先从哪部分内容听起？
E: No problem! Please ask me anything. Which part would you like me to begin with?

C: 还差最后一个问题，我很好奇你的答案——
E: And the final question. I'm really curious about your answer to this one:

C: （…总感觉变成可悲的现实故事了。）
E: (...Sounds like this turned into a realistic tragedy somewhere along the way.)

C: 不愧是好兄弟，请指导我！
E: What a true friend. Please, give me pointers!

C: （摸摸对方的头）
E: (Pat her head)

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 呵呵…好久不见，哈努兄弟。你看起来可真是着急，想来上一场紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」释放一下么？
E: Long time no see, Hanu. You look pretty stressed out. How about an intense and thrilling game of Dream Jigsaw to blow off some steam?

C: 天哪，它的样子太让人伤心了。但没关系，我们可以找回它内心缺失的部分，帮助它从失意中走出来！
E: Oh dear, seeing it like this is utterly heart-wrenching. But fear not! We're here to help it rediscover the missing parts of its inner self and guide it out of despair!

C: 倒霉蛋1号
E: Unlucky Fool #1

C: 很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。你的到来就像早春的暖阳，让谬误的积雪尽数消融。
E: Glad to meet you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. Your presence brings a warmth akin to the spring sun, melting away the snow of falsehoods.

C: 提议：用你的双手亲自布设这些藏品，装点这段追寻凡人的旅路。
E: Suggestion: Use both your hands to arrange these art pieces, to adorn this voyage of the mortal pursuit.

C: 这都没问题，但前提得是你用那小铁片真能打赢才行。
E: Fine, fine, I get it. But you've got to actually beat me with that little scrap of metal first.

C: 我会好好安排三月的课程的。
E: I'll be sure to arrange lessons for March.

C: 怎么，难道怀炎将军没有提点过你吗？
E: What? Didn't General Huaiyan offer you any guidance?

C: 那我现在去找公司那家伙，我有几分胜算呢？
E: So, if I were to take on that IPC guy now, what would you say are my chances?

C: 两位师父，我们还是先考试吧。
E: Let's focus on the test, masters.

C: 我在给星穹列车写信。出来这么久了，也该报个平安才对。
E: I'm writing a letter to the Astral Express. It's been a while, and I thought I should let them know that I'm safe and sound here.

C: 彦卿师父他真的很厉害，尾巴大爷不会是吹牛吧？
E: Master Yanqing is really powerful. You sure you aren't just blowing smoke, Mr. Tail?

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 哦，我是说「大家」。玩游戏玩的，说溜嘴了。
E: Oops, I meant "all of us." Sometimes I get carried away playing games — just a slip of the tongue.

C: 要求斯科特扪心自问！
E: Ask Skott to do some serious soul-searching!

C: 假的害我听得这么认真！那么…有没有更柔和一些的方法呢？
E: False!? I was listening so intently too! Then... are there gentler ways?

C: 你将三月与斯科特约战、与椒丘相遇的过程告诉了灵砂。灵砂似乎已经有了眉目。
E: You tell Lingsha about the appointed battle between March and Skott, and the encounter with Jiaoqiu. Lingsha seems to have gotten the gist.

C: 什么叫「就这么个事」啊？你不会是在小看本姑娘吧！
E: What do you mean by "that's it"? Are you looking down at me!?

C: 设问，枯叶之中如何诞生蝴蝶？
E: Rhetorical Question: how can a butterfly be born from dead leaves?

C: 但你还是来了。
E: But you came in the end.

C: 哎，咱们几个认识这么久了，说话生分了啊。
E: Ah, we've known each other so long, and you still treat me like a stranger?

C: 等等，我怎么会亏待你们二位呢！请放心，如果你们和我一起去整理书库，你们就有权限翻看太卜司藏书，要是翻到剑谱了，你们不就赚到了吗？
E: Wait! Of course I would not just take advantage of you two like that! Rest assured that if you come and help me arrange these books, then you will be given permission to look at all the volumes kept in the Divination Commission. There! If you happen to come across a book recording secret sword techniques, that's a win for you as well.

C: 没错，即便剑魔掌握了惊世绝技，也不会改变过去的遗憾。
E: That's right. Even if the Blade Demon was able to master an ultimate technique, that would not change the fact that he regrets what he did in the past.

C: 一段时间之后，三月七醒了过来，《孤影剑谱》悄然变成了尽是空白的纸页。
E: After some time, March 7th awakens and the Solitary Shadow Sword Scroll silently fades to blank, white parchment.

C: 今天的拍照内容可就拜托你了！
E: I'm counting on you for more photos again today!

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦，之前的拍摄很成功，距离预期搜集数也快达标了。托你的福，我的胃疼也好了大半了。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here! The last shoot was extremely successful, and we're almost at our projected target sample number. Thanks to you, my stomach ache is almost gone, too!

C: 啊…是和那个叫「匹诺康尼」的地方有关吗？我从驻留在下层区的公司员工那里听说了，你们为了解放那颗「监狱星」贡献了很多力量，就像你们为贝洛伯格做的那样。
E: Does that have to do with... that place called Penacony? I've heard about it from IPC workers stationed in the Underworld. I hear you all contributed a lot to liberating that "prison planet," much as you did for Belobog.

C: 哟。
E: Yo.

C: 随时欢迎你，我的朋友。
E: You are welcome any time, my friend.

C: 这几天如果参加了比赛，我就不会那么焦虑了……
E: If I had participated in the competition these past few days, I wouldn't be so anxious right now...

C: 你接下来的对手是谁？
E: Who's your next opponent?

C: 看来这位外星朋友需要一些点拨啊。这样吧，半个时辰后就要开赛了，我在擂台上给你一些实际的战术指点吧！
E: It appears our otherworldly friend requires some enlightenment. How about this — the match is starting in an hour. I'll give you some real-life tactical pointers in the ring!

C: 欢迎，欢迎各位来到演武仪典叩关赛现场。
E: Welcome! Welcome everyone, to the Wardance's knockout stage brought to you live!

C: 这玩意儿能过尿检吗？
E: Can this stuff even pass a urine test?

C: 你越说我越害怕了，还有大好的青春年华等着我燃烧呢，我不能倒下！
E: You're starting to scare me now... Good thing I've got plenty of youth left to burn! I can't falter now!

C: 好啦，我和{NICKNAME}还有事要办，先走了。下次再找你玩。
E: Okay, {NICKNAME} and I have some things to take care of. Play with you next time!

C: 他…真是个了不起的人。
E: He... really was an extraordinary person.

C: 如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧…前几天刚到罗浮的时候，实在是把我给吓到了。
E: If I can walk along the streets alone a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fear of the big city... This place scared the heck out of me when I first got here.

C: 哼哼，主要还是因为我有个好闺蜜！我们家小桂子在网络上振臂一呼，人气投票立刻山盟海誓般地涌来！
E: Heheh, it's all mainly thanks to my good friend, Lil Gui! All she has to do is tap a finger on the internet, and our popularity votes will blast through the roof like a comet!

C: 从我个人的经验来讲…人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。
E: From my experience... a person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril.

C: 我听说了！玲可小姐认为那是伊戈尔的衣冠冢！
E: I've heard about that! Miss Lynx thinks it's Igor's grave!

C: 原来我们没被邀请啊？完了，这下白跑一趟了。该怎么和布洛妮娅大人和杰帕德先生解释呢？他们可是对我寄予厚望……
E: So... We weren't invited? Oh no, this trip has all been for nothing then. How am I going to explain this to Lady Bronya and Mr. Gepard? They have high hopes for me...

C: 卢卡！走过来！揍我一拳！你敢吗？！
E: Luka! C'mon! Get over here and take a swing at me! You got the guts?

C: 诶呀妈呀，你这叹气都快把我给吹走了。
E: Whoa, that sigh of yours almost blew me away.

C: 其实，卢卡先生，我们是{NICKNAME}请来，专门为您治疗抑郁情绪和幻觉的治疗师。
E: Actually, Mr. Luka, we're healers invited by {NICKNAME} to help you with your depressive emotions and hallucinations.

C: 麻烦死了，速战速决吧。
E: So annoying. Let's just make it quick.

C: 我也这么觉得。毕竟这一次演武仪典向许多世界都发出了邀请函。罗浮仙舟显然是想借此对外展示自己的繁荣。
E: I feel the same way. After all, many worlds are invited to participate in the Wardance this time. It's clear that the Xianzhou Luofu intends to showcase its prosperity to everyone through this tournament.

C: 喔，有个我的消息源刚才跟我说，接下来的「竞锋守擂」，景元将军会亲自来观礼！
E: Wow, a source just informed me that General Jing Yuan himself will be present for the upcoming "Ringmaster's Challenge"!

C: 试试看吧，也许有效果。
E: Try it. It might help.

C: 是呀～不管「竞锋守擂」的结果如何，你都已经是个大明星了！
E: Right! Regardless of how the "Ringmaster's Challenge" transpires, you're already a superstar!

C: 我想，在他们心中，这样的你，绝不是一个失败者。
E: I think that in their minds, someone like you could never be considered "defeated."

C: 能打赢…我当然开心，但我更希望别人能听听我的赛后演讲。
E: Of course, I'd be thrilled to win, but what I truly hope for is that people will listen to my post-match speech.

C: 欢迎诸位来到演武仪典叩关赛现场！本次决斗的两位选手，其中一位依然是我们备受瞩目的新星——卢卡！
E: Welcome all to the knockout stage of the Wardance! One of the two fighters in this duel is still none other than our highly anticipated rising star — Luka!

C: 那么，开始供述吧。
E: Then, let's start the confession.

C: 奢摩说，这个选择，是我成长的证明。
E: Samatha said making this choice is evidence of my growth.

C: 丹轮寺的请愿，会成功吗？
E: Will the petition of Claretwheel Temple be successful?

C: 真不愧是传说中的银河球棒侠！
E: Spoken like the legendary Galactic Baseballer!

C: 我注意到「铁臂」卢卡选手的状态火热，最后也是靠着火热的状态战胜了对手。不过，我们发现卢卡选手比赛中途好像是些神情恍惚，据说是看到了幻觉……
E: I've noticed that Luka "Strongarm" is on a hot streak — something he eventually used to gain the upper hand and oust his opponent. But, we've noticed that midway through the match, Luka appeared somewhat dazed, like he is experiencing hallucination...

C: 他们俩没有私交。
E: They're not in any relationship.

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的精彩答复，今天的采访环节到此结束，请各位来场的媒体朋友有序离场。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your insightful answers. Today's Q&A ends here. Media personnel, please leave the area in an orderly and civil fashion.

C: 请问{NICKNAME}教练，卢卡选手如此快速丢掉比赛的原因是什么？
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, what was the reason Luka lost this match so quickly?

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}教练的回答。
E: Thank you, Coach {NICKNAME}, for your answer.

C: 我们都是代表贝洛伯格参赛的，如果可以的话，我希望我们不用在守擂赛之前遭遇，但是现实就是如此遗憾，只有其中一方能够挑战守擂者。
E: We are all representing Belobog. If possible, we wish not to encounter each other before the final match. But the fact is as it is. Regrettably, there can only be one to challenge the ringmaster.

C: 卢卡选手，邀你与我共谱一曲——
E: Mr. Luka, you're invited to compose...

C: 如果你准备参加庙会，就跟我说一声吧。我帮你链接体验设备～
E: If you're planning to attend the temple fair, just let me know. I'll help you link up the experience device.

C: 捉鬼小队！捉鬼小队集结！
E: Ghost-hunting squad! Assemble!

C: 大毫？你怎么死了？
E: Dahao? How'd you die?

C: 没字数解释了。你自己玩吧，再见。
E: I'm out of words to elaborate. Have fun by yourself, goodbye.

C: 这倒是没办法否认。
E: There's no denying that, that's for sure.

C: 我还是喜欢你桀骜不驯的样子。
E: I still prefer that curt demeanor of yours.

C: 那阿合马怎么没出来露脸？
E: Why hasn't Arma shown himself then?

C: 你怎么废话变少了？
E: I noticed you've cut down on your blather.

C: 那就好，蕉授制造的混乱已经结束了，真正的校长好像也回到了学校——现在总算能安心享受轻松的校园生活了。
E: That's good to hear. The chaos that the Profnana sowed is over, and the true dean has also returned — everyone can finally bask in their carefree campus lives.

C: …这是什么情况？
E: ...What's going on?

C: 就叫这个吧！
E: Let this be it!

C: 在下的忍具，便是——
E: My ningu, it is...

C: 你知道的，我从很早时候就开始看「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的演出了，一直是乐队的粉丝。
E: You already know I've been watching Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's performances since they started. I've always been a fan of the band.

C: 哈哈，我不会忘的——但你们会不会忘，就不好说了。
E: Haha, I won't forget. But whether you remember is another story.

C: 我的签名可以吗？
E: How about my autograph?

C: 譬如…以前的乐队核心往往都由谐乐学院指定，财富学院则会对演出的规模和时长提出要求，筑梦学院倒是很简单啦，成员的绩点足够就好。
E: For example... back then, the band leader was often appointed by Charmony Academy, while Fortune Academy would set requirements for the scale and duration of the performance. As for Dreamweaver Academy, it was straightforward — members just needed to have a sufficient grade.

C: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
E: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

C: 铛…铛…铛…铛……
E: Ding... Ding... Ding... Ding...

C: 摇滚还能看出来的吗？
E: You can even tell when something's rock 'n' roll?

C: 来就来！
E: Here I come. I'm not scared!

C: 你好，嘶嘶——我来负责，翻译佩佩的说话内容。嘶嘶——准备好了吗？
E: Hi, beep! I am responsible for translating what Peppy is saying. Beep. Are you ready to try things out?

C: 你一直都很讨厌我们吗？
E: Did you always hate us like this?

C: 是吧！我契波在折纸大学可是出了名的人缘好，交际广泛，大家都愿意和我交往。
E: Right? I'm well known at Paperfold University for being popular and having lots of different contacts. Everyone wants to talk to me.
...Uhh.

C: 达凡绮的学业成绩稳居倒数。此外，她的实习评价极差，入职数十次，从未通过试用期，遭到雇主的集体投诉，课堂作品悉数被筑梦师协会列为违规建筑。
E: Dafanchy's academic performance has been consistently poor. Furthermore, her internship appraisals are extremely bad, with her receiving constant complaints from employers and never passing a probation period despite entering dozens of internships. What's more, her works in the classroom are constantly classified as illegal constructions per Dreamweaver Association standards.

C: 「回归性原理」！
E: "The theory of regression"!

C: 完全没有。
E: Not at all.

C: 那位学员…她的机体根本没安装音乐模块，是个绝对的音痴。怪不得她的成绩能这么好。
E: That student... She didn't even have a music module installed in her body. She's completely tone-deaf! No wonder her grades are so high.

C: 听说音乐派对的闭幕演出是彩梦校庆最为隆重的节目，我们就从其他活动的地方赶过来了。
E: I heard that the music party's closing show is the most prestigious act of the Dreamlight Anniversary, so we hurried over from the other event venues.

C: 这位同学，你的老师难道没教过什么是举证责任吗？提出指控，就得有证据！
E: Dear student, did your teacher not teach you the burden of proof? To make an accusation, you need evidence!

C: 唔…反正，乱破同学答应会赶回来，演出肯定能正常进行的！
E: Hmm... Anyways, Rappa promised to be back soon. The performance will definitely happen!

C: ——键盘•忍徒，贝斯•忍徒，可否请二位继续研习音律•忍术，为后续作战做万全准备？
E: ...Ninja Initiate Keyboard, Ninja Initiate Bass — will you keep studying Sound Ninjutsu, and organize full preparations for subsequent contests?

C: 我的任务呢？
E: What about my task?

C: 「人世间，尘与风，去留无端，恍若梦中之梦。」
E: "All things in this world come and go with neither rhyme nor reason, as if in a dream of dreams."

C: 于是，我选择建立这片树林，希望为小镇培养出一群厉害的折纸小鸟。当钟表小子和他的朋友们无法保护小镇时，这里的小鸟们团结一心，或许能抵御未来的风暴。
E: And so, I chose to erect this forest, hoping to raise a flock of strong origami birds. When Clockie and his friends could not protect the town, the birds here would be united in heart, perhaps able to weather any future storms.

C: 你的声音怎么变了……
E: Why has your voice changed...

C: 没问题，你是乐队经理，你说了算！
E: No problem. You're the band manager. Just say the word!

C: （假装不认识它们）
E: (Pretend not to know them)

C: 客串
E: Guest Appearances

C: ——趁那群人不在，赶紧唱个痛快，表达你们的愤慨，顺便赞扬我们无畏的气概。
E: ...When they ain't around, we gon' spit it loud. Let your anger out, we ain't backing down. Shout out to the fearless, we wearing the crown.

C: 大哥！我好喜欢这个地方，这就是我们新的舞台啊！
E: Boss! I love this place, this is our new stage!

C: 看来玩家反馈还不错，总算能放心了。实不相瞒，这还是我第一次开发游戏。
E: Looks like there's decent player feedback. I can now feel at ease. To be honest, this is my first time making a game.

C: 感觉不如《小小哈努行动》。
E: Can't compare to Hanu's Adventure.

C: 原来是这样帕…那列车长也不怪你啦，丹恒乘客。但请你把地上的积水清理干净吧！
E: Pom-Pom sees... won't blame you then, Dan Heng. But please clean up the remnant water!

C: …的确，我总担心自己没办法保护好大家。
E: ...Indeed, I always fear I am incapable of protecting everyone.

C: 这该不会是对我们放水了吧？
E: You sure you aren't simply holding back?

C: 「你的选择，绝对值得——星际和平保险。」
E: "Your choice is absolutely worth it — Interastral Peace Insurance."

C: 「闭嘴」是个调饮机器人，它真有写检讨的本事吗？
E: Shush is a drinksmith robot. Can it really write a self-critique?

C: 自己写吧…
E: Let's just write it ourselves...

C: 真是惊险。我的确没想到，那兽舰真敢一路追到公司的疆域里来。还好他们刚一露头，就被巡逻的公司战舰歼灭了……
E: How harrowing. I definitely wasn't expecting that beast ship to pursue us into IPC's territory. Good thing they were shot down by a patrolling IPC cruiser once they revealed themselves...

C: 恰如此时此刻，「油墨」和「幽默」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Coincidentally, that was a pun. I am a tin can of laughs.

C: 可能是它混在易拉罐里，被你一起带回来了。找个时间送它回去吧。
E: Maybe it was hiding among your cans and you brought it back. Find a time and take it home.

C: 第二天
E: Day 2

C: 「今日的<color=#dbc291ff>『摄影课题』</color>已经公布。」
E: "Today's <color=#dbc291ff>Photography Task</color> has been announced."

C: 无视它。
E: Ignore it.

C: 原来只是玩具…睡蕉小猴流行时「助蕉」造了一大批小猴周边，大概这就是其中之一。
E: It's just a toy... The Assistanana made a whole batch of monkey merch during the Slumbernana Monkey craze. This one's probably from that time.

C: 「睡蕉大猴」。
E: "Slumbernana Ape."

C: 我倒没有意见啦。{NICKNAME}，你呢？
E: I've no objections. What about you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 那种感觉越来越近了…在这边！
E: That feeling... It's getting closer... Over here!

C: 勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
E: The valiant does not consort with the weak. The majesty of Kremnos is nurtured by fresh blood.

C: …感觉不如帕姆。
E: ...It's not as cute as Pom-Pom.

C: 怎么不要？我可是费了好多心思，才弄来的这个管理员职位。再说了，奇美拉是帮人干活的劳动力，有产出的，转让当然要收费。
E: Why not? I went through a lot of trouble to get this administrator position. Also, chimeras are labor to help people's work. Since there's output, of course I must be paid for it.

C: 并非如此。对处在扩张期的队伍而言，团队成员的储备很重要。
E: Nothing of the sort. Having a reserve of squad members is imperative to expanding a squad.

C: 不必担心，我都安排好了。在收到的入队申请中，我筛选出了最适合的对象。
E: Don't worry. I've already made arrangements. I've filtered out the best candidate after receiving the applications.

C: 行呀，缇宝老师主动提出要较量，我们当然会接受。
E: Sure, since Tribbie is the one who is challenging us, we'll accept the challenge!

C: …嗷呜。小风堇在休息吗？
E: ...Awoo. Is Cinny resting?

C: 这还不简单，我演示给你看啊。
E: It's super easy. I'll demonstrate.

C: （预言中的金色奖杯怎么一直没有看到呢，问问好了……）
E: (I don't see the prophesied golden trophy anywhere. I should ask around...)

C: 少废话，现在就下场开始冲撞吧！
E: That's enough talk. We're going to charge right into this!

C: o((⋟ω⋞; )o「豹豹好幸福，不像某只奇美拉没人心疼～」)∋
E: o((⋟ω⋞; )o "I'm so lucky, unlike some chimeras who don't have anyone to care for them~" )∋

C: 我负责证明「十敌」阁下的强大实力。
E: I adopted this posture to prove Lord Yourdei's great strength!

C: o((〒ω〒;  )o「豹风吸入太多，游不动了…」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )o "Oof... too stuffed with seal energy to swim...")∋

C: 呜…泡泡，明白了……
E: Awoo... thank you, Lady Trinnon...

C: 小小灰别太灰心，小飞儿能偷走奖杯，她偷不走冠军的荣誉。
E: Keep your chin up, Little Gray! Little Ciphy may be able to steal the trophy, but she can't steal the glory you won as champion!

C: 你为什么…要戴上墨镜？
E: And what's with the... sunglasses?

C: 别在意我了，下一场就是你和泡泡的决赛了，你要继续吗？
E: You needn't concern yourself over me. You've got the final against Bubbles coming up. Are you ready to continue?

C: 没错，{NICKNAME}，我不仅想成为你可靠的伙伴，还想让你承认我是一个不错的对手——让我们来一场真正的对决吧！
E: That's right, {NICKNAME}, I want to be both your reliable partner and a worthy rival — let's have a real showdown!

C: 当然！那个金灿灿的奖杯，泡泡会帮你拿回来！
E: Of course I am! That glittering golden trophy... Bubbles will help you take it back!

C: 嗝…果然，是我们的「金海豹杯」，「金海豹杯」回到了冠军手下的王牌小「海豹」这里。
E: Burp... As expected, it's our Gold Seal Cup. The Gold Seal Cup has returned to the champion's ace little "seal."

C: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！</size>
E: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!</size>

C: 我…到底是没赶上最后的比赛啊，咳咳……
E: I... I really missed the final match, didn't I? Ahem..

C: 「赐我此日的欢乐，使我忘记昨日的忧愁…」
E: "Grant me today's joy, so I may forget the sorrows of yesterday..."

C: 嗝~我数一二三，请大家一起喊「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
E: Burp, I'll count to three, and everyone shouts with me: "Seal Slammers"!

C: 对了！其实，我们的比赛正式名字是「豹豹碰碰好玩到不行的水上小海豹冲撞对战」…终于找到机会和大家再说一遍了。
E: Oh, and by the way! The official name of our competition is "So Dang Fun Seal Bumping Duel Challenge Seal Slammers"... finally got the chance to say it again.

C: 我不辩解。
E: I won't explain myself.

C: 倘若预言也不能使你警醒起来，我会让你在梦里切身体会一番。
E: If even the prophecy doesn't alarm you, then I'll make you experience it in the dream.

C: 那么<color=#eb4d3dff>你将永远变成小海豹。</color>你要想清楚代价……
E: Then <color=#eb4d3dff>you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color> Make your choice wisely...

C: o((•'ω´- )っ「我是要成为海豹王的豹豹~」)∋
E: o((•'ω´- )っ "I'm the seal who will become the Seal King!~" )∋

C: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
E: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

C: 我开玩笑的，我必须参加。
E: I'm kidding. I must participate.

C: 我嘞个黑圣杯也是联动内容吗？
E: Is the Black Grail a part of the collab too!?

C: 不错，咱们也不是那种规矩死板的比赛，达利安选手，准备开始比赛吧？
E: Well, we're not the type of competition to stick strictly to the rules. Contestant Dorian, are you ready to begin?

C: 原来如此，我尊重你的选择。
E: I see. I respect your choice.

C: 至于「大力海豹」，以及其他小海豹们，我祝它们一切顺利！赛场见。
E: As for the "Mega Seals" and the other baby seals, I wish them all the best! See you on the field.

C: 公司科技，天下第一！
E: Nothing beats IPC tech!

C: 哦对了，公司的货船得过段时间才能去回收这台设备。在那之前，你还可以继续玩我的游戏。
E: Oh, and the company's freight skiff won't pick up this device for some time. The game's yours to play until then.

C: 训练场已为您腾出来了，我带您试试车，对了，我看您的报名表上好像没登记赛车？奇怪，怎么查不到您提交的赛车信息，呃，您有准备自己的赛车吗？
E: The training grounds have been cleared for you. I'll take you for a test drive. By the way, I noticed that your registration form doesn't seem to list a race car. Strange, I couldn't find any record of you submitting one... Uh, did you bring your own car?

C: 但是…「极速杯」的赛道永远不会停歇，新的挑战已经在前方等着所有赛车手们！
E: However, the racetrack for the Speed Cup will never end. There are already new challenges waiting for all the racers up ahead!

C: 放心，匹诺康尼是绝对安全的！
E: Relax! Penacony is totally, absolutely safe!

C: 好好好，我就知道{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}不会放着我不管的——
E: Perfect! I knew my {F#girl}{M#guy} {NICKNAME} wouldn't leave me hanging—

C: 幽灵小鸟就像是泄了气的气球，掉落在地上。青雀和波提欧也顺利地恢复了原状。
E: The Ghost Bird falls to the ground like a deflated balloon. Qingque and Boothill also return to their normal forms.

C: （疲惫的叫声）
E: (Weary oinking)

C: 难道说…小家伙们出什么事了？
E: Oh no... has something happened to the little ones?

C: 这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
E: Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.

C: 黑塔唤出第四面镜，指尖拨动镜面，简单地查验了一番。
E: Herta summoned the Fourth Mirror. With a flick of her fingertip across its surface, she ran a quick inspection.

C: 向舒翁报告吧。
E: Go report to Siobhan.

C: 这杯调饮的作用是，为饮用者带来<color=#dbc291ff>惊喜一刻</color>！
E: This drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>experience a moment of delight</color>!

C: 咦？小灰毛，你这是……
E: Huh? Gray Hair, you...

C: 我的心永远只属于星穹列车！
E: My heart belongs only to the Astral Express!

C: 没关系，你当然可以不信任公司，但你总可以相信金钱——信用点从不撒谎。
E: Not to worry, you don't have to trust the IPC, but you can always trust money. Credits never lie.

C: 当然，这行风险太高了，不是跑到风雪交加的城外就是潜入危机四伏的遗迹，有时候还得想办法把东西卖出下层区……
E: Of course. This line of work is too risky. You're always running off to a snowstorm outside Belobog or sneaking into perilous ruins. Sometimes you even have to find ways to sell off a relic out of the Underworld...

C: 好嘞，我们出发吧！
E: Okay, let's get going!

C: 但和我之前设想的一样，越往深处走，发掘出来的古代遗物也就越值钱。现在可不是打退堂鼓的时候，准备去更深处的遗迹吧！
E: As predicted, we're seeing more valuable relics the deeper we go. Now's no time to give up. Let's drill on down to the depths!

C: 祝福，你见过的人，和一些战斗啰。当然，这些都是给你用来练手的，用来推演星神的重要数据我还在下载，不过不着急。
E: Blessings, people you've met, and some battles. Of course, these are to help you get the hang of things. I'm still downloading the important data used to deduce the Aeon. There's no rush.

C: 解释起来还是有些苍白，您直接拿着看看吧。
E: My explanation alone can't do it justice. You'd better take a look yourself.

C: 我怀疑这些名字都是你现编的…
E: Why do I get the feeling you're just making up all these names as you go...

C: 观众不就好这口吗？这年头娱乐行业竞争这么激烈，咱们这些靠一张嘴吹的，凭什么和天花乱坠的幻戏抢夺用户啊？答案只有一个，离谱！
E: It's what the audience wants, though. Competition in entertainment circles is so fierce these days. How are we storytellers supposed to compete with all the razzle-dazzle and hype of something like immersia? There's only one answer: Manufactured outrage!

C: 开锁是兆算玉璃…
E: It's locked by Abacus Circuitry...

C: 咱们的评书什么时候完稿？
E: When are we going to be done with our storytelling?

C: 哎呀，现在说破了就没意思了。马上您就能见到了。
E: It'd spoil everything if I just told you now. You'll see soon enough.

C: 「持明龙尊沉吟道：『你我二人齐心协力，应能与这绝灭大君势均力敌，可若要确保胜利，则还需要一把神兵利器。』」
E: "The high elder of the Vidyadhara sternly replied: 'With our forces combined, we should be evenly matched against the Lord Ravager. But a divine weapon would guarantee victory.'"

C: 现在我们在这迴星港，就是要找到可以制作刀柄的材料。
E: We are at Stargazer Navalia to search for materials to craft a sword hilt.

C: 这里本来就是培育星槎的地方，附近应该有不少，我们就地取材，在附近找找看吧。
E: It's always been a starskiff nursery here, and there should be plenty nearby. Let's take a look around and see if we can use what we've got at hand.

C: 这有什么！星际和平娱乐还一口气拍过六十多部以武装学士艾伦•琼斯为原型的《夺宝奇谋》系列电影。寻宝套路，老少咸宜啊！
E: So what? Interastral Peace Entertainment has shot over sixty films in the Allen Jones treasure-hunting franchise. Treasure hunts are family-friendly fun!

C: 维持原名吧！
E: Keep the old name!

C: 等赶明儿有空了，我俩一定会登门拜访一下，顺带么，也收集一波听众的反馈。
E: We'll swing by Tall Auntie's stall when we're free and get some feedback from our audience.

C: 诶，客人，要买本以太战线的攻略吗？至于这攻略靠不靠谱…咱们来场对战就知道了！
E: Hey there, buddy! Wanna buy some guidebooks for the Aetherium Wars? As for whether or not it's reliable... How about we have a showdown to find out?

C: …这协会办事还挺人性化的嘛。
E: Sounds like the association really cares about their players.

C: 啊，那孩子自顾自走掉了！{NICKNAME}，我们要不一起送他回家吧——要是他又碰上公司员工……
E: Huh, he just wandered off. Maybe we ought to take him home? What if he bumps into more IPC goons...

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 嗯…让我看看，接下来应该是……
E: Let me see, what next...

C: 目标是——以太战线大师！
E: Behold! You're looking at the soon-to-be Aetherium Wars grand champs!

C: 好耶！我们的目标是——以太战线大师！
E: Yeah! Grand champs in the house!

C: 哈哈，劲头不错。虽然我们也还没完全摸透这个游戏——但我和佩拉一定不会输给你们的！
E: Haha, the enthusiasm is cute, but don't think just because you're still figuring out the game that Pela and I will take it easy on you!

C: 哼哼…哼……
E: Oink... Oink...

C: 不对啦！我想问的和这个没关系……
E: No, no! Not that...

C: 感觉…确实是假面愚者会做的事情。
E: I mean, it does sound like something a Masked Fool might do...

C: 其实，这只以太灵是「托帕后援团」擅自从空间站「黑塔」窃来的藏品——准确地说，是那位年轻站长艾丝妲的藏品之一。
E: It's like this... This Aether Spirit was a museum piece held on Herta Space Station, which was later snatched by Topaz's Support Squad. To be precise, they actually belong to Asta, the station's lead researcher.

C: 然后，把矿车推过去——嘭！他们肯定发现不了。
E: ...give it a little push... and then kaboom! They'll never see it coming!

C: 没错，没错。恭喜你们，得出了完美的解法！正在为您调用「自动机兵•蜘蛛」操作权限——
E: Congratulations, you are correct. This is the optimal solution! Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

C: 但我明白，在我们的对决真正开始之前，两位一定有许多问题想要问我——比如，那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>究竟是谁，我和这位玩家又是什么关系……
E: I imagine before our final bout begins, you'd like me to answer some questions... Who is this <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color>? What exactly is my connection to them...?

C: 哼！哼哼——哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 让我看看……
E: Let me see...

C: 气势不错嘛！但你们还能把气氛炒得更火热吗？
E: Nice, you guys are bringing the heat! Can you go one better...?

C: 你别不说话呀虎克！我害怕……
E: Gah! Hook, say something — you're freaking me out!

C: 理解理解，不过可不要影响到今天的比赛状态啦。
E: Hmm, I just hope that doesn't affect your performance today!

C: 走吧，出发去<color=#dbc291ff>「星际决胜庆典会场」</color>！
E: Let's get going, to the <color=#dbc291ff>Interastral Tournament Festival venue</color>!

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，小三月！我在这儿呢！
E: Hey, you two, over here!

C: 空间站「黑塔」的拯救者——开拓者与三月七——！
E: The valiant saviors of Herta Space Station — the Trailblazers⁓!

C: 精彩，精彩！二位的「实力」与「决心」着实令人动容！
E: Marvelous, marvelous! The strength and resolve you two exhibited was truly astonishing!

C: 是，又不是。还记得我曾向二位不断提起过的那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>吗？她正期待着与你们展开巅峰对决呢。
E: Yes... and no. Do you remember the <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> I've been talking about? She's keenly anticipating a duel with the both of you.

C: 仙舟上一花一草皆有意义，桂小姐自然有她的过人之处：身为抛头露面的街头艺人，网络上的主播，她非常清楚如何扩展咱们需要的消息来源。
E: Every flower and tree on the Xianzhou is significant in its own way — Miss Gui has her own strengths too. As a famous street performer and livestreamer, she has precisely the skills we need to acquire intel for our mission.

C: 全看你的啦，判官。
E: We're all counting on you, Judge Huohuo.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」是罗浮仙舟上规模最大的灵异爱好者网站，所有喜欢怪力乱神的罗浮人都知道它。
E: Ghostly Grove is the most renowned website for paranormal enthusiasts on the Luofu. Everyone who loves the mysterious and the unexplained knows about it.

C: 我也玩得蛮开心的。
E: I had fun.

C: 十王司真的在…阴间？
E: Is it true that the Ten-Lords Commission is located in... the netherworld?

C: 小女子身为文职，要操劳案牍之事去了。唉唉，做不完，真的做不完啊……
