E: As always, I have mountains of paperwork to finish... Piles of paper... I'll never get it all done...

C: 你们不是总斗嘴吗？
E: You two sure like getting each other into trouble...

C: 我一定要一雪前耻！这次一定要保护好小桂子！
E: I have to redeem my honor this time! I have to protect Little Gui!

C: 捣乱的家伙，咱们俩本来快快乐乐地在这儿玩耍呢！阿露她不想跟你们回家！
E: Don't be a bunch of fun-suckers! She doesn't wanna let anyone take her away!

C: 那你们后来吃没吃上肉？
E: Did you get the meat? How does the story end?

C: 阿灼…不是拉勾说好了，绝不跟大人回去吗？大人可以说话不算话，小孩子这样也可以吗？
E: Luxie, we said we'd never go back with the grown-ups! They break their promises, but we can't!

C: 本座知道你要说什么。「人定胜天」、「自由意志」…但这些都不过是人类大脑产生的简单幻觉。从一开始，道路就只有一条。
E: I know what you want to say. Spare me the lecture on "human wisdom prevailing over nature" and those ridiculous notions of "free will"... These are but crude illusions created by the brain. From the beginning, there was only one path.

C: 宇宙的一切早已被决定好了！
E: Everything in this universe is predetermined!

C: 这就是第二种解法，也是第二种选择，我为这个沙盘创造了不同的答案。
E: This is the other solution — the alternative choice. I created a new solution.

C: 它会回来的。
E: He'll come back.

C: 虽然这些日子和你们一起行动，让我渐渐变得更有自信了一些。但也总是不自觉地想起尾巴还在的日子……
E: Ahem. Working with you guys has made me feel a little more confident... but it's hard not to think about the days when Tail was still around...

C: 有点我哥那意思了，唉呀，真是孽缘呐。
E: Reminds me of me and my brother — sort of a love-hate relationship.

C: 各位，行动时请务必小心，这很可能是个有强烈攻击性的岁阳。
E: Be careful everyone — this sounds like a very aggressive heliobus.

C: 我们会有分寸的。
E: Don't worry, this sort of thing is our specialty.

C: 一番搏斗后，你们制住了狂乱的云骑。
E: After a struggle, you subdue the crazed Cloud Knight.

C: 倒是不危及性命，只是他手足痉挛，语无伦次，似乎正处于某种无法摆脱的妄想中。
E: His life isn't in danger, but his hands and feet are spasming... and his speech is incoherent. I think he's experiencing a delusion that he can't snap out of.

C: 驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
E: Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 将军？你说谎。我在丹鼎司的任务已经完成，并未收到其他命令。
E: The General? You lie. I've already finished my assignment at the Alchemy Commission. I have no further orders...

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 你在抗拒我？无谓的仁慈。若不能抛下这些杂念，你又如何能向前更进一步！举剑！
E: You're resisting me? Tsk, rid yourself of these needless notions of clemency. How can you move forward without casting these distractions aside! Raise your sword!

C: 对阵实力如此悬殊的剑士，你竟然花费如此之多的时间。身为剑士的你，难道没有一点自尊心吗？折戟于祈龙坛的惨败，难道要再次上演？
E: Your opponent is no match for you, yet they have managed to fend you off for this long. As a swordsman, have you not any pride? Do you want to repeat the disaster you suffered at Dragonprayer Terrace?

C: 你们要对朋友有信心啊，也许藿藿安然无恙，也许她将那只岁阳顺手降服了呢？也许你们现在赶去流云渡，还能找到她？
E: You should have faith in your friend... Perhaps Huohuo is safe and sound — perhaps she's managed to subdue the heliobi? If you rush to Cloudford, there's still a chance you might find her...

C: 这有什么嘛，你是我们的队长，当然是要帮你找回来的嘛！
E: Well, where would we be without our squad leader? We had to help!

C: …不会是因为我的关系吧？
E: ...It's not because of me, is it?

C: 如果老子还是一个单纯的星火之精，我当然要浮游于天外了。但是我沾染了你们的人情世故之后，老子的「自由」早就不再那么简单了。
E: If I were merely Starfire Essence, then naturally I'd prefer to glide through the cosmos... but after being entangled in your human world, my freedom is no longer that simple.

C: 等等，这样一来岂不是违背了隐秘行事的原则？
E: Wait, aren't we supposed to be operating in secret?

C: 老子原本是打算跑路的，但是，这不是不放心你嘛，特意来确认一下，你这个怂包到底能不能行，有没有长进？
E: I thought about getting out of here, but I couldn't shake the feeling there was something wrong... so I came back to see if you could manage on your own, or if you were still a scaredy-cat.

C: 相信我，这真的很难！
E: Trust me, that was really hard!

C: 文远你看到了，它是个岁阳！
E: Wenyuan, see for yourself — it's a heliobus!

C: 我明白了，藿藿不知道自己究竟做对了还是做错了，可世上哪有那么简单的对错呢？
E: I see. Huohuo doesn't know whether she was right or wrong. But when is she ever going to get a simple case of right and wrong in this world of ours?

C: 藿藿别难过了，我请你去吃尚滋味吧。
E: Don't be sad, Huohuo. Let me take you out to the Spices Supreme.

C: …你这不等于什么都没说嘛？
E: ...That really doesn't help us at all.

C: 大爷我可不惯着你们！让你们见识见识罗浮仙舟女子防身术长乐天赛区第一名的实力！
E: I will not tolerate troublemakers! I will show you the strength of the Xianzhou Luofu Exalting Sanctum's women's self defense champion!

C: 你说什么？！气、气死我也！
E: Wh—What did you say? Wh—Why you little... feckless... I'm so mad right now!

C: 不、不好了，青总！
E: P—President Qing, we're in huge trouble!

C: 呜咕，现在打帝垣琼玉决胜负还来得及吗？
E: Ugh, it is too late to decide this with a game of Celestial Jade?

C: （使用道具）
E: (Try using an item)

C: 茶壶，没有茶，没有水，也没有茶水。
E: A teapot. No tea leaves, no water, no tea.

C: 嚯，总算解脱了！竟能把我困在其中…真是了不得的执念。
E: Oh yeah, finally free! Trapping me inside herself like that... what an incredibly powerful obsession.

C: …你是？
E: ...And you are?

C: 让我想想…我们该怎么办……
E: Let me think... what should we do...

C: …我们快去看看！
E: ...Let's go quickly and take a look!

C: 看来姬子姐没有问题——我早就知道。
E: It seems like Himeko is fine, just as I suspected.

C: 不知哪个大东西把我分裂了出来……
E: I don't know what fragmented me...

C: 他是个持明族。呃，你要是问我什么是持明…我就答不上来了，我不擅长科普。但我可以带你去看看他小时候的样子。
E: He's a Vidyadhara. Uhh, as for the question of what a Vidyadhara is... Sorry, I can't answer that. I'm not good at explaining things, but I can show you what he looked like when he was little.

C: 出发！
E: Let's go!

C: 谢谢这位观众老爷的夸奖！简单来说就是抓住一切聊天的机会，使劲聊使劲练！
E: Thank you for the compliment, boss! In a nutshell, just seize every chance you get to talk. Talk and practice as much as you can!

C: 目前丧偶。
E: I'm widowed.

C: 今天也辛苦你了{NICKNAME}！回见！
E: Good work today once again, {NICKNAME}! Goodbye!

C: 提起球棒的时候好酷！
E: So cool with that pose while wielding a bat!

C: 我还打算再感受下热烈的气氛…
E: I was planning to enjoy the bustling ambience a little longer...

C: …我当时可没有考虑这么多，再说了，你现在也是「小桂子Guinevere」。
E: ...I wasn't really thinking that far back then. Besides, you're also "LilGuiGuinevere" right now.

C: 我一个人是做不到的，这都是有你，有捉鬼小队，有粉丝们的共同帮助才能完成的。所以我想再麻烦你一次，把我们的合照发在罗浮杂俎上。
E: I couldn't have done it alone — it was thanks to you, the ghost-hunting squad, and the unity of our fans that this was achieved. So I was thinking of troubling you once more — to post the photograph of all of us on Ghostly Grove.

C: 出发！
E: Let's go!
...*sniff* *sob*

C: 真的要这么得罪粉丝吗？
E: Do you really want to provoke your fanbase?

C: 好。
E: Alright.

C: （「生命烘焙箱」就在附近，此处通风良好，还有现成的桌椅……）
E: (The Lifeform Oven is nearby, there's good ventilation in here, and there's a table with chairs all set up...)

C: 西衍先生把这鸟放在我这里好几天了…这还是我第一次听到它和人说话呢！
E: Mr. Xiyan has had this bird here for days now... but this is the first time I'm hearing it actually talk with a human!

C: 游辞呀～你刚才是不是和{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}对话来着？
E: Youci~ Were you just talking with {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}?

C: 跟你说了多少遍对客人要礼貌，你哪次做到了？
E: How often have I instructed you to display courtesy to the guests!? But have you ever complied?

C: 回去吧，你还没有到达终点。
E: Now, go back. You haven't reached the end yet.

C: 唉，我帮你遮住眼睛。
E: *sigh* Let me cover your eyes.

C: （…说是要听我的想法，自己的心声倒是完全暴露出来了。）
E: (...It said it wanted to hear my thoughts, but in the end, it poured out his own heart.)

C: （拿到了一块拼图碎片，后面或许派得上用场。）
E: (Got a jigsaw piece. It probably will come in handy later.)

C: 算不出来才正常。这种小型的「美梦剧团」，本身就没有很强的思考能力，刚才的问题只是为了测试它是否有攻击性罢了，看来意识还挺清楚，没有被噩梦侵蚀太深。
E: It's natural if you can't handle these questions. Small-sized Sweet Dreams Troupe members don't have good computation abilities. I asked it those questions just to see if it's becoming combative, and luckily, it seems like the nightmare corruption on it's still not too deep.

C: 到你了。让我想想啊……
E: It's your turn now. Let me see...

C: 我能给你调出想要的饮料。在吧台旁边站会。
E: Well, I'll make you the drink you want. Just give me a moment.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！有个惊喜，有个惊喜！嘿…可别感动到满地掉小珍珠了哦。
E: Mwahahaha! We've got a surprise for you! Heh... just don't get all teary-eyed with joy and start sprinkling tears everywhere.

C: 好嘞！拭目以待！究竟是小还是小，小还是小呢……
E: Yeah! I'm on the edge of my seat! Is it small or is it small...

C: 走了！新来的调饮师，我记住你了。嘿嘿嘿…心情好得想唱歌。
E: I'm off! I remember you, newbie drinksmith. Hehehe... I feel so good I want to sing.

C: 怎么，看你满脸不服气的样子，有什么话要说？给你这个机会，说吧。
E: What? What's the matter? Got something to say? Here's your chance. Spit it out.

C: 你的骄傲，无可救药。
E: And your hubris is irreparable, beyond any hope of salvation.

C: 既然如此，人家再悄咪咪地问句…刚才，是有位非常忧郁的客人来过吗？
E: In that case, let me ask you a secret question... Did a melancholy customer just leave?

C: 我的想法是…
E: My idea is...

C: 还是先点单吧。请给我<color=#dbc291ff>一大杯越浓稠越好的饮料，味道稍微刺激点。最重要的——再来点爱，谢谢。</color>
E: Better make an order first. Please give me something in <color=#dbc291ff>a large glass, as thick as you can make it, and tastes a little intense. Most importantly — a little more love, please</color>.

C: 嘻嘻，当然是所有人都会感兴趣的那种秘密啦。
E: Hee-hee, the kind of secret that would pique anyone's interest, of course.

C: 人家不是打算在梦境酒店里逛逛嘛，就在不久前，来酒吧的路上，碰见了个打扮很漂亮的女孩子，看来看去的不知道在找什么。
E: I was wandering around the hotel in the Dreamscape when I spotted a gorgeously dressed lady searching for something.

C: 为了报答您的恩情，我做了件极为大胆的事。
E: To repay your kindness, I did something incredibly daring.

C: 没想到你还怪好的嘛。
E: I didn't realize you were so nice.

C: 我说了这么多，该你了。优秀的调饮师不应该只会聆听，更要能猜出对方心里的想法。
E: Now that I've said so much, it's your turn now. A good drinksmith shouldn't just listen. They should be able to guess what's on their customer's mind.

C: 你是家族的成员。
E: You're a member of The Family.

C: 看啊，奇妙的命运让我们再度相遇了。为了庆祝这来之不易的重逢，请您调杯饮料吧，<color=#dbc291ff>需要梦幻风格，口感很浓厚的类型，别忘了将知更鸟小姐的装饰加上去</color>，谢谢。
E: Look, wondrous destiny has brought us together again. To celebrate this hard-earned reunion, please make me a drink. <color=#dbc291ff>It needs to be dreamy and with a thick texture. Don't forget to add Miss Robin's decoration on top</color>, thank you.

C: 汪！我还有个问题哇，就是…外面那么多好玩的地方，为什么你要来这里做调饮师哇？
E: Woof! I still have a question, woof! Umm... With so many fun places out there, why did you come here to be a drinksmith?

C: 汪！看看你说的话，你自己相信吗？说谎话是不对的哇！
E: Woof! Just listen to yourself. Do you even believe in what you just said? It's no good to lie!

C: 汪！带来幸福的汽水狗狗又来拜访你了！期待吗？开心吗？
E: Woof! The Soda Doggo that brings happiness has returned to visit you! Were you looking forward to seeing me? Are you happy?

C: 我好期待，好开心哇！
E: I was looking forward to this! I'm so happy!

C: …汪？连狗狗的需求都没法完成，你实在是太差劲了哇！
E: ...Woof? You won't even fulfill a dog's requests? You really do suck!

C: 以前它还是派送员的时候，收到的差评就是最多的！嘲讽客户，偷喝汽水，私吞小费…就没干过什么正经事！除了尾巴摇得特欢！
E: When that dog was a courier, it got the highest number of negative reviews! Making fun of customers, stealing soda, and pocketing tips... It's never done what it's supposed to, beyond wagging that tail of its so happily.

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 我<rhythm>是
E: I <rhythm>am

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 汪汪汪  汪
E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 扮演<color=#f29e38ff>蓝色的折纸小鸟</color>，加入到《美梦进行曲》的<color=#f29e38ff>合奏</color>里啾！
E: Play the <color=#f29e38ff>blue Origami Bird</color> and join the <color=#f29e38ff>chorus</color> for Sweet Dream March, tweet!

C: 准备开始正式翻译吧！
E: Prepare to begin the translation proper!

C: 准备开始苏乐达天团的正式表演了！
E: Prepare to begin SoulGlad Idol Group's proper performance!

C: 这是您的报酬，一分不少，如果有多的，就当是补偿您的辛苦费。
E: Here's your payment, not a penny less. And if it's more than the amount we agreed on, consider it as compensation for your hard work.

C: 靠！居然是本小说，欺骗我纯真的感情。
E: Heck! Can't believe it's just a novel! What a letdown!

C: 你看过钟表小子，真不错！但不是这个！
E: Impressive! You've watched the Clockie series! But that's not the password!

C: 对，就放那儿…别乱动，马上就好。
E: Yes, just place it there... Don't move, it'll take just a minute.

C: …不服？不服也得憋着。
E: Don't like it? Well, too bad.

C: …那个黑天鹅还会算卦？那不是仙舟的玩意吗……
E: ...Black Swan knows the art of divination? I thought that was a Xianzhou thing.

C: 咳…你知道我之前尝试过多少次拉她一起打游戏吗？策略的、动作的、休闲的、模拟经营的…但凡能推荐的我都推过了，这家伙却始终兴致缺缺。
E: Uh, do you have any idea how many times I've tried to convince her to game with me? Strategy, action, casual, simulation... I've suggested everything under the sun, but she never shows any interest.

C: 我记得{NICKNAME}你应该很擅长游戏吧？毕竟每次看到你时都是手机不离手…那接下来，我可以和你一起吗？
E: If I recall correctly, {NICKNAME}, you're quite the expert at games, right? After all, I've never seen you without your phone in your hands. Do you mind if I join you?

C: 程序已经装载在旁边的终端上了，测试的事…那就拜托您了！
E: The program has been loaded on the terminal by the side. As for the testing... We're counting on you!

C: 我觉得他不是坏，就是单纯的蠢。小地方来的，还是习武出身，估计文化水平也不太行。
E: I don't think he's bad, just a bit naive. He's from a small town and has a background in martial arts, probably not the most cultured.

C: 初次见面。之后我们应该还会在赛场上重逢吧…还是说，你打算识趣一些，就此退赛？
E: Nice to meet you for the first time. We'll probably meet again on the field... unless you plan to bow out gracefully now.

C: 我现在应该做的，就是用我这双拳头，在擂台上证明自己。
E: Right now, I need to prove myself with my fists in the ring.

C: 我原以为叽米是个可爱的好鸟，结果也是公司的一丘之貉！
E: I used to think Owlbert was a decent character. But it turns out he's just another IPC stooge!

C: 那就对了！你现在最应该做的就是收拾好心情，为那些还在支持你的人赢下更多的比赛。
E: That's right! What you should do now is get your spirits up and win more matches for those who are still supporting you.

C: 这一定是黑幕，没错！是黑幕！是公司的黑幕！观众朋友们，这卢卡一定是和公司勾结起来，用了什么见不得人的手段，才能像这样打败我的！
E: This must be rigged! It's rigged! It's The IPC's rigging! Dear spectators and friends, Luka must have colluded with the IPC and used some sneaky tactics to beat me!

C: 斯蒂芬表示，他在目睹了寂静领主的技术后「大受震撼」，想要做出一套与她相同的面部认知滤网。
E: Stephen expressed that his "mind was blown" after witnessing the Lord of Silence's methods, and wishes to make a facial recognition filter mesh similar to hers.

C: 当宇宙的不稳定指数超过它，未来便会倾向混沌的未知，被迷雾包裹。当不稳定指数低于它，未来则会落入确定的轨迹，再无自由意志。
E: When the universe's unstable index exceeds it, the future will veer towards the chaotic unknown, enveloped in fog. When the unstable index is less than it, the future will fall into an ascertained trajectory, and free will ceases to exist.

C: 那么回到最初的话题…{NICKNAME}，身为星穹列车的无名客，你应当拥有自己的房间。
E: Alright, let's get back on track. Now that you're a Nameless on the Astral Express, {NICKNAME}, it's only right that you have a room of your own.

C: 好，那你就和列车引擎挤挤帕～
E: Okay, you can room with the Express' engine, then!

C: 呼呼，这样就大功告成啦！{NICKNAME}乘客的房间建设，终于迈出了第一步！
E: Phew! We're finally done! {NICKNAME} has finally taken {M#his}{F#her} first step toward completing the renovation of {M#his}{F#her} bedroom!

C: 不是吧？这你都要拖延？
E: Are you serious? You're putting off even something like this?

C: 不愧是杨叔！
E: Just as expected from Mr. Yang!

C: 教教我，丹恒老师！
E: Teach me, Master Dan Heng!

C: 哎哟，我也想翻新一遍自己的房间了。
E: Wow, this makes me feel like revamping my own room.

C: 言归正传。听说您有泡澡的打算，我决定前来送您一份恰当的礼物，一块有着传奇历史的香皂。
E: Ah, but I digress. After hearing about your plans for a good soak, I thought this would make a most suitable gift and wanted you to have it. It's a bar of soap with a storied history.

C: 放在观景车厢。
E: How about placing it in the Parlor Car?

C: 我只是有些不祥的预感，我已经做过太多无用功了……
E: I merely have a sense of foreboding. After all, my previous efforts have all come to naught...

C: 不过…我确实感觉好受了些。眼下还有更重要的事去做，没空为宏大的东西感伤。
E: And yet... I actually feel better now. Seeing as how there are more important things to accomplish, now's not the time to feel sad over grandiose dreams.

C: 没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
E: Just simple sounds of happiness.

C: 呜呜呜呜，呜嗡——（不对，我一定在做梦，一定是昨天吃了不该吃的东西…）
E: Grumphhhhhh, grumph— (This must be a bad dream... Probably ate something funky yesterday.)

C: 敬拜学派和大地兽有关吗？
E: Does Venerationism have anything to do with dromas?

C: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
E: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

C: 呜，呜~嗡~~~（它说…我们两个长得简直一模一样。）
E: Grumphhhh~~~ (It says... we look exactly alike.)

C: 不不不，没有责怪您的意思。我也想体验一下和大地兽一起泡澡是什么感觉，可惜我还在上班。
E: No, no, no, I'm not blaming you. Honestly, I'd love to know what it's like to bathe with a dromas too. Too bad I'm still on shift.

C: 呜嗡…（不会啦！毕竟是庆功仪式嘛。）
E: Grumph... (No way! It's a celebration ceremony, after all.)

C: 我们一样了呢~
E: We're the same now~

C: 手持珍宝的贵客漫不经心，怀揣赝品的愚人反当成宝。如此有历史沉淀的物件，却被溺爱的主人拿来做奇美拉砂盆。
E: How sad that the esteemed guests with genuine treasures treat their gems with nonchalance, while a fool buying counterfeits thinks their hoard is priceless. I can't believe that such a historically valuable item is being used by someone to spoil their pet chimera as a litter box.

C: 这这这！偷人家的宝贝，还想在我这儿换成钱逃之夭夭，没门！我得赶紧联系圣城卫士，不然到时候进去的就是我了。
E: No way! Do you think you can steal a treasure and cash it out here without consequence? I need to call the Holy City Guard right now — before I end up behind bars myself.

C: 我们是二元概念的具象，从不轻易示现。但你不同，那条未被你踏足的小径，太过刺眼……
E: We are the embodiment of duality, rarely revealing ourselves. But you're different. That path you haven't taken yet is far too glaring...

C: 「传说呀，在哀丽秘榭的秘境里，居住着一群小妖精。」
E: "According to legend, within the hidden depths of Aedes Elysiae, live a group of playful little fairies."

C: 好灰的迷迷。
E: ...A really gray Mem.

C: 村长大人，这边！
E: Chief, over here!

C: 要不说正事吧…
E: Let's just cut to the chase...

C: 迷！迷迷！迷迷迷！
E: Mem! Memem, mememem!

C: 好啊，你专程来偷吃的是吧？
E: Oh, I see what's going on. You showed up just to sneak some food, didn't you?

C: 噢？店长希望我和万敌认真切磋一番吗？好啊，我赞成这个提案。
E: Oh? You want me and Mydei to go head-to-head in the kitchen? Fine by me. I'm in.

C: 对面的，时代已经变了迷！万敌主厨掌勺的餐馆里，没有你们的位置！
E: Listen up, opposing team! Times have changed, mem! There's no place for you in a restaurant where Chef Mydei makes the call!

C: 既然这道菜分不出胜负，再追加一道便是了。你不介意多比试几个回合吧？
E: If these dishes are too evenly matched, let's just go another round. You don't mind, do you?

C: 即便算上今天的收获，食材储备也远低于警戒线。按目前客流量的上升速度，我们很快就将面临无菜可用的情况。
E: Even after today's harvest, our food stock is way below the danger line. At this rate, with more and more customers pouring in, we'll be out of ingredients in no time.

C: 想想看，到底该怎么使用呢？
E: I wonder how we should best put them to use...

C: 好好吃！虽然是尝过好多遍的菜品，但在宴会上别有一番风味呢！来，你要不要也尝一口……
E: This is so good! I've had these dishes plenty of times before, but somehow they taste even better at a feast! Come on, have a taste!

C: 呀！这就来！
E: Ah! Be right there!

C: 不必担心，赛飞儿阁下。我们…会编织出新的美梦的。
E: Don't worry, Lady Cipher. We... will weave new dreams together.

C: 是啊。正如金织爵所言，我们途经数不清的年月，各执金线一端，最终交织于此。
E: Yes... just as Dux Goldweaver said, we've each traveled through countless years, grasping a golden thread, and in the end, all our threads are intertwining here.

C: 嘻，我想到了…「木盆里堆满了蔬菜，到处都是笑声。大家围成大大的圈，唱呀跳呀，仿佛这一刻永远不会结束。」
E: Hehe... I've just thought of an ending: "Wooden tubs stacked high with fresh vegetables, laughter all around. Everyone held hands in a big circle, singing and dancing, like this moment would never end."

C: 开始今日的经营。
E: Let's begin today's business.

E: Members of the Express all said they gained a lot from the experience!

E: The Remembrance

E: Inheritance

C: 她为因果沉入花海，他为答案化作飞灰。\n自旅途间遭遇的离别，前往书中将其写下。
E: She sank into a sea of flowers for karma, and he turned to ash as the answer.\nThe farewells experienced during your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 暗酒色的海送葬昨日的夕阳，也必将托起初生的晨光。\n自旅途间领受的天命，前往书中将其写下。
E: The wine-dark sea buries yesterday's sunset, yet shall cradle tomorrow's dawn.\nFrom the destiny bestowed upon this journey, I shall inscribe it within these pages.

C: 喜欢夜晚的你
E: You, Who Enjoy the Night

C: 如其不死神躯，\n花朵永不凋谢，
E: Like his undying body,\nThe flower never wilts.

C: 「虫蛾都会争相吞吃，那男人是疯王的血裔。」
E: "Even insects consume each other, and he's no less than the Mad King's kin."

C: 「陌生的朋友，欢迎来到圣城！\n*我们*——将为你指点迷津。」
E: "Stranger, welcome to the holy city!\nWe will show you the way forward."

C:
于是，我向她发出邀请——

在这篇属于她自己的故事中，
留下一句自己的结尾。
E:
Therefore, I extend her an invitation —

In this story belonging to herself,
She can leave an ending reserved only for her.

C: 「能骗到一次诡计老祖，」\n「这辈子可真值了！」
E: "To have managed to trick the grandmaster of all tricks..."\n"I can die happy now!"

C: 在黎明云崖，\n大司铎的秘密，\n预示那无光的夜将要来临。
E: At Dawncloud,\nThe chaplain's secrets,\nForetold the coming of that endless night.

C:
再一次拨转时针吧。
笔迹倒退、残阳复燃，
在世界的正午，
步入万民欢腾的盛宴。
E:
Turn the clock once more.
The ink rewinds, and the sun rekindles its flame.
At the zenith of the world,
enter a grand feast for all.

C: 可是，它在哪里呢？
E: But, where is it?

C:
巨龙记得，
在纷争降世的霎那，
满溢之杯陡然轻叹，
渎神的凶潮自海底侵展。
E:
The Giant Dragon recalled,
At the moment that Strife was born,
The Chalice of Plenty sighed,
And the heretical tide spread from the seabed.

C: 彼时迎接它的，\n并非那鲜花遍地的再创世……\n而是一柄沉沦已久的黑剑。
E: What greeted them,\nIs not a flower-covered Era Nova...\nBut a long-fallen black sword.

C: 所谓的逐火……\n不过自怜的薪种，\n灾难的温床。
E: This Flame-Chase...\nIs nothing but the kindling of self-pity,\nThe breeding ground for calamity.

C: 「这招你真练出来了吗？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「反正给招式起名不花钱。」 ——三月七
E: "Did you actually master that move?" — {NICKNAME} "Well, naming moves doesn't cost anything." — March 7th

C: 人们高呼她的尊名跪拜，\n却被权杖击地的声音喝止——\n「别把头低过我的王冠。」
E: The people cried out her name and knelt in reverence,\nBut were stopped by the sound of the scepter of authority striking the ground —\n"Do not lower your heads beneath my crown."

C: 人们说， 「所向披靡的君主，终究也难敌宿命。」 她却说， 「与宿命的战争中，何曾有公正可言？」
E: The people said, "Even the sovereign that conquers all before her, is no match for fate." Yet she said, "In a war with fate, has there ever been any justice?"

C: 城中稚龄的王女，\n也曾喜好悠游。
E: And the young princess inside the gates,\nOnce loved to roam without worries.

C: 「此世棋局即将收官，\n但在遥远的未来……」
E: "This world's game is nearing its conclusion,\nBut in the distant future..."

C: 剑士抿嘴轻笑，\n不知何时…那彷徨已然消弭。
E: The swordmaster smiled,\nAnd before she knew it... her hesitation was gone.

C: 「公主，来与我们一同欢唱吧！」\n窗下人们照例盛情邀请。
E: "Princess, come sing with us!"\nThe people outside her window invited her warmly still.

C: 律法的血契赢来海洋的火种，\n海妖也再度失去曼妙的歌喉。
E: When the blood pact of the Law won over the Ocean's Coreflame,\nThe sea siren once again lost her melodious voice.

C:
当她跃出水面的刹那，
便感受到笑声掀起的海浪。
伙伴的残影若隐若现，
岸上的欢歌如她所愿。
E:
The moment she leapt free from the water,
She felt the waves stirred by peals of laughter.
Mirages of her friends shimmered and faded,
And songs of joy rang out from the shore just as she had wished.

C: 「比起增添世界的知识，」\n「我更想为世界减去痛苦。」
E: "Instead of increasing this world's knowledge,"\n"I prefer to reduce its pain."

C: 她咬牙来到命运的终地，\n崩毁的天象画壁只余一角——\n那正巧映留着<color=#9e5738>「阳雷骑士」</color>的英姿。
E: She fought her way to destiny's edge.\nOf the crumbled mural, but one piece endured —\nA corner portraying the <color=#9e5738>Daythunder Knight</color>, dazzling in blaze.

C:
此刻伫立，回首往昔，
前尘旧事，曲折成蜿蜒小径。

又望前途，是通天的长路，
向着升起的烈阳，
他写下<color=#9e5738>「救世」</color>的名。
E:
Now he stands here and looks back,
And his past twists into a winding path.

The long road to the sky stretches ahead.
And towards the blazing white sun,
He pens down <color=#9e5738>Deliverance</color>'s name.

C: 「他看似手无缚鸡之力， 但切忌与之为敌。」 异邦的勇武剑士来犯树庭， 他仅凭一双眼睛，一根教棍， 便能挫其锋芒，破解高超的剑技。
E: "Do not make him your enemy, Even though he may seem frail and weak." When a valiant warrior from afar assaulted the Grove, He shattered their strength with only his eyes and pointing stick, He sent them running, pride cut to the quick.

C:
缝制丧服的时候，
她控制不住颤抖的手指，
常被锋利的针尖戳伤。

因而那洁白无瑕的衣料，
渗出点点如泪的血。
E:
When sewing the death shroud,
She could not control how her fingers shook,
Often pricked by the needle sharp and acute.

Thus that pristine white cloth,
Wept with tears of blood and gloom.

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 花儿在旅途的尽头收梢，又在旅途的起点生根，为昨天带去「爱」的结局。
E: And so, the flower fades at the journey's end, only to take root again at the journey's beginning. It leaves "love" as yesterday's conclusion.

C: 「塞涅俄丝，你只见过那天空的信仰者，而我去过上百座城邦。我曾见过死亡的国土举城自焚，也见到过同样信仰死亡的城邦，在冰雪中恪命苦行。」
E: "Seliose, you've only met those who worship the Sky, but I've been to hundreds of city-states. I've witnessed lands of Death where entire cities voluntarily set themselves aflame, and I've seen city-states that also worship Death practicing austere penance in the ice and snow."

C: 高傲的学者率先发言。「沟通冥地的炼金阵成功在即，遐蝶，你可静待佳音……」
E: The haughty scholar was the first to speak. "The alchemy matrix to reach the underworld is nearly complete, Castorice. You may await the good news..."

C: 金线中蕴藏的光景逐渐静默。少女倚着巨龙，将相片拥在怀中，西风在花海上翻起海浪。
E: The visions woven into the golden thread slowly faded into silence. The girl leaned against the giant dragon, clutching the photo to her chest as the west wind stirred waves across the sea of flowers.

C: 星穹列车的无名客，「不朽」的龙裔。误入死循环的外部变量。\n在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了即将闭合的「大地」路径。\n同为「不朽」行者，与SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>共鸣，接纳火种内约二百一十六万数据生命体，完成了「大地」的试炼。
E: A Nameless from the Astral Express, a Scion of Permanence. An external variable trapped in a recursive loop.\nIn the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop, he took over the nearly sealed path of "Earth."\nAs a fellow pathstrider of Permanence, they resonated with SkoPeo<unbreak>365</unbreak>, embracing approximately <unbreak>2.16</unbreak> million data lifeforms within the Coreflame, completing the trial of "Earth."

C: 包裹翁法罗斯的混沌物质，实为无漏净子德谬歌的「记忆」。\n往昔的涟漪掠过时间，留下诸多空缺。\n当德谬歌选择牺牲自我、回望翁法罗斯时，空缺的「原因」被「结果」补全，因果闭合。
E: The chaotic substance enveloping Amphoreus is, in actuality, the "memory" of the Pure Child of Anāsrava, the Demiurge.\nRipples of past reverie swept through time, leaving numerous gaps.\nWhen the Demiurge chose to sacrifice itself and look back at Amphoreus, the "cause" of the gaps was filled by the "result," and causality was closed.

C:
石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。
于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了赚一笔大钱——他希望借此让自己和石头老板一样富有，和鳄鱼们平起平坐，汽水先生就是这样一瓶贪心的饮料。
但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。

所幸哈努兄弟和钟表小子救出了汽水先生。汽水先生成为了他们的伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。
汽水先生用攒下的积蓄买来了许多武器，将小镇的镇民们都武装起来，在哈努兄弟的带领下屡战屡胜。
E:
Boss Stone sent the townsfolk to dig for stones every day, but he only fed them dirty water from the crocodile pond and weeds from the swamp, making everyone's life miserable.
To make a fortune, Mr. Soda starts to concoct a mysterious drink. He hopes the drink could help him become as rich as Boss Stone and be seen as an equal to the crocodiles. Mr. Soda was one such greedy drink.
Yet, Mr. Soda's action infuriated Boss Stone, who couldn't allow anyone to behave willfully on his turf. Boss Stone unscrupulously captured Mr. Soda using a dirty trick and sent him to prison.

Fortunately, Brother Hanu and Clockie managed to rescue Mr. Soda. Mr. Soda then joined them to rebel against Boss Stone.
Mr. Soda purchased numerous weapons with his savings to arm the townsfolk. Under Brother Hanu's leadership, they were unstoppable.

C: 娃娃花火不会受伤
E: Sparkle Doll Takes No Wounds

C: 体验一般，下次不会再住了。
E: It was an average experience. I probably won't come back.

C: \n• 涅柔娅 - 刻法勒司祭，其使命结于归宿。\n
E: \n• Nereia – A Kephale priest, her mission ended at her resting place.\n

C:
咪发迷，你要多想：给文明以工具，而不是给工具以文明。
有时候你可以换个思路。干脆把脏的家具全丢了，再换些新家具，不就干净了？

信号有点不好，通讯随时都可能中断，先不聊了！
E:
Mifamem, remember this: give tools to civilization, not civilization to tools.
You have to think out of the box sometimes. Toss out all the dirty furniture and get new stuff. That'll clean up everything, right?

The signal's weak here, it might cut off any second now. Let's chat again another time!

C:
刻法勒是全知、全能之泰坦，最初的创生之神，背负天空者。据说，它过去是一名端坐在王座上的君王，而如今是身负黎明机器的巨神——奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影。

刻法勒自天空的雷霆与大地的脊髓的结合中诞生，被众神赋予了创造生命的责任。翁法罗斯最初的人类，便是刻法勒依照自己的形象，在赋予生命后抟造而成。刻法勒深爱这些渺小的存在，因此，它伟岸的身影永远停留在凡界，与人类相伴。黄金裔们认为，刻法勒亦是救世主和英雄的象征，它是翁法罗斯所有英雄的父亲，也是所有救世主最终会成为的样子。

据说，刻法勒舍弃了统御全世的王座，只为令奥赫玛留下一丝光明。圣城中流传着一种浪漫的传说：在危难之际，刻法勒会重新睁开双眼，带领人们战胜黑潮，再度开创天地。
E:
Kephale is the omniscient, omnipotent god of original creation that holds up the skies. It is said that they were once a monarch that sat atop the throne, but now they are the god that bears the Dawn Device. Everyone in Okhema is able to see their great form.

Kephale was born from the combination of lightning bolts from the skies striking the spine of the earth. They were then given the duty of the creation of life. The first humans of Amphoreus were created in Kephale's own image and given life. Kephale loved these tiny beings so deeply that their majestic figure would always remain in the mortal world to accompany them. Chrysos Heirs believe that Kephale is the symbol of deliverers and heroes. They are the father of all heroes and the form that all deliverers will eventually take.

It is said that Kephale abandoned their throne ruling over all worlds just to become a ray of light for the people of Okhema. There is a romantic legend that circulates throughout the holy city: When the world is in crisis, Kephale will once again open their eyes and lead the people to victory against the black tide to create the heavens and earth once more.

E: Data Base Clean Up

C: 按完闹铃后小睡片刻，没想到一睁眼晨练已经结束了。{NICKNAME}啊{NICKNAME}，明天可不能这样了。
E: After hitting the snooze button and dozing off for a bit, you wake up to find the morning workout is already over. {NICKNAME}, oh {NICKNAME}, you can't let this happen again tomorrow.

E: Leftover Takeout

C: 面部朝上入梦。请勿尝试以卧姿、跪姿或其它非常规动作入梦，避免溺水风险。
E: Please enter the dream lying on your back. Please do not attempt to enter the dream while facing down, kneeling, or other positions. This will minimize the risk of drowning.

E: Love-hate relationship. Hard to describe

E: That woman with a sword

C: ——这里的敌人都注意到了你，纷纷现身…或许古代炸弹可以帮助你摆脱困境。

C: ——小心，埋伏的敌人将会发动突袭，削减你的耐力值。
E: — Careful, hidden enemies here will drain your Stamina by launching Surprise Attacks against you.

C: ——远处的扑满发现了你，它似乎带着古代补给物资，正准备逃跑…
E: — The Trotter has noticed you from afar and prepares to escape, seemingly carrying supplies...

C: ——遗迹中出现了大量的扑满，快去捕获它们吧！
E: — A huge number of Trotters appear in the ruins. Quick, capture them!

C: ——这里的敌人都注意到了你，纷纷现身…或许古代炸弹可以帮助你摆脱困境。
E: — Enemies around here have all noticed you and are showing up in droves... Maybe an Ancient Bomb can help you out.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「突出重围」</color>击败所有敌人后，将激活可传送门。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Siege Breaker</color>: After defeating all enemies, you can activate the teleporter.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「遗物扑满」</color>携带古代遗物的序列扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Relic Trotter</color> A Sequence Trotter carrying an ancient relic appears!

C: 花费金币购买经验<color=#f29e38ff>提升等级</color>，可提高<color=#f29e38ff>团队规模</color>，上阵更多角色！\n等级越高，商店越容易刷新到<color=#f29e38ff>高费用</color>的角色。
E: Spend Gold Coins to buy Experience and <color=#f29e38ff>level up</color>, increasing your <color=#f29e38ff>team size</color> to deploy more characters!\nThe higher your level, the more likely you are to find <color=#f29e38ff>high-cost</color> characters in the Store.

C: 每个节点的备战阶段开始时，商店会自动刷新1次。可在商店中使用金币购买需要的角色。
E: The Store automatically refreshes 1 time at the start of the preparation phase for each Node. You can use Gold Coins to recruit desired Characters from the Store.

C: 可使用2金币进行商店刷新，重置其中的出现的角色。\n也可使用锁定功能，下个节点开始时商店将停止自动刷新。
E: You can use 2 Gold Coins to refresh the Store and reset the Characters appearing within it.\nYou can also use the Lock feature, which will prevent the Store from automatically refreshing at the start of the next Node.

C: 货币战争中，初始具有<unbreak>100</unbreak>点小队生命值。\n在对局结束时，剩余小队生命值决定这场对局的评价。
E: In Currency Wars, you start with <unbreak>100</unbreak> Squad HP.\nAt the end of the match, the remaining squad HP determines the rating for that match.

C: 合理分配金币的使用：\n1. 前期适度刷新商店，优先攒利息和提升等级，在后期可找到费用更高的角色。\n2. 阵容中的非核心角色，不需要追3星，有2星即可，可节省一定金币。
E: Reasonable allocation of Gold Coins:\n1. Moderate Store refreshing in the early game. Prioritize saving interest and increasing your level to find higher-cost characters in the late game.\n2. Non-core characters in the lineup do not need to aim for 3 stars, as 2 stars are sufficient, which saves a certain amount of Gold Coins.

C: 完成相应<color=#f29e38ff>开拓任务、开拓续闻、同行任务</color>后，会向伙伴发出邀请。
E: After completing related <color=#f29e38ff>Trailblaze Missions, Trailblaze Continuances, and Companion Missions</color>, you can send out invitations to your companions.

C: 在特定角度下，多个不完整标识接近拼合时，可再次使用<color=#f29e38ff>相机</color>功能，将完整的光印拓片记录下来。
E: At a certain angle, piece together multiple incomplete markings and use the <color=#f29e38ff>Camera</color> to record the completed optical rubbing.

C: 请<color=#f29e38ff>保持跟踪目标在视线范围内</color>。目标离开画面一定时间后将进入<color=#f29e38ff>跟丢状态</color>，提示器的<color=#f29e38ff>倒计时归零时将判定跟踪失败</color>。请在提示器倒计时归零前找回跟踪目标。
E: Please <color=#f29e38ff>keep the target you're trailing within your line of sight</color>. After your target has left your screen for a set amount of time, you will have <color=#f29e38ff>lost the target</color>, and the mission <color=#f29e38ff>will be considered failed when the Prompter's countdown reaches zero</color>. Please find your trailing target before the Prompter's countdown reaches zero.

C: 机巧经过压力桩后，压力桩将转变为障碍物。
E: After the ingenium passes by a pressure plate, the plate will be turned into an obstacle

C: 触发极限超车、拾取补给道具都会累积能量，能量充满时将进入<color=#f29e38ff>「坚果冲刺」</color>，进入一段长时间的无敌状态
E: Energy can be accumulated by triggering Turbo Dash and picking up supplies. When energy is full, you will enter <color=#f29e38ff>Nutty Blitz</color> and experience a long period of invulnerability.

C: 在《小小哈努行动》的故事中，被石头老板的奇怪装置变小，需要用自己的小小身躯经历一场大冒险，夺回石头老板从小镇夺走的宝藏。
E: In the story of Hanu's Adventure, he was made smaller by Boss Stone's strange device. He then had to experience a grand adventure with his small body and take back the treasure Boss Stone took from the town.

C: 使用左摇杆控制移动，使用右侧按键上升，下降。按下<color=#f29e38ff>退出键</color>可以结束操控。「扎格列斯之手」将会<color=#f29e38ff>留在原地</color>。
E: Use the left joystick to control the movement and the right-side buttons to ascend and descend. Hit the <color=#f29e38ff>Quit button</color> to disengage. The Hand of Zagreus will <color=#f29e38ff>remain at the spot</color>.

C: 世界上存在着其他参与以太战线的玩家，<color=#f29e38ff>前往对决</color>成功后会不断解锁新的对手。
E: There are other Aetherium Wars players in the world. <color=#f29e38ff>Heading into matches</color> and claiming victory will continuously unlock new opponents for you.

C: 以太灵共有机械，人形，异形三种相互克制的属性，合理运用克制关系是胜利的关键
E: Aether Spirits can be sorted into the Mechanical, Humanoid, and Aberrant types that counteract each other. Utilizing their counteracting relationship is the key to victory.

C: 联机乱斗模式中，每场共有<color=#f29e38ff>6名</color>玩家参与对局。玩家每回合将<color=#f29e38ff>从剩余对手中抽取一名</color>进行对战。
E: In Multiplayer Bonanza mode, every match will have <color=#f29e38ff>6</color> participating players. Players will <color=#f29e38ff>draw one from remaining opponents</color> in each turn to battle against.

C: 快速解锁后，可直接挑战记录中的最高3星通关难度，3星通关后，<color=#f29e38ff>视同3星通关全部前置难度，并获得前置难度的全部奖励</color>。
E: After performing quick unlock, you can directly challenge the highest difficulty that you passed with 3-stars. Once you have passed that difficulty with 3-stars, <color=#f29e38ff>all the previous difficulties will be immediately cleared with a 3-star rating, and all rewards from those difficulties will be obtained</color>.

C: 训练会消耗<color=#f29e38ff>心情</color>，心情低下时<color=#f29e38ff>训练效率</color>也会降低，心情可以通过<color=#f29e38ff>游历</color>来恢复。
E: Training consumes <color=#f29e38ff>Mood</color>, and when Mood is low, <color=#f29e38ff>training efficiency</color> will also decrease. Mood can be restored through <color=#f29e38ff>Excursions</color>.

C: 小桶进化至究极金后，动能点上限提升至5点。\n魔法师施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>后，小桶也会获得<color=#f29e38ff>动能点</color>。
E: When minicans reach the Ultra Gold form, increases max Kinetic Points to 5.\nAfter the Magician uses their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color>, minicans will also gain <color=#f29e38ff>Kinetic Points</color>.

C: 银枝的召唤物将<color=#f29e38ff>不断刷新</color>。\n<color=#f29e38ff>消灭召唤物</color>，上演<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: Argenti's summons will be <color=#f29e38ff>constantly refreshed</color>.\n<color=#f29e38ff>Defeating summons</color> will trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> and grant a massive amount of Vibes.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>击破</color>敌方<color=#f29e38ff>首领</color>，上演<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> the enemy <color=#f29e38ff>Boss</color> to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> and gain a massive amount of Vibes.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>造成伤害与击败敌人</color>均可以获得「试炼点数」。\n通关时如有<color=#f29e38ff>剩余轮次</color>可获得额外「试炼点数」。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Dealing damage and defeating enemies</color> will award Trial Points.\nIf there are <color=#f29e38ff>remaining Cycles</color> when the trial is cleared, extra Trial Points will be awarded.

C: 「无尽位面」活动中，全部奇物、祝福、事件均<color=#f29e38ff>不会解锁</color>「模拟宇宙图鉴」。
E: In the Planar Infinity event, all Curios, Blessings, and Occurrences encountered <color=#f29e38ff>will not unlock</color> Simulated Universe Index entries.

C: 「差分宇宙」中，通过激活<color=#f29e38ff>灵感回路</color>可解锁<color=#f29e38ff>命途特性</color>。
E: In Divergent Universe, activate <color=#f29e38ff>Inspiration Circuits</color> to unlock <color=#f29e38ff>Path Traits</color>.

C: 如果「钟表时间」技能槽内有苏乐达能量，则可以按下<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表时间」键</color>持续消耗能量召唤钟表小子客串帮助哈努兄弟减缓敌人的时间，「钟表时间」持续时间内<color=#f29e38ff>再次按下「钟表时间」键</color>，则可以<color=#f29e38ff>结束「钟表时间」</color>节约能量。
E: If you have SoulGlad Energy in your Clock Time ability bar, you can {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} the <color=#f29e38ff>Clock Time button</color> to continuously consume Energy and summon Clockie for a guest appearance to help Brother Hanu slow down the enemies' time. While Clock Time is active, <color=#f29e38ff>{LAYOUT_MOBILE#tapping}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#pressing}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#clicking} the Clock Time button again</color> will <color=#f29e38ff>end Clock Time</color> and conserve Energy.

C: 在拓星模式下，只能进入与星阶相匹配的协议等级，成功通关后可以<color=#f29e38ff>点亮智瞳</color>。若未能成功结算，则会<color=#f29e38ff>熄灭智瞳</color>。
E: In Star-Pioneer Mode, you can only enter the protocol level matching your Astronomical Division. You will <color=#f29e38ff>light Cognoculi</color> after passing stages and will <color=#f29e38ff>extinguish Cognoculi</color> if you do not successfully finalize.

C: 诚实之心，曾相信只要以诚对人他人便会以诚待己。

C: 原本是搭载了谐乐学院教材的「十七分熟」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。舞台上的蕉燥之心酝酿炽焰的蕉响乐，誓要将不听从蕉诲的坏猴生烤为蕉碳。
E: Originally a Beyond Overcooked loaded with the Charmony Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. The banaxious heart on stage brews a banaphony of flames, vowing to barbeque bad banastudents who don't listen to banadvice to charbanas.

C: 我还挺能打的嘛。
E: I told ya I could fight!

C: 瓦尔特似乎担心自己跟不上年轻人的脚步，依我看，他自个儿内心也年轻得很…
E: I think Welt's anxious that he can't keep up with you youngsters, but he sure seems young at heart to me...

C: 放心休息吧，有我和帕姆在，不必担心列车。
E: Relax, Pom-Pom and I are here to take care of the train.

C: 即使是日常训练，多少也会有新的收获。
E: You can learn new things by going back to the basics.

C: 巡逻时，我会尽量不引人注目，既不打扰科员，又能看到他们工作时最投入的神情。
E: I try to be inconspicuous when I'm on patrol. That way, I can avoid disturbing the researchers while they work and observe their utmost concentration.

C: 我也得小心起来。
E: Time to get vigilant.

C: 拿出你的看家本事，我的时间很宝贵。
E: You better be good. My time is precious.

C: 多用点力吧…
E: Try harder...

C: …算了，人要知足。
E: ...Never mind. It's good to appreciate what you have.

C: 昨天做噩梦了…抱，抱歉，我有点没睡醒。
E: I had a nightmare last night... S—Sorry, I'm not fully awake yet.

C: 躁起来！
E: Let's rock!

C: 姐姐，战场不是舞台，切勿大意。
E: Stay alert, sis. This is a different kind of arena.

C: 小伤而已。
E: It'll heal.

C: 克拉拉：克拉拉只要修理的元件就好。
E: Clara: If you find any components... Can I have them?

C: 好家伙……
E: Ooh, ouch...

C: 很好很好，看准机会…
E: Perfect, now's my chance.

C: 实用的技术，不错！
E: Very practical. Nice call!

C: 怎么这么点小事也要找我…抱歉抱歉，突然来了通工作电话，我先走啦！
E: Ugh, why do they have to call me for such a trivial matter... Sorry, something just came up at work, I've got to get going!

C: 注意止损……
E: Better cut our losses...

C: 我是青雀，太卜司的卜者。要找我打牌？行，等我上班时间来好吧？
E: I'm Qingque, a diviner from the Divination Commission. You wanna play Celestial Jade? Okay, come back during my work hours.

C: 我一闲下来，太卜大人就会立刻出现并塞给我一些细碎工作…看来我还得再琢磨琢磨时间管理这门学问……
E: As soon as I have free time, the master diviner immediately appears and gives me mundane jobs to do... It looks like I need to work on time management more...

C: 万事顺意~
E: All the best~

C: 我是「罗浮」云骑将军景元。不必拘谨，「将军」只是一时的身份，你称呼我景元便可。
E: I am Jing Yuan, the general of the Luofu Cloud Knights. There's no need for formality. "General" is a temporary title, and you can simply call me Jing Yuan.

C: 正是像停云小姐这样的接渡使往来周旋，仙舟的贸易才能有如今的繁盛。
E: Xianzhou is capable of such bustling trade because of how Amicassadors such as Tingyun socialize so much with the outsiders.

C: 游云天君的虹车再度启程，诸界连通在即，这对联盟是个好消息。但星轨通畅后，原本困于一隅的妖邪祟物又会如何异动呢？…唉，他日再头疼吧。
E: The Cloudstrider's chromatic echelon has departed once again, and the renewed connection of all worlds is imminent. This is good news for the Alliance... but now that the Star Rail is clear, what action will be taken by the fiends and demons once stranded in that remote corner? ...Alas, another problem for another day.

C: 那些岁月，犹如无可追挽的幻光。
E: Those days were left behind with the passage of time.

C: 已死之人，不知所惧。
E: The dead know no fear.

C: 哎、哎呀，眼睛都看花了……
E: Wowww, look at that...

C: 每每我同景元议事，言辞稍有怠慢，那小家伙便会拿眼睛来瞪我。不过不必用法眼观瞧也知道，他对我动武的可能微乎其微，便由他去了。
E: Whenever I get into a heated discussion with Jing Yuan and allow my tone to betray me, Yanqing starts glaring at me. Still, I don't need the omniscia to know that the odds of that child making a move against me are minimal...

C: 成了！下次再让我试试！
E: It worked! Save the next one for me too!

C: 潜鳞，已现。
E: Awaken, dormant scales.

C: 虽是偃偶之身，功能已然齐备。
E: Though puppet in form, I'm fully functional.

C: 藿藿：居然找到了这个…
E: Huohuo: I didn't expect to find this here...

C: 我的医术虽出自「染指」一脉，但如今已算是自成一派。毕竟传统的曜青食疗术，可没有「九宫格」这样的鼎镬药式。
E: Though my medical expertise is derived from the culinary Ranzhi tradition, it has become a discipline in its own right. After all, the Yaoqing's traditional culinary medicine didn't make use of tools such as the "nine-squared grid."

C: 就你了。
E: This one, then.

C: 红罗复斗帐，四角垂香囊。
E: Under a red silken canopy, fragrant spices swing from each corner.

C: 时机，转瞬即逝。
E: The moment of opportunity comes.

C: 游走在危险边缘的感觉，很令人着迷吧？
E: Teetering on the precipice of danger is quite enchanting, wouldn't you agree?

C: 第一，戴上头套，隔绝五感，我可以不受干扰地进行思考；第二，我见不得蠢材，当然，他们也不想见我。
E: First, with the headpiece on, isolated from my five senses, I can think without interference. And second, I don't have to set eyes on stupid people. Of course, they don't want to see me either.

C: 坚持练习才能保证最佳状态。
E: Only consistent practice can ensure optimum performance.

C: 乐曲之外的准备也不能懈怠。
E: Don't slack off even if it's not music.

C: 要随时保持整洁！
E: Gotta keep things neat and tidy!

C: 要、要有礼貌……
E: P—Please be polite...

C: 来吧，我们的配合绝无失手的可能。
E: Come, our partnership has no chance of failure.

C: 财富是换取幸福的妙方，将财富交给渴望幸福的人，便是物尽其用。这样说来，我的工作也算是为人们带来福祉，任何人都可以得到这份恩惠…只需要付出等量的代价。
E: Wealth is the recipe to happiness. Giving it to those who desire happiness is making the best use of it. In this way, my job also brings people happiness. Anyone can receive this blessing... They only have to pay an equivalent price.

C: 论逻辑和手腕，他胜我一筹，论才能和成就，他逊我三分。论审美和衣品，我俩各有所长。总的来说，我们不相上下。
E: He's better than me in logic and finesse. I'm better than him in talent and achievements. We stand toe-to-toe in taste and dress. Therefore, in conclusion, we're equals.

C: 别稀罕了，我有更好的。
E: This thing? What I've got is leagues beyond.

C: 哀地里亚的死亡侍者…她注定要接过塞纳托斯的火种。希望黑潮的尽头，温暖西风的彼岸，也是一片花海。
E: The Death Servant of Aidonia... she is destined to carry the Coreflame of Thanatos. I hope that at the end of the black tide, on the other side of the warm west wind, is also a sea of flowers.

C: 无妨。你不必为「死亡」担心。
E: It's fine. There's no need to worry about Death.

C: 累人啊。
E: So tiring.

C: 我见过他沉思和记录的样子，但一靠近便被察觉了，真是个警惕的人呐…莫非，他也曾四处流浪？
E: I've seen him deep in thought, writing things down, but he noticed me as soon as I got close. He's pretty vigilant... Maybe he was also a wanderer once upon a time?

C: 赐予你所求。
E: I grant you this, as you wish.

C: 人的一生或许会有许多个名字，无论「长夜月」，或「三月七」，愿属于她的颜色，不会随着岁月的流逝而改变。
E: A person may have many names over their lifetime. Whether hers is "Evernight" or "March 7th," I hope her colors never fade with the passage of time.

C: 白厄阁下对待所有的同伴都温柔友善，但他望向大家的笑意中总有一丝痛苦…他曾经失去的事物，一定很沉重吧？
E: Lord Phainon is kind and friendly to all his companions, but there's always a sliver of pain in his smile... He must have lost something very dear to him.

C: 我猜，昔涟一定也很喜欢亮晶晶的事物…因为她总是那么喜欢望着天上的星星，你说是吗，小伊卡？嗯！她一定也很喜欢软乎乎的你~
E: I'm guessing that Cyrene must also really like sparkly things... because she's always gazing up at the stars in the sky. Don't you think so too, Little Ica? Yep! She must also like you, with how soft you are~

C: 小猫鱼，既然跃入了浪中，就别被吓跑呀。
E: If you've already leapt into the waves, then don't run away in fear again, little kitten fish.

C: 乱世之中，许多人因她们的孩童之貌对预言置若罔闻。可娇小的身躯，也能容纳莫大的智慧…此乃放之四海而皆准的真理。
E: In chaotic times, many dismissed their prophecies, fooled by their childish looks... But wisdom knows no size, a truth that holds across all the seas.

C: 金织爵，愿你的战衣为我们带来荣耀。
E: May your battle raiment bring us glory, Dux Goldweaver.

C: 没能…保护好……
E: Couldn't... protect...

C: 小心了！
E: Incoming!

C: 开始第二乐章吧。
E: Let's start the second movement.

C: 拥有一件阿格莱雅的定制，是所有爱美之人的梦想，我也不例外！带着盛妆出席浪漫的宴会…悄悄地，梦已经实现啦。
E: Having a bespoke outfit made by Aglaea is the dream of everyone who wants to be beautiful, and that includes me! Attending a romantic banquet while dressed to the nines... Before I knew it, that dream had come true.

C: 如果我也变成一千个，就能和缇宝老师一一配对啦。
E: If there were a thousand of me, maybe then I'd be enough to match Tribbie.

C: 风堇，感谢你洒下的色彩。
E: Thank you for the colors you've scattered across the world, Hyacine.

C: 枪尖已经点燃。
E: Lance ablaze.

C: 节奏乱了？
E: Did the rhythm get messed up?

C: 还是按过去的方式来？见一个打一个，对吧？
E: Same as always? Beat them down as they come, right?

C: 期待您这一次表演。
E: I look forward to your performance this time.

C: 施放技能
E: Cast

C: 在与「狮震八方」任意难度的战斗中，我方目标累计消灭#1个【后排目标】
E: In any difficulty against Earthshaker Leo, ally targets defeat "Back Row Target" #1 times

C: 哪怕一切为时已晚，我们还是能去唱，自己能唱的歌
E: Even if it's too late, we still have the choice to sing whatever we can

C: 使敌方<color=#f29e38ff>未被击破</color>也能够<color=#f29e38ff>受到超击破</color>伤害
E: Deals <color=#f29e38ff>Super Break</color> DMG to enemies even when they are <color=#f29e38ff>not Weakness Broken</color>

C: 敌方首领触发复活次数少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关
E: Clear the stage with the enemy boss triggering revive fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战，且我方全体角色在战斗过程中【负载生命值】均不超过<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Complete the challenge on Nightmare difficulty without any character's "HP Overload" exceeding <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> during combat.

C: 所以……
E: So...

压力怪
E: Pressure Monster

C: 商店中出现火种，可用于<color=#f29e38ff>升级专属奇美拉！</color>
E: The store will feature Coreflames, used to <color=#f29e38ff>level up exclusive chimeras!</color>

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的努努斯会召唤大地兽。每回合开始时：大地兽使紫色稀有度及以上的我方奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Nanus in the team will summon a dromas. At the start of each turn: The dromas causes all ally chimeras with purple rarity and above have their <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increased by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 能请更多假了吗？
E: Can I get more days off?

E: Can we be friends?

C: 与我并肩作战吧！
E: Fight by my side!

E: Show

E: Item locked

C: 流萤：揭晓梦主的阴谋
E: Firefly: The Dreammaster's Plot Revealed

C: 焚身
E: Immolation

C: 暴威
E: Oppression

C: 翁法罗斯
E: Amphoreus

C: 曾经是由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，能承载泰坦灵魂的强大造物，如今却堕落成只知道杀戮的机器。
E: Once a Titankin sculpted from "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. Today, they have degraded into nothing more than machines that know only slaughter.

C: 传说中的多洛斯强盗双子，武艺超群，配合无间。双拳总难敌四手，令无数英雄饮恨。
E: The legendary Dolos Bandit Twins, unmatched in combat prowess and flawless teamwork. Even the mightiest heroes fell before their four fists. After all, two fists rarely triumph against four.

C: 对我方和敌方全体目标施加<u>【生命计数】</u>状态。
E: Applies <u>"HP Count"</u> to all friendly and non-friendly targets.

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量火属性伤害，同时大概率使击中目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Fire DMG with a high chance to Burn the attacked targets.

C: 追逐光芒
E: Chasing Illumination

C: 浑流奔涌
E: Torrential Surge

C: 摆袖醉意袭人
E: Intoxicating Corruption

C: 在列车组众人描述的旅途往事中，<color=#f29e38ff>大丽花</color>与你们同行「开拓」至今。姬子请大丽花为你诊断一下，是不是你的「记忆」出了问题。
E: According to the stories shared by the Express Crew, <color=#f29e38ff>The Dahlia</color> had been trailblazing alongside you all this time. Himeko asked The Dahlia to examine you, to see if there might be something wrong with your memories.

C: 花火现出真身。知更鸟尝试动用「同谐」力量将其抓捕，却力不从心。花火向知更鸟递出面具，称她为<color=#f29e38ff>「秩序」的双子</color>，并将其杀害。
E: Sparkle revealed her true form. Robin attempted to capture her using the power of Harmony, but failed. Sparkle handed Robin a mask, calling her the <color=#f29e38ff>twin of Order</color>, before killing her.

C: 完成蚀心影魔「简单」难度挑战
E: Complete the Corrupting Shadowfiend challenge in Easy mode

C: 奇美拉博士
E: Dr. Chimera

C: 一套可以动态追踪怪物的藏宝图。在米诺陶星的迷宫猎场中，猎杀牛头怪曾是个相当火爆的活动。但随着牛头怪因环境恶化而濒临灭绝，该活动也在两个琥珀纪前被迫终止。不过，博识学会的保育专员已经为现存的每只牛头怪都植入了追踪芯片，并制定了相当可靠的种群恢复方案。或许在不远的将来，人们又可以在迷宫里说出那句猎人的经典台词：「天呐，有牛！」
E: A set of treasure maps that dynamically track monsters. In the labyrinthine hunting grounds of Planet Minotaur, hunting Minotaurs was once an incredibly popular activity. However, as Minotaurs faced extinction due to environmental degradation, the activity was forcibly suspended two Amber Eras ago. Nevertheless, conservation specialists from the Intelligentsia Guild have implanted tracking chips in every surviving Minotaur and developed a rather reliable population recovery plan. Perhaps in the near future, people will once again be able to shout that classic hunter line in the maze: "Holy cow, there's a bull!"

C: 火漆商人（其一）
E: Sealing Wax Merchant (I)

C: ●初始获得方程
E: ● Initial Equations

C: 【蝶魄】状态下受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: While in the "Butterfly Soul" state, increases DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 天敌
E: Nemesis

C: 死灭本能
E: Mortal Instinct

C: 聚气化神
E: Unto Apotheosis

C: 去为所有人夺回「开拓」的权利，人们终将在那里找到答案。
E: Reclaim the right to Trailblaze for everyone. That's where people will ultimately find their answers.

C: 揭开此地的秘密
E: Uncover the secrets of this place

C: 嗯，如果你也参与了翁法罗斯之行，许多事会变得简单。
E: Indeed. Had you joined the Amphorean expedition, it would've made a lot of things easier.

C: 我雇了个帮手，提前混入匹诺康尼打探消息。刚才，她传回了情报——
E: I hired a helper to slip into Penacony ahead of time to snoop around. She just sent me some intel...

C: 没换地方，刚才你一直都待在这儿，嘴里说着怪话。
E: You haven't gone anywhere. You've been here the whole time, saying weird stuff.

C: 只要能好受些，都由你——动作利落点就行。
E: If it makes you feel better, I'll leave it to you. Just be quick about it.

C: 呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
E: Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.

C: 没有可是。听着，知更鸟——切勿和梦中的「死亡」扯上关系。
E: No buts. Listen, Robin. Never get involved with "Death" in dreams.

C: 你不知道么？棕色头发、灰马甲——这位就是家族派来看护谐乐大典的治安官啊。
E: Don't you know him? Look at his brown hair and gray vest. He's the officer sent here by The Family to maintain order at the Charmony Festival.

C: 放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！
E: That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!

C: 对了，毕竟是「谐乐大典」——用人们的话说，你会为「同谐」献唱。
E: Right, it is the Charmony Festival after all. As people say, you'll be performing for the Harmony.

C: 您肯定不记得我了。不，这么说太失礼，我还没资格……
E: You probably don't remember me. No, that's too rude of me to say, I'm not worthy...

C: 不必劳烦了。
E: Don't bother.

C: 在此之前，我还有一个问题。我们也算相处了一段时间，此时此刻，你对我的感觉怎么样？
E: Before we continue, I have one more question. We've spent some time together, so at this moment, how do you feel about me?

C: 每次回忆，你都可能篡改它的面目。借此，他们强调着光锥的必要性。多么可悲啊，从未明白过，越是永恒的事物，越会引发毁灭的欲望。
E: Each time you recall a memory, you risk distorting its true face. That's how they justify the necessity of Light Cones. How tragic. They never understood the truth: The more eternal a thing, the more it stirs the desire to destroy it.

C: 绝对不行，得把她和{NICKNAME}分开。
E: Absolutely not. We need to keep her away from {NICKNAME}.

C: 正因生命敢于沉睡，他们才能醒来。
E: It is precisely because life dares to slumber that they can awaken.

C: 我想，必要的时候……
E: I suppose, if it comes to that...

C: 你更愿意，享受我的「双重标准」？
E: ...you would prefer to indulge in my "double standards?"

C: 知更鸟小姐？
E: Miss Robin?

C: 为了找到原因，我们进行了一些调查。在原始梦境，我们接触到了一桩被他掩埋起来的罪行。
E: To find out why, we conducted some investigations. In the Primordial Dreamscape, we uncovered a crime that he had buried away.

C: 冷静些吧，孩子，挣扎徒增苦痛。
E: Easy, child. Your struggle only adds to the pain.

C: 当真是好手段。流萤女士…若你愿意听听我的建议，不妨回现实一趟吧。仔细问问那位银狼女士，谁才是你真正的同伴。
E: Quite the clever move there. Miss Firefly... if you're willing to take my advice, why not make a trip back to reality? Ask that Silver Wolf lady carefully who your true companions really are.

C: 不必故作姿态了。就算你行事一向不顾代价，也没办法独自对付我。
E: Cut the act. Even with your usual reckless methods, you can't handle me alone.

C: 第二条律令，是他分予我这个合作者的力量。同时，也作为禁制，确保我不会轻举妄动。
E: The Second Law is the power he bestowed upon me as his collaborator. At the same time, it serves as a constraint to ensure I won't act recklessly.

C: 不用理会，是个迷因吧，怎么跑这儿来了？
E: Ignore that. Must be some meme. How did it end up here?

C: 那为什么直到现在，我们才第一次交流线索？
E: Then why is this the first time we're comparing notes?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>她指向了一个噩梦，「梦主」的所有阴谋，都会在那里实行。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She pointed to a nightmare, in which all the Dreammaster's schemes would be carried out.</color>

C: 至少现在…我能够理解这种心情。
E: At least now... I can understand those feelings.

C: 这是什么地方？
E: What is this place?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「{RUBY_B#希佩}同谐{RUBY_E#}之癌」，星核。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The {RUBY_B#Xipe's}Harmonic{RUBY_E#} Cancer, the Stellaron.</color>

C: 即便只是赝作，也非得由一位令使出手不可。
E: Even if it is just a counterfeit god, we'll need an Emanator to step in.

C: 不能等其他人醒来吗？
E: Can't we wait for the others to wake up?

C: 原来如此…看来我们能够苏醒，当中也有知更鸟小姐的帮助。可是…人性的弱点绝非一朝一夕能够克服，仅凭这些努力，真的能让所有人弃暗投明么？
E: I see... So we were able to wake up thanks to Miss Robin's help. But... The flaws rooted in human nature can't be eradicated overnight. Do you believe that these efforts alone are enough to convince everyone to choose the right path?

C: 诚然如此，黑天鹅小姐。所以，计划中最重要的一环不是让所有人弃暗投明……
E: I agree with you, Black Swan. That's why the most critical aspect of this plan is not to convince everyone to choose the right path...

C: 另一个，则是星期日的错误，而且绝对致命——他不该收缴「基石」，而应该一开始就把我赶出去。
E: The other mistake was Sunday's, and it was a fatal one. He should never have confiscated my Cornerstone. He should have kicked me out right from the start.

C: 你可以再稍作准备。出发之前，{NICKNAME}，可以再来找我单独谈谈吗？还有件事，我有义务向你说明。
E: Take your time to prepare. Before you head out, may I have a moment alone with you, {NICKNAME}? There's one more thing I need to explain to you.

C: 哥哥，你还是把「秩序」的美梦…带给了我们的乐园？
E: My brother... Did you still bring the Order's sweet dream into our paradise?

C: …还好，只是回忆起了一些事。
E: ...I'm okay. I just remembered something, that's all.

C: 我们会一起醒来。
E: We'll wake up together.

C: 然后拼命让它们不被夺走…
E: Then fight tooth and nail to keep it from being taken away...

C: 愿你能引领人们，{RUBY_B#开拓}归还{RUBY_E#}清醒的{RUBY_B#明天}世界{RUBY_E#}。
E: May you guide people {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}back{RUBY_E#} to the waking {RUBY_B#tomorrow}world{RUBY_E#}.

C: 各位，跟我来吧。
E: Alright, please come with me.

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: …焚烧？
E: ...Burnt?

C: 就算一个人的愿望，是希望所有人都能幸福，那也是一个自私的愿望。
E: Even if someone wishes for everyone's happiness, that's still a selfish wish.

C: 你又一次抵达了那座城邦废墟。循着熟悉的小径，你回到了躲雨的岩洞。老者站在洞口迎接你，他看起来精神依旧，你的脸上却满是风霜。
E: Once again, you arrive at the ruins of the city-state. Following the familiar path, you return to the cave where you once took shelter from the rain. The old man stands at the entrance to welcome you. He still looks spirited, while your face bears the marks of wind and frost.

C: 「抱歉，我来迟了。从今往后，生与死将不再分离。」她抬起手，那股幽香指引你向前。你终于落入了甜蜜的死亡。
E: "Sorry I'm late. From now on, life and death shall never part." She raises her hand, and that ethereal fragrance guides you forward. At last, you fall into sweet death.

C: 古旧的轮椅，在道路的尽头像一座墓碑矗立。
E: An old wheelchair stands like a tombstone at the end of the road.

C: 一面碎镜，停留在了破裂的一刻。对碎镜的钟爱，好像是忆者的出厂设置。
E: A shattered mirror, frozen at the moment of breaking. The love for broken mirrors seems to be the default factory setting for Memokeepers.

C: 啊，不许拆穿！小灰没有幽默感，这种时候应该配合*我们*讲故事才对。
E: Ah, don't call us out like that! Little Gray has no sense of humor! At times like this, you should play along with us in telling the story!

C: 【后排目标】位于战场阵型后方，无法被<color=#f29e38ff>【单攻】</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>【扩散】</color>类型的技能选中。<color=#f29e38ff>【群攻】【弹射】【追加攻击】</color>类型的技能可攻击到敌方后排目标。
E: "Back Row Target" is located in the back of the formation on the field and cannot be selected by <color=#f29e38ff>"Single Target ATK"</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>"Blast"</color>-type abilities. <color=#f29e38ff>"AoE ATK," "Bounce," and "Follow-Up ATK"</color> abilities can hit enemy Back Row Targets.

C: 玩法教学
E: Tutorial

C: 双战场
E: Dual Battlefield

C: 差分宇宙•气球变变变
E: Divergent Universe: Balloon Bonanza

C: 戮力双雄
E: Synergy Duo

C: 攻击气球以改变气球颜色，将场上所有气球转换为相同颜色后即可完成一轮挑战。在限定时间内完成轮次越多，奖励越丰厚。
E: Attack balloons to change their color. Complete a Challenge Cycle by changing all balloons on the field to the same color. The more Cycles you complete within the time limit, the greater the rewards.

C: 关于流萤
E: About Firefly

C: 将我，铭心蚀骨吧。
E: Etch me into your bones!
